chapters.title: Chapter 384 - Family Of Four, Shi Sui Is The Most Dog-Like (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 384 - Family Of Four, Shi Sui Is The Most Dog-Like (4)

Chapter 384: Family of Four, Shi Sui Is the Most Dog-Like (4)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The livestream was silent for a few seconds, and the pop-up comments immediately appeared on the screen:

—— [Picking up an adult single-handedly??]

1

—— [Ahhh, I’m wrong, Sister, are you a heart sniper?]

—— [Sorry, I defected and had previously shipped the Untimely Couple. From now on, I’m solely a fan of Xiang Yi!!!]

…

Xin You was scared out of his wits and, in a moment of panic, he thought of seeking help from Old Mrs. Xiang, who seemed to be the nicest.

1

“Grandma Xiang! Take your granddaughter in hand! She’s not behaving like a girl at all!”

3

Old Mrs. Xiang blinked and asked, “Old man, did you see something?”

Xiang Yin didn’t blush or pant at all. “I’m old, and my eyesight is getting worse, I didn’t see anything at all.”

2

Shi Sui even applauded. “Wow, Xiang Yi is so impressive~”

Zhong Yi did not say anything either as she merely covered Jiangjiang’s eyes calmly.

Xin You: ??????

‘What’s up with this family?!’

Xiang Yi carried him out a few meters expressionlessly before tossing him out and slamming the small wooden door leading from the garden to the manor shut.

“Don’t bother me again, or else you’ll have to bear the consequences.”

Xiang Yi had always been a very good-tempered person, but that didn’t mean that she didn’t have a temper.

Xin You was scared soulless, and he quickly stumbled out the door.

The photographer old Zhang also evilly gave him a close-up shot and captured his wretched back…

The Spicy Rabbits felt incredibly relieved. This is the right way to treat scums!

1

‘Reasoning is for humans. Scums are not considered human, so there’s no need to reason with them!!’

…

Xiang Yi took a deep breath, calmed herself down, and carried Little Xiji back to the living room.

Xiao Naofu was light on its feet as it picked Little Xiji’s kennel up in its mouth one step ahead of her and carried it into its luxurious cat villa.

1

“Meow meow meow!!!”

—— [Hmph, stinky dog, I’m not being nice to you, it’s just… it’s just that the villa is too big! I’m just sharing it with you!]

Xiang Yi said with a warm gaze, “Xiao Naofu, you’ve grown up.”

1

Xiao Naofu turned its face to the side, feeling a little embarrassed.

After placing Little Xiji back inside its kennel, Xiang Yi raised her hand and stroked it.

Xiao Naofu immediately got jealous again and moved towards Xiang Yi aggrievedly and rubbed itself against her coquettishly.

“Meow~”

—— [No touching the bumpkin! You can only touch me!]

“You…are such a petty little imp,” Xiang Yi said in a helpless and indulgent tone while giving Xiao Naofu a full-body massage.

1

She rubbed the back of its neck and pinched its ears. It soon couldn’t take it anymore and relaxed completely.

It took the initiative to come to Xiang Yi’s side and seemed to be asking for a kiss.

Xiang Yi recalled the way it caught the rat valiantly just now and covered its mouth, feeling extremely touched.

“Ahem, you have to brush your teeth before we can kiss.”

1

Xiao Naofu instantly showed a heartbroken expression.

“Meow meow meow!!!”

[This damned stupid woman, how dare she mind my dirtiness?!]

The netizens in the livestream were dying of laughter.

—— [Xiao Naofu: I put in effort for nothing.]

—— [Shi Sui! Have you noted this down?! Take notes, you have to brush your teeth before you can kiss her!]

1

…

While Xiao Naofu was gazing at Xiang Yi, as if to say, “You’re being heartless and disloyal, you’ve had a change of heart”, Xiang Yi became softhearted again. “How about a kiss on the forehead?”

“Hmph!” It humphed in a puerile tone.

Xiang Yi leaned over, her hair drooped in front of her and she pouted her cherry lips slightly.

However, her kiss didn’t land on Xiao Naofu’s forehead but on the back of a man’s clammy, slender and fair hand.

2

…It was Shi Sui who had placed his hand between her lips and Xiao Naofu.

The netizens were dumbfounded.

—— [A family of four, Shi Sui is the most dog-like!]

chapters.title: Chapter 385 - Lonely Lonely Lonely
chapters.body:
Chapter 385 - Lonely Lonely Lonely

Chapter 385: Lonely Lonely Lonely

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

—— [He kissed her hand! That’s as good as kissing!!]

2

—— [Hey, to that person who posted that comment, isn’t that a little overboard?]

—— [Hahaha, Xiao Naofu’s expression is hilarious shockedcat.jpg]

1

…

Even Xiang Yi was dumbfounded.

The most calm one was undoubtedly Shi Sui.

1

His long and narrow eyes curved up gleefully, but he said righteously, “Xiang Yi, you’re taking advantage of Xiao Naofu so openly, you’re going to prevent him from getting a girlfriend.”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Xiao Naofu: ….!

The netizens were dumbfounded!

The corners of Li Jianyu’s mouth twitched. ‘Shi Sui, Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji may not be human, but you’re really such a dog!’

Ruan Qing smiled, seemingly having seen through something.

Xiang Yi took several seconds to react. She then retreated slightly and pulled away from the back of his hand.

She asked softly, “What about you?”

Shi Sui chuckled and asked, “Are you despising me now?”

“No, I’m not. Don’t spout nonsense…”

Shi Sui started to sigh. “Actually, I think that man makes sense. No one wants a dirty boy…”

Xiang Yi panicked, and she exclaimed anxiously, “No! Don’t listen to his nonsense! You don’t have to take to heart the words of a detestable person! You’re the little kid that nobody wants!”

She frowned, and Shi Sui teased, “I’m a few years older than you, and you still dare to call me little kid?”

Xiang Yi said, “…Big kid.”

2

Their interaction made countless netizens guffaw.

—— [I’m a singleton and I’m crying tears of envy, I’m so lonely, I’m so lonely, so lonely…]

—— [It always seems like Shi Sui is trying to say, ‘If I lose my chastity, you have to be responsible for me.]

—— [Xiang Yi is such a silly girl. This dog of a man is tricking you! Why are you so sweet and silly in front of him?!]

…

Xiao Naofu was so furious that it started meowing while trying to scratch Shi Sui. However, it was afraid of being taken to the neuter and thus, barked at him incompetently again.

Little Xiji’s eyes were full of tears as it curled its tail and pulled Xiao Naofu toward him.

1

Fortunately, the kennel was large enough and Xiao Naofu was tiny. Hence, it wasn’t too cramped for the both of them.

Xiao Naofu was angry and aggrieved as it tried to scratch at the soft and tender kennel.

Little Xiji licked its fur patiently, but Xiao Naofu stomped its head with its feet twice.

…

Xiang Yi began to realize that there was some ambiguity in their conversation, and the ambiance was getting strange too.

She looked at the clock on the wall and coughed gently. “It’s 8 pm, why don’t we watch some TV?”

Shi Sui always listened to her, and this time it was no exception either. “Sure.”

The netizens watching the livestream: Is there such a way to do things too?

‘I was watching a livestream in a livestream previously, but now I’m watching a variety show in a variety show???’

1

Xiang Yi proceeded to switch on the TV, while her grandparents, Zhong Yi, and Jiangjiang came over one after another.

The opening credits were a cartoon version of Xiang Yi planting flowers and vegetables, fishing, and catching pigs. Jiangjiang kept her eyes fixed onto the screen. “Wow!”

The crew froze in shock for a moment, and he finally realized that Xiang Yi’s thoughtless act was actually good publicity!

They have such a high traffic on the livestream, there’s no point in using it!

Hence, Li Jianyu frantically began to advertise, “Friends and viewers, please stay tuned to Two Under One Roof of Nancheng TV. Those who have a TV, please show your support, those who don’t have a TV, you can download the Nancheng TV app!”

1

As they were speaking, the show began.

Although countless netizens were teasing Li Jianyu, they nevertheless switched on the television or downloaded the app.

The program team of “Eating Well for All Three Meals” made them almost pass out!

chapters.title: Chapter 386 - Breakthrough In Ratings
chapters.body:
Chapter 386 - Breakthrough In Ratings

Chapter 386: Breakthrough In Ratings

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

‘Why didn’t we think of such a simple and effective marketing method?!’

1

The director of Muyao TV sent a voice message and flew into a rage. “Are all of you pigs? You can’t even think of that!!”

1

The others were yelling in agony.

Before Ruan Qing left, she had actually done the job of several people and made great progress.

1

Once she left, it would be no exaggeration to say that the planning department and the publicity department all seemed to be half paralyzed without a leader. Their work efficiency also became extremely low.

1

They only started to regret now.

‘How great would it be if Ruan Qing didn’t leave?’

‘We can let her take over these jobs.’

.

‘We can push the blame to her too.’

3

…

On the other hand…

Xiang Yi began to get uneasy after watching the opening.

She hadn’t seen much of “Two Under One Roof”, but in hindsight, she realized that she didn’t quite have a good sense of the camera in the first episode…

When she was sulking, she looked a little daft.

“How about we switch to another channel?” Xiang Yi said with a serious look. “Let’s watch some news and find out what’s going on in the country.”

1

Old Mrs. Xiang said, “This is so nice to watch! Bunny is on TV, wonderful! I want to share it with my friends!”

Xiang Yin said, “Obey your Grandma.”

Xiang Yi coughed and said, “Okay.”

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Hahaha large public execution site]

—— [Xiang Yi, did you grow up eating cuteness?!]

—— [So her grandmother is the person with the highest status in the family!]

…

The first episode, which was edited by Li Jianyu himself, was titled ‘The Value of Life Is in Knowing Oneself’.

There were two main character relationships, one of which was between Shi Sui and Director Yan. Director Yan was both the person he nurtured and his close friend. When the pair of close friends reunited, there was a heartwarming scene where they chatted and reminisced about the past. Several old songs were also selected to be the soundtracks in the background, which put the audience in a comfortable ambiance and reminded them of their close friends.

The other was between Xiang Yi and Yan Nai, who was hostile to Xiang Yi at first, but Yan Nai soon vividly showed what true joy was! This storyline was a lot more interesting and the scene of Xiang Yi helping the father and son reconcile was very influential.

1

Although they revolved around daily life, the pace of the clip was fast so even after an hour and a half, the show left the audience longing for more.

1

‘This variety show is too enjoyable!’

‘What? The second episode can only be broadcast next week?

Many people pounded their chests, only to learn that this is actually a livestream show, and for a while, there was a bunch of new viewers!

…

In the small director’s room with various equipment and instruments…

Li Jianyu and others refreshed the number of views of the online version.

160 million!

1

The program team was shocked speechless!

‘We’ve shot to fame! That’s the number that only a famous show will reach!’

Soon, Ruan Qing went out to take a call and when she returned, she answered composedly, “The ratings are out.”

“What’s the number?” Li Jianyu was the first to ask, but he grabbed his hair again.” Ahhhhh, don’t say it! I dare not listen!”

Although the numbers of the online version were ideal, he would still feel dejected in case the ratings were too low.

Ruan Qing smiled and said, “It’s indeed an incredible number.”

“I don’t want to listen to it, I don’t want to listen!”

Ruan Qing didn’t bother to pay attention to him and exclaimed to the crowd, “The average rating is 2.18, the highest rating is 2.46!”

All of a sudden, the small room was full of cheers.

…

Meanwhile…

Muyao TV also received the information.

Yesterday’s premiere of “Eating Well for All Three Meals” had the highest rating of 1.8 when the livestream started, but the average rating dropped to about 1.6 later on.

On the other hand, the ratings of “Two Under One Roof” exceeded 2!

That was akin to rubbing them on the ground!

1

…

chapters.title: Chapter 387 - Gain Three Pounds After Every Livestream
chapters.body:
Chapter 387 - Gain Three Pounds After Every Livestream

Besides, ‘Eating Well for All Three Meals’ started off as a hit with extremely high ratings, but it ended in a pathetic state. It reached the highest ratings in the first few minutes of the broadcast, but it gradually began to decline.

The ratings for ‘Two Under One Roof’ gradually increased. The ratings for the few famous scenes like the appearance of the crawfish in the pot, Yan Nai, Xiang Yi playing the string instruments, and a few others had all been boosted to the maximum. Toward the end, there was still an amazingly high number of viewers even during the advertisement segment!

It was simply incredible!

There were more than ten threads on the hot search list on Weibo, gossip forums, and other social media platforms.

Countless people realized that ‘Two Under One Roof’ was not just the top livestream variety show.

It had the potential to become the most popular and hottest variety show of summer!

…

In the small room.

Li Jianyu’s cellphone was flooded with calls from various brands that were desperate to invest.

Fortunately, Ruan Qing was long prepared and diverted her calls to her assistants’ phones so that she could be free for the time being.

Li Jianyu said with a silly smile, “This feeling of being chased by a bunch of rich Daddies that are vying to give me money is wonderful.”

‘This is simply a godsend that’s handed to me on a silver platter!’

Ruan Qing said, “You seem really familiar with using the word ‘Daddy.”

Li Jianyu said self-righteously, “Anyone who gives me money is Daddy!”

Hearing his words, Ruan Qing pulled out a bill from her bag and slapped it onto Li Jianyu’s palm. With a wry smile, she said, “Call me Daddy.”

Li Jianyu felt a little shy and ashamed, which was quite rare of him. “That…that’s really embarrassing.”

“Give it back to me then,” said Ruan Qing, who was about to take the money back.

Li Jianyu immediately exclaimed, “Daddy Ruan! You have to keep to your word!”

Ruan Qing stroked her chin, seemingly deep in thought, and said, “So this is what it feels like. Call me Daddy again.”

‘That’s…indeed quite exhilarating.”

“Must I do so just because you asked me to?” Li Jianyu continued decently, “That’s another price!”

Ruan Qing was speechless.

…

…

The sky gradually darkened as it was getting late. Xiang Yi’s grandparents had regular schedules so they went to bed early.

Jiangjiang kept rubbing her eyes. After Zhong Yi helped Jiangjiang wash up, she hadn’t been able to fall asleep and thus returned to the living room.

The warmth of the light blended with the warm glaze on his handsome face, softening his entire silhouette, which made him seem like a stark contrast to how he looked like back when he was filming the movie.

After Xiang Yi brushed Xiao Naofu’s teeth twice, Xiao Naofu was extremely fatigued and it was tucked in its soft and fluffy bed.

“Goodnight, Xiao Naofu.”

Little Xiji licked the palm of Xiang Yi’s hand, and she rubbed its head tenderly. “Goodnight, Little Xiji.”

Zhong Yi looked at her in shock.

She could understand why Shi Sui treated Xiang Yi differently from others.

The most irresistible thing in this world is tenderness.

“Senior Zhong.” When Xiang Yi saw her, she took the initiative to greet her, “Do you want to have a late night snack?”

The viewers, who originally thought the livestream was going to end, wailed:

—— [Stop! Hold it, stop!]

—— [I gain three pounds after watching each livestream.]

—— [Xiang Yi: Are you hungry? Do you want to eat? Do you want supper?]

—— [Little Vase Spirit, did you see that man by the window? Can’t you just focus on being all lovey dovey with Shi Sui?! All you do is cook! How infuriating!]

…

Zhong Yi was stunned, but she somehow relaxed again. “Do you have wine?”

Shi Sui, who was reading, took a glance at her.

A little alcoholic exclaimed with glistening eyes, “Yes, yes!”

A few minutes later…

Xiang Yi came out of the kitchen happily with some stir-fried shredded squid and a few appetizers.

Shi Sui succeeded in waiting for her at the door, and he glanced at her with a smirk.

chapters.title: Chapter 388 - A Little Interesting
chapters.body:
Chapter 388 - A Little Interesting

“…”

Xiang Yi felt a little diffident when she saw him.

“Xiang Yi, are you going to have drinks with someone?” Shi Sui asked calmly.

She knew he could never drink today because he had to go to work early the following morning.

She tried to guess what he was thinking. “Are you…jealous of us?”

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Xiang Yi, what kind of a dangerous statement is this from you?]

—— [Hahahaha, she’s absolutely the cutest!]

—— [Huh? Beautiful Older Sister X Pretty Younger Sister, that seems interesting]

Shi Sui said with a helpless expression, “You…” He sighed and continued, “Don’t drink too much.”

“Okay, okay.” Xiang Yi carried the tray and took a few steps out. She suddenly thought of something and turned around again. She said, “There is still a lot of wine in the wine cellar, I’ll treat you to a drink next time!”

Shi Sui chuckled and said, “Okay, I’ll remember your words.”

…

Zhong Yi discovered that Xiang Yi had suddenly become enthusiastic. After working in the entertainment industry for so many years, she had developed a keen sense of observation, and it wasn’t difficult for her to guess the reason for Xiang Yi’s change in attitude.

It turned out that she liked to drink.

“Senior, try this shredded shrimp, it’s fragrant yet a little salty. It’s really chewy too…”

Zhong Yi swallowed her saliva after hearing her tempting description but she, nonetheless, remained poised and graceful.

“!”

‘It’s actually so delicious!’

Xiang Yi began to recommend her other dishes. “These are some peanuts wrapped in noodles with egg. It’s sweet and the fragrance of egg is just right. Although it’s not fried, it doesn’t taste greasy at all…”

Zhong Yi gave it a taste.

“!!!”

Hence, two minutes later, Zhong Yi’s image and reservations as an actress were completely gone as she sat cross-legged on the ground with her hair up in a bun. She paired the dishes with wine, taking mouthful after mouthful, looking just like a female warrior from ancient times.

In the livestream:

—— [Xiang Yi, send the link if you’re capable enough!]

—— [Ahhh, I feel that Xiang Yi has the potential to be a mukbang host. Hearing her description of the food is enough to make me feel peckish!]

—— [Sister Zhong Yi, did you forget about your expression management? Where are your qualms as an idol? Where’s your persona as a beauty?]

…

Shi Sui didn’t join them and instead sat quietly by the window to read a book.

The two ladies were a little distant at first, but they soon warmed up to each other.

Zhong Yi raised her glass and said, “May there be world peace and no longer any scumbags!”

Xiang Yi clinked glasses with her and their glasses produced clear and crisp sounds.

Sometimes, the friendship between women is just that simple. As long as they stood on the same side and liked or hated the same thing, they would be sworn sisters!

The livestream was supposed to have ended by now, and Li Jianyu felt that it would be great to end it here; but Ruan Qing signaled for him to continue.

“If it flops…”

“It won’t. My female intuition tells me so.”

Seeing that Li Jianyu was about to continue, Ruan Qing stopped him with one statement of hers, “Who’s the boss? Me or you?”

Li Jianyu was rendered speechless.

The lowly Li Jianyu immediately kept quiet.

…

Zhong Yi and Xiang Yi began to get tipsy, and their topic of conversation gradually began to get more personal.

“I kinda resent him sometimes, if it wasn’t for him, Jiangjiang wouldn’t have existed… I’m not afraid of being criticized, but I don’t want Jiangjiang to be called names… I think she’s just a little kid who isn’t blessed by the world…”

Perhaps, actresses tend to empathize with others very well. Xiang Yi began to tear up as she listened to her story.

She patted Zhong Yi on her back and said, “Every child was brought to this world for happiness.”

Her words touched Zhong Yi whose eyes reddened immediately.

Xiang Yi hesitated for a moment and leaned closer to give Zhong Yi a hug before patting her back gently.

“Same goes to you, Senior.”

chapters.title: Chapter 389 - Let Me Do It If You Can’T
chapters.body:
Chapter 389 - Let Me Do It If You Can’T

It had been too long since she had hugged someone, and Zhong Yi’s body was obviously a little stiff, but Xiang Yi knew when to stop and pulled away after just a few seconds.

She was polite and warm.

Snap

A teardrop rolled down from the corner of Zhong Yi’s eye.

There was no photographer in the living room and only a few fixed cameras.

In the director’s small room.

Seeing this scene, Li Jianyu began to get teary-eyed.

Although there weren’t many pop-up comments in the livestream, it was a very heartwarming scene.

—— [Xiang Yi really is the epitome of tenderness in this world…]

—— [Uwu~ Sister, don’t cry, I can’t hold back whenever you cry]

—— [Xiang Yi’s words really hit the spot. She must have grown up being pampered throughout her childhood. That’s why she can say that every child arrives in this world for happiness!]

…

Zhong Yi teared up silently, looking melancholic yet beautiful.

Xiang Yi didn’t say much to comfort her and merely poured some more wine into her cup.

A few moments later, Zhong Yi got a grip on her emotions.

“I really envy you.” She expressed her feelings truthfully. “You have a family that pampers you, but I don’t. During the most difficult time of my life, I called home and no one comforted me. All they did was ask me for money…”

“At that time, going to the supermarket at night to buy fruits at a discounted price of 1 yuan a bag was considered a luxury to me. I was so hungry that I didn’t even bother washing the fruits, I just gobbled them up while on my way home…” Zhong Yi smiled and continued, “Funny, huh? But even ’til now, I still remember the taste of those fruits.”

When one has suffered too much, even the slightest joy would put them on cloud nine.

That was why she fell head-over-heels in love with Jiangjiang’s father.

“You’re the first person who has ever said that to me,” Zhong Yi said, grinning widely and beautifully. It was as if no amount of dejection could hide her beauty at all. “Can I call you Sister Yi?”

Xiang Yi was a little dizzy from the alcohol, and she nodded with her cheeks in her hands. “Sure.”

Zhong Yi put an arm around her shoulder and said pridefully, “Sister Yi, I’ll protect you from now on!”

The comments on the livestream suddenly increased.

—— [I know Zhong Yi is a cult, I’ll stand for one second! Just one second!]

—— [Now that I think about it, Zhong Yi didn’t have it easy. Not everyone can have the courage to be a single mother]

—— [Xiang Yi looks so soft when she’s tipsy! Shi Sui, stop reading! Can you do it or not? If not, let me take over!!]

…

The livestream came to an abrupt end.

Just as Ruan Qing had expected, the scene of Xiang Yi and Zhong Yi didn’t flop and instead, it touched countless people!

This was particularly baffling to the program team of “Eating Well for All Three Meals”.

They couldn’t understand why the netizens didn’t like the scene of Jiang Yun’er showing her true feelings and yet, they were raving over the scene of Xiang Yi giving the crying Zhong Yi a hug!

The program team of “Eating Well for All Three Meals” were extremely depressed.

In the almost suffocating atmosphere, someone came up with a faint idea and proposed, “I think ‘Two Under One Roof’ must have succeeded due to the excellent script! How about we poach their planner and screenwriter?”

The proposal was surprisingly widely accepted.

Since they couldn’t beat them openly, they could resort to scheming tricks!

…

…

Both women ended up having a drop too much in the end.

Shi Sui asked Ruan Qing to send Zhong Yi back to her room and help take care of Jiang Jiang, while he picked Xiang Yi up in his arms with a straight face.

The gaze in Ruan Qing’s eyes was rather subtle. “Li Jianyu said that you’re much more of a dog than Little Xiji. I thought he was joking, but it turns out to be true.”

Shi Sui raised his brows with joy in his dark eyes.

“Thanks, you flatter me.”

chapters.title: Chapter 390 - Protective Family
chapters.body:
Chapter 390 - Protective Family

Ruan Qing was speechless for a while and she teased, “Aren’t you scared that Xiang Yi’s brother will come home?”

Even she would get intimidated by Xiang Chen’s aura.

Shi Sui smirked and said mysteriously, “He? He should still be busy.”

Ruan Qing was speechless.

…

In a bar in Nancheng.

Although Xin You made a big fool of himself in the livestream of “Two Under One Roof” and was greatly ridiculed by netizens, his purpose was achieved!

Bad publicity is still good publicity.

Now that he had gained fame, the influencers of his company would surround him and suck up to him all the time by feeding him fruits and toasting to him.

Xin You was thick-skinned to begin with. In the blink of an eye, he forgot about the humiliating scene just now and began bragging.

“Xiang Yi looks very average in real life, and she’s really petty too. She’s not presentable at all.”

“A woman should behave like a woman. Look at her, how is she like a woman at all? She’s totally a shrew!”

“Actually, I should have called the police when she got physical with me. I should have gotten her locked up so that she would learn her lesson!”

“…”

He had completely undermined Xiang Yi, and, after rattling on and on for a long time, he discovered that the influencers beside him all seemed extremely sullen.

“What are all of you pulling long faces for?! Get high now!”

In the next second, a cold young man’s voice sounded behind them.

“My sister is a shrew?”

Immediately afterward, a quick and demonic voice sounded.

“Try saying that again.”

Feeling a cold chill down his back, Xin You’s heart palpitated, but he soon heard two voices behind him.

He said in a warm voice, “Do you think Xiang Yi is a pushover?”

Another asked in an icy cold voice, “How do you want to die?”

Xin Xi twisted his neck stiffly and saw the row of tall figures behind him, after which his vision turned dark.

“H…Hello, Xiang Yi’s brothers…” Xin You greeted with a fawning smile. “I’m Xin You! Xiang Yi adores me! Have you guys forgotten how she bawled and rolled around on the ground while clamoring about marrying me?”

He quickly brought up Xiang Yi and used her as a shield. Little did he expect that his plan would backfire as he ended up angering Xiang Yi’s brothers even more!

Xiang Yu grabbed him by his collar and yanked him up. “You’re not worthy to mention her name!”

When Xin You was at the old residence of the Xiang family, he had evil intentions toward his sister! If they hadn’t all been home that day, who knows what would have happened?!

The thought of his sister almost getting… made Xiang Yu fly into a rage. He was so furious that he was about to punch him, but Xiang Qi stopped him.

Xiang Yu exclaimed, “Let go!”

Xiang Qi muttered, “You didn’t even address me as Third Brother, where are your manners?”

Xiang Li pushed his glasses up and said, “Xiang Yu, your competition is coming up, don’t mess up at this juncture.”

Xiang Chen was much more straightforward. “Move aside, you noobie.”

Xiang Yu, who had been belittled, was speechless.

Xin You was on the verge of tears. “Brothers, I know my mistakes now, I really do!”

“Hehe, do you know your mistake now?” Xiang Qi said smilingly. “But, we’re not here to hear your apology…”

Xin You trembled and exclaimed, “I-I have money! I’ll pay for it, okay?!”

Xiang Qi interrupted, “We’re here to mob you! Speak up, what’s the order that you want? 1-2-3-4 or 4-3-2-1? Or do you want a deluxe solo beatdown package?!”

The influencers were so frightened that they had long fled.

The bar was emptied too.

Xin You wanted to cry, but there were no tears. He never expected Xiang Yi’s family to be so protective!

‘I’ve offended the wrong person this time, I’ve been defeated!’

chapters.title: Chapter 391 - Interpersonal Interactions (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 391 - Interpersonal Interactions (1)

Chapter 391: Interpersonal Interactions (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

Half an hour later.

The netizens on Weibo found a new status.

It was a video posted by Xin You!

Everyone had already gotten sick of looking at him but out of habit, they opened the video.

Xin, You said sincerely with some stubbornness, “I hereby apologize to you, Miss Xiang. Everything that happened today is because I was trying to chase clout. It’s all made up…”

‘Huh? Why is Brother apologizing to me?’

.

‘How dare this ugly man apologize!?!’

Xin You had not only apologized in the entire video, he even implicated the media company, claiming that they were instigating him and using Xiang Yi to drive traffic!

1

In an instant, the netizens were enraged!

The tabloid media account soon got a taste of the backlash from treating netizens like fools!

The account was being slammed so hard that they switched off the comments section and received more than 100,000 hateful messages.

In the end, they had no choice but to reveal the person who exposed the news.

1

Qin Wanyan felt that her plan was seamless as she used a private account and had even got someone to change the IP address.

However, she had shared several daily updates on her private account and the netizens with gleaming eyes found out from the reflection of a bracelet and half a side of a face in a pair of sunglasses in a photo, that the private account belonged to her!

1

The overwhelming news flooded her Weibo.

Qin Wanyan panicked and called her manager who then comforted her in annoyance. They hung up simply after that.

1

The second time she called, there was no answer.

Qin Wanyan was horrified. She didn’t dare to look at her phone at all. Whenever she saw the malicious comments, her body would tremble.

She never thought that those people who sent hate to Xiang Yi would come for her!

Soon, Tomato Entertainment released a public statement.

Although Xiang Yi was the owner in name, she didn’t have much time or energy to manage things for the time being. Her uncle, Xiang Feng, had also specially hired a professional manager for her.

Seeing that there were such rumors exposed by a celebrity, he immediately and resolutely decided to terminate his contract with Qin Wanyan!

Apart from having to bear the huge sum of compensation, her reputation in the industry had also been ruined. No big agency was willing to sign her on!

Qin Wanyan, who was at a dead-end, suddenly thought of someone.

‘Maybe she can help me…’

…

In the bar.

After kicking away Xin You, Xiang Chen adjusted his tie and accentuated her perfect figure. His aura was as cold as ice, and he had a strong sense of oppression that couldn’t be ignored.

1

Xiang Li had a warm expression on his face but he was actually more vicious than Xiang Chen. For him, it was a piece of cake to destroy a company.

Xiang Yu said worriedly, “I feel like I’m here to idle around…”

1

Xiang Qi comforted, “Just be contented. Uncle doesn’t even get to come here… Xiang Chen thinks he’s too stupid and that he will drag us down…”

2

Xiang Yu was speechless. ‘Thanks, I was comforted.’

1

He put on the hood of his jacket and his jawline was smooth and suave. Suddenly reminded of something, he asked, “Will Xiang Yi hide under her blanket and cry?”

1

Imagining that scene, the few of them, who loved their younger sister to bits, felt as if they had been slit.

Heartbroken, Xiang Qi said, “Let’s go comfort, Xiang Yi, together! Even if she’s crying, she should be crying on my shoulders!”

1

Xiang Li scoffed. “Are you worthy at all?”

Xiang Chen frowned and strode towards the front.

“Big Brother, you’re cheating!” Xiang Qi hollered furiously.

The three of them quickly caught up with Xiang Chen.

To his surprise, the manor…

chapters.title: Chapter 392 - : Interpersonal Interactions (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 392 - : Interpersonal Interactions (2)

Chapter 392: Interpersonal Interactions (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Little did they know that Xiang Yi had just been carried into her bedroom in the manor at this moment.

Xiang Yi behaved well and didn’t throw any drunken fits. Shi Sui placed her on the bed while rolling the blanket up and wrapping herself in the blanket.

Shi Sui burst into laughter and raised his hand to pinch her face. “You are indeed quite easy to handle.”

“Meow meow meow!” Xiao Naofu woke up from a nap and hurriedly ran in when she saw Shi Sui carrying the silly woman, Xiang Yi, back to the room. It suddenly came to an abrupt halt at Shi Sui’s feet and growled at him ferociously!

Shi Sui looked down and said indifferently, “Go back to your bed.”

Xiao Naofu: Meow! Meow! Meow!

—— [Don’t think I don’t know that you just want to lure me away so you can act all hanky panky with that silly woman!]

It jumped up on the edge of the bed and sat on Xiang Yi’s pillow, as if it was declaring its firm stand of staying there today..

Xiang Yi was jolted awake by the noise and she opened her eyes wearily while Xiao Naofu appeared in front of her. She snuggled into his arms and said habitually, “All of you…”

Xiao Naofu: Oh oh~~

It raised its chin at Shi Sui provocatively.

‘Hmph! See that!?!’

‘I’m the rightful spouse! I’m the silly woman’s favorite tiger!’

Xiao Naofu wagged its tail gently and curled it around her fingers while rubbing its head against Xiao Naofu’s chest. It meowed coquettishly.

Xiang Yi closed her eyes again and coaxed warmly, “Be good…”

Shi Sui squinted dangerously and sneered. “Do you want to be neutered?”

Xiao Naofu was so frightened that it shuddered. However, although its IQ was only equivalent to a child that was a few years old, it had a natural instinct to know who would protect it and who it could be coquettish to!

Xiao Naofu, the soft and tender kitten, was arching its back and propping its but up unskillfully. It then ducked into Xiang Yi’s shirt and revealed half of its head to stick its tongue out at Shi Sui.

—— [Blegh~ Dog, I’m not afraid of you at all!]

Shi Sui’s temples throbbed.

She was drunk so he obviously couldn’t take advantage of her at such a juncture…

Hence, there was really nothing he could do about Xiao Naofu now.

However…

He remained calm and said with a smile, “Xiao Naofu, I realized that Xiang Yi’s claypot is really useful, the meat stewed in it is really soft and tender.”

Its vicious and dark aura were just like that of a villain!

Xiao Naofu: …!

‘Dog, you’re not going to be humane, are you!?!’

Xiang Yi felt a little tickled by the warm and furry thing pressing down on her body, which was a little…heavy too.

She groaned a little and tried to move Xiao Naofu away but her shirt was in the way so she subconsciously tried to tug her shirt…

Shi Sui’s breathing became a little erratic and he pressed her hand down to stop her!

Xiang Yi was a little dizzy when she felt the warmth on the back of her hand. She lost control and reacted very quickly. She then grabbed Shi Sui’s wrist and pulled him..

In the blink of an eye, she pressed Shi Sui beside her and restrained him.

In fact, it was because Shi Sui did not resist, or else the drunken Xiang Yi could not have succeeded so easily.

Xiang Yi’s eyes were full of confusion and seemed to have recognized Shi Sui.

Shi Sui smirked at Xiao Naofu and said, “That’s what acting skills are, do you understand?”

Xiao Naofu: Woof! Woof!

—— [Damn it, you dog!!!!]

Shi Sui was smug only for three seconds. Soon, someone knocked on the bedroom door.

“Are you awake, Xiang Yi?”

…

chapters.title: Chapter 393 - Interpersonal Interactions (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 393 - Interpersonal Interactions (3)

In an instant.

Shi Sui's expression stiffened slightly.

Even Xiao Naofu was so frightened that its tail curled up.

Xiao Naofu and Shi Sui made eye contact and shockingly, they didn't make a single sound.

Fortunately, her brothers, who were outside the door, were all gentlemanly enough not to barge into her room without her permission.

"She should be sleeping, right?" Xiang Qi asked with uncertainty.

Xiang Yu crinkled his nose and sniffled a little. "It seems that she has made supper."

.

Xiang Qi was elated. "I'll go to the kitchen to take a look!"

Xiang Yu followed behind him, afraid that he would sneakily take a few bites of the food.

The two went out of the kitchen, only to discover that there were indeed dishes in the refrigerator!

"!"

Xiang Qi suppressed his voice and exclaimed, "Xiang Yu, keep quiet, let's share the loot!"

With one hand in his pocket, Xiang Yu pressed down the hood of his hoodie with the other hand, he said indifferently, "Big Brother is outside."

"…"

Xiang Qi immediately became cowardly.

If the vicious Xiang Li was outside, he would still dare to take the gamble and risk death; but Xiang Chen was there too…

Xiang Qi said righteously, "Am I the type to steal food behind my brother's back? The most important thing about a family is sharing!"

Xiang Yu wouldn't believe his nonsense.

'Since we're here, let's just eat.'

The four brothers surrounded the small dish that was meant to be paired with wine and sat down. Xiang Li then proceeded to get some wine from the wine cellar.

Xiang Yu was about to compete soon, so he naturally abstained from drinking.

Xiang Qi tugged him and said, "Xiang Yu, pour wine for your brothers!"

Xiang Yu glanced at him.

Xiang Qi barked, "What are you staring at?! Keep staring and I'll beat you up! You're the youngest, of course you should be pouring us wine."

Xiang Yu said with disdain, "Why don't you say such things when Xiang Yi is around?"

He had never seen Xiang Qi bossing Xiang Yi around before and would only ever boss Xiang Yu around just because he was his third brother.

Xiang Qi said self-righteously, "How can you compare to Xiang Yi?"

Xiang Yu was speechless.

'Fine, there's nothing wrong.'

He poured wine for his brothers expressionlessly.

…

In the bedroom.

Xiang Yi stared at Shi Sui for a long time, seemingly having recognized him. She buried her head in his chest and sniffed his shirt.

Shi Sui's body tensed up while a terrifyingly gloomy gaze filled his eyes.

After confirming that it was the familiar scent of laundry detergent, Xiang Yi slept with peace of mind.

"…"

'Does this mean that she doesn't take me for an outsider?'

That realization made Shi Sui feel amused and helpless.

He broke free from Xiang Yi's arms and pinched her cheeks.

Xiao Naofu meowed in protest.

—— [Be a human, you dog-like man!"

Shi Sui sneered. "If I'm inhumane, I would have put you in a pot and stewed you a long time ago."

Xiao Naofu snuggled into Xiang Yi's arms and itsher thin eyelids pounded twitching rapidly when itshe looked at Shi Sui.

'Seriously… it's asking for a beating.'

After a few minutes, the anger in his heart dissipated, and he gently pulled the duvet up for Xiang Yi before walking along the balcony to return to his room.

…

In the living room.

Xiang Chen was still frowning after downing two glasses of wine.

He put down the wine glass and walked toward Shi Sui's room before knocking on the door expressionlessly.

After a few moments, the door was pulled open.

Shi Sui was wearing only a pair of dark blue pants and wiping his body with a towel. "You're back. What's the matter?"

Xiang Chen looked over into the room.

The large bed in the room was neat and clean. Even the thin blankets were stacked neatly.

Xiang Chen felt relieved, and he said with an austere expression, "Rest early."

Afterward, he heard the sounds of stumbling footsteps coming from behind him.

Xiang Chen turned around, only to see that his younger sister had walked out of the room with a soft pillow in her arms. She walked toward Shi Sui's room, seemingly sleepwalking. She accidentally bumped into him and fell into his arms…

chapters.title: Chapter 394 - Interpersonal Interactions (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 394 - Interpersonal Interactions (4)

Xiao Naofu tagged along behind her and meowed continuously.

Shi Sui subconsciously wrapped his arms around her waist.

Xiao Naofu hit the hem of Xiang Chen's trousers. It was frightened out of its wits, and its fur stood on ends!

The temperature of the room seemed to be plunging rapidly.

The gaze in Xiang Chen's eyes was cold as he looked at the drunken Xiang Yi, and then looked at the innocent-looking Shi Sui.

"Explain yourself," Xiang Chen said coldly.

Shi Sui had a good EQ and thus, he said with a straight face, "Xiang Yi has sobered up. Big Brother, remember to remind her to take responsibility."

.

Xiang Chen was confused.

Xiang Qi, who was at the dining table, was already dumbfounded.

'Damn it, there's actually such a way of doing things?!'

'He actually had the guts to be mischievous in front of Xiang Chen!'

Xiang Li pushed down his glasses, and a trace of worry appeared in his eyes.

Reasoning from a logical point of view, it was reasonable that Xiang Yi would walk to Shi Sui's room after getting drunk based on muscle memory because she used to stay in that room.

However, from an emotional point of view, it was clear that Xiang Yi, whom they doted on greatly, had started carrying a torch for her colleague!

An oppressive chilliness emerged from Xiang Chen's body, his eyes bearingwith an icy cold gaze. The danger in them multiplied exponentially.

"You're seeking death," he said menacingly.

He rolled up the snowy white sleeves of his shirt with his bony hand.

Xiang Qi and Xiang Yu, who were far away, immediately chickened out and rushed to hide far away, afraid of getting implicated.

Xiang Li stood up and walked forward slowly.

Xiang Chen sneered, "What? You want to put in a good word for him?"

"Am I that kind?" Xiang Li grinned like a vicious old fox, "You fight him, while I lead Xiang Yi away. I don't want to scare her."

Xiang Qi scolded, "Second Brother, you're so scheming! I bet you're just trying to take advantage of Xiang Yi's drunken stupor and pinch her cheeks!"

Xiang Yu, who was at the side, was tempted to move and he felt an urge to move his fingers.

'It feels great to pinch Xiang Yi's face…'

'But she's all grown up now so I can't just pinch her easily…'

He made an immediate decision and strode over. "Let me do it."

Xiang Qi cursed and inched closer. "Do you guys know how to take care of girls? You're so clumsy, let me do it!"

Shi Sui discovered that Xiang Yi's brothers…had begun arguing. There was an internal strife.

He didn't feel nervous or scared of getting beaten at all. He simply leaned lazily against the door frame like he didn't have any bones at all. With one hand on Xiang Yi's waist, he watched them argue with a smirk on his face.

Xiang Yi was drunk and light-headed. She began to get dizzy and started losing her balance after standing for a long time. Thus, she instinctively leaned against Shi Sui's shoulder.

"Enough!" Xiang Chen hollered, shocking everyone as soon as he did. He felt that they were too noisy.

No one dared to make another sound.

Xiang Chen grabbed Xiang Yi's wrist and wanted to get her back into the room.

To his surprise, Xiang Yi reacted very quickly even though she was drunk.

Smack.

Now that she was drunk, Xiang Yi wasn't afraid of Xiang Chen at all. She simply smacked his palm away.

Xiang Li was dumbfounded.

Xiang Qi was speechless.

Xiang Yu: ???

'Xiang Yi…hit Xiang Chen?!'

Even Xiang Chen, who had always had a cold and aloof expression, couldn't help but smirk.

"Wow, it seems Xiang Yi has her own ideas~" Shi Sui chuckled. He teased in a flirtatious manner, "Xiang Yi, do you want to come into my room?"

Xiang Yi did not hear clearly what he was saying at all and merely assented when she felt that his breath was the most familiar.

Shi Sui's lips curled slightly and asked, "Do you want to sleep on my bed?"

Xiang Yi blinked, looking rather bewildered.

Shi Sui naturally took her pillow and said in an undulated tone of voice, "Sure, I'll place the pillow properly for you~"

chapters.title: Chapter 395 - Go To Sleep, I'Ll Go Get Beaten Up
chapters.body:
Chapter 395 - Go To Sleep, I'Ll Go Get Beaten Up

Xiang Chen and the others watched as Shi Sui took a pillow in one hand and held Xiang Yi in the other, leading the person to the bedside.

He patted the bed and said in a coaxing tone like he was cajoling a child, "Go to bed."

Xiang Yi yawned and obediently plopped herself down on the bed. She then lifted the thin blanket to cover herself.

"Good night, Shi Sui."

Xiang Yi murmured in a warm and mellow voice as she covered her head with the warm blanket.

She felt that he was too noisy.

Shi Sui said with a smile, "Go to sleep, I'll go get beaten up."

.

He had great self-awareness!

…

…

In the underground boxing gym.

Xiang Yu, Xiang Qi, and Xiang Li were panting heavily, their foreheads covered in sweat.

Xiang Li's breathing began to get a little erratic, and he even removed his glasses. He now regretted skipping the gym and training.

Xiang Chen was still exchanging blows with Shi Sui.

"Come again." Sweat flowed down Xiang Chen's chiseled jawline as his breathing was steady and his expression was sullen.

Shi Sui, who was opposite him, was still as poised and composed as ever.

"Brother Shi Sui is quite impressive…" Xiang Yu said softly.

After all, he could still put up a fight against Xiang Chen.

Xiang Qi was so exhausted that he laid on the ground. Hearing his words, he kicked him and said, "Can you stop overestimating the opponent and demoralizing us?"

Xiang Yu said, "Someone here keeps getting beaten up… He almost had to climb up the pillar…"

Xiang Qi asked, "Did you not get beaten up? Trust you to call yourself the god of e-sports, you're just like an elementary school kid!"

The two argued and chattered, while Xiang Li silently sat a little farther away from the two of them.

…

…

On the following day.

In the nanny van, Si Chuanbai looked at the wound on the corner of his artist's eyebrow, and he sighed. He said, "You really got hit, huh?"

Shi Sui was speechless. 'Why is he acting like he's looking forward to seeing me get hit?'

"Fortunately, the wound is small. Let's have Xiao Li to cover it up for you later," Si Chuanbai said as he took a glance at his leg. "How's your leg? Do you need me to rent a wheelchair to push you to the event later?"

Shi Sui was speechless too.

"Are you my manager or my greatest hater?" he asked in a helpless tone.

Si Chuanbai said uprightly, "I'm Miss Xiang Yi's manager, and I'm like her family too. You're just an artist I signed out of convenience."

"…"

The makeup artist couldn't help but laugh out loud.

He was Shi Sui's exclusive makeup artist, and they've been rather close over the years. They spoke without restraint either and said, "If the netizens find out that you ended up getting beaten up by Xiang Yi's brothers, they're definitely going to celebrate with firecrackers."

Shi Sui replied rhetorically, "Is my current persona that of a person that everyone hates?"

"Haha because except for the fans who ship the two of you together, everyone wants Xiang Yi to stay single," the makeup artist teased. "By the way, I heard today's guest is Fu Jiayan who's known to be a flirt. You have to work harder, or else, Xiang Yi's going to be taken away by another man."

…

…

When she woke up and found herself in Shi Sui's room, she was utterly confused.

She was extremely diffident. She tiptoed to the door and opened it in a bid to sneak back to her own room, but she heard a cold voice coming from above her head.

"Are you awake?"

She subconsciously stood upright and greeted him, "Good morning, Big Brother. What do you want to eat? I'll make it for you!"

"Do you know how to please me now?"

Xiang Yi exclaimed seriously, "It's only right to be nice to your brother!"

Xiang Chen's expression was still hostile, but he couldn't help but smile as he accidentally strained his wound. He was in so much pain that he inhaled sharply.

Xiang Yi assented and asked, "Brother, why are you hurt? What did you do yesterday?"

Xiang Chen sneered, "I hit a dog."

Xiang Yi was speechless.

chapters.title: Chapter 396 - Breaking Up The Couple
chapters.body:
Chapter 396 - Breaking Up The Couple

…

Xiang Yin and Old Mrs. Xiang got up early and before they went out. They left a note saying that they went hiking together.

Her brothers made breakfast together. Although it tasted ordinary, Xiang Yi was satisfied.

Zhong Yi completely let herself go, and she didn't put on any makeup at all. Completely barefaced, she drank some beef and radish soup to cure her hangover together with Xiang Yi.

After eating, Zhong Yi got ready to leave with Jiangjiang.

The livestream had already begun and the netizens noticed that Xiang Yi had stuffed Zhong Yi's nanny van with lots of food.

.

There were spicy snacks, strawberries with cream, some other specialties from Little Rabbit Farm, as well as some chili noodles, chili oil, and plum wine that Xiang Yi had made herself.

She had also given Jiangjiang a small gift, which was a fluffy rabbit plush toy.

"This my favorite rabbit, it's for you."

Jiangjiang blinked her large eyes and shook her head. "I can't accept it. Mommy said that this is called snatching away someone else's love!"

Xiang Yi smiled gently and stroked her little head, "But I like you more, Jiangjiang."

Jiangjiang's face was flushed. Hugging the plush rabbit, she thanked Xiang Yi and leaned closer to whisper into Zhong Yi's ear, "Mommy, can we just take Auntie home without the gifts?"

Although her voice was soft, she was wearing a microphone so everyone in the livestream could hear her clearly——

—— [Zhong Yi's pretty even when she's barefaced!]

—— [Wow, I think Xiang Yi really treats Zhong Yi as a friend!]

—— [Omggg, I ship Xiang Yi and Zhong Yi!]

—— [Jiangjiang, you've spoken my mind! Come on, I'll give you a hemp bag!]

…

Zhong Yi grinned and changed the subject. "Aunt Xiang Yi's birthday is coming soon. We can give her a gift when the time comes, okay?"

Jiangjiang exclaimed in a puerile voice, "Sure!"

"Goodbye, Aunt."

Jiangjiang waved her paws and gave Xiang Yi a flying kiss.

Xiang Yi made a catching gesture and showed her a heart sign.

…

After sending Zhong Yi and Jiangjiang away, Xiang Yi strode back to the living room.

The netizens then realized that all four of Xiang Yi's brothers were all present!

Xiang Chen was replying to emails on his computer by the floor-to-ceiling window, holding a cup of black coffee in hand.

Xiang Li stood in front of the bookshelf and flipped through books. The moonlight shone down on his white shirt, making him look refined.

Holding a needle and thread in hand, Xiang Qi was sewing Xiang Yi an apron, looking rather effeminate.

As for Xiang Yu…

The persona that he had been trying to maintain had collapsed and he seemed to have let himself go. He stood in front of the cat bed and rubbed Little Xiji's head while holding Xiao Naofu in hand. He looked like a philandering scumbag.

The netizens were appalled.

—— [What welfare is that?!]

—— [I'm a Sister-in-law fan, I'm here to report!]

—— [Where are the other Sister-in-law fans? Don't let me see you again!]

—— [I'm crying, I never thought I'd see Xiang Yi's brothers in the same frame in my lifetime!]

…

The moment Xiang Yi came in, her brothers looked over in unison.

"Have a seat," Xiang Chen said while pointing at the empty seat opposite him.

Xiang Yi bit the bullet and walked over to take a seat. She placed her hand on the table like an obedient child.

Xiang Chen looked at her for a few seconds before suddenly asking, "Do you know the dangers of falling in love at a young age?"

Xiang Yi was confused.

Xiang Chen made a hand gesture and said, "Xiang Li, come over and break it down for her."

Xiang Li understood immediately. He said in a warm and mellow voice, "It refers to the premature establishment of a romantic relationship between a man and a woman. I'll break down the details into five major points and twenty smaller points…"

Xiang Yi was speechless.

The netizens were laughing uncontrollably.

—— [Hahahaha, oh dear, oh dear, are you breaking a couple up?!]

…

chapters.title: Chapter 397 - The Country Owes Me A Brother
chapters.body:
Chapter 397 - The Country Owes Me A Brother

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

—— [I suddenly feel that Xiang Chen is really childish! Second Brother Xiang Li, why do you have to cooperate with him?!]

—— [Okay, I’ve learned it! I’m going to break up with my boyfriend now! Oh right, I don’t have a boyfriend yet…]

…

Xiang Yi was given a lecture in layman terms for more than ten minutes.

“…In short, falling in love too young is a social activity that harms society.” Xiang Li gave her a summary. He then asked in a warm tone, “Do you understand, Xiang Yi?”

Xiang Yi argued feebly, “I’m twenty years old….”

“Huh? You’re only twenty years old and you already want to start dating?” Xiang Chen questioned with a frown, clearly in disapproval of her behavior.

Xiang Li said in a warm voice, “You need to be more careful with your words. You haven’t even turned twenty years old yet.”

Xiang Qi chimed in, “Yeah, that’s right! Even if you’re twenty years old, you’re still a baby!”

The 21-year-old Xiang Yu folded his arms and said stiffly, “Yes.”

Feeling aggrieved, Xiang Yi said, “I… I’m not in love…”

Xiang Chen frowned and asked, “Do you want to actually fall in love?”

Xiang Li gave everyone an out by saying, “Prevention is better than cure.”

“…”

‘Fine, my brothers are right.’

Xiang Yi sighed helplessly. There was nothing she could do except obey him.

The netizens who were watching the livestream couldn’t stop laughing at all.

—— [Fans of the Untimely Couple have passed out from crying in the washroom.]

—— [Ahhhh, the country owes me an older brother!]

—— [Her brothers are right! Xiang Yi should stay single!]

…

The atmosphere was rather cordial. All of a sudden, Li Jianyu received a message and he quickly cued Xiang Yi. “Xiang Yi, the guests have arrived.”

The guest today was Fu Jiayan, an actor who had worked with Shi Sui before.

He played the crown prince in a period drama revolving around the theme of power struggles, and his character had won the hearts of countless girls.

Previously in “Heartbeat”, he and Yu Miaomiao tried to create publicity by pretending to be a couple, but their attempt flopped and caused his reputation to go down the drain. His management agency had helped him clinch the chance to star in “Two Under One Roof” so that he could clear his name.

“I’ll go receive the guest,” Xiang Yi said to her brothers and then stood up to go open the door.

…

Xiang Yi walked to the black iron gate. Apart from Fu Jiayan’s nanny van, there was a red supercar behind it too.

The handsome Fu Jiayan took the initiative to greet Xiang Yi. “Hello, Xiang Yi, I’m Fu Jiayan, you can call me Brother Jiayan.”

The netizens watching the livestream immediately started criticizing them:

—— [Ah, that’s quite gross]

—— [No way? Brother Jiayan sounds so um…]

—— [I really can’t accept that the Crown Prince has turned into a sleazy young man!]

…

Before Xiang Yi could say anything, she heard a dismissive snort of contempt from the supercar.

“How tacky.”

The camera moved backwards and a young woman wearing exquisite makeup on her face alighted from the supercar, clad in a socialite-style dress. She then threw her car keys at Fu Jiayan arrogantly.

Fu Jiayan subconsciously took it.

“Hey, park the car for me.”

Fu Jiayan asked, “Huh?”

‘Come on, do I look like a valet attendant?’

Xiang Yi blinked and was obviously glad to see her. “Jiujiu, what brings you here?”

Li Jianyu and the others were dumbfounded, and they finally realized that the young woman wasn’t a guest.

Jiang Jiujiu raised her chin arrogantly like an untamed heiress. “Don’t think I came for you, I just came to see Grandpa and Grandma Xiang!”

Xiang Yi said with a bitter expression, “Oh, I see.”

Jiang Jiujiu seemed to be dissatisfied with her answer as she humphed and strutted in on her high heels.

Li Jianyu asked in puzzlement, “Xiang Yi, who is this?”

Xiang Yi answered carefully, “My friend…I guess?”

Jiang Jiujiu, who was at the front, stopped in her tracks.

chapters.title: Chapter 398 - : Girl Who Catches Pigs (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 398 - : Girl Who Catches Pigs (1)

‘Atrocious!’

‘What kind of tone is that!?!’

‘She’s so reluctant to say that we’re friends!’

Little did she know that Xiang Yi merely felt that Jiang Jiujiu probably no longer treated her as a friend because that person had neglected Jiang Jiujiu when her body was being possessed.

Jiang Jiujiu gritted her teeth and sped up.

The comments about Jiang Jiujiu in the livestream were rather hostile too.

—— [This girl is too arrogant!]

Xiang Yi briefly introduced Jiang Jiujiu to everyone on the spot.

“She’s a very outstanding violinist and the head of the Orpheus Orchestra. She and I have known each other since kindergarten.”

Li Jianyu inhaled sharply and asked, “Is…is it the Orpheus Orchestra that I know?”

In the livestream:

—— [Orpheus Orchestra? What on earth is that?]

—— [I’m speechless, it’s the top orchestra overseas, and the age requirement is no more than thirty years old]

—— [I’m a music major, just passing by. This girl is really impressive, she’s a music prodigy. She has a good sense of music!]

All of a sudden, the comments were all about Jiang Jiujiu.

…

Fu Jiayan helped Jiang Jiujiu park her car bitterly and immediately afterward, he got tricked by the program team.

Li Jianyu grinned and handed a few mission cards to Fu Jiayan and said, “Jiayan, take one.”

Fu Jiayan took out a card and opened it, only to be dumbfounded.

“Give the little black pig a bath?” Fu Jiayan’s eyelids twitched and he asked, “Not all the task cards are about this task, right?”

Li Jianyu asked, “Am I that kind of person?”

Fu Jiayan seemed hesitant.

Afterwards, Li Jianyu said righteously, “Well, I am!”

Fu Jiayan: ???

‘…For the sake of clearing my name, I’ll bear with it!’

He had a rather bubbly (foolish) character, but he had left a strong impression on many people when he played the character of the Crown Prince previously. Countless fans began liking him because of that character, so they naturally hoped that his actual personality could be the same as that of the Crown Prince he played.

His team had been letting him build a persona but as time passed, he could no longer pretend and eventually was reduced to being a distasteful young man.

Fu Jiayan prepared himself mentally for a few seconds and asked expectantly, “So will Xiang Yi help me catch the pig?”

He was a loyal viewer of “Two Under One Roof” and usually, he would spend his free time binge-watching it. He had watched the video clip of Xiang Yi catching pigs on a loop more than a hundred times!

“You are able-bodied, and you have hands and feet, why do you need her to catch a pig for you?” The moment Jiang Jiujiu entered the living room, she was dumbfounded. Xiang Chen and the rest were all around so she greeted them stammeringly before going out quickly in fear.

She was enraged when she heard Fu Jiayan asking Xiang Yi to catch the pig for him.

‘Xiang Yi is such a cute girl, how can she go catch pigs?!’

Fu Jiayan said resentfully, “I don’t know how to…”

Jiang Jiujiu rebuked overbearingly, “You can go learn how to! The hands of girls are not meant for catching pigs!”

Xiang Yi happened to have come out from the tool room after getting some gloves, straw hats, some satin sleeves to shield herself from the sun, and other items.

She gave a set to Fu Jiayan and put on a pair for herself.

Jiang Jiujiu asked in disbelief, “Hey, where’s mine?”

Xiang Yi was stunned. “It’s very sunny outside, enjoy the air conditioned environment in the living room. There are snacks in the small refrigerator.”

Jiang Jiujiu widened her eyes in shock. “Are you a devil? The King of Devils is in the living room!”

“…”

Xiang Yi thought about it and realized that Jiang Jiujiu did seem to be quite scared of Xiang Chen.

She asked tentatively, “Well…shall we do it together then?”

“Hmph, since you invited me so enthusiastically, I’ll make do and agree.”

Fu Jiayan gibed, “But didn’t you say that a girl’s hands are not meant for catching pigs?”

Jiang Jiujiu rolled her eyes and snapped, “It’s none of your business!”

chapters.title: Chapter 399 - : Girl Who Catches Pigs (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 399 - : Girl Who Catches Pigs (2)

Chapter 399: Girl Who Catches Pigs (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Fu Jiayan: …

‘Have I been despised?’

The miserable look on his face was so amusing that all the netizens left “hahaha” comments in the live stream and joked about it.

—— [Trying to reason with a girl? Buddy, you were courting death]

1

—— [Does “Two Under One Roof” have the ability to get rid of nasty things? Even Fu Jiayan is starting to seem pleasing to the eye]

—— [Shocking! The popular male artist has actually done such a thing in broad daylight with two girls…”

…

In the midst of the audience’s mockery, Xiang Yi and the other two reached the farm..

The small black pigs were scattered on the hillside.

1

Fu Jiayan asked curiously, “Xiang Yi, how many pigs are you rearing in total?”

Xiang Yi answered, “Not many, just a few dozen.”

“!” Fu Jiayan was shocked and he was just like a walking meme. “Let me calculate, according to a price of 80 yuan per kilogram of pork, and assuming that each pig is 50 kilograms, each mouthful would be 4,000 yuan… There’s money everywhere in this mountain, not pigs!”

2

Jiang Jiujiu said in disdain, “Look how much of a hillbilly you are!”

Fu Jiayan scratched his head, feeling a little embarrassed. “In this case, I’ll go nab them and see if I can do it. There’s shade and it’s cooler here, wait for me.”

Xiang Yi said, “Uh, actually there is no need to catch…”

1

Jiang Jiujiu chimed in, “Who are you looking down on! I’m not a loser! I’m going too!”

Fu Jiayan said, “Then let’s compete to see who catches it first.”

Xiang Yi murmured, “It’s really unnecessary…”

The two people didn’t listen to her at all. They suddenly got aggrieved and rushed up the mountain.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘Forget it, as long as you’re happy.’

…

Fu Jiayan and Jiang Jiujiu had their eyes on the same little black pig. The two of them pounced on it left and right, only to miss as the little black piglet scurried far away.

Fu Jiayan said regretfully, “What a pity, this pig is quite cute.”

1

Jiang Jiujiu licked the corner of her lips and said, “It should be quite delicious as roast pork.”

2

Fu Jiayan: ???

All of a sudden…

A big black pig with a tough, muscular and powerful body appeared in front of them with a few smaller black pigs at the back.

1

Jiang Jiujiu exclaimed in dismay, “It…it actually knows to call Daddy here!”

Fu Jiayan pulled a long face. “Is it too late to call it Daddy?”

1

The answer was that it was too late.

The black pig burrowed the ground and charged towards the two of them assertively.

“Ahhhh!!!”

Hence, the sounds of running and screaming filled the air.

—— [The girl who catches pigs, so cute.]

—— [Damn it, what kind of sill show is this? I’m going to laugh my ass off]

—— [Fu Jiayan must be a comedian by nature, huh? It’s such a waste that he isn’t using his eloquence on a stand-up comedy!]

…

Fu Jiayan and Jiang Jiujiu fled frantically while the cameraman also followed behind. All of a sudden, there was chaos and they had somehow alerted the nearby black pigs.

Seeing the increasingly dangerous situation, the audience gradually felt that something was amiss.

—— [There can’t be any accident, right?]

—— [The program team is toxic. Trust them to arrange such a dangerous task, do they not take the lives of artiste seriously?]

1

—— [IF she falls, she might get trampled on! What if her hand gets hurt? She’s a violinist!]

—— [Most confusing behavior of the year. Can’t Vase Fairy catch the pigs herself? Why must she make the Crown Prince and this pretty lady do it herself!?! That’s too much!”

—— [Ummm… I suspect that she has done it on purpose because she’s jealous of Jiang Jiujiu for being the leader of Orpheus Ochestra! People are most likely to be jealous of their friends around them.No one at Orpheus would want Xiang Yi!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 400 - They’Re Getting Into A Fight
chapters.body:
Chapter 400 - They’Re Getting Into A Fight

Chapter 400: They’re Getting Into A Fight

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

There was a huge argument going on in the pop-up comments section. Some were worried about the guest’s safety, while some were trying to influence the rest to criticize Xiang Yi.

1

There were just that many resources in the entertainment industry. Once Xiang Yi became extremely famous, she would definitely affect others’ share of the pie.

1

There were lots of people who didn’t want her to become famous.

2

There were also many who were prepared for her to become an A-lister.

1

As the scene became more and more dangerous, Li Jianyu also panicked and snatched the loudspeaker. He exclaimed, “Guys, don’t panic! Come and gather here!”

1

As soon as she finished speaking, a little black pig knocked into his leg and Li Jianyu fell to the ground.

2

He was dumbfounded..

The photographer, Old Zhang, gave him a close-up shot.

However, no one could bring themselves to laugh now. The audience were so eager that their anxiousness seemed to be pouring out of the screen.

—— [Damn it, our Crown Prince can’t stand this!]

—— [Xiang Yi, can’t you take care of your pig? I’m speechless!]

—— [Where is she? Has she fled?? How can there be such an irresponsible person!?!]

—— [Damn it, I take my hat’s off to her. Are the members of the program team stupid? They actually set up such a dangerous activity?]

…

Someone else said feebly:

—— [The last time Xiang Yi caught a pig, it wasn’t that dangerous… This must just be an accident, right?]

This person only defended Xiang Yi, but was also criticized to the point of doubting life and becoming autistic.

Seeing that the chaotic situation was about to go out of control, a clear whistle sounded.

The restless little black pigs immediately quietened down.

The whistling was relaxed, and immediately afterward, the little black pigs actually all went in one direction.

Everyone was dumbstruck.

The netizens were appalled.

‘Wow, is this a miracle?!’

The crowd coincidentally looked toward the source of the whistle, only to see a slender young woman who was standing near a small pond and whistling while carrying a bag of corn and a bag of vegetables.

She scattered the corn and vegetables onto the ground and the little black pigs ate obediently. After having had their fill, they leaped into the pond and stepped around in it.

1

In just a few minutes, the scene turned from a violent and dangerous pursuit of humans by pigs to that of a warm and harmoniously beautiful, idyllic life.

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Uh, did she just say that there’s no need to catch the pig?]

—— [Damn! Xiang Yi is so strong! She managed to carry those two large sacks in one go? Well, I won’t be able to do that!]

—— [Those who just scolded Xiang Yi, come out and get beaten up! Xiang Yi went to get food for the pigs, okay!? Who knew that they’d be chased by the pigs?!]

…

In an instant…

The people who had been scolding Xiang Yi were too embarrassed to speak.

It turned out that she not only did not abandon the crowd, she also stood out to give them all an out…

“Phew…”

Fu Jiayan let out a long sigh of relief. “Oh my god, I was scared out of my wits.”

He had been running so hard that his forehead was now covered in sweat. Besides, he had been shielding Jiang Jiujiu just now so his clothes were soiled with grass and mud.

Jiang Jiujiu, who was at the side, didn’t have it any better than him. The curls in her hair, which she had painstakingly curled, had loosened, and the ribbon at the top of her head was twisted too. She walked toward Xiang Yi aggressively.

Fu Jiayan was shocked.

‘Is this wealthy heiress going to settle scores with Xiang Yi?’

Many of the viewers of the livestream thought the same.

—— [Oh, someone’s in trouble~]

—— [She deserves it. It’s her fault for not appearing sooner and causing Jiang Jiujiu to be in such a wretched state.]

—— [Cat fight! Cat fight! Yank her hair! It’s finally time for a fight, I’m so excited!]

However, to everyone’s surprise…

Jiang Jiujiu stood still with one hand on her waist. “Hey! I want to have that pig for lunch!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 401 - Little Piggy, I Hope You Go To Heaven Soon
chapters.body:
Chapter 401 - Little Piggy, I Hope You Go To Heaven Soon

Chapter 401: Little Piggy, I Hope You Go to Heaven Soon

1

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Everyone was speechless.

What the hell?

‘Miss, do you remember that you are a noble and elegant violinist?!’

Xiang Yi said in a warm and tender voice, “Huh? Which one?”

“That one!” Jiang Jiujiu said aggrievedly. “It touched my butt! Hmph, I’m going to eat it!”

1

Jiang Jiujiu was very willful, but Xiang Yi gave in to her. “Sure, let’s kill it next.”

1

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Little black pigs: can’t escape from fate after all]

—— [Hahahaha this young lady is so cute!]

—— [Xiang Yi, a woman who says the cruelest things in the gentlest tone]

. 1

—— [The pigs are so cute. Eating one is not enough. Why don’t you kill two and start a lucky draw for fans?!]

1

…

The wretched Fu Jiayan seemed to have come to a sudden realization as he murmured, “So this is the correct way to complete the task of bathing the pigs… Heaven and man become one, and the Dao is natural. May man and the environment coexist in harmony. Namo Amitabha, little piggies, I hope you’ll rise to heaven soon…”

1

‘No wonder Xiang Yi said that there’s no need to catch them.’

‘It turns out that she just feeds them by the pond and they’ll jump right into the water to bathe themselves.’

The netizens started teasing:

—— [Fu Jiayan: Master, I’m enlightened!]

—— [Is His Highness the Crown Prince conducting an expiation?]

—— [Fu Jiayan is a certified harmonious star! All the major variety show producers, please look at him!]

1

…

This segment of the show was really hilarious, and Li Jianyu was very emotional.

At that time, Shi Sui asked him to invite Xiang Yi and he agreed to do so out of convenience, but in hindsight, he realized that Xiang Yi was a true gem and Shi Sui was like the free gift that you’d get for purchasing a discounted item on sale at the supermarket.

1

He wanted to help Xiang Yi become a solo variety show artist and produce a show exclusively for her!

2

When the time comes, the variety show award would be within reach!

“Hehe, ah…”

Ruan Qing’s voice made Li Jianyu snap back to reality and she asked, “How much longer do you plan to sit on the ground for?”

Li Jianyu came back to his senses and realized that he was still sitting on the ground!

Amused, Ruan Qing extended her hand toward him.

Li Jianyu was stunned for a while, but he said feebly, “Sister Ruan, can you not hit me in the face? I didn’t know that this task would be that dangerous. Previously, everything was fine and peaceful when Xiang Yi tried to catch pigs…”

1

Ruan Qing was speechless. “I’m just trying to pull you up!”

‘So she wasn’t going to hit me?’

The corporate slave Li Jianyu rejoiced.

…

…

When they were done bathing the piglets, Xiang Yi skillfully caught them and prepared to take them for processing. She then arranged for Fu Jiayan to go pick some ingredients.

“Pick some red and green chilies. I want two spring onions and two heads of garlic too. Thank you.”

Fu Jiayan exclaimed gleefully, “Sure, sure, Xiang Yi, you’re awesome! You gave me such an easy task!”

Jiang Jiujiu asked, “What about me?”

Xiang Yi pointed to the glass nursery and said, “Go in there to get some rest, while I brew you some floral tea, okay?”

Fu Jiayan: ???

‘Those are double standards, right? It must be a double standard.’

Jiang Jiujiu was overjoyed, but she still had to pretend to be indifferent as she said, “Okay. Oh right, I want to have some braised pig trotters!”

Xiang Yi agreed, “Alright.”

She washed her hands and made tea for Jiang Jiujiu. Before leaving, she adjusted Jiang Jiujiu’s bow hair clip too.

Holding the struggling black pig in one hand, she walked toward the kitchen.

The cameraman who was following Xiang Yi asked, “Why are you so nice to Miss Jiang?”

Xiang Yi was puzzled. “Isn’t it only right to be nice to your friends?”

All of a sudden, countless people flocked to Shi Sui’s Weibo page.

—— [@ShiSui, Best Actor Shi Sui! If you don’t come back, your wife is going to run away with someone else!!!]

2

chapters.title: Chapter 402 - Can’T I Be A Human?
chapters.body:
Chapter 402 - Can’T I Be A Human?

Chapter 402: Can’t I Be A Human?

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

Meanwhile…

At a movie premiere.

In this movie, Shi Sui played a supporting role. Although his persona and scenes were outstanding, the character he played had left the strongest impression on the audience.

Even during the interview, he was the cast member who had the most number of reporters asking him questions.

Shi Sui calmly shifted the topic back onto the lead actors.

However, in the end, he still couldn’t avoid the questions by the reporters..

“Shi Sui, someone said that you’re lowering your own status by agreeing to be the supporting character in a film where a newbie is the leading actor. What do you think about that?”

Shi Sui pushed his gold-framed glasses up his nose and said in a warm tone of voice, “I was once a newbie too. For actors, playing one’s role to the best extent is the most important.”

“Shi Sui, what’s your upcoming work schedule like? Are you not planning to star in another production?”

Shi Sui said, “I will consider the external factors and my own situation and choose the most suitable production, lest I let my friends, who have high expectations of me, down.”

The reporters were a little disappointed, but they were used to it.

Since Shi Sui first debuted, he had always been eloquent and logical with his words. Although throwing the ball into someone else’s court and avoiding the subject requires skill too, his words were ultimately lacking in the ability to captivate the audience.

1

Until…

Someone asked, “Netizens holding a poll for the type of men Xiang Yi likes the most. Everyone is speculating if she likes puppy-like pretty boys or husky-like masculine men. Shi Sui, which type do you think you are? And which type would Xiang Yi like?”

Everyone was speechless.

‘Incredible!’

‘It hit the nail on its head!’

All of a sudden, Shi Sui was the center of attention and everyone was looking forward to hearing some gossip or juicy news.

The suave man raised his eyebrows and said languidly, “Can’t I just be human-like?

1

Someone laughed out loud and everyone burst into laughter.

The reporter who asked the question held back his laughter and asked, “In this case, Shi Sui, do you think Xiang Yi likes pretty boys or masculine men?”

Shi Sui answered, “I know the answer. I think she likes humans.”

1

“Psht…” The reporters discovered that Shi Sui actually had a humorous side too.

However, after carefully thinking about it, he discovered that there seemed to be more to his words.

By saying that Xiang Yi liked humans, he could be insinuating that Xiang Yi liked him because he was human. However, the lack of firmness in his tone made their imagination run wild.

Wow!

‘Brother, where can I buy your book?!’

…

…

Xiang Yi was getting busy in the kitchen.

Fu Jiayan was bored out of his wits, and he didn’t know Xiang Yi’s brothers either. Hence, he had no choice but to chat with Jiang Jiujiu awkwardly.

1

Jiang Jiujiu wasn’t very interested. While tapping away on her phone, she chatted with them perfunctorily.

All of a sudden, Fu Jiayan asked a question about Xiang Yi.

“How old were you when you met Xiang Yi?”

Jiang Jiujiu raised her delicate face and said with certainty, “Three and a half years old!”

1

“You actually remember that?” Fu Jiayan was a little surprised, “A three-year-old child shouldn’t be able to remember such things, right?”

1

“I just remember!”

“Okay, okay, tell me then, what was Xiang Yi like when she was three and a half years old?”

Jiang Jiujiu began to recall and after a moment of silence, she continued, “She’s about the same as she is now. She was a timid crybaby who was helpless and pitiful…”

1

Fu Jiayan: ???

‘Wait, are you sure you’re talking about Xiang Yi?!’

“Hmph, just an annoying child!” Jiang Jiujiu commented.

Jiang Jiujiu was peeved at the thought of the events that happened when they were in kindergarten.

Xiang Yi was nice, but she was nice to all her classmates! Anyone could get a share of her portion of fruit!

1

She had a harem at a young age!

1

It was really annoying!!!

1

chapters.title: Chapter 403 - Not Friends (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 403 - Not Friends (1)

However, in the ears of the netizens in the live room, his words meant something different.

—— [Umm, did you guys notice that Xiang Yi has no friends at all?]

—— [Who said no? Qin Wanyan is her best friend but she exposed some information about Xiang Yi’s unsavory past.]

—— [This point alone tells a lot about her personality. Although Shi Sui doesn’t have many friends, they’re all very close friends of his. On the contrary, all Vase Fairy does is seduce men. She doesn’t have any true friends.]

…

As the camera panned to the kitchen and shot the pig’s trotter being stewed by Xiang Yi, the pop-up screen was instantly covered with new comments.

—— [Is that the little black pig? It looks so fragrant!]

—— [Damn, the little black pig has such a good figure. It’s neither too fat nor skinny, I’m going to drool]

—— [Little black pig: ??? Seriously, are you guys lusting for my body at such a juncture? Be more humane!]

—— [Xiang Yi is weak, helpless, and pitiful? She’s a devil who can catch pigs with just one hand and sharpen the knife to slaughter pigs!]

…

The comment section was very lively but Xiang Yi’s expression was calm and she was cooking quietly.

Every time she cooked, she would put her heart and soul into it. A task that’s deemed laborious and boring to others may be an outlet for her to alleviate her stress.

The scene of Xiang Yi cooking was pleasing to the eye, and it was like admiring a piece of art.

When the last dish was plated,.

Xiang Qi and Xiang Yu had already consciously served the dishes.

Fu Jiayan was still trying to clear his name so he helped to clean up the dining table with a grave expression.

‘No, I can’t eat too much!’

‘My style and image is that of an aloof and suave actor!’

‘I’ll just have a taste of each dish.’
