Moreover, he didn’t believe that the previous livestreams were completely raw and unstaged. He thought that Xiang Yi’s food may be fragrant, but it might not be that delicious.

Fu Jiayan picked up a piece of meat with his chopsticks while still thinking to himself conceitedly, ‘I’ve dined at lots of top restaurants before… Damn!’

‘The meat is fatty but not greasy. It’s fresh and slightly spicy. The slightly sweet fragrance suddenly spread at the tip of the tongue and conquered my tastebuds right away! The meat is freshly cut and the chilies are freshly picked. Paired with bean paste, green onions, and garlic, a rich and unique flavor profile is created!’

‘What a wonderful delicacy! It’s the best food in this world!’

Fu Jiayan was dumbfounded.

By the time he reacted, a third of the dishes on the table was already gone!

His pupils constricted as he looked at everything in front of him in astonishment.

Hades brought his own large bowl, but Xiang Yu’s bowl was much larger. Perhaps, it would be more appropriate to call it a basin. Even the refined and well-mannered Dr. Xiang, as well as the cold and indifferent Attorney Xiang, had a pile of food in front of them.

“What a bumpkin,” Jiang Jiujiu said in disdain. “What’s the big deal? One of them brought a pot to place their food in during a meal the last time!”

Fu Jiayan came to a sudden realization of the brutal competition in the Xiang family!

While eating, he asked, “Why aren’t you eating?”

Jiang Jiujiu picked up a strand of vegetable and rinsed it with water before eating it. She then raised her head at the sky arrogantly.

“The orchestra will be performing soon, and I’m the lead violinist! I’m the lead violinist! I’m on a diet, so I can’t eat greasy meat dishes! Not even a bite!”

Fu Jiayan agreed, “You’re right! I hope you succeed, Missy!”

In the next second, he picked up all the vegetables in front of Jiang Jiujiu and took them away!

Jiang Jiujiu was speechless.

At this moment, a tantalizing and spicy fragrance wafted up to her nose…

chapters.title: Chapter 404 - Not Friends (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 404 - Not Friends (2)

She couldn’t control her physical instincts and looked at the source of the scent.

It was Xiang Yi who had come out of the kitchen with a plate of braised delights.

The food of the top layers were soft, sticky, and tender pig trotters and beside it were some duck wings and chicken claws. The platter was also garnished and decorated with some dried beancurd and mushrooms. The food was all dipped in the beautiful red-brown marinade with some white sesame seeds sprinkled on it. The heavenly aroma spread toward the surroundings, making all of them tempted…

Fu Jiayan: ???

Jiang Jiujiu was speechless.

Xiang Yi’s brothers were clearly already accustomed to the delicacies she cooked so they were rather composed.

However, the food was a huge stimulation to Fu Jiayan and Jiang Jiujiu!

‘It’s so fragrant!’

‘How can it be so fragrant?!’

“Gulu…” Fu Jiayan couldn’t help but swallow his saliva.

Xiang Yi placed the braised food platter on the center of the table. She said, “I asked around and everyone can take spicy foods, so I marinated them in spicy sauce. Give it a try. Oh, by the way, I’ll go get the soy milk.”

Xiang Yi stood up and proceeded to get the soy milk, and the people at the table immediately got into battle mode!

Xiang Yi’s brothers made eye contact with fiery gazes in their eyes. There was an intense tension.

Fu Jiayan chickened out, and he didn’t dare to move his chopsticks at all.

Jiang Jiujiu remembered her ‘bold words’ just now, and now she didn’t move her chopsticks at all because she was too embarrassed to do so.

Soon, there was a clear victory among Xiang Yi’s brothers.

Xiang Chen was the first to dig in, and he picked up a few bite-sized pieces of sliced pig’s trotters and placed them into his mouth.

Xiang Li was next and he only ate vegetables.

Xiang Qi and Xiang Yu were meat lovers so one of them picked up a duck wing and the other picked up some chicken feet.

When it was Fu Jiayan’s turn, he warily picked up a small piece of pig’s trotter that had fallen on the plate and stuffed it into his mouth.

“!!!”

His mouth was filled with a heavenly aroma as soon as he put the food into his mouth, followed by a numbing spiciness on the tip of his tongue. The meat was tender and soft. It was as if even the bone had become tender after a long time of cooking. The sauce was sweet and delectable, and the meat really melted in his mouth. There was an endless aftertaste!

It was different from what Fu Jiayan imagined. After tasting it…

It was really enjoyable!

Having a taste of every dish without eating much?

No such thing!

Fu Jiayan showed the audience what a grown man’s meal is!

He couldn’t help but bury his face in the bowl as he polished the food off in joy!

The netizens were appalled.

—— [This is like a pig in the granary…]

—— [Your Highness, you have eaten all sorts of delicacies, must you enjoy it so much?!]

—— [Oh dear, the suave Crown Prince is dead. All that’s left is a ruthless eating machine!]

…

As for Jiang Jiujiu, she had already slipped into a miserable struggle.

To eat…

Or not…

‘Ahhhh!!!’

Xiang Yi’s clear and melodious voice rang in her ears. “Jiujiu, eat up.”

The young girl took the initiative to pick up a piece of pork trotters for her. “Didn’t you say that you want to eat this just now?”

Jiang Jiujiu said proudly with a sullen expression, “Really? I don’t even remember anymore.”

‘Well, you cooked these dishes for me because I asked but if others asked you to, you will do the same!’

‘Hmph!’

Xiang Yi said, “Yes…”

Seemingly realizing something, she continued, “I’m sorry, I’ll use another pair of chopsticks.”

She didn’t realize that she was using her own chopsticks.

Although she had yet to start eating, she reckoned that Jiang Jiujiu probably minded it and thus didn’t want to eat it.

She took a clean plate for Jiang Jiujiu and picked up a piece of pig’s trotters, duck wings, mushrooms, and other food items for her with a clean pair of chopsticks.

Seeing how careful Xiang Yi was and how she was treating her as a stranger, Jiang Jiujiu exclaimed furiously, “Must I eat it just because you told me to? Why must I listen to you?!”

chapters.title: Chapter 405 - Not Friends (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 405 - Not Friends (3)

Xiang Yi looked at Jiang Jiujiu in disbelief.

‘She was clearly the one who said that she wants to eat it…’

‘Why is she getting upset again…’

‘Ah, women are really unfathomable!’

Some haters began to make snide remarks in the livestream because of Jiang Jiujiu’s attitude.

—— [Welcome, please enjoy the scene of Leader Jiang putting the Vase Fairy to shame.]

—— [She can’t even be bothered to care about you, but you just had to bend over backwards to please her only to be snubbed. What a joke!]

—— [I can sense how awkward Xiang Yi is even through the screen. Want to befriend Jiang Jiujiu? You should check if you’re worthy or not before doing so!]

—— [The actress Miss Xiang is obviously jealous. Jiang Jiujiu has already said that she’s on a diet to lose weight, and yet, Xiang Yi cooked such greasy and caloric-dense food for her. What intentions are she harboring?! How malicious!!!]

…

The brothers of the Xiang family glanced at Jiang Jiujiu, whose thoughts they had seen through clearly. However, they didn’t want to be involved in the affairs between the two girls so they simply continued to eat their own food.

Xiang Yi gave it some thought and then said in a warm tone of voice, “Don’t eat it then. Is there anything else you’d like to eat? I’ll cook it for you. Or how about I order you a light salad or something?”

‘Maybe Jiang Jiujiu simply doesn’t want to eat the food I cooked.’

Xiang Yi felt that she couldn’t force her against her wishes.

Jiang Jiujiu glared at her and chided, “Is this how you persuade someone to eat the food you cooked?”

Feeling a little shy, Xiang Yi said, “I’m indeed not very good at that.”

Xiang Yi’s grandmother was really good urging her guests to eat, especially juniors whom she would enthusiastically persuade whenever they visited her home.

All Xiang Yi knew to say was, “If you can’t finish the food, don’t force yourself…”

“Hmph!” Jiang Jiujiu picked up her chopsticks and said arrogantly, “Since you’ve already made the dishes, I’ll force myself to try it! I’m telling you, I’ll vomit it if it’s not nice!”

Xiang Yi nodded feebly.

“…”

‘Atrocious! How can she be so adorable?!’

The tips of Jiang Jiujiu’s ears turned red, and she avoided Xiang Yi’s gaze before lowering her head to scrutinize the food. She chose to pick up a piece of tender and greasy pig’s trotters and took a large bite out of it!

“…”

The world seemed to have suddenly frozen as everything became silent. The colors turned to black and white and Jiang Jiujiu felt as if there were party poppers popping in her head.

Immediately afterward, a white light flashed in front of her eyes and all her senses seemed to have become dull. Only her sense of taste was heightened countless times as she became extremely sensitive to the taste of the tender, collagen-rich and bouncy meat that was marinated in thick marinade. It had a strong, unstoppable and aggressive flavor that conquered her taste buds!

Her saliva was secreted quickly and she swallowed it.

“How is it?” Xiang Yi asked.

Jiang Jiujiu didn’t answer, or rather, she let her actions do the talking.

Xiang Yi quickly shoved food into her mouth. The chicken claws came off the bone with a gentle suck, and the duck wings were polished off in moments. She even wolfed down the vegetables continuously!

“Ha…hoo…” Her lips had turned red from the spiciness, which caused a sharp and burning sensation to spread. However, the pain intensified the stimulation of her taste buds, just like when one is eating spicy snacks.

In short, it was splendid!

Xiang Yi gave her a bottle of soy milk just at the right time.

Jiang Jiujiu sucked two mouthfuls of soy milk with a straw. Finding that she was in need of a thrill, she continued to eat the braised delights. She was so full that her belly had quickly become rather round…

Crack…

The button at the side of her red checkered dress suddenly gave way and pulled it apart. Although none of her private areas were exposed, everything was caught on camera…

The netizens were dumbfounded.

‘Has she eaten so much that her skirt has fallen apart too?!’

Before they could criticize her, Xiang Yi quickly blocked the camera and rebuked sternly with a solemn expression on her fair face, “Don’t shoot!”

chapters.title: Chapter 406 - Not Friends (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 406 - Not Friends (4)

Chapter 406: Not Friends (4)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The staff present were all stunned.

It seemed that Xiang Yi had never been so fierce since the start of the livestream.

Even when throwing the scumbag over her shoulder yesterday, she did it effortlessly.

The comments in the livestream began to increase:

—— [A new cult has appeared! How can it stagnate?!?!]

—— [I totally ship Xiang Yi and Jiujiu! Pretty girls should date other pretty girls!]

3

—— [I stan JiuYi! The arrogant young heiress X the gentle and mild-mannered rich and beautiful girl who has a fairy persona. Please grant me your wishes!]

—— [Wow Xiang Yi is so gentle! Actually, Jiang Jiujiu didn’t have a wardrobe malfunction, but Xiang Yi blocked her immediately!]

…

At the dinner table, Jiang Jiujiu’s face was flushed. She was feeling extremely shy and ashamed, so much that she wanted to dig a hole in the ground and bury herself in it!

.

She hurriedly sucked her belly in and tried to pretend that nothing had happened.

However…

She had had too much to eat and even drank two bottles of soy milk. Thus, her little belly was round and she couldn’t suck it in at all…

The men present were all gentlemen and so they didn’t crack any jokes about her with that. Xiang Qi even took the initiative to ask, “Do you want me to help you sew it?”

Xiang Yi’s brothers had always been extremely worried about her friendships.

1

That was the difference between men and women. The care they can give to Xiang Yi was ultimately limited, and there was a certain type of warmth that could only be transmitted between girls.

1

“No,” Jiang Jiujiu rejected without even thinking.

‘It’s…it’s too embarrassing!’

All of a sudden, Xiang Yi grabbed Jiang Jiujiu’s wrist and the latter looked up, only to meet her clear eyes which contained a gentle gaze.

“I’ll take you to my room.”

Jiang Jiujiu cocked her head to the side in a wishy-washy manner. Her silence was consent.

…

In the bedroom.

Jiang Jiujiu changed into a loose-fitting hemp dress and slowly popped her head out of the dressing room.

She saw Xiang Yi who was sewing her button on for her.

The young girl skilfully put the thread through the hole of the needle and coiled it lightly around her wrist twice before tying a knot. She then bit the thread off with her teeth and meticulously ironed the dress.

Jiang Jiujiu was speechless.

It was a strange feeling.

Although they hadn’t contacted each other for a long time, they didn’t become distant.

‘But…’

At the thought of Qin Wanyan’s words, Jiang Jiujiu felt extremely awkward.

Xiang Yi noticed her and she asked, “Do you want to change back into this dress? Or do you want to wear mine first?”

Jiang Jiujiu said fiercely, “Are you feeling the pinch because I’m wearing your clothes?”

“That’s not what I mean…”

“I’m not going to listen.” Jiang Jiujiu covered her ears and said, “I’m going to go out for a meal.”

She went to the living room, sat in front of the dining table, and started chomping down on the pig’s trotters.

Xiang Yi’s brothers and Fu Jiayan had already moved to the resting couch at the lounge.

Fu Jiayan was puzzled to see that scene. “Isn’t she on a diet? Why is she still eating so much?”

2

Xiang Li took a sip of tea and said, “Mr. Fu, you must be single, huh?”

Fu Jiayan was astounded. “Huh? Dr. Xiang, you can tell that too?! You research scientists are really incredible!”

2

Xiang Li smiled quietly.

…

Li Jianyu and Jiang Jiujiu interacted. “Miss, what do you think of Xiang Yi’s culinary skills?”

“It’s mediocre,” she said.

“But you seem to be enjoying it…” Even the buttons of her dress had popped open, but she just had to lie. “Aren’t you guys friends? Why are you still hating on Xiang Yi?”

The word “friends” struck a sour note within Jiang Jiujiu. She turned her head to the side and barked fiercely, “She and I are not friends!”

“Uh…”

“I unilaterally announce that she and I are half-sisters!”

2

There was instantly an uproar in the livestream.

…

chapters.title: Chapter 407 - Woohoo~~
chapters.body:
Chapter 407 - Woohoo~~

—— [??????]

—— [Does…does she mean that Xiang Yi is her close friend!?]

—— [Duh, she clearly treats Xiang Yi as her best friend!]

…

On the other hand, the keyboard warriors stared at their keyboards in bewilderment.

‘How can Vase Fairy have a best friend…’

‘Were we not typing fast enough?’

They were put to shame before they could even send hate!

…

The program team of “Eating Well For All Three Meals”.

The director had arranged for people to keep tabs on the activities of “Two Under One Roof” and after hearing about this, the crowd was even more convinced that it was definitely scripted!!!

‘We have to poach them! Immediately! We’ll poach them by offering an annual salary of five million yuan!’

…

…

In the living room of the manor.

Xiang Yi stared at Jiang Jiang Jiujiu in shock, not daring to look at the scene in front of her.

She subconsciously pinched her palm.

The distinct pain confirmed that everything at this moment was real.

After saying those words angrily, Jiang Jiujiu’s ears and face turned red while her shoulders trembled gently. She was extremely shy but she still had to pretend to be arrogant.

“Hmph, of course, I don’t care what she thinks. Even if… even if she doesn’t treat me as a friend, I won’t be bothered by it!”

Everyone was speechless.

‘Do you know how arrogant you are, Missy?’

Although she said that she wasn’t bothered, anyone who wasn’t blind could tell that she minded it very much!

“Jiujiu…” Xiang Yi muttered.

Jiang Jiujiu was infuriated. “What are you doing?”

“I…I…” Xiang Yi wanted to say something, but when the words reached her lips, she habitually asked, “Do you want to have some dessert?”

Jiang Jiujiu was even more enraged. ‘Is it that difficult to say that you treat me as your friend too!?!’

Xiang Yi was actually a little embarrassed, and she didn’t have any close friends so she had absolutely no idea how to get along with others and had no choice but to use the established strategy that often succeeded on her brothers, on Jiang Jiujiu too.

“Whatever you want to eat, I’ll cook it for you.” The young girl said seriously.

Her brothers had different expressions after hearing those words but their moods were similar.

They were all feeling a little sour.

Xiang Yi’s words were like a “code” to Jiang Jiujiu but they could crack it easily.

When Xiang Yi says “I’ll cook for you” she basically means it literally because she purely liked cooking.

When she says “I’ll make you some delicious food”, it means that the person she said those words to is someone close to her and someone she had a good feeling about.

When she says, “Whatever you want to eat, I’ll cook it for you” it meant that she really liked that person! If Jiang Jiujiu were a guy, they would even suspect that Xiang Yi was confessing her love to him.

Jiang Jiujiu said with pursed lips, “I want to take a nap and then have some afternoon tea!”

“Alright.”

“I also want to go to the glass-walled nursery to take some photos! You’ll be my photographer!”

“Okay.”

“At night…I want to sleep next to you!” Jiang Jiujiu clenched her little fist and exclaimed with flushed cheeks, “We should wear matching pajamas!”

“Sure.”

Jiang Jiujiu’s eyes were glistening and she seemed to be hiding the joy within her as she lowered her head and took a few mouthfuls of food with a smile on her face.

Xiang Yi’s brothers were confused.

‘Is this what friendship between girls is like?’

The fans who shipped JiuYi were exhilarated and left lots of comments in the live stream.

—— [Shi Sui: Am I not worthy?

Jiujiu: Yes.]

—— [Medic! Quickly give me a shot of insulin!]

—— [Woohoo Sleeping together Jiujiu is the lawful wife, no one objects to this, right?]

—— [Xiang Yi is so good at pampering others. UwU, is this what the socialist sisterly friendship is!?!]

chapters.title: Chapter 408 - What The Lawful Spouse Is
chapters.body:
Chapter 408 - What The Lawful Spouse Is

Chapter 408: What The Lawful Spouse Is

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

The netizens in the live stream were all obsessed with shipping the both of them and someone even took screenshots and posted them onto the meme accounts on Weibo. For a while, the Internet was full of mockery towards Shi Sui.

1

After the premiere and celebratory banquet that Shi Sui attended was over, Si Chuanbai showed him the hot search list but the man who had always been solemn and reserved, was clearly laughing in a silly manner now.

“The netizens are hating on you again.”

1

Shi Sui raised his brows and noticed that the word used was “again.”

After casually skimming through the story, he laughed silently and said, “It’s good that Xiang Yi has friends.”

1

There was a seven-year age gap between him and Xiang Yi after all. Although they didn’t have much interaction previously, he had seen how lonely Xiang Yin was when she was a teenager. She kept skipping grades in school because of her excellent academic results, and had a hectic schedule all the time.. In her memory, Jiang Jiujiu was the person whom she had been friends with for the longest time.

2

Si Chuanbai said, “You’re quite sporting. Should I praise you for your good mentality? There are already people shipping Xiang Yi and Jiujiu.”

1

Seated inside the nanny van, Shi Sui crossed his long legs sluggishly and then loosened his tie.

“Change the destination in the navigator to the manor.” Light shone in from outside the window and the scenery changed. He said with a calm expression, “I’m going to go teach a little kid what a lawful spouse means.”

5

Si Chuanbai was speechless.

‘Indeed, the netizens and I have worried too much.’

1

So what if she has always been an arrogant heiress since she was a child? A competition of who can be more of a simp?

1

Shi Sui had never lost before. 🙂

1

…

While Jiang Jiujiu was taking a nap, the live stream was paused and Li Jianyu announced that he would let everyone rest for two hours.

Xiang Yi was ecstatic and she couldn’t sleep at all. In a state of hyperactivity, she ran to the kitchen, picked up a yam and peeled it in preparation for making some yam pate.

5

She remembered that Jiang Jiujiu liked yam paste.

Suddenly, several tall figures came into the kitchen.

Xiang Li walked over and volunteered to help Xiang Yi peel the yam. After some acupuncture treatment, the condition of his hand had improved greatly.

Seated on the small stool, Xiang Yu fiddled with his game console at an incredible speed.

Xiang Qi leaned against the wall languidly and yawned, unsure of why Xiang Chen had asked all of them to gather here.

Xiang Chen was tall and taut. Although he was wearing casual clothes, it couldn’t hide his imposing, oppressive aura.

He said indifferently, “The family meeting begins now.”

Xiang Yi was slightly stunned and she was hesitating if she should put the yam down or not. However, she heard Xiang Li say, “Relax, we’re mainly just going to discuss if that person will return or not.”

1

Xiang Qi was flabbergasted. “Surely…my conjecture didn’t come true, did it?”

Xiang Yu raised his head with a look of confusion.

Xiang Chen glared at his brothers who looked like they were itching for a beating, and curbed his urge to lose his temper. He explained to them patiently about Xiang Yi being possessed in the past year.

Although Xiang Qi was shocked, he could accept it readily.

Xiang Yu was dumbfounded.

Xiang Yi steamed the washed yam and purple potatoes used for coloring, in the pot, and said with in a helpless tone of voice, “I’ve already asked Xiao Naofu and it can’t contact the main system, so… I can’t be sure.”

Xiang Yu: ???

‘So Xiao Naofu is not just an ordinary kitten?’

1

Perhaps because of the shocked expression on his face, Xiang Qi patted him on his shoulder and said, “Nonsense, no such thing, Uncle Xiang Feng must be stupider than you! He definitely can’t guess that Xiang Yi wasn’t herself in the past year!”

1

Xiang Yu was speechless.

‘He compared me to Xiang Feng?’

‘Thanks but I don’t feel comforted.’

As the person with the highest IQ, Xiang Li frowned and said, “If there’s no shortcut, we can only…adopt the stupidest method.”

Everyone looked at him.

“Extrapolating from the situation that is already down, the premise for a soul replacement is a weakened health or state of injury. The easiest solution is to find someone to protect her round the clock.”

2

chapters.title: Chapter 409 - Let Him Leave Home
chapters.body:
Chapter 409 - Let Him Leave Home

Xiang Chen asked, “Bodyguard? I’ll go find out if there’s a suitable one.”

Xiang Chen interjected, “We have to hire a female bodyguard, a male bodyguard can’t protect her every single minute round the clock.”

Xiang Yu had a flash of inspiration. “A boyfriend can…”

In an instant, the three brothers cast looks that were almost fatal.

Xiang Yu wished he could die right on the spot and he quickly added, “I was just kidding. Is it funny? Hahahahah…”

He was chuckling wryly and cold sweat had broken out on his forehead, for fear that his big brother would teach him a lesson.

Xiang Chen glanced at him and couldn’t be bothered to argue with him. Instead, he said calmly, “Let me do the arrangement.”

Xiang Li said, “I think I can request for an official protection order for family members. Wait a minute, I’ll make a phone call to confirm.”

Xiang Qi exclaimed, “I’ll also go around to inquire about it!”

Xiang Yu said, “I’ll ask my friends as well.”

The few of them were very efficient. As soon as the yam and purple potatoes were steamed, Xiang Yi learned that she had… ten bodyguards.

The corners of her mouth twitched and she asked, “Uh… would that be a bit too much? I can actually protect myself…”

“Ten is too much?”

“Don’t take it lightly.”

“Don’t worry don’t worry, I can afford to pay this money!”

“…”

In a moment of helplessness, Xiang Yi had no choice but to accept their good intentions.

After the family meeting, the few of them left one after another. After all, they all had things to do.

After sending off her brothers, Xiang Yi felt a bit depressed but she soon accepted the reality.

It was difficult for them to get together so they would cherish it even more.

…

Jiang Jiujiu woke up from her nap and ran out of the guest room to look for Xiang Yi.

She wandered around for a while and saw Xiang Yi in the kitchen.

Xiang Yi was quietly preparing the toppings needed for the milk tea. Yam paste and taro balls were all her favorites. The light in the oven was on, and the scent of cookies wafted out, forming a warm and quiet scene.

Ding~

When the oven timer was up, Xiang Yi took out the cookies and tasted them.

Seemingly finding it delicious, Xiang Yi tilted her head to give herself a huge thumbs up.

Jiang Jiujiu thought, ‘Ahhhh, my best friend is so cute!’

Noticing Jiang Jiujiu’s line of sight, Xiang Yi turned to look and grinned widely. “You’re up from your nap, huh? Want to go for afternoon tea?”

Jiang Jiujiu haughtily folded her arms and said, “Since you invited me, I’ll think about it for a moment.”

A second later, she nodded and said, “Okay, I’ve decided, let’s go.”

Xiang Yi was speechless. ‘She really took only a moment.’

“I’ll carry the food to the glass nursery then.”

Jiang Jiujiu sounded like she was being wishy-washy but she took the initiative to help her with half of the things.

Just as the staff was almost fully rested, Li Jianyu yelled and prepared to shoot the scene of the girls having afternoon tea.

A few minutes later, netizens received a notifcation that the live-stream was on, and after clicking it, a scene that seemed to be from an idol drama, appeared in front of them.

The breeze was gentle and the distant mountains were beautiful. The light of the sun refracted through the glass, casting on the blooming flowers and greenery.

There was a lace tablecloth laid on the table, on which there were some exquisite biscuits and milk tea. There were also a few freesia in the slim porcelain vase.

The two young women were seated opposite each other and swaying relaxedly while leaning against the lounge chair.

The white and soft little kitten, Xiao Naofu, was nestled in Xiang Yi’s arms while the silly Little Xiji was squatting beside Jiang Jiujiu.

Jiang Jiujiu took a bite out of a cookie, followed by a sip of milk tea. She then squinted blissfully.

—— [Taking screengrabs like a madman. This is beautiful!]

—— [The director is so good at this. This is my ideal life!]

—— [Huh?? I seem to have seen the old Shi Sui. He’s at the gate, in the bottom left corner of the screen]

—— [Let him go! Let him run away from home!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 410 - Jealous Shi Sui (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 410 - Jealous Shi Sui (1)

Chapter 410: Jealous Shi Sui (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

—— [Hahaha, to the person who posted the comment above, are you serious about wanting Shi Sui to run away from home? My mom is asking me why I’m laughing so hard that I’m starting to sound like a pig]

…

The camera shot a distant view and the man was dressed in an immaculate, tailored suit which accentuated his height and long legs. His tie was hanging loosely below his collar and some segments of his hair, which he had combed back, was draping in front of his forehead. He looked rather relaxed and casual.

It was as if he had just returned home.

The first thing that he fixed his gaze on was Xiang Yi who was in the glass nursery. He moved his long legs and strutted over.

1

The comments section was instantly flooded with comments:

—— [Ahhhh, Shi Sui in a suit, I love it!!]

—— [His legs are so long, he must be at least two meters tall! He’s so much better at the catwalk than fashion models are!]

—— [I’m so immersed, I have a feeling that he’ll unbuckle his belt the next second!]

Si Chuanbai was watching the live stream in the nanny van. He grinned when he saw the comments.

Indeed, the status of the lawful spouse was reflected in the comments.

His cell phone vibrated and he picked it up.

Hearing Ah Nan’s anxious voice on the other end of the line, he exclaimed, “Chuanchuan, I feel like I’ve been cheated!”

1

“… Chuanchuan?”

“Don’t you think it’s weird to call you Bobo instead? It’s as if you’re taking advantage of me. Besides, it sounds strange too…”

Si Chuanbai interrupted his nonsensical babbling. ‘This greenhorn never fails to shock me with his words.’ He pinched the middle of his forehead and said, “Get straight to the point.”

“Well, there’s someone claiming to be the director of the variety show ‘National Mass Workout’ and he wants Xiang Yi to join the first episode as a floating guest. It seems iffy to me but I’m afraid that it’s real…”

1

Si Chuanbai raised his eyebrows. Even he was a little astonished.

National Mass Workout was a national variety show, and arguably the hottest variety show at the moment. There had been a total of two seasons, and the third season was in preparation.

It can be said that the guests invited for each season are all A-listers. They were either veterans or the most popular celebrities at the moment.

Si Chuanbai took a deep breath and said, “Send me the contact information.”

Two minutes later, Si Chuanbai confirmed that it really was the director of National Mass Workout!

Ah Nan was incredibly excited on the other end of the line. “Ahhh, Xiang Yi has done us proud!!!”

Si Chuanbai said with a smile, “He’s quite competent.”

In a sense, Xiang Yi’s popularity can be said to have soared from a D-lister to an A-lister. However, she had never acted in any films or television dramas so far, so the industry wouldn’t recognize her. e

However, her subsequent resources would make up for it…

Becoming a close associate to Xiang Yi was just like getting an A-lister for free.

…

…

In the glass floral room.

Shi Sui politely greeted Jiang Jiujiu.

The moment the poised, gentle and handsome man appeared, Jiang Jiujiu felt that Xiang Yi had changed!

Her tone of voice had somehow become very gentle——

“You’re back, come take a seat.”

For example, she was somehow very enthusiastic——

“There are biscuits, cakes, and fruits!”

For example, she somehow kept her eyes peeled to him——

“You look great in those clothes.”

1

Shi Sui intended to go change out of his outfit after greeting her but he blinked and forgot about it at the moment. He sat down and said, “Thank you, you’re beautiful too, Xiang Yi.”

1

Jiang Jiujiu gritted her teeth.

‘Why does their interaction…resemble that of an old couple?’

“Ahem.” Jiang Jiujiu coughed hard a few times to catch Xiang Yi’s attention. She said, “You said that you’d help take some photos of me!”

“Sure.”

The two young ladies began to study which camera app and filter was better.

Meanwhile, Shi Sui remained still and raised his hand to unbutton the topmost buttons.

3

Whoosh——

Xiang Yi subconsciously looked over, captivated like sunflowers to the sun…

1

chapters.title: Chapter 411 - Jealous Shi Sui (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 411 - Jealous Shi Sui (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

His black tie was loose and the top of his snowy white shirt was slightly open, revealing his defined collarbones. The contours of his body were obvious and his skin was fair, cold, and delicate.

Xiang Yi couldn’t take her eyes off him at all. It was almost as if she was bewitched.

“I think this retro filter is pretty good, it gives off the vibe of a Renaissance painting…” Jiang Jiujiu muttered incessantly, only to find that Xiang Yi was distracted. She then looked in the direction of Xiang Yi’s sight…

Wow!

‘Why would my best friend be bewitched by a man!?!’

Jiang Jiujiu was puzzled.

She was so vexed that she poked Xiang Yi’s arm with her finger and said, “We agreed that you would take pictures of me…”

Xiang Yi seemed to have woken up from a dream. She coughed a little and said, “Ahem, I’ll help you with it then. Stand there, there’s better lighting over there.”

Jiang Jiujiu proceeded to have her photos taken happily and she even raised her brows at Shi Sui provocatively.

‘Men are all bullshit!’

‘Best friends are the most precious!’

The netizens watching the live stream were thrilled to see that scene.

—— [The jealous Shi Sui who’s fighting for attention is full of disdain towards Jiujiu!]

—— [Shi Sui’s collarbones are actually more defined than mine!]

—— [Oh my, I totally dig men like him who are laid back, relaxed, and ascetic! Shi Sui, please undo a few more buttons! I don’t lack this traffic!]

Xiang Yi patiently snapped some photos of Jiang Jiujiu and after taking about dozens of them, the two huddled together to discuss which one was nicer.

Thanks to the narcissistic Xiang Qi, Xiang Yi’s photography skills and aesthetic sense were both impeccable. Thus, she managed to make Jiang Jiujiu look like a noble lady from the medieval times.

A professional photographer once took a portrait of Jiang Jiujiu, and the angles were all flawless. However, Jiang Jiujiu felt that the photos that Xiang Yi took were a thousand times better than that of professional photographers!

However, her tone was still arrogant as she said, “Hmph, that’s all you’ve got? You still haven’t improved at all after all these years!”

However, her body language reflected her true thoughts. She was holding onto Xiang Yi’s arm, displaying the intimate friendship between them.

Shi Sui saw that scene.

He picked up the glass of water calmly and drank it slowly.

Whoosh——

Xiang Yi spinelessly looked over once more…

The man’s face was just right in every point of the brilliant warm light. He craned his snowy, fair neck, and his Adam’s apple began to roll as he swallowed. His light-colored and thin lips had been moistened by the water stains. He frowned and gently licked the corner of his mouth, seemingly intentionally yet casually.

He suddenly looked up as if he had sensed Xiang Yi’s gaze, his thin lips curling into an alluring smile.

Jiang Jiujiu thought, ‘Damn it, you dog!!!’

The netizens watching the livestream were screaming.

—— [I can’t stop myself from screaming like a marmota even though I’m covering my mouth with my hand!]

—— [Brother! I’m totally digging this one! I’d absolutely date him!!!]

—— [Uhhhhhh Jiang Jiujiu’s facial expression is hilarious. You didn’t expect this, huh!?! You’re now facing the “Grand Slam” Best Actor!]

—— [Seriously, Shi Sui is fighting for attention and to be favored, isn’t he? That must be the case, right? He really is a man with a mental age of 10 years old! I laughed until the neighbors within a five-kilometer radius have to live on hearing aids for the rest of their lives!]

…

Jiang Jiujiu gritted her teeth, thinking to herself that her best friend would never fancy such a dog-like man!

In the next second…

She heard Xiang Yi Wen ask meekly, “Do you want to have some pictures of yourself taken too?”

Shi Sui blinked and said with an innocent look on his face, “But I’m barefaced now, will I look awful in the photos? I really envy Miss Jiang for looking so good in the photos you took.”

Jiang Jiujiu: ???

That’s the pretentious compliment that’s like “Sister, you’re so good at doing makeup, unlike me, I don’t know how to put on makeup at all!!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 412 - Disliked Even By Dogs And Cats
chapters.body:
Chapter 412 - Disliked Even By Dogs And Cats

Chapter 412: Disliked Even By Dogs And Cats

1

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The staff present was having a hard time holding their laughter in but the netizens watching the live stream did not have that many concerns.

—— [He’s so pretentious as soon as he speaks.]

—— [Oh my, Shi Sui is so apt for a variety show!!]

—— [I can’t stand it anymore, look at the expressions on Xiao Naofu’s and Little Xiji’s faces. I’m rolling on my bed laughing]

1

…

Only then did they notice that Xiao Naofu had taken several steps back with a look of disdain, seemingly trying to draw a line with Shi Sui. On the other hand, Little Xiji followed behind Xiao Naofu without knowing the facts of the matter. It was even wagging its tail profusely as if a motor had been installed in it.

1

It was a vivid interpretation of being disliked by cats and dogs.

1

However, Xiang Yi retorted seriously, “No, you’d look good in all photos!”

1

Shi Sui was slightly stunned but he smiled quietly.

It seemed that Xiang Yi would somehow trust him regardless of when it was.

He…suddenly felt a sense of guilt.

2

He put away the idea of teasing her and said in a low voice, “Please, Xiang Yi.”

1

Holding her phone in hand, Xiang Yi began to take photos of him.

Jiang Jiujiu, who was at the side, kept stomping her feet, which led to countless laughter from the viewers.

What a strange but amazing scene of a social interaction

Other social situations: Thrilling, exciting, repeated dangerous testing of the waters.

The social situation in “Two Under One Roof”: Silly and hilarious

This scene had deservedly become one of the famous scenes that the fans of “Two Under One Roof” would often rewatch.

1

…

Xiang Yi took dozens of photos for Shi Sui in a bid to be fair.

“I’ll send them all to you later.” The young woman recalled what Ah Nan said about Shi Sui’s Weibo being extremely inactive because he couldn’t be bothered to manage it. Hence, she said, “Why don’t you upload an album of photos onto Weibo? There should be plenty of people looking forward to it.”

Shi Sui nodded and said, “Sure.”

All of a sudden, the countless “Shisui Sisters” fell silent in front of their computer screens.

1

Most of them had a bad impression of Xiang Yi in the beginning. After all, Xiang Yi had a bad reputation and had been hated by the Internet for almost a year. Everyone was prejudiced against her.

‘But…’

After Shi Sui joined “Two Under One Roof”, he was really different from before. He used to stay with the crew all day and apart from photos of the films and drama series he stared in, there would be no other updates on his social media accounts. The fans can never capture the traces of his life, and many people even pessimistically assumed that he simply didn’t care about his fans.

However, “Two Under One Roof” gave everyone an insight to the relaxed side of Shi Sui in his daily life, especially his interactions with Xiang Yi, through which they finally realized that he actually had a childish side. He was so childish that he would even bully kittens.

Shi Sui may not be perfect but he was very genuine.

Now… Xiang Yi even took the initiative to urge Shi Sui to take photos.

It was really an amazing feeling.

There are times when there is no reason to hate or like a person. Such feelings would surge from nowhere all of a sudden.

Shi Sui picked up his phone and edited his Weibo caption while Jiang Jiujiu grabbed Xiang Yi’s wrist.

“Uh, uh…” The arrogant heiress kept stammering while clenching her fists tightly.

After a brief moment of silence, Xiang Yi assented.

She had piqued all their curiosity.

Jiang Jiujiu closed her eyes and finally made up her mind to express the unspoken words that were hidden deep in her heart. “Hey, why don’t we take a selfie together?”

1

“…” Xiang Yi parted her cherry lips before closing them again. After a few seconds of hesitating, she asked, “I’ll take a few more photos of you, okay?”

Striking the iron while it’s hot, Jiang Jiujiu exclaimed, “Sure! I can do it! Sure!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 413 - Straight Man
chapters.body:
Chapter 413 - Straight Man

Chapter 413: Straight Man

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

In the livestream:

—— [The young lady who does one thing and says another is so adorable]

—— [Xiang Yi is really an expert at dealing with arrogant people. She has done such a good job!]

—— [Even Jiujiu can do it. Shi Sui, can you do it or not!?!]

—— [I’m tired of answering this question, #CanShiSuiDoItOrNot, okay, okay, next question]

…

…

The two young women selected various filters and stickers for their selfies. Netizens remarked that it was extremely realistic as she felt that they were bosom friends!

At the same time, Shi Sui posted something on Weibo.

The captions of the photos was simple and but they were enough to make their imagination run wild.

[@ShiSui: Shot by Xiang Yi.]

The Shisui Sisters were a little frustrated when they saw the words but after seeing the photos, they were all screaming their lungs out!

The man in the photos was wearing a white shirt and a black suit, with his tie hanging loosely on his collar. His eyes were deep, affectionate, and lazy.

1

He looked like a well-dressed scum who was ascetic yet devoted.

1

The number of comments immediately exceeded 10,000.

—— [This is totally the girlfriend POV!]

—— [He’s finally updated his Weibo! *covering my mouth and weeping]

1

—— [Thank you, Xiang Yi! I hereby announce that she’s the most beautiful pretty girl in this world!]

1

…

…

Shi Sui put away his cell phone and teased Xiang Yi in embarrassment again before turning around to get changed.

The corner of his shirt was suddenly grabbed by someone. He turned around, only to meet the young girl’s bright gaze.

“Xiang Yi?”

“Do…do you want to take a selfie?” Xiang Yi asked.

A trace of surprise appeared in Shi Sui’s eyes as he seemed to have not expected that Xiang Yi would take the initiative to ask him for a selfie. He looked at her with a smile and said, “Sure~~”

To his surprise, he clearly didn’t do anything here. In Jiang Jiujiu’s eyes, he was just playing hard to get and advancing by taking a step back!

“Ahhhh!!!”

Due to their height difference, Xiang Yi raised her cell phone high in the air but before she could tap the shutter button, it landed in a bony hand.

2

The alluring male voice said, “Let me.”

Xiang Yi said, “Okay.”

Jiang Jiujiu began to stomp her feet again when she saw that.

1

“Jiujiu, do you have something against the ground?” Fu Jiayan yawned perfunctorily and appeared beside Jiang Jiujiu, his hair all messed up.

No one woke him up so he slept until the afternoon.

Fu Jiayan seriously suspected that he had been forgotten by the program team.

1

Jiang Jiujiu gripped furiously, “This is infuriating! Don’t bother about me!”

Fu Jiayan assented.

“…”

With one hand in his pocket, Fu Jiayan frolicked towards Xiang Yi and Shi Sui. He then inched closer in a thick-skinned manner, “Senior Shi Sui, are you guys taking a selfie? Let me join you! Let me join you! Let’s use the pig head filter!!”

2

Shi Sui grinned with a “kind and amicable” gaze in his eyes.

2

The netizens watching the live stream were extremely disgruntled.

—— [Fu Jiayan! A typical straight guy!]

—— [Shi Sui: Damn it, you look like a pig]

—— [Crap, why is Fu Jiayan so hilarious? I can’t stop myself from laughing as soon as he appears]

…

Fu Jiayan’s manager almost passed out when he saw that scene in the live stream.

‘Big Brother! I told you to go there to clear your name! Why are you ruining your own image?’

‘I told you not to talk so much and try to do more while paying attention to your image but my words fell on deaf ears, huh?’

‘Brains are a good thing, forget it if you won’t put them to good use but you can’t keep them unused for more than two decades, can you!?’

1

His manager drank some cough syrup and opened the pop-up comments while shivering, all ready to face the criticism of netizens that might cause Fu Jiayan to quit the industry…

Whoosh——

The “hahahaha” comments on the screen were an eyesore to the manager.

The manager was confused.

chapters.title: Chapter 414 - So Muchapter Hate That His Name Will Eventually Be Cleared
chapters.body:
Chapter 414 - So Muchapter Hate That His Name Will Eventually Be Cleared

Chapter 414: So Much Hate that His Name Will Eventually Be Cleared

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

One minute…

Two minutes…

The scoldings and hateful comments that he expected didn’t appear but instead, the netizens left lots of positive comments.

—— [Hahaha heheehe hahahaha]

—— [The comment above, why are you able to send a voice message?]

—— [Fu Jiayan is quite suitable for being a comedian, he’s so funny himself]

—— [Is the Crown Prince actually just a silly boy in real life? I love him, I love him]

—— [To be honest, I’ve long gotten sick of looking at him after all the benefits he has been receiving from his role as the Crown Prince in the past two years.He has made the right choice by choosing to star in “Two Under One Roof”! His manager has excellent foresight! He has broken free from the constraints of the Crown Prince image!]

1

…

Seeing this, the manager slipped into a trance.

‘Excellent foresight?’

‘Does that word have anything to do with me!?!’

The reason he gave Fu Jiayan this resource was really just to clear his name…

1

‘Is this like a blind cat meeting a dead rat? Is his name getting cleared naturally!?’

…

…

Next, Fu Jiayan followed Xiang Yi to the Little Rabbit Farms where he completely let himself go and revealed his chatterbox nature. He was so long-winded that he could rattle on for a long time even when milking the cows.

1

By the time he was done, he suddenly remembered that he was there to clear his name.

He recalled his manager’s instructions to build a good image for himself…

‘Oh dear, oh dear, why didn’t those information get registered in my head!?!’

1

Jiang Jiujiu was still a little disgruntled as she kicked the pebbles every now and then. Seeing the meme-like expression on his face, she chided with disdain, “Hey, are you suffering from dementia?”

Pulling a long face, Fu Jiayan exclaimed, “I’m going to lose my fans!!”

Jiang Jiujiu asked with suspicion, “You actually have fans too?”

“Am I living in an imaginary world? Is everything fake? Could it be that I don’t actually have a single fan?”

1

Seeing that he was about to break down, Jiang Jiujiu said reluctantly, “Fine, your looks are actually somewhat acceptable. It’s normal for you to have a few fans. After all, even an ordinary person like me has hundreds of thousands of followers!”

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Somewhat acceptable-looking Fu Jiayan? Ordinary person, Jiang Jiujiu?!]

Xiang Yi carried a basket of duck eggs over and was about to make some salted duck eggs. Seeing that Fu Jiayan seemed to be in a bad mood, she asked in a warm voice, “Fu Jiayan, are you alright?”

Jiang Jiujiu secretly pointed at Fu Jiayan and then at her head again. She hinted, “There’s something wrong with his head!”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Fu Jiayan sat on the ground and hugged his knees, exuding a despondent and dejected aura.

“You guys don’t understand, they all like me because of a character. If they find out that I’m nothing like that character, no one will like me…”

Jiang Jiujiu said, “What nonsense? It turns out that you’re an actor? I thought you were a stand-up comedian.”

Fu Jiayan: “…”

He felt like his heart had been stabbed by a knife.

Jiang Jiujiu asked, “Since they like you because of a character you played, won’t they like you ten times as much as they do now if you play ten characters? Or have you not been offered any roles so far?”

1

Fu Jiayan was speechless.

‘I’m getting stabbed again and again.’

1

The netizens were laughing but Fu Jiayan’s fans took sympathy on him.

They wanted to comfort him but they didn’t know how to start. Just as Fu Jiayan said, they indeed became a fan of him because of the Crown Prince…

At this moment, Xiang Yi’s calm and indifferent voice filled the air.

“You gave the character life.”

“You’re the reason people like the character.”

“Fu Jiayan, why do you have to act? You are who you are.”

3

…

chapters.title: Chapter 415 - Why Isn’T He Coaxing Me Yet?
chapters.body:
Chapter 415 - Why Isn’T He Coaxing Me Yet?

Bang!

Bang Bang!

Every single word of his seemed to be striking Fu Jiayan’s heart.

The young woman’s gaze was clear and her tone was firm. Every word she said seemed to be full of conviction.

‘You’re you…’

‘You’re you…’

Fu Jiayan slipped into deep thought.

Fu Jiayan’s fans who were watching in front of the screen, also came back to their senses.

‘Yeah…’

‘The persona of the Crown Prince’s character is indeed not very likable.’

It was Fu Jiayan’s interpretation that shaped the soul of the Crown Prince.

They shed tears for him, rejoiced for him, got angry for him, and was agonized for him.

“It’s never the case that actors make the characters.” Xiang Yi said seriously, “You played the crown prince, but what makes you you is your identity as an actor, Fu Jiayan.”

The fans: !!!

—— [Ahhhh, well said!]

—— [Xiang Yi is really a girl with a very strong sense of self. Girls like her are really rare]

—— [Xiang Yi, please write a book soon! Since you’re so eloquent and knowledgeable, you should speak more!!]

…

At this moment, the confusion in Fu Jiayan’s eyes began to dissipate.

All along, his team had always told him to milk his persona and maintain his popularity.

He had been feeling rather anxious too as he felt trapped and confined to the limitations of the role of the Crown Prince, which he couldn’t break free from no matter how hard he tried.

In the past two years, he had starred in several drama series before but since he had already played a breakthrough role, the subsequent roles he played didn’t seem to be that outstanding.

The external pressure made Fu Jiayan more and more anxious.

‘Am I not good enough?’

‘Is it true that the peak of my career was during my debut?’

‘Is it that I can only play that one classic role in my life?’

During the most extreme periods of his life, he had even began loathing himself.

Fu Jiayan even agreed with the others that he had just gotten lucky to have been given the chance to play a character that brought him fame.

However, Xiang Yi’s words had knock some sense into him and made him wake up.

Moved to tears, Fu Jiayan said, “Xiang Yi, you’re wonderful! You’re totally my life mentor and my guiding light!”

He tried to shake Xiang Yi’s hand, but was mercilessly slapped away by Jiang Jiujiu.

“Ew, don’t try to take advantage of Yiyi!”

Fu Jiayan sniffled and sincerely asked, “Xiang Yi, do you have anything else to say to me?”

‘What Xiang Yi said must be true and insightful! I have to note them down in a small notebook!’

In the next second…

Xiang Yi asked calmly, “Do you want to bring a bottle of salted eggs with you when you leave?”

Fu Jiayan: ???

“The salted eggs are large and they all have double yolks. After they’re pickled, the yolks will flow slowly when poked…”

Fu Jiayan: ???

“You don’t like that? How about a jar of pickled vegetables then? I’ve pickled some cabbage, radish, beans, also made some sauces, chili sauce, and numerous types of jam. You can slowly take your pick.”

To the program team, Fu Jiayan and the others were guests.

However, to Xiang Yi, she couldn’t let her guests leave her home empty-handed.

Fu Jiayan stayed silent for a moment before suddenly choking and saying tearfully, “Xiang Yi!!! UwU, I unilaterally announce that you’re my sister from another mother!!”

Jiang Jiujiu said, “Get lost, you stole my lie!!!”

…

Fu Jiayan seemed to be full of ardor all of a sudden as he started cleaning, chopping wood, and feeding chickens… He couldn’t stop at all.

Jiang Jiujiu saw on the swing grumpily, pouting her lips like a blowfish while staring at Xiang Yi who was pickling some salted duck eggs, as well as Shi Sui who was helping her at the side.

‘Why…why isn’t she coaxing me yet…’

‘Atrocious!’

She bit her lip, jumped off the swing, walked to Xiang Yi and stood still in front of her.

“I’m angry! I’m very, very angry!”

“I gave you a chance to coax me. It’s overdue!”

“Hmph!”

chapters.title: Chapter 416 - Her Family Truly Owns A Mine
chapters.body:
Chapter 416 - Her Family Truly Owns A Mine

Snap.

The duck egg in Xiang Yi’s hand fell into the mud mixed with salt water and yellow soil, causing mud to splash up.

“Hey? What are you angry about?”

Jiang Jiujiu clenched her fist, which was hanging beside her skirt, and exclaimed, “You…you dimwit!”

“Ah…it turns out that in this world, what is more difficult than reading comprehension questions, is figuring out the heart of a girl.”

The live stream was full of boisterous and joyful comments:

—— [As expected of you, Xiang Yi! The words of a straight woman!]

—— [Hahahaha, Xiang Yi, just continue being angry at Jiujiu!]

—— [JiuYi is so sweet! I really ship them!!!]

…

All of a sudden, the man’s chuckling filled her ear. He said warmly in a somewhat teasing manner, “Xiang Yi, aren’t you very good at coaxing others?”

Xiang Yi seemed to be in a difficult spot. She only knew to give candy to coax others but her hand was really dirty now so how could she do it now…

Glancing at Shi Sui’s clean hand, she had a flash of inspiration and nudged him with her elbow. “Help me get something from my left pocket.”

Shi Sui obeyed and fumbled about in her pocket before fishing out a candy and handing it to Jiang Jiujiu. “There you go, Miss Jiang, please have a candy.”

Instead of feeling comforted, Jiang Jiujiu was so angry that she wanted to vomit blood!

Seeing that she was about to flare up, Xiang Yi said something, which successfully comforted her.

“I have a gift for you.”

Jiang Jiujiu was surprised. ‘Huh?’

After pickling the salted duck egg, Xiang Yi washed her hands and then grabbed a box with a clean packaging. Feeling a little embarrassed, she said, “I’m sorry but your birthday has already passed. Can we treat this as a make-up gift?”

Jiang Jiujiu raised her chin arrogantly and said, “It depends on my mood.”

She opened the box and saw a beautiful necklace that had an exquisite, thin chain and a sparkling teardrop-shaped red pendant that was really eye-catching.

There were pop-up comments in the live stream that were full of contempt for the necklace:

—— [Doesn’t Vase Fairy claim to be a pretty and rich heiress? She’s giving a crystal necklace as a gift??]

—— [It looks great but crystals are too low-class. Everyone knows that crystals aren’t worth much]

—— [Jiang Jiujiu treats her as her best friend but what about her? She treats Jiang Jiujiu like a fool *waves hand*]

…

As soon as the haters started sending hateful comments, Jiang Jiujiu exclaimed in surprise, “Pigeon blood ruby? Is that the one you dug out of your mine?”

Xiang Yi nodded and said, “Yes, this is the one with the best clarity, color, and cut quality.”

In a instant, someone stood out to explain in layman terms.

—— [Pigeon blood ruby is a very pure red ruby with streaks of faint blue. It’s produced in limit amounts in the world! Each one is worth a lot of money!]

Some people also started to acknowledge Xiang Yi as their sister.

—— [Gemstone…mine? Xiang Yi, I’m your long-lost sister!]

—— [Her family really owns a mine. Mommy, is my kneeling posture proper?]

The haters: ???

‘That sparkling thing wasn’t a crystal but a pigeon blood ruby?’

…

“Do you like it?” Xiang Yi asked carefully.

Jiang Jiujiu looked up at the sky in joy but her tone was arrogant. “It’s alright, I can make do and wear it.”

After a few seconds, Xiang Yi still didn’t move and Jiang Jiujiu was puffing her cheeks up. “Help me put it on! I can’t reach!”

Xiang Yi smiled and put on the necklace for her. The pendant happened to be hanging in the middle of her collarbones, accentuating the fairness of her neck.

Jiang Jiujiu proudly glanced at the Shi Sui, as if to say, “Look, I got a gift but you didn’t~”

To her surprise, the next instant…

Shi Sui sighed gently in a pitiful, innocent and pretentiously vulnerable manner.

“Other children get gifts, when can I have mine~~”

chapters.title: Chapter 417 - Bald
chapters.body:
Chapter 417 - Bald

The fragrant aroma of tea that wafted up to her nose made Jiang Jiujiu confused as a series of questions appeared in her mind.

‘Does this dog-like guy’s family plant green tea leaves? Why would Xiang Yi like a man like him!?! I can’t figure it out. I seriously can’t.’

Xiang Yi blinked at the thought of the red ruby in the accessories box.

Although its quality was not as high as that of the one she had given to Jiang Jiujiu, it was still of a high carat level and was as large as a baby’s fist. It was also shiny and glistening.

‘I’ll give it to Shi Sui secretly at night, lest others misunderstand and his reputation gets ruined.’

…

In the blink of an eye, it was dinnertime.

There was a spread of clear porridge, some dishes, pancakes, and salted duck eggs produced in Little Rabbit Farms.

Fu Jiayan said, “This is good. Not only does the food satisfy my cravings, it’s not fattening too!”

He was a male celebrity who wanted to maintain his figure. There was a sumptuous spread for lunch so he really couldn’t help himself.’

‘I can probably curb my cravings for dinner tonight, right?’

Fu Jiayan picked up a pancake and opened his mouth to start chewing…

The eggs used for the pancake were laid by the chickens that Xiang Yi raised herself, which Fu Jiayan had collected after hatching. They were mixed with flour, vegetables, and ground pepper to form a batter that’s fried in thin layers on a pan.

The light yellow pancakes were still warm and garnished with chopped vegetables. They were so thin that they were almost transparent.

The plain pancakes were full of a rich, eggy flavor and one may add chili oil according to their preferences. The fresh and spicy taste will overwhelm one’s tastebuds.

“!”

Fu Jiayan’s pupils trembled as he was in huge disbelief.

‘What kind of a deity is Xiang Yi? Why can she make such a simple pancake taste so delicious!?!’

Hence, Fu Jiayan who just claimed that he wouldn’t gain weight from this meal, polished off eight pancakes in a short period of time, finishing each one in just a few bites!

Xiang Yi was dumbfounded. ‘Do male celebrities have such huge appetites?’

‘In comparison, Shi Sui eats really little.’

‘Does he deliberately eat less because he knows that he needs to be on camera?’

Xiang Yi thought about a poor, mini-sized cartoon version of Shi Sui having to go to work on an empty stomach and the expression on her fair face turned even more grim.

She entered the kitchen and swiftly brought the pancakes out. The first thing she did was to give Shi Sui two pancakes.

Shi Sui was confused.

Xiang Yi said with a sullen expression “Eat more. If you lose any more weight, you’ll just be skin and bones.”

She intended to remind Shi Sui that he wouldn’t be good-looking if he was too thin but Shi Sui misunderstood and thought that she didn’t like the way he looked…

‘Is my figure not good enough?’

The man raised his eyebrows and decided to put hitting the gym on his agenda. He wanted to make his abs a little more pronounced.

…

…

The dinner ended with Fu Jiayan eating until he burped.

After dinner, Fu Jiayan continued to clamor and lament, “This can’t go on, I’m going to gain at least a kilo and a half after each meal.” He then changed into a workout suit and went out for a run.

Jiang Jiujiu wasn’t considered a guest of the show and didn’t care about her image. Thus, she began playing with her phone in the living room openly.

After returning home, she learned that Xiang Yi was starring in a live stream variety show bu she didn’t have time to watch it so she wanted to make up for the episodes she had missed but she accidentally clicked on today’s episode.

The live stream was divided into the main livestream and personal livestream. Without hesitation, Jiang Jiujiu chose Xiang Yi’s personal live stream.

The pop-up comments were automatically switched on and most people were sucking up to her.

Jiang Jiujiu: Why are these people such bootlickers?!!

Some netizens discovered that Jiang Jiujiu was watching the live stream so they started sending lots of comments.

—— [Missy, is it difficult to learn to play the violin?]

—— [Do you know that you’re very rude? So what if you’re rich?]

—— [I’m very curious how you can be friends with Xiang Yi. What’s so good about her? I can’t understand]

chapters.title: Chapter 418 - Bald (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 418 - Bald (2)

Chapter 418: Bald (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

—— [Don’t you think Xiang Yi is being too pretentious? Hanging out with someone like her must be very tiring]

…

The comments on the screen were blinding.

Jiang Jiujiu skipped all the malicious comments that were directed at her and accurately found some hateful comments that were directed at Xiang Yi!

‘Are these people too full?’

1

‘Xiang Yi is so cute and she actually received hate too?’

Jiang Jiujiu was furious. “You people are heartless! Who are you to criticize Xiang Yi!?!”

The haters who were sending streams of pop-up comments discovered that Jiang Jiujiu had really read them and thus became even more enthusiastic about sending hate.

—— [I still like genuine girls like Jiang Jiujiu. Xiang Yi is too pretentious. Isn’t it tiring to constantly be trying to give herself a beautiful persona?]

1

—— [Girl, blink your eyes if you feel threatened! You clearly weren’t like this when you just came. Why have you started to defend Xiang Yi?]

—— [At the end of the day, Vase Fairy is just a variety show star who has no notable achievements under her belt apart from “Two Under One Roof”. She isn’t even in any other variety show]

—— [I admit that Xiang Yi is quite popular now but she doesn’t have any other works. Without any notable work, her fame will vanish easily. “Two Under One Roof” one go on forever. Once this variety show is over, she’ll definitely lose all her fame]

1

…

Jiang Jiujiu looked at those comments in disbelief.

‘Has…Yiyi been receiving so much flak all this while?’

‘Why would humans have so much malice towards another human across the internet!?!’

1

She later realized that there was something wrong with Qin Wanyan’s words.

In the past year, Jiang Jiujiu and Xiang Yi rarely contacted each other, and had only met briefly at the old residence of the Xiang family. At that time, Qin Wanyan was also present and was continuously pestering her for her number.

Later, Qin Wanyan kept sending messages from time to time to show her concern.

It must be said that those words gave warm comfort to Jiang Jiujiu who was far away from home. Hence, she once regarded Qin Wanyan as a friend.

This time after returning home, Qin Wanyan asked her out for dinner and during the meal, she mentioned that Xiang Yi’s character had changed greatly. Xiang Yi had apparently become rather ruthless and mean to her friends. All she cared about was men as she was all smitten with them. She also claimed that Xiang Yi no longer treated the two of them as friends…

1

Qin Wanyan complained and lamented about being treated harshly by Xiang Yi just because she had accidentally offended her. Now, she had lost her company and fans, and her career as an actress was probably going to reach its end.

Hence, Qin Wanyan asked Jiang Jiujiu to plead Xiang Yi for mercy on her behalf.

Jiang Jiujiu naturally wouldn’t believe her entirely but she was more or less affected. When she first arrived, she didn’t treat Xiang Yi with an amicable attitude.

1

When she thought that it was because of her attitude that Xiang Yi had gotten scolded, she was full of self-reproach.

At this moment, the phone vibrated because she had received a message from Qin Wanyan.

Qin Wanyan first sent her a weather forecast, reminding her that the temperature will drop tomorrow. She then said, “I’m so envious of you. Xiang Yi treats you as a good friend, unlike me… I don’t even know how I offended her and ended up in this plight…]

Jiang Jiujiu squinted and thought about the way Shi Sui was in the afternoon. She gritted her teeth and typed away incessantly before replying,

[Xiang Yi will never bully others for no reason. Did you say that she bullied you? Well then… it must be because you deserve it!]

3

Qin Wanyan who was in front of her screen: ???????

Jiang Jiujiu raised her head.

She said ferociously at the camera, “Xiang Yi is not like what you said!”

“She’s the most gentle and best girl in the world!”

“If you people spout nonsense again, I…. I will pluck out your hair and make all of you bald!!!”

2

chapters.title: Chapter 419 - Best Accompaniment (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 419 - Best Accompaniment (1)

The girl confirmed in a puerile voice.

There were no cameraman to follow the cast around in the living room at the moment, only still cameras that were placed in fixed spots. In the small director’s room, Li Jianyu and the others were munching on pancakes and some dishes. When they heard Jiang Jiujiu’s words…

Everyone: ‘Huh?’

‘Ah… She’s a little, a little adorable!’

The netizens in the live stream were a little surprised because they didn’t expect Jiang Jiujiu to say those words.

—— [Make us bald? That’s not necessary…]

—— [It’s so immersive, my scalp has begun to hurt]

—— [We must have hair for you to pluck before you can do that. Everyone, look at your heads guys, do you still have any hair? *dog head*]

…

The pop-up comments were all arguments between the silly netizens.

However, there were still people who refused to give in. The more furious Jiang Jiujiu was, the more smug they were.

They were all sarcastic and derogative… They were so callous with their words that they would say anything that would trigger her.

Jiang Jiujiu was clenching her fist tightly, wishing she could go through the internet to beat up those crooks!

A clear, warm voice managed to save Jiang Jiujiu from her bad mood in time.

“Jiujiu, can you wear this pajamas?”

It was Xiang Yi.

That realization made Jiang Jiujiu calm down.

She turned her face and saw that Xiang Yi had grabbed two sets of pajamas, one of which was pink with rabbit ears while the other was cream-colored with bear ears.

It was just something hat she said casually, but Xiang Yi remembered it all.

Jiang Jiujiu suddenly felt a lot less angry.

‘What’s the point of bothering with fools? After all, they’re quite pitiful for being brainless.’

“It’s not too bad.” Despite saying so, Jiang Jiujiu quickly proceeded to take a shower before changing into the pajamas with bear ears.

She stopped before entering the living room and then returned to grabbed her violin case.

By the bookshelf, Xiang Yi was flipping through a book on bow and arrow. When she saw Jiang Jiujiu come out with her violin, her eyes curved as she asked with a faint smile, “Which song are you going to play?”

Jiang Jiujiu corrected her. “You mean which song are we going to play?” She continued seriously, “We’ll okay together, okay?”

Of course, Xiang Yi wouldn’t turn down a request from her best friend.

“Sure, shall we go to the music room?”

All of a sudden, the pop-up comments were full of mockery.

—— [Oh please, she’s the chief of Orpheus Academy, are you worthy of it?]

—— [You learned folk music, don’t embarrass yourself in front of a classical music student, okay…]

—— [Didn’t Jiang Jiujiu just defend Xiang Yi? Why has she changed her mind again? Letting Xiang Yi and her play a piece together with her… They’re worlds apart…]

…

There was no camera in the music room so Li Jianyu quickly instructed the cameraman to go over.

Ruan Qing asked, “Are you so at ease with it? Aren’t you afraid that Xiang Yi would flop?”

Li Jianyu said in a bubbly manner, “I admit that I’m taking a gamble but I think that Xiang Yi will let me win this gamble!”

He didn’t believe in himself, but in Xiang Yi.

Ruan Qing raised her eyebrows. Instead of taking a stand, she kept her eyes fixed on the screen.

…

In the music room.

Every member of the Xiang family basically knew how to play one or two musical instruments. There was a large variety of instruments in the music room. Apart from the perennial Western instruments, there were also traditional instruments such as the zither, Guzheng and Chinese flute.

Seeing that Xiang Yi was pacing back and forth around the traditional instruments, the “Spicy Rabbits” felt worried for her.

However, she walked past the traditional instruments and chose the cello in the end.

‘Huh?’

‘She didn’t choose the Chinese string instruments nor the electric guitar but the…cello!?!’

Someone mocked:

—— [Oh please, this is a cello. Does she even know how to play it? How dare she choose it?]

However, the moment Xiang Yi sat down and picked up the bow, her aura seemed to have suddenly changed.

…

chapters.title: Chapter 420 - Best Accompaniment (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 420 - Best Accompaniment (2)

She looked down, her long lashes casting a faint shadow on her fair face. She was holding the bow with her thin and tender hand, on which her ones were defined clearly. Her skin was so fair that her faintly green veins were clearly visible.

It was low-key, unobtrusive, yet gentle and elegant. Even though she was wearing cute pajamas with rabbit ears on the hood, she gave off the vibes of playing the cello in a gorgeous dress during a recital.

The cello had not been touched for a long time. Xiang Yi first tried to pull it downwards before tuning it slowly.

Someone retorted: [Are you toxic? What are you procrastinating for? You either know how to play it or you don’t. What’s the point of pretending?]

At this moment, a golden pop-up comment appeared in their eyes.

The golden pop-up comment was a privilege given to the live stream hosts who were in the Hall of Fame of Starry app. Basically, all the famous live stream hosts were on Starry app.

The person who posted the comment was none other than a live stream host of the music genre, who had a million fans—Little Nocturne

—— [Little Nocturne: Without the help of a tuner, or the assistance of any software and Jiang Jiujiu… Missy must…have a good sense of music if she isn’t pretending to be impressive, right?]

The golden pop-up comment stayed on the screen for fifteen seconds before disappearing. That was enough to let countless netizens take a clear look at it.

—— [Wow! Great Nocturne!]

—— [When will the Great Nocturne start a live stream? I want to hear you play the piano]

—— [You should reflect on yourself. How long has it been since you started a live stream!?! You actually have the cheek to come here and watch someone else’s live stream?!]

—— [Absolute sense of music? Sounds impressive but can Little Vase Fairy actually have such a thing?]

Even Little Nocturne herself was a little uncertain.

Having an absolute sense of sound referred to the ability to distinguish the specific pitch of a sound without a reference tone, including the sounds of nature like rain, thunder, and even the sound of talking, the sound of opening doors… In the ears of people with a sharp sense of sound, these sounds are like melodies in the pentatonic spectrum. It was a natural ability that existed and did not require deliberate exercise.

It wasn’t an exaggeration to say that people with such talent are one in a million.

Even in the Orpheus Orchestra, in which Jiang Jiujiu is a member alongside the best young performers from various countries, not everyone had a sense of sound.

However, when Xiang Yi finished tuning the instrument, Little Nocturne’s eyes lit up before the screen!

She really had a good sense of sound!

There was no shortage of people who were proficient in music in the live stream.

—— [I take my hat’s off to Xiang Yi. This tuning is even more accurate than that of my tuner]

—— [Other than that, this talent alone can beat the keyboard warriors here. Go to sleep, okay?]

—— [It’s no wonder that she’s so good at playing string instruments and the electric guitar. UwU, Xiang Yi is favored by God! God is chasing after her to give her favors!!]

…

Xiang Yi made a hand gesture at Jiang Jiujiu to show that she was ready.

Jiang Jiujiu nodded and in the next second, the melodious sound of the violin instantly caught the ears of the crowd!

She was definitely worthy of being the chief violinist of the Orpheus Orchestra!

Even people who knew nothing music could feel that Jiang Jiujiu is playing particularly well!

A golden pop-up comment appeared on the screen of the livestream.

[Little Nocturne]: Such terrifying strength.

In reality, Little Nocturne was also a student of a top overseas music academy who was surrounded by bigwigs. Hence, she could better recognize how impressive Jiang Jiujiu’s abilities were.

After a short while, the clear and melodious violin sounds fused with the thick and heavy sounds of the cello…

The cello wasn’t trying to overshadow the violin at all. In fact, it was completely a textbook example of the best accompaniment a main instrument can have. In an instant, Little Nocturne got the goosebumps!

chapters.title: Chapter 421 - Best Accompaniment (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 421 - Best Accompaniment (2)

For example, some people would naturally stand out and steal the limelight.

That was exactly what the cello was like at the moment.

It was clearly an accompaniment but it was an existence that was not to be neglected!

“Just how many instruments can she play…” Little Nocturne muttered.

Most of the netizens watching the livestream didn’t have a sharp sense of hearing like Little Nocturne nor did they know much about playing instruments but they all felt the same way…

—— [This ensemble is wonderful!!]

—— [Never mind that I am not educated, I can roam the world with a single word ‘Damn’]

—— [Ahhh, Xiang Yi can actually play the cello too! Impressive!!]

…

Yes, it was indeed very pleasant and melodious.

It was even more shocking for professionals.

The piece that Jiang Jiujiu played was called “Spring Overture” which had an upbeat rhythm that was full of life and vitality. It was also extremely difficult to play and required a high level of skill.

They weren’t surprised that Jiang Jiujiu could reach such a level.

However, Xiang Yi… was just a musician who learned traditional folk music. Yet, she actually played the cello so well?

Many people were in an extremely complicated mood.

They initially thought that Xiang Yi was just good at folk music but they didn’t expect her to be equally outstanding in playing Western musical instruments.

It was as if she had gotten a hack to reach that level!

Besides, with such impressive abilities and talent, she actually chose to join the entertainment industry instead…

What was she after?

That was simply a shame to those who majored or studied music!

When they reached the climax of the song, Jiang Jiujiu suddenly performed an easy and relaxed bow, which was amazing and full of vitality. Immediately afterwards, she continued the song on a whim instead of following the original melody.

Xiang Yi looked up at her with a calm gaze. Without uttering a single word, she turned up the fingering with her left hand while jumping the bow with her right to hand. There was almost no pause and she perfectly matched Jiang Jiujiu’s improvisation!

—— [Little Nocturne: !!!!!]

There was yet another golden pop-up comment and a series of exclamation marks, which were enough to show how excited Little Nocturne was!

He jumped up from the sofa immediately, turned on the livestream equipment fixed on the tripod, and then started placing his fair and slender fingers onto the black and white keys while listening to Xiang Yi and Jiang Jiujiu’s improvisation…

Their improvisation turned into an ensemble of three!

Little Nocturne’s fans swarmed in excitedly after they received a notification, only to be stunned immediately!

In the past, Little Nocturne would try to keep his face out of the frame when he was on air, or use the face-changing filters that come with the live-stream software to block his face with a cartoon avatar, but today, he had somehow actually showed his face!

The young man in the frame was slender and he had an exquisite side profile, looking just like a comic character.

What attracted the most attention were his hands…

His fingers were long and slender, with well-defined bones. However, there was a somewhat old red rope wrapped around it. With his movements, white and red intertwined as if there is a kind of compelling magic.

The fans: !!!

—— [Where did this little angel come from!?! Make your debut online!]

—— [Oh my God, Little Nocturne’s handsome good looks are at the level that they’d simply defeat a large number of local idols!]

—— [His hands, his face, his piano skills… Woww! Why do I have nothing to do with such a handsome yong man!?!]

The fans complimented Little Nocturne or a long time before realizing that Little Nocturne seemed to be…playing some accompaniment music for someone!

chapters.title: Chapter 422 - Anger You Anger You
chapters.body:
Chapter 422 - Anger You Anger You

Little Nocturne’s fans were mostly music lovers so they could easily distinguish the different sounds of the three instruments.

Piano, violin, cello.

Combined together, it was like the performance of a small orchestra.

The improvisation of the violin was spontaneous and natural; the cello was apt and tacit; the addition of the piano enhanced the timbre and, like icing on the cake, pushed the climax of this ensemble to the peak!

…

In the music room, Jiang closed her eyes and devoted herself to the performance.

In no time, she ended her improvisation and skillfully transitioned to the last movement of the Spring Overture. The light and deft sound, which was full of the beautiful aura of spring, slowly and gently struck the softest corners of the human heart.

When the last note settled down.

The violin, cello and piano came to a clean close at the same time!

It was as if someone had pressed the mute button and everything fell silent.

“…”

The pop-up comments were also gone as if they had been cleared.

However, a few seconds later, the screen was covered in comments again.

—— [Did Goddess Nuwa create me to be a filler and make up the number?]

—— [I… *cactus* *cactus* Was there really no rehearsal, just improvisation?]

—— [After three years of learning to play the violin, I still sound like I’m sawing mood when I play some new tunes from time to time. I still can’t remember the score, and these two ladies are like human notation machines?]

…

The long-awaited ensemble this time could be said to be excellent. Panting slightly, Jiang Jiujiu looked at Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi was still staring at her and clapping. “You’re impressive.”

Jiang Jiujiu suddenly felt like crying.

As a gifted child, she had taken a shortcut in learning the violin compared to ordinary people.

However, even geniuses, too, have to work hard to beat other geniuses.

Over the past decade or so of learning the violin, she often developed calluses and blood blisters on her fingers. Even her parents and teachers would chide her.

Only Xiang Yi was different.

She would always gently encourage her.

“You…you’re not too bad.” Jiang Jiujiu said arrogantly, “You must not have played for a long time, your skills are far worse than before!”

“I’m too busy…”

“Excuses! It’s all excuses!”
