‘She’s clearly more talented than me but she just had to go be a cook…’ Jiang Jiujiu expected better from Xiang Yi.

“Do you want to consider joining the Orpheus Orchestra?”

The haters were pleased to hear that.

—— [Is Orpheus Orchestra an orchestra that you can join just because you want to?]

—— [Okay, I admit she can play the cello, but does Orpheus Orchestra want her?]

—— [Don’t insult the Orpheus Orchestra, it’s a sacred place for young performers which is not to be dirtied by people like Vase Fairy!]

…

The pop-up comments ups were full of discussion, but the reality was that Xiang Yi’s expression was indifferent.

She shook her head and said, “Jiujiu, I want to do what I like to do.”

She didn’t need fame or fortune, nor did she care about the applause and denigration.

She had once lost everything so she knew what was most precious.

Jiang Jiujiu pursed her lips, feeling a little upset but she made up her mind to respect Xiang Yi’s decision.

She pushed Xiang Yi towards the outside of the room and said, “Go out first, I want to be alone for a while!”

Xiang Yi was a little confused but she nodded and did as she was told.

She closed the door. The soundproofing effects of the room was excellent and Jiang Jiujiu was fearless.

She moved her head closer to the camera and said fiercely, “Orpheus invited Xiang Yi to join them back when she was 15 years old!”

“If you don’t need your eyes, you can donate them to those that need them!”

“My best friend is just that excellent! She’s going to anger you! Anger you!”

chapters.title: Chapter 423 - Xiang Yi’S Gift (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 423 - Xiang Yi’S Gift (1)

The netizens in the livestream were first stunned before quickly realizing that Jiang Jiujiu was…clapping back at the haters.

—— [Today’s dose of cuteness overload!]

—— [What is this absolute cutie!?!]

—— [Wow, Missy is just being arrogant. Actually, she’s very protective of Xiang Yi!]

—— [I’m so envious, I’m so envious. When will I ever have such a good best friend? The girls in my 8-pax dorm are scheming against each other like in palace dramas, every single day…]

The amount of information in Jiang Jiujiu’s words made the netizens astonished!

Invited by Orpheus Orchestra at the age of fifteen?

Doesn’t that prove that Xiang Yi’s talent in music is not any inferior to that of Jiang Jiujiu!?!

God probably added extra hacks, talents, and maximum skills to Xiang Yi for free when he created her, right? He probably put in extra work into sculpting her meticulously and even created a few godly brothers for her, right?

…

Outside the door.

After being pushed out, Xiang Yi seemed to have seen Shi Sui who was standing by the floor-to-ground window.

The man was wearing a cotton sports attire and reluctantly stroking Xiao Naofu who was reluctant to be stroked by him.

The reason was none other than that they had no other materials.

Li Jianyu was now starting to dislike Shi Sui. Without Xiang Yi, he would be absolutely boring!

He would either be reading the script or reading books. Many a time, the scenes of him would look like stills.

In a moment of helplessness, the program team had no choice but to bring Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji to let the audience swoon over them.

Xiao Naofu and Shi Sui hated each other.

Shi Sui was rubbing Xiao Naofu half-heartedly, clearly distracted and out of sorts.

Xiao Naofu had its butt facing him, completely interpreting its hatred towards him through its actions.

Little Xiji was quite meek as it laid obediently by Shi Sui’s side and fell asleep in a daze.

Hearing the sounds of the familiar footsteps, Xiao Naofu broke free from Shi Sui’s embrace ruthlessly and scurried towards Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi squatted down and caught it.

Xiao Naofu rubbed its head against her chest affectionately and even pressed its face against Xiang Yi’s to ask for kisses.

Mwacks——

Xiang Yi kissed it on the forehead and asked in a tender voice, “Are you hungry or not? Do you want to drink some milk?”

Xiao Naofu glanced at Shi Sui and wagged its tail before meowing in a soft and coquettish tone.

‘Hmph, see, the silly woman loves me the most!’

Shi Sui clucked his tongue against the roof of his tongue but he soon reacted and realized that he had already quit smoking.

He rubbed the middle of his forehead in some annoyance.

There was suddenly a clear and exquisite candy jar in front of him, which was full of lollipops.

“There are fruit-flavored ones.”

Xiang Yi had a pleasant voice that was gentle, tender, and sweet but not overwhelming.

Shi Sui thanked her and then saw her going to make some milk for Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji.

Hugging the candy jar, he grinned gleefully in an alluring manner.

Raising his brows at Xiao Naofu, he provoked languidly, “Little kitten, what’s good? I have candy but you don’t~~~”

Xiao Naofu was so furious that it roared viciously. “Meow!!!”

In the live-stream:

—— [That’s the couple that fierce hunks should be shipping!]

—— [She’s really giving him candy! The UntimelyCouple is so sweet!!]

—— [The way he drags his words is so irritating hahaha]

…

In the director’s room, Li Jianyu seemed to be absolutely speechless as he glanced at Shi Sui who was on the screen, in disdain.

‘See, his scenes are just going to be like stills when Xiang Yi is not around.’

‘Once Xiang Yi is here, he’s an absolute simp!’

When he thought that the Shi Sui was being as much of a simp as he could be, the man slowly picked up Xiao Naofu and asked with a gentle smile, “Want a kiss, Little Kitty?”

Xiao Naofu shuddered with horror in its eyes.

‘Damn it, don’t come here ahhhhhh Silly woman, save me!!’

chapters.title: Chapter 424 - Xiang Yi’S Gift (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 424 - Xiang Yi’S Gift (2)

It was trying hard to push Shi Sui away with its furry little paws and claws, screaming repulsed from head to toe.

However, Shi Sui deliberately misinterpreted its meaning. “Want a kiss? Tsk, you’re so clingy~”

Xiao Naofu barked in exasperation. Woof! Woof! Woof!

Shi Sui, who had easily managed to make the little kitten bark like a dog, blinked and his long eyelashes fluttered. He teased, “No? What a lying little kitten who doesn’t mean what it says. Do you want me to kiss you on the face or on the…”

He deliberately tapped Xiao Naofu’s mouth with his long, slender and clammy fingers.

Xiao Naofu shivered even more, and all the hairs on his body stood on ends.

He would feel embarrassed about bullying Xiang Yi.

But would he feel the same when it comes to Xiao Naofu?

The answer is of course…no.

The man’s light-colored thin lips were curled into a perfect arch. Perhaps because he had just drank some water, there was a touch of moisture on them.

He bent forward and inched over slowly towards the soft and fluffy little kitten, as if in slow motion…

—— [For a moment, I don’t know who to envy]

—— [God, let my soul possess Xiao Naofu!]

—— [Hahahaha, Xiao Naofu really doesn’t know how blessed it is]

—— […Wait a minute, didn’t Xiang Yi just kiss Xiao Naofu? If Shi Sui kisses it, wouldn’t it be the same as kissing Xiang Yi indirectly???]

—— [Wtf??!!]

—— [WTF!?!?!]

…

Xiao Naofu was just about to be kissed by him…

Woof!

Little Xiji bit onto Shi Sui’s sock, ferocious and full of animosity.

Shi Sui paused and stared at the Shiba Inu on the ground.

Little Xiji was a little scared of him but it was very courageous. Woof! Woof!

Seemingly deep in thought, Shi Sui let go of Xiao Naofu with a mirthless smirk.

Xiao Naofu quickly fled. It was so fast that there were afterimages as it moved. It stayed by the door of the kitchen and stared warily in the direction where Shi Sui was.

Little Xiji chased after Xiao Naofu and laid down beside it before licking its fur comfortingly.

At this moment, Xiang Yi came out with two bowls of goat milk formula and asked in puzzlement, “Why did you all come here?”

Xiao Naofu complained aggrievedly. “Meow~ Uwu Meow~”

—— [Silly woman, that dog-like man is obnoxious!]

Xiang Yi put the bowl on the floor and coaxed Xiao Naofu for a while before walking towards Shi Sui.

“What’s wrong with you, Xiao Naofu?” the young girl asked in a helpless tone.

Shi Sui chuckled and said, “I’m just teasing it.”

The program team was shocked speechless!

The netizens were dumbfounded.

‘Is that a humane thing to say?’

‘You’re even saying it with a straight face. You’re much more of a dog than Little Xiji!’

…

Seeing that the script from last time was still placed on the coffee table in front of him, Xiang Yi asked curiously, “Have you not made up your mind yet?”

After a moment of silence, Shi Sui said, “Actually, I want to ask you if you’re interested in acting in a film.”

Xiang Yi was stunned. “Huh?”

The conversation between the two of them instantly caused an uproar in the comments’ section of the live-stream!

—— [Is Shi Sui crazy? Does Vase Fairy have any acting chops??]

—— [She’s just a variety show star who has no representing works. Does she want to become a movie star right away?]

—— [Indeed, men really do think with their lower bodies. They lose all their bottom lines when they meet young and pretty girls.]

—— [Hey, that’s not how you give away resources. When Xiang Yi starred in a TV drama series previously, I cringed so hard at the scenes where she widened her eyes and pouted. I even have lingering fears when I think about it now]

…

“You don’t need to rush to make a decision, you can tale your time to consider it slowly.” Well, at most, he can give up this opportunity. Shi Sui had always been easygoing when it comes to such things. Recalling the call that Si Chuanbai gave him just now, he said, “By the way, Brother Si wants me to let you know that you’ll have to go film for a variety show in the next two days.”

Coincidentally, it just so happened that the official Weibo of “National Mass Workout” announced the piece of news almost at the same time as Shi Sui.

chapters.title: Chapter 425 - Xiang Yi’S Gift (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 425 - Xiang Yi’S Gift (3)

[@NationalMassWorkout: @XiangYi, do give us the best guidance~]

…

The simple text was much more straightforward, simple and clear.

The comments section below the Weibo post was flooded with comments.

—— [Is Xiang Yi a guest?]

—— [Wtf? They actually invited Vase Fairy??]

—— [Are they serious? Doesn’t National Mass Workout only ever invite A-listers and big shots?!]

…

Everyone was discussing incessantly.

The news spread back to the livestream, resulting in an earthquake.

‘It’s actually National Mass Workout?’

Who else dares to say that Xiang Yi doesn’t have any prominent job offers?

No one!

It was the most popular and most watched variety show in the country!

It was only then that people realized how terrifyingly popular Xiang Yi was.

She was simply worthy of being called the fastest rising female artist of the year!

The “Spicy Rabbits” were confident enough to retaliate quickly.

—— [Carrying Xiang Yi away. Sudden cue.]

—— [No way, seriously? Are there really people who believe that Xiang Yi doesn’t have any resources?]

—— [Guys, you can look forward to Xiang Yi’s performance in “National Mass Workout”! Our Xiang Yi is awesome!]

…

No one dared to brag anymore, except for a few of the most malicious haters. They were still harping on the variety show but no one cared anymore.

Although it wasn’t good to be branded as an artiste who only goes on variety shows, the popularity brought about by variety shows was obvious.

In a sense, variety shows are more popular than film and television.

A lot of actors envy the popularity of variety shows, but also find going on such shows a taboo.

Firstly, it would ruin their personas and secondly, they were scared that once their images were fixed, the audience would no longer be able to immerse themselves in the roles they played in dramas and movies in the future. Thirdly, they had to maintain a sense of mystery and avoid over-promoting themselves.

Thus, there would be quite a lot of restrictions.

Xiang Yi didn’t have such woes. On the contrary, she acted in a more natural manner, which won her more fans.

Soon, the hashtag #XiangYiNewVarietyShow made it to the hot search list. The program team of “National Mass Workout” first showed their support before the comments became a spontaneous discussion among netizens.

Some people were looking forward to it, some slammed it, and some even sent hateful comments… However, it could all be summed up into one simple word.

Popularity.

Many veteran managers in the industry, as well as entertainment companies, had all acutely sensed an extraordinary aura.

Female artistes had a harder time making it big in this industry compared to their male counterparts. Generally speaking, male artists generate higher traffic flow.

However, Xiang Yi… She now generated higher traffic than the most popular idols at the moment, which left everyone in awe. They reckoned that she was probably just lacking one representative work.

Only then would she reach the peak of her career.

…

…

In addition to the hot search about the variety show, there were two other hot searches that were related to Xiang Yi, on the list.

One was a clip of the ensemble with Jiang Jiujiu, and the other left many netizens confused after they clicked on it.

‘Why is there an additional piano accompaniment?’

‘…Wait a minute, this young man is so handsome!’

While countless people were licking their screens,information about the pianist was revealed.

Little Nocturne, whose real name was Ling Ye, was a student of a top foreign music academy. He was also one of the live stream hosts in the Hall of Fame of music in Starry App.

Most people’s level of music appreciation only stagnated at the level of “Wow this sounds wonderful” but Ling Ye’s looks were way too stunning so the video quickly went viral on the Internet while also garnering the comments of many professional music critics.

—— [AGrayTurtledove: Tonight’s ensemble of Ms. @XiangYi and Ms. @Jiang Jiujiu was perfect and astonishing. I also watched the trio ensemble with @Mr. Little Nocturne. I was greatly impressed and I can only describe it as my blessing to be able to enjoy it in my lifetime.]

chapters.title: Chapter 426 - Xiang Yi’S Gift (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 426 - Xiang Yi’S Gift (4)

In this ensemble, the violin was the deserving main highlight while the piano was an evenly matched opponent. It was just like a clash between the two.

Surprisingly, the cello not only assumed the role of the accompanist perfectly, but also became the best accompaniment. Its presence simply couldn’t be ignored as it gave off a low and dense one that neutralized the intensity of the battle. It had the vigorous vitality of spring and a gentle prelude that resembled the clearing snow and flowing glacier.

The three instruments played by three people formed a perfect melody that was more than just 1+1+1.

…

…

The slew of comments was said to be extremely high.

Even a prestigious musician, Old Mu, had shared a video with a concise caption.

—— [@OldMu: Not bad.]

The netizens were dumbfounded.

The last time Xiang Yi played the accompaniment music for SEASEVEN, this big shot had also come forth to play the bass music. They didn’t expect him to support Xiang Yi again this time!

This person’s status in the music industry was comparable to that of a national team player!

He actually came forth to support Xiang Yi..

However, it was still just the beginning.

Several string instrument experts of the folk music world, such as masters of the Suo Na (Chinese double-reed woodwind instrument) and masters of the zither who had Weibo accounts, were all forwarding comments and giving them likes.

The netizens felt suffocated when they saw the recognition that those masters gave Xiang Yi.

—— [Ah this is just outrageous]

—— [Could it be that all these bigwigs are silently following Xiang Yi?]

—— [Oh my God, Xiang Yi is simply the group favorite of the folk music world!]

—— [No, no no, not just the folk music world. The bigwig of the ancient classical music world has spoken up too! It’s the first time I’ve seen so many musical experts making comments on Weibo!! I suggest you search the hashtag #MusicLegacy. Senior’s words have really touched me!]

Some netizens searched the hashtag, the page froze for a few seconds before displaying the results.

—— [@YuSha: Heh, the little girl can play the cello too? *thumbs up* *thumbs up* #MusicLegacy]

—— [@MyCatIsNamedFatty: Tsk tsk, with such an excellent string skipping and handling, it’s a pity that she isn’t playing the Erhu! #MusicLegacy]

—— [@ChineseNationalMusicAssociation: There isn’t a music “circle”. Be it national music or ancientclassical music, it’s all worth passing on. #MusicLegacy.]

—— [@ZhouYao: @XiangYi, would you like to consider coming to Beijing Classical Music Academy to pursue a graduate degree? Guaranteed employment. #MusicLegacy]

—— [@AnZhiRuo: Stop trying to vie with us, the Vienna Orchestra, okay?@XiangYi, will you consider becoming the principal cellist? #MusicLegacy]

—— [@WorldClassicalMusicAssociation: We thank the three performers for the excellent performance, which was an absolute pleasure. We also hope that there will be more young people who enjoy music, be it folk, pop, classical, or other genres, as long as it’s music.]

The netizens who saw this scene were all astonished!

This is!!!!

Who else in the entertainment industry is able to gain the support of so many bigwigs and official music academies!?!

This night, more and more people remembered the name “Xiang Yi” and her unparalleled talent in music.

…

…

After the live-stream was over, Xiang Yi took out another ruby and placed it in a box. She even specially tied a butterfly bow around it.

Xiao Naofu’s tender meowing came from the balcony and Xiang Yi walked over, only to see that Xiao Naofu was meowing loudly at Shi Sui who was standing opposite the balcony.

In the night, the man’s body was tall and slender. The breeze blew over, falling gently on his soft hair.

chapters.title: Chapter 427 - Adore (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 427 - Adore (1)

When Xiao Naofu saw Xiang Yi, it meowed loudly again a few more times, as if it had found a backer.

“Xiao Naofu, you can’t behave like this,” she chided, though in a gentle tone of voice.

The kitten moved its head away and humphed coldly.

Xiang Yi looked at Shi Sui curiously and asked, “What did you do to Xiao Naofu? Why is it always so fierce to you?”

Shi Sui, “I joked about taking it to be neutered.”

Xiang Yi said seriously, “Don’t say such things to Xiao Naofu again in the future. He’s still just a baby who has a weak heart. You can’t hurt him like that.”

Shi Sui agreed, “Alright, anything you say, Xiang Yi.”

Hearing his words, Xiao Naofu widened its icy blue eyes in disbelief.

Xiang Yi said, “Promise it then.”

She held up the chubby and soft white kitten.

“…”

Shi Sui probably didn’t expect that there would be a day that Xiao Naofu lowers its pride one day. Resting the tip of his tongue against his jaw, he sighed after a few seconds. “Xiao Naofu, I won’t scare you by bringing up the matter about the neutering again.”

‘I have to obey Xiang Yi.’

Xiao Naofu’s tail dangled twice in the air. The godsend sense of bliss overwhelmed it.

The next second, it heard Xiang Yi saying, “You are also not allowed to be fierce to Brother Shi Sui!”

Xiao Naofu: Meow!

—— [Hmph, I’m not going to listen to it. I’m not going to.]

Xiang Yi teased, “If you’re obedient, I’ll prepare a luxurious seafood feast for you. I mean the type that contains ten types of ingredients!”

Xiao Naofu: Would I swallow my pride for the sake of food?

Hah, of course, I will.

It meowed sweetly in a fawning and coquettish manner.

“Okay then, you two shake hands and make up, alright?”

Hearing that, Shi Sui and Xiao Naofu both showed their reluctance to agree.

However, Xiang Yi insisted.

Hence, Shi Sui had no choice but to stretch out his bony hand while Xiao Naofu reluctantly reached out its chubby little paw.

The man and the cat shook hands on the balcony. However, after less than a second, they eagerly retracted their hands as if they had been stained by something filthy.

Shi Sui was rather composed. Xiao Naofu couldn’t stand it any longer so it leaped out of Xiang Yi’s arms in a bid to look for Little Xiji and lick it.

It didn’t want to lick its paw!

‘That mans hand must smell like a dog!’

…

Looking at Xiao Naofu’s back, Xiao Naofu couldn’t help but smile and remark, “It seems to have really gained some weight.”

Its body was round and chubby, and its fur was soft and tender. Its legs were short and it was extremely adorable.

Shi Sui assented softly. Even a man like him who didn’t like pets felt that Xiao Naofu was quite adorable.

However, adorable… pets are more interesting to bully 🙂

“By the way, this one’s for you,” Xiang Yi said, handing the box to him.

Shi Sui raised his brows in surprise. “I get a present too?”

Xiang Yi explained seriously, “Little children get gifts and so do big children.”

Shi Sui seemed to be stunned for a second. Perhaps, it was Xiang Yi’s illusion again.

He restrained the icy cold gaze in his peach-blossom-shaped eyes, which had hooked inner corners and upturned outer corners.

He opened the box to reveal a dazzling ruby that was emitting stunning rays of light, which was the size of a baby’s fist.

It was incredibly beautiful.

Xiang Yi said, “Although this one is not as pure as the one I gave Jiujiu nor that one but… it’s large! It’s also shiny and sparkling!”

He said with an ambiguous smile, “It’s quite big.”

“Uh…” Xiang Yi was suddenly a littler nervous, for some reason. “Do you like it then?”

chapters.title: Chapter 428 - Adore (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 428 - Adore (2)

Chapter 428: Adore (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The darkness of night was gentle, the moon was bright, and the stars were scarce. There was a faint floral fragrance in the air.

Shi Sui stared at her with his lips slightly curled into a smile, seemingly answering her question. However, he seemed to be giving a devoted confession.

“I do, I’ll like all the gifts that you give me.”

1

The young girl in front of him smiled, her eyes curled up like crescents, quiet and pretty.

“It’s good that you like it.” Xiang Yi pursed her lips and smiled, “I’m going in then.”

“Wait a minute.” Shi Sui called out to her.

“Huh?”

Xiang Yi turned around and looked at him in confusion.

The man fumbled in his trousers pocket and took out a velvet box. He said in a gentle voice, “It’s from a brand sponsor. See if you like it or not.”

2

Xiang Yi opened the box to see that it was an extremely exquisite bracelet. It was decorated with some diamonds, each of which was of quite a large carat. As it moved, it emitted dazzling rays of light.

2

Thanks to the gemstone mine that her aunt had given her, Xiang Yi had a certain understanding of the gemstone.

2

She asked with some uncertainty, “Brand sponsor… Will they sponsor you with such an expensive gemstone?”

1

Shi Sui said with a straight face, “Yeah.”

2

Xiang Yi had always believed everything he said so after hearing his words, she said, “You’re indeed very popular.”

1

‘That’s why the brand sponsored him with such an expensive bracelet.’

2

“Are you sure you can give it to me? The brand didn’t insist that you have to wear it yourself?” Xiang Yi asked.

1

“No.” Shi Sui chuckled and said, “Besides, I think it suits you better.”

Xiang Yi picked up the bracelet and scrutinized it. She liked it so she didn’t refuse out of courtesy, and instead, thanked, “Thank you.”

“Do you need me to help you put it on?”

Xiang Yi didn’t think much about it and subconsciously handed her hand and the bracelet to him.

He looked down and put on the bracelet for her meticulously. It was thin and it tickled her fair wrist when it brushed against her skin inadvertently

1

Xiang Yi’s fingertips shuddered a little.

“There you go.”

The man’s low and deep voice made her snap back to reality. Xiang Yi retracted her hand and then said in an extremely tender voice, “Thank…thank you.”

‘It turns out that’s how it feels like to have a crush on someone.’ She was deep in thought.

1

Shi Sui blinked. “Well then…goodnight?”

Xiang Yi said, “Goodnight.”

After the two of them said goodnight to each other, Xiang Yi returned to her room. Her footsteps were light and she even skipped twice.

Shi Sui was still at the balcony. He reached a hand into his pocket but he didn’t find the cigarette box. All he found was…a lollipop.

1

It was from Xiang Yi.

He had quite a strong smoking addiction and tolerating till now was already almost his limit.

However, when he saw the candy, he slowly peeled off the wrapper with joy in his eyes and bit the candy.

1

The sweetness spread, stimulating his nervous system to secrete dopamine, the pleasure hormone. The corners of his mouth were slightly curled up and he suddenly felt that it wasn’t difficult to quit smoking.

1

…

When Xiang Yi returned to her room, Jiang Jiujiu happened to push the door and entered. She squinted when she saw the bracelet on her wrist.

“Have you hooked up with that dog of a man?”

She sounded like she was questioning an unfaithful scumbag.

2

Xiang Yi said, “We didn’t.”

Jiang Jiujiu heaved a sigh of relief. “That’s good, that’s good, I knew you didn’t like him!”

1

Xiang Yi hesitated for a moment before choosing to be honest with her friend. “I think he doesn’t like me.”

2

Jiang Jiujiu was speechless.

Seeing how dumbstruck Jiang Jiujiu was, Xiang Yi calmed down.

She chose not to confess her feelings to Shi Sui because she didn’t want to affect him during the filming of the live stream.

However…

Having a crush on him wasn’t something to be ashamed of.

She nodded and said, “Yes, I have a crush on him.”

2

chapters.title: Chapter 429 - Lusting For His Body
chapters.body:
Chapter 429 - Lusting For His Body

Chapter 429: Lusting For His Body

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

*Thunderclap*

1

Jiang Jiujiu felt as if she had been struck by lightning. She was completely stunned and parting her quivering lips, unable to believe what she had just heard.

‘How can my adorable and perfect Xiang Yi possibly fall in love with that dog-like man, Shi Sui!?!’

2

Jiang Jiujiu raised her hand and tested the temperature of Xiang Yi’s forehead before muttering to herself.

1

“How…how come it isn’t warm at all…”

“…”

Xiang Yi was caught between tears and laughter. “I’mnot running a fever.”

“No, you have a fever!” Jiang Jiujiu said with certainty. “Sit still and be good while I go get a thermometer to take your temperature!”

She pinned Xiang Yi to the bed forcefully. After taking a few steps away, she realized that she had appeared a little overly concerned.

1

She added coquettishly, “Don’t be mistaken, I’m just scared that you might pass your fever to me! Hmph!!”

1

…

…

A few minutes later…

Jiang Jiujiu looked at the number on the thermometer which read 36.8 degrees before finally accepting reality.

2

‘Xiang Yi isn’t running a fever = Xiang Yi is sober and capable of thinking rationally = The dog-like man has snatched Xiang Yi away!’

1

‘Ahhhh!!!’

‘Is he worthy?’

‘He’s not!’

Having expected better, Jiang Jiujiu asked, “What do you see in him? He’s just… good looking, isn’t he? He’s just… successful in his career, isn’t he? He’s just…” She was suddenly at a loss for words because she had just listed out all of Shi Sui’s positive attributes. Feeling embarrassed and angry, “Xiang Yi, wake up, are you such a superficial person!?! You’ve met all sorts of handsome men, must you be attracted to him?”

Xiang Yi bit her lower lip and reflected on herself for a few seconds before saying, “I think, I do.”

Jiang Jiujiu was speechless.

Xiang Yi said, “He has quite a good figure. He has abs.”

3

Jiang Jiujiu was speechless.

‘So you’re not only after his face, you’re lusting after his body too!’

3

…

…

Jiang Jiujiu was so furious that she didn’t sleep well all night, and couldn’t get up early in the morning. She was grumbling incessantly and refusing to get out of bed.

Xiang Yi tucked her under the duvet and went out for a morning workout. When she returned, she flowered the plants and sprayed them with some revitalizing agents.

“Xiang Yi! Xiang Yi!!!” Fu Jiayan was like a monkey at the moment as he didn’t comb his hair or even was his face. He charged straight out with his phone in hand and exclaimed excitedly, “I’ve gone viral!!”

Overnight, something else unexpected in the entertainment industry happened in addition to Xiang Yi’s trio ensemble gaining popularity.

That was, Fu Jiayan had become famous.

He was caught off guard by his newly found fame but it wasn’t unreasonable for him to be famous either.

He was a popular A-lister to begin with and had merely been on a hiatus for a long time. All along, he had also been shackled to the persona of the Crown Prince character that he played. He didn’t expect the segment of his interaction with Xiang Yi during the live-stream to go on the hot search list, propelling him to fame immediately.

His manager received a ton of offers for Fu Jiayan to take on roles in numerous drama series and films, as well as… crosstalk shows, comedy variety shows, and other stand-up comedy shows.

1

He was so excited that he began spluttering incoherently. Fortunately, Xiang Yi was patient enough. After hearing his words, she grinned and said, “Congratulations, you’ve gotten what you wanted. Are there any variety shows that you want to be on?”

Fu Jiayan clenched his fist and said with a solemn expression, “Actually, I’d like to go on variety shows but I think Jiang Jiujiu is right. Acting in one drama series will garner fans that like me for one character that I played. If I act in ten drama series or films, my fans will probably like me for ten roles that I played! As an actor, acting well and performing to my best abilities is considered being responsible to my fans.”

When young men are self-assured, they would look extremely confident and eye-catching even if they look unkempt.

However, less than three seconds after being suave, he said with a silly smile, “Xiang Yi, let’s hug each other, here’s to our half-sibling relationship!”

1

A dangerous gaze was locked onto him from behind.

4

chapters.title: Chapter 430 - Fishball Rice Noodles
chapters.body:
Chapter 430 - Fishball Rice Noodles

Chapter 430: Fishball Rice Noodles

1

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

…

Fu Jiayan didn’t discover anything at all. He merely outstretched his arms to give Xiang Yi a hug.

1

Xiang Yi remained still and took a step back to avoid being touched by Xiang Yi.

“Save the hug.”

Not having his hug reciprocated, Fu Jiayan scratched his head and said, “I’m not that ugly, right…”

Due to the angle, Xiang Yi didn’t notice the slender figure in the doorway and said seriously, “It’s not because of you. It’s because I’m carrying a torch for someone.”

2

“Oh… huh!??!”

Fu Jiayan was flabbergasted. ‘Xiang Yi has a crush on someone? Who can it be?’

He didn’t know much about “Two Under One Roof” before joining the streams. Usually, he was really busy with work too and rarely surfed the Internet. SO, he didn’t even know what the UntimelyCouple was…

Simply put, he barely paid any attention to the things on the Internet…

…

Hear the Xiang Yi’s calm and gentle voice, the rhythm of Shi Sui’s gentle finger-tapping against the wall became extremely chaotic.

‘There’s someone she likes, huh?’

‘Could it be me? Or is it someone else?’

2

Shi Sui realized that he was actually a little nervous.

Until…

“Xiang Yi! I’m here to pick you up!” the manager, Ah Nan’s gentle and enthusiastic voice came from outside the door.

He was carrying a large backpack on his bag, clad in a short-sleeved shirt and a pair of pants. He looked like a fresh and clean college student.

Si Chuanbai, who was dressed in a smart suit and exuding the aura of an elite, was standing beside him. Their heights were about ten centimeters apart and although they were dressed in starkly different styles, they surprisingly didn’t seem out of place standing together.

1

“Ah Nan.” Xiang Yi grinned and asked, “Have you had breakfast?”

Ah Nan said honestly, “No, my car broke down. Mr. Si sent me here.”

The man beside him, Si Chuanbai, suddenly covered his lips with his hand and coughed twice.

Ah Nan immediately acknowledged, “Mr. Si hasn’t had breakfast yet!”

Xiang Yi said, “Quickly come inside then. I’ve cooked some fishball with rice noodles.”

2

Si Chuanbai said with a smile, “I’ll have to trouble you then, Missy.”

…

The fish balls were made by Xiang Yi early in the morning. She chopped up some fresh fish meat and mixed them with sweet potato flour. A variety of fillings was then stored inside the fish paste before being rolled into bright and shiny balls with rich fillings.

The rice noodles cooked in the claypot were crisp and smooth. They were then added to some soup cooked with ribs, paired with a ladle full of fish balls and seasoned with scallions, chili oil, and soya sauce. The bowl of piping hot rice noodles was then served to him.

1

“Gulp…” Ah Nan swallowed his saliva and tried his best to curb his appetite before pushing the bowl to Si Chuanbai. “Mr. Si, please.”

Si Chuanbai held up his glasses and glanced at the rice noodles expressionlessly. “I’m not hungry yet.”

1

Ah Nan asked with glistening eyes, “Shall I eat first?”

“It’s up to you.”

‘Oh, yay!’ Ah Nan cheered gleefully and picked up his chopsticks to start eating, taking large mouthfulsat a time.

5

The rice noodles were slightly springy and the broth was warm and viscous. It was good for warming one’s stomach and the best part of it all was the fish balls that were each stuffed with a different filling. The fishballs in his bowl were stuffed with pork, fresh shrimp, mushrooms and tofu… Each one was fresh and delicious!

The food was so warm that Ah Nan kept huffing and puffing. “Hoo… Hah… Sss…”

Si Chuanbai said, “Slow down, no one’s going to snatch your food away.”

1

“This is delicious! This is really tasty too!”

When it was Si Chuanbai’s turn, he tried his best to control himself but to no avail.

1

On the other hand, Fu Jiayan also huffed and puffed as he ate, not bothering about his image as an A-lister at all.

1

After finishing a bowl of noodles, Ah Nan made a heart with his fingers and said to Xiang Yi, “Love you, Xiang Yi!”

2

Xiang Yig grinned and acted like she was catching the heart.

Although she hadn’t known Ah Nan for long, she felt as if they were best friends.

Fu Jiayan, who saw that scene, suddenly had a horrified gaze….

2

chapters.title: Chapter 431 - Love Triangle
chapters.body:
Chapter 431 - Love Triangle

Chapter 431: Love Triangle

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

‘Is Xiang Yi’s manager the person that she has a crush on?’

Fu Jiayan was picking at the rice noodles with his chopsticks when his hand paused in mid-air, hovering back and forth between Ah Nan and Xiang Yi.

1

Xiang Yi smiled at Ah Nan…

Xiang Yi cooked another bowl of rice noodles for Ah Nan…

Xiang Yi gave Ah Nan a big spoonful of fish balls…

The more she looked at it, the more suspicious it seemed and the more he felt that his doubts were real!

Fu Jiayan completed the logical train of thought in his mind.

1

‘Xiang Yi being nice to Ah Nan = Xiang Yi likes Ah Nan

However, the next instant.

The corners of Si Chuanbai’s mouth were stained with soup and Ah Nan actually grabbed some tissue to wipe them. He asked with a tone of concern, “Mr. Si, be careful when you eat, don’t get your clothes stained.”

1

After all, his suit was really expensive and could only be dry-cleaned!

Si Chuanbai’s body stiffened and he said, “Thank you.”

Fu Jiayan: ???

‘Kid, why are you so effeminate?’

‘Xiang Yi likes him but he likes someone else. This, this… This is a love triangle!’

2

Fu Jiayan, who had imagined a huge show, was suffering from such a bad headache that he couldn’t breathe at all.

He felt unjust for Xiang Yi!

‘Xiang Yi deserves better!’

Fu Jiayan tried to bear with the discomfort but there was nowhere he could vent it. Jiang Jiujiu was still asleep while Si Chuanbai was involved in the love triangle himself. After giving it some thought, he felt that Shi Sui seemed to be the only reliable person he could pour his heart out to.

1

Unlike Ah Nan and others who gobbled up the food, Shi Sui ate everything slowly.

However, he would finish every single morsel of food that Xiang Yi cooked.

A man with a messy hair suddenly peeked out from beside him, and said furtively with some mysteriousness, “Senior Shi, you know who Xiang Yi likes, don’t you?”

Shi Sui answered, “Huh?”

“Ah Nan! It’s Ah Nan!” Fu Jiayan said in surprise, as if he had discovered something shockingly new.

“…”

“Ah, why does she have a crush on Ah Nan?” Fu Jiayan said with some frustration. “She can have a crush on me instead, I quite like her…”

Shi Sui asked with raised brows, “Is that so?”

Fu Jiayan chuckled in a silly manner. “That’s necessary. Xiang Yi is so adorable. Apart from Senior, which human won’t love her?!”

1

He had a clear memory of Shi Sui’s resistance towards women. At that time, there was a female background actress who tried to force a kiss on him on set. Shi Sui vomited even though only their arms touched.

2

He threw up badly.

Afterwards, Fu Jiayan heard the director vaguely mentioning that Shi Sui’s illness wasn’t biological but psychological.

There was a hurdle within him that he couldn’t get past.

He would only be able to overcome it if someone gave him a hand.

Otherwise, he would forever resist any intimate behavior with women for the rest of his life.

“It would be great if Xiang Yi likes me.” Fu Jiayan was so immersed in his fantasy that he couldn’t help himself at all. “I’ll definitely give her all the money that I earn! It won’t be too soon to get married in a year’s time, right? It would be great if we have a boy and a girl. We can have two daughters too. But it’ll be really worrisome if we have two sons…”

2

Shi Sui bit into a fish ball elegantly and the sauce in the fish ball burst in his mouth. It was so fragrant that he grinned.

“You’re right.”

Fu Jiayan thought that he was referring to the matter regarding having children. “Haha, Senior, you prefer to have daughters too, right? Girls are better…”

Shi Sui said coldly, “I’m human too.”

Fu Jiayan said with a smile, “What a cold gag, Senior. Haha, what can you be if you’re not human…”

Shi Sui remained composed.

Fu Jiayan’s laughter suddenly stopped.

—— Which human won’t love her?

—— I’m human too.

His gaze was filled with horror. He was as shocked as he was when he suddenly caught up with the news on the Internet….

chapters.title: Chapter 432 - Can I Eat Anything I Want?
chapters.body:
Chapter 432 - Can I Eat Anything I Want?

Chapter 432: Can I Eat Anything I Want?

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“Do I get to eat everything I want?”

‘Oh my God!’

‘Has he already discovered some shocking secret!?!’

‘Senior Shi actually likes women!’

‘The person he likes is Xiang Yi!’

‘Well then, here comes the problem. He likes Xiang Yi but she’s in love with someone else. Wouldn’t this mean that things will return to the Russian Doll model where there’s a love triangle within a love triangle?’

1

‘It turns out that the one suffering the most is Senior Shi…’

‘Under his glamorous appearance lies a miserable man who cries silently every night.’

The gaze in Fu Jiayan’s eyes gradually became sympathetic as he looked at Shi Sui. He even brazenly patted Shi Sui on his shoulder and said, “Senior, it’s been hard on you too…”

Shi Sui was speechless too.

…

On the other hand…

After eating breakfast, Ah Nan began to talk to Xiang Yi about work.

This time, the variety program team decided to invite Xiang Yi in hopes that she could save them. They had initially invited a male celebrity but he couldn’t attend due to certain reasons. Hence, the director of the program team suddenly decided to settle on Xiang Yi.

“Xiang Yi, I’ll accompany you there for the next two days. That variety show is very tiring and you have to be mentally prepared,” Ah Nan said earnestly, wishing he could go accept the suffering on her behalf.

1

Xiang Yi asked calmly, “Do you want to have some dumplings? I’ll make some meat dumplings and vegetable dumplings, then keep them chilled in a cooler bag so that we can have them at night. How does that sound?”

Ah Nan : !

“Sure!”

“Alright, sit down and wait for me.”

Xiang Yi proceeded to get busy in the kitchen while Ah Nan sat down obediently on the tiny stool, feeling as if he wasn’t going out for work but a company-funded trip with meals included…

…

After Xiang Yi wrapped the dumplings, Si Chuanbai helped Ah Nan with packing them up.

Xiang Yi packed up simply and dragged her suitcase to the door of the bedroom where Shi Sui naturally grabbed them.

He was tall and long-legged. The suitcase was rather short for him so he had to pull the handle up to the maximum point before he could grab it with ease.

“I’ll give you a lift.” He said.

Xiang Yi nodded and walked away while briefing him about some trivial matters. “Don’t feed Xiao Naofu too many snacks, it’s time for it to lose some weight. There are some leftover fish balls and dumplings in the freezer, you can make steamed dumplings and curry fish balls together with Director Li and the rest. The fish tank I bought is arriving this afternoon, and Uncle Wang will be delivering the fishes when the time comes. Please help me take care of them…”

2

Shi Sui listened quietly, nodding every now and then to show that he was listening.

The distance to the gate was long but it seemed short too.

Shi Sui one-handedly placed the suitcase into the trunk and Xiang Yi somehow felt a sense of…melancholy from parting.

‘It turns out… this is what it feels like to leave someone important.’

‘Were my brothers also so melancholic when I left?’

1

Shi Sui’s words brought her back to reality from her trance. “Bon voyage, Xiang Yi.”

“Okay.” Xiang Yi blinked and continued, “Okay…take good care of yourself too.”

“Alright.”

“I’ll be back as soon as I’m done with work.” Xiang Yi scratched her palm lightly with her fingers. She exclaimed anxiously, “I’ll cook you any food you want to eat!”

Shi Sui stared at her with a gloomy gaze in the bottom of his eyes. Seemingly reminded of something, his thin lips curled into a smile and he asked, “Can I eat anything I want to?”

4

“Yes.”

“Then it’s… a deal.” His deep voice was warm and pleasant to the ears, making Xiang Yi’s heart skip a beat. “Xiang Yi, you can’t go back on your word~”

With a serious expression on Xiang Yi’s fair face, she said, “I won’t.”

Afraid that Shi Sui wouldn’t believe her, she reached her fingers out and said, “We can pinky promise.”

1

Shi Sui chuckled. Just as he was about to do a pinky promise with her, Jiang Jiujiu yelled hysterically from behind, “Ahhh, you’re not allowed to hold hands! No, you’re not!!!”

1

chapters.title: Chapter 433 - Rightful Spouse
chapters.body:
Chapter 433 - Rightful Spouse

Xiang Yi somehow felt a little diffident and guilty as she retracted her hand quickly, hiding it behind herself.

Without even changing out of her bear-ears pajamas, Jiang Jiujiu dashed over and stood in between the two of them.

“Yiyi how can you hold a man’s hand!?!”

Xiang Yi said, “I didn’t, I just wanted to do a pinky…”

“You wanted to touch a man’s hand!?!?”

Xiang Yi was dumbstruck by Jiang Jiujiu’s interrogative tone.

‘Uh… there may not be a causal relationship between a pinky promise and holding hands but it seems to be a…juxtaposition?’

Xiang Yi’s eyes darted around uncomfortably and she said, “No-no…”

Shi Sui chuckled.

He discovered that Xiang Yi really wasn’t a good liar.

Her body movements and eye language had all betrayed her.

As her best friend, Jiang Jiujiu had, of course, seen through it too. She was so furious that she stomped her feet and exclaimed, “Y-y-you…you’re not pure at all!”

Xiang Yi pursed her lips without saying anything.

Shi Sui said, “Miss Jiang, Xiang Yi is setting off.”

Jiang Jiujiu seemed to have been woken up from her sleep as she said aggrievedly, “Why didn’t you wake me up!?!”

Xiang Yi said, “You seemed to be sleeping soundly so I didn’t wake you up but I saved you some of your favorite fishballs for breakfast, it’s in the refrigerator. You can have it after warming it up.”

Jiang Jiujiu was full of resentment and she immediately fell silent because of Xiang Yi’s words.

Her ears were red and she tapped her toes against the ground intermittently. Pretending to be nonchalant, she said, “So you still remember my preferences.”

“I’ve always remembered that fish and kale are your favorites. Your favorite fruit is mango…”

Jiang Jiujiu listened for a long time before saying pretentiously in satisfaction, “Okay, okay, I didn’t ask you that many questions.”

After saying that, she gave Shi Sui the side-eye.

Shi Sui wasn’t angry at all and he simply smiled at her politely.

It made Jiang Jiujiu seem like an unreasonable child who was throwing a tantrum for no reason, and himself, a mature and reliable rightful spouse.

Jiang Jiujiu was speechless.

‘What a scheming dog!’

Ah Nan and Si Chuanbai had already come out too.

“It’s time to go, Xiang Yi,” Ah Nan reminded.

The filming started in the afternoon, and later on, she would need to have her hair and makeup done. After all, National Mass Workout wasn’t as casual as Two Under One Roof.

Only then did Jiang Jiujiu fumble in her bag and find a pink sachet. “There you go, this… this is a safety amulet that I randomly got… No, it’s a gift that I got when seeking divination for others! You don’t have to take it to heart, it’s not something important, just throw it away if you don’t like it!”

Despite her arrogant tone, her hand was trembling a little, for fear that Xiang Yi would turn her down.

Xiang Yi grabbed it and carefully placed it in her pocket. She then patted it and said in a warm and gentle voice, “Jiujiu, I’ll put it away well.”

Jiang Jiujiu crinkled her nose and turned her face away. “Leave, don’t say goodbye to me. I hate hearing that word.”

Xiang Yi cocked her head to the side and thought about it before hugging Jiang Jiujiu.

She gently patted Jiang Jiujiu’s back.

“I’ll see you next time then.”

Jiang Jiujiu’s eyes turned red immediately. “You must keep to your word! Anyone who doesn’t is a little dog!”

“Alright.”

Fu Jiayan who had come out to join the fun had an even more bewildered look on his face. ‘Ah, why is there suddenly romance!?!’

‘So it’s a love quadruple within a love triangle within another love triangle!?!’

…

…

Si Chuanbai parked the car steadily at the filming location.

The voice of a dissatisfied woman spread from the makeup room.

…

chapters.title: Chapter 434 - Human Barbie
chapters.body:
Chapter 434 - Human Barbie

Chapter 434: Human Barbie

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“Are you kidding? Why should that woman be allowed to join the show? Is she fit to be in the same frame as our dear Mimi? Your program team is really strange. Why did they choose to hire a D-lister of all people…”

1

Another person, who seemed to be a crew member, said humbly, “Ah, you’re right, Sister Yan. Please take care of us, Madam Xu.”

“Hmph! You will regret it sooner or later! She’s a troublemaker, so don’t expect us to help her clean up when she stirs up any trouble!”

A sweet voice came from behind and said, “Alright, alright, stop making things hard for others. I’ll just pay more attention.”

The staff was relieved and wiped the sweat from his head. “Thank you, Mr. Xu, you’re so nice!”

Sister Yan said, “Forget it, I won’t say anything else, just give us the mission card for this episode.”

2

“Uh…” The crew said with some hesitation. According to the rules, they were not supposed to disclose it to the guests, but when facing the gorgeous lady in front of him, he was muddled up. “Okay then, I’ll send you the electronic issue later. Remember, don’t spread it around.”

“You’re really nice. Thank you so much, let’s add each other on WeChat. I’ll treat you to a meal when we’re free.”

‘What?’

‘A celebrities wants to add me, a mere staff member, on WeChat?’

1

The man curbed his excitement and added Xu Tumi on WeChat by scanning her WeChat account !QR code.

…

The three of them walked to the exclusive dressing room that was dedicated to Xiang Yi.

Ah Nan pursed his lips and said, “They’re playing good cop and bad cop…”

“Be mindful of what you say.” Si Chuanbai looked at Xiang Yi and then said, “Miss Xiang, it’s better to stay away from such people.”

Xiang Yi nodded.

Ah Nan widened his eyes and said, “But she’s obviously badmouthing Xiang Yi! Are we supposed to keep tolerating it then!?!”

1

Si Chuanbai said, “It was a slip of the tongue, there’s no real meaning to it.”

Ah Nan knew that he made sense but he was still so furious that he puffed his cheeks up.

Si Chuanbai pinched the middle of his brows and said, “The contract with the jewelry brand that Xu Tumi is the ambassador of is about to expire. Do you think it’s better for us to go over and scold her now and then keep getting provoked by her, or is it better to snatch the endorsement deal for Miss Xiang?”

2

Ah Nan was confused.

‘We can do that?’

He marveled in awe and said, “Mr. Si, you’re like the villain in movies…”

Si Chuanbai raised his brows. It was his first time hearing someone describe him in such a manner.

He rubbed Ah Nan’s colored fur and then explained once or twice before leaving.

2

Ah Nan stayed behind to accompany Xiang Yi as she waited for the makeup artist and stylist.

However, after waiting for a long time, there wasn’t a single trace of a person at all.

Ah Nan recovered from the shock and suddenly stood up. “Damn it, you’re using such a childish trick too? How shameless!”

In the entertainment industry, it wasn’t uncommon to make trouble for one’s competitors. Hence, he was negligent but he didn’t expect anyone to use such cheap tricks.

…

Meanwhile…

The stylist was carefully styling Xu Tumi’s hair and she said carefully, “Madam Xu, your hairline is a bit high. Why don’t I put some wigs for you…”

1

Xu Tumi fiddled with her newly done nails while Sister Yan said, “How can you say that!?! Mimi is gorgeous, she’s a human barbie!”

The stylist was speechless. She thought, ‘But Barbie isn’t bald.’

However, she only dared to criticize in her heart without saying it boldly.

A few seconds later, Xu Tumi said, “Make sure my hair is more voluminous than Xiang Yi’s.”

chapters.title: Chapter 435 - Putting On Airs?
chapters.body:
Chapter 435 - Putting On Airs?

The stylist murmured, “Uh…”

Xu Tumi asked, “Why? Is there a problem?”

‘Uh…there’s a huge problem!’

The stylist had watched “Two Under One Roof” before so she could tell with a glance whether or not Xiang Yi had had her hair and makeup done.

Xiang Yi had a shockingly large volume of hair, which was dark, fluffy, soft, and smooth. Regardless of whether she ties it up into a casual bun or drapes it across her shoulders, she would look especially beautiful.

The same effect can never be achieved using hair extensions…

The stylist politely told Xu Tumi that she may need to wear a wig in hopes that she would give up, but to her surprise, Xu Tumi raised her hand and took out several wigs of different colors and lengths from her large backpack.

The stylist wondered, ‘That works too?’

…

Xu Tumi spent more than three hours doing her hair and makeup.

The girl in the mirror had long, chestnut-colored tresses and clean, exquisite makeup on her face. The pumpkin-colored eyeshadow made her beautiful eyes look even more soulful.

The stylist already thought she looked beautiful enough, but Xu Tumi wasn’t satisfied at all and even wanted the makeup artist and hairstylist to redo her makeup and hair from scratch.

In the end, even the assistant director was informed, and he personally came over to coax her for a long time, promising to digitally enhance her looks frame by frame in the post-production stage.

The assistant director wiped his sweat and thought to himself, ‘Xu Tumi is really hard to please.’

However, she was really popular and capable. She won the ‘Best Actress’ award at the age of 23, and she had a strong family background. Hence, even he didn’t dare to offend her easily so he could only coax her.

“By the way, how’s Xiang Yi? Is she not ready yet?” The assistant director couldn’t help, but be a little frustrated.

Actually, he was rather reluctant about having Xiang Yi join the team, but the director and scriptwriter suddenly decided after watching “Two Under One Roof” for five minutes that they would have Xiang Yi stand in for a male artist who was supposed to be part of the show.

It was really unbelievable!

Xiang Yi didn’t have a single presentable film in her filmography and yet, her name kept appearing on the hot search list.

‘Her brothers and grandparents keep joining the show. Well, she’s just lucky that she was born into a wealthy family!’ The assistant director thought to himself, genuinely looking down on Xiang Yi from the bottom of his heart.

Having had a bad first impression of Xiang Yi, he instinctively disliked her and vented his anger on her.

The assistant hurriedly left and when he returned, he said, “The dressing room is empty… Miss Xiang Yi is no longer around…”

The assistant director was enraged. “What is she doing instead of being in the dressing room? What? Is she going to put on airs and leave just like that? Let her go then! Does she really think our show can’t work without her?”

The assistant said in a wishy-washy manner, “I heard that the stylist and make-up artist that has been assigned to Miss Xiang Yi has suddenly fallen ill and called in sick today… Could it be because of that…”

The assistant director choked and quickly became irritated. “Can’t she bring her own stylist and makeup artist? How can she survive in this industry if she doesn’t even have the ability to adapt?! She should really do some soul-searching and reflect on why other artists are doing fine, but she’s getting nitpicked on all the time.”

The assistant was speechless.

Although he didn’t agree with his point of view, he didn’t dare to retort, so he had no choice but to keep quiet and suffer in silence.

The more the assistant director thought about it, the angrier he got. ‘Xiang Yi just has a rich family. Other than that, she’s completely incompetent. How dare she put on such airs?!’

“Tell her that if she doesn’t appear in front of me within five minutes, she doesn’t have to come anymore!” the assistant director said austerely.

In the next second, someone came running while panting heavily. “Huh? Is Miss Xu not ready yet? Miss Xiang has already been waiting for a long time at the shooting venue!”

chapters.title: Chapter 436 - Beauty Is In One’S Nature, Not Appearance
chapters.body:
Chapter 436 - Beauty Is In One’S Nature, Not Appearance

In an instant.

The assistant director’s expression changed. His face turned red and then pale, which was considered rather exciting.

The assistant at the side secretly held his laughter in painstakingly before pretending to be shocked. “What? Aren’t Miss Xiang’s stylist and makeup artist absent?”

The assistant director finally found something to harp on. He questioned, “Did she go to the venue barefaced? What does she take ‘National Mass Workout’ for?! It’s not a random variety program like ‘Two Under One Roof’!”

‘Such artists who don’t know how to respect others should be banned!’

The field reporter was dumbstruck. “Is that so? But Ms. Xiang Yi’s makeup and hair are beautifully done, and there’s a man with colored hair next to her who’s helping her with touching up her makeup.”

The assistant said, “Oh, that should be her manager.”

The assistant director was confused.

‘Why would an artist manager be so good at hair and makeup? Is he planning to steal the job of professional hairstylists and makeup artists?!’

He had a sullen expression, but he refused to give in. “How good can the makeup done by a manager be?! I’ll go take a look! We’ll have to redo it if it fails to meet my standards!”

The people present suddenly fell silent, knowing clearly that he was trying to find fault with Xiang Yi.

The assistant was indignant. It would take at least one or two hours to have her hair and makeup done. ‘Isn’t this a deliberate attempt to make things difficult for her?’

However, he didn’t have enough power to say anything, so he sighed and secretly thought to himself, ‘I hope Ah Nan’s skills are good, so that Xiang Yi won’t get scolded much.’

…

The filming venue was in Nancheng Sports Stadium.

The program team had contacted the authorities of the sports stadium beforehand, so the area in the stadium was left empty for them.

In order to promote a variety of sports, the program team divided the process into two different rounds, with the first being a sports competition for point-scoring. The team with the highest score would receive a reward that they can use in the second round.

The second round was an all-member competition that would happen in various forms such as snatching the name tags of the members of the other teams, a game of arresting criminals, and more. The reward props obtained in the previous round or a variety of special cards could be used in this round.

The first round today was archery.

In order to make the games funner, the program team decided to make the contestants draw lots to select their respective bows. There were also professional recurve bows as well as plastic cartoon bows that were meant for comedic relief.

Filming had yet to begin, but the scene was already very chaotic and rowdy. However, Xiang Yi could be spotted effortlessly.

The young girl’s hair was permed and extremely curly, with a large red bow on top of her head, which made her fair and delicate face look even more exquisite. She was obviously barefaced, but in fact, she was rather scheming and her eye makeup was fine and gentle. She didn’t put on any heavy makeup or bright red lipstick. However, it highlighted the beautiful features of her face.

She was absolutely gorgeous.

The assistant director was immediately stunned.

He had never seen Xiang Yi before. At this moment, the impact was massive.

Her face seemed to be made for the camera, and her movements were languid and casual, yet alluring.

Xu Tumi and Sister Yan happened to come over at this time too.

Xu Tumi was obviously a famous actress, so all the crew members nearby took the initiative to greet her.

The assistant director turned his head and saw the exquisite Xu Tumi, whose pores seemed to be clearly visible.

However…

There was no way she could hold a candle to Xiang Yi.

After all, her beauty was superficial because it was created with makeup.

However, true beauty comes from one’s features, not from one’s appearance. Xiang Yi, who had an excellent facial bone structure, was so gorgeous that she could trump Xu Tumi immediately!

The assistant director had never felt his face hurting so badly before!

Xu Tumi kept her eyes fixed on Xiang Yi while clenching her fists tightly.

“Why does she have so much hair?!?!?!”

chapters.title: Chapter 437 - Exchanged Numbers
chapters.body:
Chapter 437 - Exchanged Numbers

Looking at Xiang Yi’s voluminous and shiny hair, Xu Tumi was green with envy.

She had a lot of hair when she was a child, but since she joined the entertainment industry, she often had to style her hair and dye it every now and then. For most people, their hair would become damaged after dyeing it twice or thrice, let alone frequent dyeing.

Coupled with the pressure of work and lack of sleep, Xu Tumi’s hair gradually became sparse, and her hairline began to recede even though she was getting more and more popular and earning more and more money.

She could break her neck and bleed, but she would never lift her bangs up! Over her dead body!

Sister Yan went against her conscience and said, “She’s indeed an amateur. She’s not even half as pretty as you, Mimi! You’re really superb today. After this episode is broadcast live, you’ll definitely get plenty of fans because of your good looks again! Oh, she’s really pretentious. What is she pretending for…”

Not far away, Xiang Yi was picking up a cool black-colored recurve bow with her body turned to the side. Her position was upright and her shoulders were facing the front. She unhurriedly placed an arrow on the bow and pulled the string slowly…

There was a clang.

It hit the yellow bullseye!

“Ten rings!” The numbers automatically popped up on the electronic display.

There were cheering and gasps of astonishment at the scene.

“Damn it! She’s so suave! So suave!”

“No way? This is a professional way to abuse the scumbags!”

“Oh my God, Xiang Yi is so impressive, she hit the bullseye with a single arrow!”

Sister Yan was speechless.

‘Ten rings? Are you an artist or a national team player?!’

When she was in a daze, Xu Tumi ruffled her hair and walked toward Xiang Yi aggressively in her little white shoes.

By the time Sister Yan reacted, Xu Tumi had already reached Xiang Yi, making her so frightened that she broke out in cold sweat.

Although Xu Tumi was quite a snob, she didn’t like playing scheming games, and she didn’t put on airs either. She would exchange numbers and add almost everyone on WeChat.

In Sister Yan’s opinion, Xu Tumi was a little noble and silly, so she often got up to some tricks.

On the surface, she would deliberately get a mission card in advance.

She would secretly bribe Xiang Yi’s make-up artist and stylist.

If she were to get into a conflict with everyone in public, it would be difficult to handle public relations affairs!

Sister Yan hurriedly raised her leg and chased after her.

…

Xiang Yi gave it a try and discovered that she still had a feel of it, so she put the bow down.

A sweet fruity scent suddenly appeared beside her. Xiang Yi sniffled it gently, and she could tell that there was a mix of sea salt, sage, and persimmons.

It was bright and sweet.

She turned to look at Xu Tumi.

Xu Tumi’s tone was overbearing, but the words she said gave Xiang Yi a great shock.

“What brand of shampoo do you use?!”

Xiang Yi was confused.

“And what brand of conditioner, hair mask, oil and comb did you use?”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Xu Tumi treated her look of bewilderment as silent provocation.

“Hey, you’re not going to say that you don’t take care of your hair at all, right?” Xu Tumi sneered. “You think I would believe that? Hmph! Forget it if you don’t want to tell me! I will find out the brand you use sooner or later!”

Xiang Yi said, “I forgot the brands of some of the items, but I’ll look through the history of my online orders. Do you want the links to them?”

Xu Tumi exclaimed, “Yes, yes, yes!”

When Sister Yan scurried over, she discovered that two of them had even added each other on WeChat and were discussing a topic that had confused her.

“I’ll buy it tomorrow; it seems like there’s a 10% off 300 yuan promotion tomorrow.”

“Alright, you can also stack category coupons and VIP discounts to save even more.”

“You’re right! Your math is so good!”

Sister Yan was suddenly bewildered.

‘Do you girls need to save that money???’

…

chapters.title: Chapter 438 - The Star Of Variety Shows (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 438 - The Star Of Variety Shows (1)

The friendship between girls can sometimes really be described as magical.

Some of them would affectionately call themselves sisters during their first meeting, and those who had been best friends for years would even call each other ‘Daddy’.

It’s human nature to hoard and collect things. For women, happiness comes from shopping and reaching the minimum cart value for bigger discounts.

Sister Yan initially thought that Xu Tumi and Xiang Yi would get into a conflict with each other, but she never expected to see them getting along so harmoniously.

Xu Tumi placed a few orders and winked at Xiang Yi in satisfaction. “I’ll also recommend you to use the products that I find are effective in the future!”

Xiang Yi smiled and continued with archery.

Sister Yan quickly pulled Xu Tumi to the side and said “Ah, Tumi, you have to be very careful in case she misses and the arrow strikes you instead…”

Xu Tumi said in annoyance, “Okay, okay, I know.”

Sister Yan explained, “When filming starts later, stay further away from her. You’re the main guest of this episode, so she won’t get much screen time. Besides, we have the mission card now so don’t worry, Mimi, we’ll definitely come in first place!”

Xu Tumi rolled her eyes and asked, “Am I proficient in archery? No. Can I run? No. How can I win first place?”

Sister Yan was speechless.

‘Why are you blatantly telling the truth?’

…

On the other hand…

The director organized a short and concise meeting.

“What? Change the main guest? And the rules of the game?” At first, hearing the screenwriter’s proposal, the assistant director couldn’t accept it. “The previous planning for this episode was pretty good. It doesn’t seem appropriate to change it now.”

The director picked up his thermos flask and drank a mouthful of wolfberry water before saying indifferently, “Didn’t you guys see the way she shot an arrow just now? What’s the purpose of a variety show?”

The assistant director was displeased with Xiang Yi in the first place. Once one is prejudiced against someone, they tend to be irked by everything that the other person does. Hence, he said bluntly, “She’s not a suitable candidate. Our program team has never replaced the main guest with a D-lister.”

“If we were to replace the guest this time, the netizens would definitely slam our program terribly. As you know, cancel culture is thriving among netizens and we can easily get boycotted overnight. I believe none of us wants the hard-earned reputation of our show to be ruined because of a mistake in decision-making, right?”

The director shot him an ambiguous glance without criticizing him much. Instead, he said, “Variety shows need funny punchlines, humor, juicy topics, and enjoyable content. Once we secure these three, we can have anything we want. I think Xiang Yi has the potential to be the main guest.”

The screenwriter chimed in, “Yes, so I suggest that we go ahead with the battle tactic that we implement in the game, where we feature one of the four guests as the highlight of the episode. This episode, Xiang Yi shall be the highlight and induce a different soul to the show.”

The assistant director was extremely speechless as they thought that the two of them were out of their minds.

“It’s up to you guys,” he said stiffly. “If things don’t work out, don’t blame me for not reminding you!”

The director and screenwriter started whispering to each other about the new rules and scheme of the game.

The assistant director was indignant.

‘Let’s wait and see. They’ll definitely regret it’

‘It’s unbelievable that they’d rather have a random woman be the main guest than Xu Tumi, for whom we already have a plan!’

He hadn’t realized that he had been ignored by the core members.

…

…

The filming officially began.

“Viewers, welcome to this week’s episode of ‘National Mass Workout’, I’m your best friend, Wang Yao!” The resident host of the show was MC Wang Yao, who was also an actor that had starred in numerous family dramas. He was very well-known among the middle-aged and elderly audience. “First of all, let’s welcome our dearest Xiang Yi!”

Sister Yan immediately had a change of expression outside the studio.

chapters.title: Chapter 439 - The Star Of Variety Shows (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 439 - The Star Of Variety Shows (2)

Chapter 439: The Star of Variety Shows (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

There was an unwritten rule in ‘National Mass Workout’ that the first floating guest to be cued would be the main guest of the episode.

As the name implies, the main guest has the most airtime. Even for A-listers, more exposure is always better. Hence, the guests would definitely vie to be the main guest for each episode.

Of course, the program team had a very high degree of freedom to decide who they wanted to designate as the main guest.

However, Sister Yan had already agreed that Xu Tumi was the main guest, so she didn’t expect it to be Xiang Yi!

1

All her efforts had gone in vain because she had paved the way for some loathsome person!

The few veteran artists that were invited were peace-loving and showed no intentions to vie to be the main guest. Another young hunk and highly popular web drama actress looked at each other without saying anything.

Xu Tumi… yawned in front of the cameras and everyone else.

1

Sister Yan was speechless.

‘You’re feeling sleepy at such a moment?’

‘How can kids your age fall asleep?!’

1

After the guest list was announced, Wang Yao announced the rules of this first round.

They would first draw lots and shoot ten arrows each according to their lots. The person who has the highest total score would come in first place.

1

“Now I declare that the National Elementary School Games begin!” Wang Yao teased while giggling.

Jokes aside, all the people present were adult artists, so they couldn’t be as obedient as elementary school students. Before the lots were drawn, the crowd was rather unruly as they were all gossiping, drinking water, studying the arrow targets, and discussing the bow and arrow.

Wang Yao exclaimed bitterly, “Everyone, please cooperate with me. If you don’t, I’ll be fired!”

In ‘National Mass Workout’, he had a humble persona, and he was known as the most uncontrollable host in the entire entertainment industry. The netizens often laughed while criticizing him. Hence, there was quite a comedic effect.

1

Xiang Yi was the first to draw lots.

Wang Yao asked mysteriously, “Xiang Yi, which bow did you draw? Is it a recurve bow? I think you’d definitely look really suave with a recurve bow!”

“It’s not a recurve bow, but it should be quite suave too,” Xiang Yi said confidently as if she had drawn an artifact-grade equipment.

1

The next second, she picked up the only pink-colored cartoon plastic bow and arrow on the scene and calmly pulled the string all the way backward.

1

The young girl stood straight, and her posture was proper. However, the more serious she was, the funnier it seemed.

The director who was seated behind the camera had already burst into laughter.

The fact that the contestant, whom everyone had high expectations for, had chosen a cartoon bow and arrow was hilarious in the first place.

Afterward, everyone else drew horn bows, crossbows, and other funny bows.

However, the most amazing thing was that Xu Tumi had drawn one of the most professional recurve bows in the field!

The camera caught her dumbfounded micro-expression.

Xu Tumi carefully picked up the bow, pretended to shoot an arrow, and held her chin up proudly. She then asked the person next to her, “Does my bow look good?”

“Yes.” Xiang Yi happened to be beside her so she said, “It would look even better if you hold it like this.”

She stood at the back and raised her hand to help Xu Tumi adjust the way she was holding the recurve bow. From a certain camera angle, it looked as if Xiang Yi was holding Xu Tumi in her arms…

1

The assistant director couldn’t help but interject, “What nonsense is Xiang Yi getting up to?! This is a scene out of an idol drama; it should be played by Jun Han and Xu Tumi!”

1

The director said, “The weather is really good today.”

1

The screenwriter said, “Drink more hot water.”

1

The assistant director was confused.

‘Is there something wrong with these two? Why aren’t they answering the question?’

‘I’ve been speaking so loudly. Are they deaf?!’

2

chapters.title: Chapter 440 - The Star Of Variety Shows (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 440 - The Star Of Variety Shows (3)

Unbeknownst to them, the staff almost screamed like a groundhog when they saw that scene.

Who would have thought that this combination of Soft Girl X Sweet Girl would be suitable for shipping!?!

“Have I made myself clear?” Xiang Yi asked softly.

Xu Tumi pursed her lips and said, “Y-Yeah…”

She pulled the string all the way backward and was about to let go, but Xiang Yi pressed her hand down.

She said with a warning gaze in her eyes, “You can’t release the string without a bow, or you’ll end up hurting your hand easily.”

Ah Nan was very good at drawing. He had gently applied a tinge of blush to the tip of Xiang Yi’s nose with a brush, which made Xiang Yi look very pitiful.

With such a beautiful face, she’d look absolutely gorgeous even if she was a little fierce, so much so that no one would get angry at her at all.

Xu Tumi was stunned. She said in a wishy-washy manner, “Why are you being so fierce…”

However, she took Xiang Yi’s advice and let go of her hand slowly.

…

The assistant director muttered, “What’s going on with those girls? What’s so exciting about two girls…”

The director laughed without saying anything.

…

Everyone took turns to shoot their arrows.

Apart from the young hunk who had done better than the rest by landing his arrow in the seventh ring, the others were very amateur as their arrows landed mostly on the second and third rings. Some were even off target.

Xiang Yi was undoubtedly the biggest attraction.

She was given the lightest cartoon bow, so she had no advantage. Yet, she managed to place the arrow on the bow and release it fluidly in one go!

Ninth ring!

Everyone was dumbfounded.

‘You’re not holding a plastic bow but an epic weapon, right?!’

Another funny one was Xu Tumi, whose archery posture was taught by Xiang Yi. However, she learned well and got into a standard pose. At first glance, she looked domineering and convincing.

However, her arrow would often land in the first or second rings…

When she finally landed her arrow in the yellow region, Xu Tumi started jumping in excitement. “Ahhhh, I hit bullseye!!!”

Sister Yan, who was watching her jumping from outside the venue, tensed up immediately, for fear that she would fling the hair extensions away.

Xiang Yi reminded gently from the side, “You struck my target.”

Xu Tumi’s smile stiffened and gradually disappeared.

“Hahahaha…” The director laughed out loud again on the scene.

The staff couldn’t help but burst into laughter. They could almost imagine how hard the audience laughed when they saw that scene.

It was time for the tenth arrow to be shot.

Xiang Yi was already way ahead. She came in first place with a total score of 81, making her the deserving champion.

She pulled back the bowstring and squinted slightly, her long and slender eyelashes casting a beautiful shadow on her face. Her jawline was extremely exquisite and beautiful. The nylon bowstring lightly touched her cherry-colored lips, as if it was a kiss. She then slowly let go…

Whoosh——

Bang!

There were two loud sounds.

A bright red number popped up on the LCD screen. Ten rings!

It sparked a huge commotion because Xiang Yi actually used a cartoon plastic bow to hit the bullseye.

However, they were confused by the second sound.

A staff member went up to check the situation and a moment later, he teared up while laughing. “Miss Xiang Yi has struck the center of the bull’s eye and that is the tenth ring of the tenth ring. The interior of the pinhole camera has been shattered.”

Everyone was dumbfounded.

She had actually shattered the screen with an arrow.

The screenwriter didn’t even dare to include such a scene!

Xiang Yi said apologetically, “I’m sorry, I will compensate for it.”

The director waved his hand and declined, “No, no, it’s alright. The effects of this scene are excellent. Xiang Yi, you’re the glory of variety shows! Tell the post-production team that I’ll edit this scene myself!”

There was yet another uproar at the venue.

As a top variety director in the industry, he didn’t actually have to keep an eye on the post-production process, let alone edit it!

chapters.title: Chapter 441 - Support Food Truck (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 441 - Support Food Truck (1)

The nicer the director was to Xiang Yi, the more disgruntled the assistant director was.

He perceived it as an insult to him.

‘Is he going against me because I don’t like Xiang Yi?’

…

The first round of the competition was over, and Xiang Yi came in first place. She received a mystery prop and a small gold medal.

She opened it and put it back in her pocket indifferently.

On the other hand, Xu Tumi came in last place and didn’t get a single reward. In fact, she might even receive flak once the episode airs.

When she thought of how a hater had poked fun at her hair and called her bald previously, Xu Tumi felt incredibly aggrieved.

She froze in place.

A golden figure suddenly appeared in front of her.

“Here’s a gift for you,” Xiang Yi said casually.

She was usually very tolerant of good-looking people.

In fact, Xu Tumi looked like she was going to cry. Be it because of her upbringing or her penchant for good-looking people, Xiang Yi couldn’t bring herself to remain indifferent.

Xu Tumi sniffled her nose and said in a puerile voice, “Are you really going to give it to me?”

“Yes.” Xiang Yi nodded.

‘Seriously, I left home too soon today and forgot to bring the candy…’

She felt regretful for not using the candy-giving tactic that her ancestors had passed on to her.

Xu Tumi glanced at the medal, and then at her feet, and then at the medal again. She repeated that action back and forth, wanting to grab it but feeling rather embarrassed too.

Xiang Yi seemed to have seen through her as she shoved the medal into her hand.

“I’ll go draw some arrows.”

Xu Tumi stared at her back in shock.

The arrows they shot before were still on the target, and since there were many, pulling them out became a laborious task but it seemed to be a piece of cake for Xiang Yi. She tugged it gently with her fair and slender hand, easily dislodging the arrow.

The popular young hunk gave it a try too, only to end up having his efforts turn futile.

Xu Tumi grinned and put the medal into her pocket.

…

Filming came to a halt.

The second round was a game that simulated Counter-Strike, which required a change of venue. The artistes got into their respective nanny vans and treasured every single second of rest they got.

Sister Yan was still trying to brainwash Xu Tumi. “Mimi, Xiang Yi doesn’t seem to be a nice person. She’s probably trying to use your for your popularity! Think about it, if a man were to do this, wouldn’t it be sleazy and gross? Don’t fall into her trap!”

Xu Tumi fiddled with the little gold medal in her hand. The program team’s props were very exquisite and the medal even seemed to be made of gold. She said distractedly, “Don’t you think that she and I share a special affinity?”

Sister Yan was speechless.

“My haters call me Tu Zi (baldie) and her nickname is Tu Zi too (Little Rabbit). Look, this is destiny!”

Sister Yan was speechless.

“Hey, you know what? She really smells good, her hair smells good, her clothes smell good, her body smells good too. No, I have to ask her which body lotion she uses…” Xu Tumi lowered her head to send Xiang Yi a message.

Sister Yan was speechless.

‘Okay, I shouldn’t have had expectations of this silly girl! I shouldn’t have!!!’

…

The crowd rushed to the site of the real-life counter-strike game and took a short break.
