The fans of the popular young hunk and Xu Tumi had both prepared supply trucks. One was a truck with snacks like fried chicken, curry fishballs, etc. and the other offered drinks like lemonade and milk tea.

Everyone was cheering.

When one is tired, food is often the best therapy.

The assistant director took a big bite of the fishballs and criticized incoherently, “Tsk, tsk. That whatever-her-name-is, doesn’t even get a support truck. How pathetic.”

Before he finished…

chapters.title: Chapter 442 - Support Food Truck (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 442 - Support Food Truck (2)

Someone said in surprise, “Wow, so many food trucks! Which artiste is the support for?”

The assistant director smacked his lips and said, “I guess it’s the fans of a few seniors but it can’t be Xiang Yi’s anyway. Pigs will fly if someone ever sends food trucks to support her…”

No one agreed.

His laughter seemed particularly ear-piercing amidst the silence.

Whoosh——

The few food trucks were parked accordingly. There was coffee and other snacks like sandwiches and cupcakes. The most incredible thing was that there was a barbecue truck!

Everyone was dumbfounded.

‘We can barbecue on the spot!?!’

“Whose fans provided these support trucks? It’s so grand….” The fans began to whisper among themselves.

There were small colorful flags placed at the most prominent spots of the truck, with two words printed on each of them.

“Spicy Rabbits!”

“Spicy Rabbits? Whose fans are they?”

“It seems to be… from… Miss Xiang Yi’s fans…” A voice of uncertainty came from the crowd.

The catering staff on the barbecue truck smiled and said, “That’s right, our support food truck was sent by Xiang Yi’s fans!”

In an instant…

The assistant director forgot to even chew. His throat moved and he swallowed an entire fishball, which made him choke and his eyes rolled backwards as he was in huge discomfort!

‘Xiang Yi has actually received such luxurious support?’

‘How is this possible?!!!’

The artists at the scene also had different expressions on their faces, not expecting that a mere Xiang Yi would have such a huge appeal.

…

Ah Nan said excitedly, “Wow, Xiang Yi, your fans are so supportive!”

Xiang Yi assented and asked, “Wasn’t this sent by you and Mr. Si?”

“Your fans did! They heard that you’ve joined National Mass Workout so they’re all really elated,” Ah Nan said, showing her the chat records in the group chat with fans.

When she saw that some people said they skipped breakfast to save up enough money to show their support, Xiang Yi frowned and asked, “These are very expensive, right?”

Ah Nan was stunned. “Xiang Yi, these are the tokens of appreciation from your fans. It’s very common for celebrities in the entertainment industry to receive such support…”

Xiang Yi said sternly, “My fans don’t need to spend money on me, I have money.”

Ah Nan was speechless.

‘Okay, I’m sorry, I almost forgot that Xiang Yi is a rich girl.’

He scratched his head and conveyed Xiang Yi’s words in the group, and they immediately send messages to the group.

—— [OOOO Xiang Yi is so gentle!]

—— [But I just want to spend money on Xiang Yi!!]

—— [Xiang Yi is such an angel, ahhhh]

…

However, at Ah Nan’s insistence, the management nevertheless tallied the amount.

Ah Nan was shocked to see the price. He asked in the group chat.

[Four food trucks only cost so little?]

The other party sent a voice message. “We only sent a barbecue truck, are there any other trucks? Is it possible that the fans of the unofficial fan clubs sent it?”

Xiang Yi’s official fan club was created by Ah Nan and there was a strict assessment that fans had to go through before they could join. Hence, they were the most loyal and most devoted fans of Xiang Yi.

Of course, there were a lot of other fans that have created their own fan groups.

Ah Nan was about to go and check, only to see that Si Chuanbai had texted him.

[Mr. Si: Don’t bother asking, the remaining three food trucks were arranged by Shi Sui.]

[@Ah Nan: Huh? Shi Sui is actually Xiang Yi’s No. 1 fan? I’ll go and tell her right now!]

[Mr. Si: … Sort of.]

Si Chuanbai, who was in front of the screen, calmly pushed his glasses up.

He was probably not considered her No. 1 fan but he was definitely her top suitor.

chapters.title: Chapter 443 - : Ordinary Xiang Yi (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 443 - : Ordinary Xiang Yi (1)

Chapter 443: Ordinary Xiang Yi (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

…

Just as Si Chuanbai had expected, Ah Nan told Xiang Yi about the fan support food truck immediately.

Xiang Yi said, “Ah, Senior, you’re so nice and thoughtful.”

1

Ah Nan couldn’t help but let his imagination run wild. “Xiang Yi, don’t you realize that Shi Sui seems to treat you differently from others…”

He had at least been working in the entertainment industry for years and often got firsthand news and gossip. As far as he knew, Shi Sui had never been embroiled in any scandals with any female celebrities.

Xiang Yi was an exception.

It was said that he had an excellent PR team and if there were any female celebrities who tried to use him for clout by hyping up the idea of him dating them, the news would be deleted immediately However, there were now all sorts of rumors, posts, and gossip forums suggesting that he and Xiang Yi were an item but Shi Sui’s team didn’t delete a single one of them…

1

Xiang Yi asked in confusion, “Hasn’t he always been that nice?”

Since she was a child, Shi Sui had always been gentlemanly whenever she met him and the way he treated others was simply flawless. He was well-liked by her brothers and the elders.

Ah Nan widened his mouth and said, “That doesn’t seem to be the case…”

The two of them were chatting when Xu Tumi suddenly inched closer and said angrily, “Xiang Yi, why didn’t you reply to my text!?”

Xiang Yi said, “I’m sorry, I didn’t check my phone.”

“Hmph.” Xu Tumi pursed her lips. She was sweet and beautiful to begin with and when she behaves coquettishly, she never fails to win the sympathy of others. “In this case, tell me why you smell so nice!”

1

Xiang Yi was thoroughly amused and sent her the product link of the body lotion that she often used. She asked casually, “Do you like sweet-smelling perfumes? Send me your address, I’ll mail some homemade perfume to you some time in the future.”

Xu Tumi asked in shock, “Do you know how to concoct fragrances?”

Xiang Yi said, “I’m an amateur.”

1

Xu Tumi took her word for it but she didn’t want to dampen Xiang Yi’s mood and enthusiasm. After she sent her homemade soap to someone else, they criticized it so she stopped trying to make her own soaps. “Alright, I’ll give it a try then.”

The two of them chatted for a while and rushed over when they heard the director announcing for them to gather.

…

“Filming begins in 5, 4, 3, 2, 1!”

“Let me announce the rules of the game for this episode.”

“This round will be a competition that’s based on the setting of Counterstrike. You will be divided into two teams, blue and red. There are two ways to win, one is where all members of a team die and the other is to get the other team’s flags first. All players are to guard their own flag and ‘kill’ as many opponents as possible.”

2

“The player with the most kills or the greatest contribution will be named the MVP for this round!”

2

“Now, the game shall begin!”

…

All the artistes were blindfolded and brought to different areas.

The instant they saw light again, they felt slightly blinded.

Xiang Yi squinted and quickly allowed herself to adapt to the light before beginning to survey her surroundings.

Before coming, Ah Nan tied Xiang Yi’s hair into a bun so Xiang Yi casually broke off the branches of plants and wove them into a had. She put it on her head and started fiddling with the toy gun in her hand.

2

It was a toy replica of a sniper rifle that was named ‘Fall of the Gods’ which came with a multiplier.

Xiang Yi didn’t rush to search for her teammates and instead, hid the team’s flag in a conspicuous place.

To ensure a fully immersive game experience, there was no camera to follow each of them but there were cameras all around, and each artiste was wearing a camera on their head.

The sounds of footsteps spread over and Xiang Yi skillfully skillfully plopped down in the hiding place, loaded her gun, and opened the lens. She then aimed her gun at the source of the sound!

1

The person who came was not wearing a blue team badge.

Bang!

Xiang Yi shot resolutely.

1

chapters.title: Chapter 444 - Ordinary Xiang Yi (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 444 - Ordinary Xiang Yi (2)

The young girl’s long, slender eyelashes fluttered, and the finger pressing on the trigger was fair and tender. She wasn’t shaking at all.

It was a shot to the heart.

The blue paint ball burst and stained the person’s body.

The popular young hunk, Jun Han, looked incredibly dumbstruck, feeling as if it had ended before it even started.

He said through the loudspeaker, “Player Xiang Yi has struck Player Jun Han. Player Jun Han out!”

Next, there was yet another announcement. “Resurrection card is activated. Player Jun Han has been revived!”

‘He has two lives?’

Xiang Yi raised her brows and was about to fire the second shot when she heard Jun Han saying quickly, “Xiang Yi, don’t shoot, he’s our teammate!”

He hurriedly fished out the blue team badge in his pocket and put it on.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘So I killed my teammate on my first shot?’

She walked out from behind the tree, feeling a little embarrassed. “I’m sorry, I thought you were from the red team.”

Jun Han sighed and said, “I deliberately took off the badge to confuse my opponent but I didn’t expect to have ended up confusing my own teammate again.”

In the director’s room, the director burst into laughter when he saw that.

He could already imagine the audience’s uncontrollable joy when they saw this scene.

The accident was naturally a humorous punchline which couldn’t have been staged.

…

Xiang Yi and Jun Han paired up.

Jun Han had debuted from an idol survival show so he was good at managing himself and socializing. He could easily strike a conversation with Xiang Yi even without a common topic.

“I’ve watched Two Under One Roof before. Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji are really cute. The scenes of Shi Sui taking them with him on his jogs everyday are really funny.”

It was normal to walk dogs but walking cats was rare, let alone taking them on jogs together.

Xiao Naofu would often become dog tired and end up spending the rest of the journey in Shi Sui’s pocket where it would pop its head out to breathe heavily.

Xiao Naofu asked with a subtle expression, “Jogs? He bullied Xiao Naofu?”

Jun Han was stunned and he asked hesitantly, “Xiang Yi, aren’t you going to watch the replay…”

Xiang Yi shook her head.

Jun Han was speechless, feeling like he had accidentally dug his own grave.

He hurriedly changed the subject. “The prop I got in the last round was a resurrection card, what about you, Senior?”

Jun Han ranked second in the previous round.

Xiang Yi said, “I haven’t seen it yet.”

She fished out a small envelope from her pocket, and opened it to see that there was a card inside.

[Elimination Card]

[Description: Use this card to eliminate one player.]

“Oh, that’s a good card, keep it well, Xiang Yi. You might be able to use it to turn against the odds and reverse the situation,” Jun Han said while laning slightly towards Xiang Yi.

He didn’t feel repulsed by fans who shipped Xiang Yi with him because he knew what they would bring about—

Popularity.

Moreover, in the current ecosystem of the entertainment industry, the female celebrities would often be the ones receiving hate when they get shipped with other male celebrities.

Even if they sent him hate, it was nothing compared to high traffic and interests.

However, Xiang Yi didn’t plan to cooperate with him and instead, pulled away from him quietly.

Jun Han vaguely realized her repulsion towards him but he still refused to give up. He asked, “Xiang Yi, are you tired? Do you want to get some rest?”

Xiang Yi glared at him and for some reason, Jun Han felt that she disliked him…

The young girl stopped in her tracks and bent a tree branch to break it with her bare hands. She then calmly handed it to Jun Han.

“If you can’t walk, I can use this to pull you along.”

Jun Han was dumbstruck.

‘She mistook my kindness for a physical disability?!’

“It’s not convenient for me to piggyback you but how about I carry you?” Xiang Yi asked sincerely.

chapters.title: Chapter 445 - : Ordinary Xiang Yi (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 445 - : Ordinary Xiang Yi (3)

Xiang Yi meant those words from the bottom of her heart.

Although she was stronger than ordinary girls and knew the right technique to use, Jun Han was still undeniably tall so it would definitely be troublesome for her to piggyback him. If she were to carry him instead, it would save her a lot of energy and effort.

Jun Han pursed his lips and said, “It…it’s alright.”

Xiang Yi’s eyes lit up. “Can you manage on your own? Can you hang in there? If you can’t, don’t force yourself.”

Jun Han exclaimed, “I can, I really can!”

Xiang Yi shoved the branch to him and said, “Well then, you can use this as a walking stick, maybe it can also act as a weapon when necessary.”

Jun Han was clearly much quieter than before.

…

Gradually, five players were eliminated.

There were three people left on the blue team and two on the red team.

All of the players of the red team were eliminated by Xiang Yi.

Jun Han had also witnessed Xiang Yi’s terrifying hits rate.

All of them were one hit to the heart, and there were no exceptions!

He suspected that if it wasn’t for safety reasons, Xiang Yi might have blown his head off…

Treading along the water source, the two managed to meet up with their teammate, Bai Wuxia.

Meanwhile…

Not far away, Xu Tumi screamed, “Don’t come over, help…”

Bai Wuxia was considered a highly respected senior. Although he was not very popular now, he had a high status in the industry.

He said, “This can’t be a trap, right? Luring the enemy with beauty.”

Xiang Yi’s expression was rather grave. “I’ll go and check it out.”

Bai Wuxia said eloquently, “Ah, Xiang Yi, you do not understand. Once you go, you’ll fall into their trap! You are the marksman of our team, in case you are trapped, how can we win!?!”

Jun Han hesitated but did not refute as he acquiesced.

Although it was a variety show, the audience had a competitive mentality. Who does not like the winning side?

However, Xiang Yi remained firm.

“I’ll go take a look. Winning and losing doesn’t matter, it’s just a game, but what if Tumi gets into danger?”

The young girl’s footsteps were light and she darted towards the source of the sound.

Bai Wuxia and Jun Han looked at each other and had no choice but to follow suit.

…

Xu Tumi was very unlucky today. She never met her teammates, but she was lucky enough to “kill” two players by accident.

She was humming a little melody proudly when she accidentally entered the depths of the forest.

In the bushes, a man suddenly appeared, with tattered clothes and a fierce gaze in his eyes.

At first, Xu Tangyuan thought that it was a plot arranged by the program team, but in the blink of an eye, she realized that something was amiss!

There was dried blood on the man’s s clothes.

It didn’t seem like fake props and instead, it was real corn.

Xu Tumi came back to her senses and dashed forward.

As soon as she did, a man quickly chased her from behind, as if she had ignited some kind of danger signal!

Like a beast locking onto its prey.

Xu Tumi was even more certain that this man was definitely not arranged to join them by the program team!

She screamed desperately and gestured to every passing camera, hoping that someone would come to her rescue…

…

In the director’s room.

The director and everyone else was stunned pale by that scene. They quickly set more than then, staff, over.

“This woman isn’t some kind of fugitive, right…” the assistant director swallowed his saliva with sweat breaking out on his palm. “I case something happens, it’ll be over for our show…”

The director’s Adam’s apple moved and after giving some thought about it, he hollered, “Is the program more important than someone else’s life? Be more humane!”

The atmosphere was tense and they were so nervous that their palms were sweaty, as if there was a hovering sword in their hearts.

…

chapters.title: Chapter 446 - Ordinary Xiang Yi (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 446 - Ordinary Xiang Yi (4)

Someone suggested, “Isn’t Jun Han and a few of the other artistes nearby? Shall we let them rush over first…”

However, someone quickly retorted, “How can that work? What if that man has a weapon? It’s too dangerous!”

The crowd regretted it at this point. They initially thought that they had made all the preparations but who would have thought that such an accident would happen?

The director suddenly exclaimed, “Xiang Yi has gone over!”

‘Huh!?’

…

In the depths of the lush jungle, Xiang Yi was running very quickly on light footsteps.

She arrived at the source of the voice as quickly as she could, only to see that there was no one around, only traces of depression on the grass.

Each artiste was equipped with a headset that was meant for them to get help when there was danger. The director hurriedly contacted Xiang Yi and said, “Xu Tumi isn’t too far from you. She’s at your three o-clock.”

Before she could finish, the young girl sprinted over along the traces.

…

Somewhere behind a bush.

Xu Tumi’s mouth was covered by a pair of dirty hands, and the feeling of being suffocated overwhelmed her.In the beginning, she could still make some muffled sounds but soon, she didn’t have the energy to even make a single sound.

Large teardrops rolled down her cheeks. Xu Tumi had never thought that she would encounter such a matter.

For a moment, she even felt that perhaps dying here would be the best outcome.

Otherwise, what should she do when the whole entertainment industry finds out?

The sound of a man’s rapid breathing, coupled with the movement of her clothes being rustled, came from behind her. Xu Tumi closed her eyes in despair…

Bang!

“Ah~!!”

The two sounds filled the air one after another.

The first sound was the sound of a toy gun bullet bursting.

The second sound was the painful shriek of the man behind her.

Xu Tumi suddenly opened her eyes, only to see the slender Xiang Yi while she was in a trance. She was wearing camo clothing and wearing a hat made of tree branches. There was a leaf on her eyebrow and she had a terrifyingly cold gaze in her eyes.

She held up the sniper rifle and fired a second shot at the man!

Both shots were headshots!

Although it was a toy bullet, it had some killing power, let alone a fragile part like the head.

The man fell to the ground in pain and cursed an expletive as he tried to take Xu Tumi as a hostage.

Xu Tumi was so scared that she forgot to run away and struggle. She looked rather disappointed.

The man’s hands were unexpectedly superb. They even reached a stalemate.

Jun Han and the others also rushed over. Seeing this scene, Jun Han quickly held onto the walking stick that Xiang Yi had just given him. “Senior, do we go there…”

He coughed twice and said, “Uh, why don’t you youngsters go in? I’m too old for this.”

He was very sharp-eyed and he had noticed that there was something bulging in the pocket of his shirt. There seemed to be a knife.

Only a fool would be the hero that saves the damsel in distress.

They weren’t acting now so he felt that protecting his life is the most important.

Jun Han was speechless.

He actually didn’t dare to do it.

Not everyone would have the courage to face this kind of thing.

Jun Han hesitantly took a few steps out and his calves were starting to twitch.

He gritted his teeth and was about to go forward, only to discover that the man had pulled out a fruit knife, scaring him.

‘Why…why is there a knife?”

Bai Wuxia comforted, “There’ll be people coming over later. We’ll stand further away but we’re doomed if Xiang Yi can’t handle it alone….”

chapters.title: Chapter 447 - Ordinary Xiang Yi (5)
chapters.body:
Chapter 447 - Ordinary Xiang Yi (5)

Chapter 447: Ordinary Xiang Yi (5)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Unbeknownst to them, the conversation between the two was transmitted back to the director’s room.

For a while, there was complete silence in the room, and even the sound of breathing seemed to have disappeared.

In all fairness, Bai Wuxia was right. Legally speaking, there is no obligation to rescue others when one’s safety isn’t guaranteed…

1

However, what he said made everyone feel particularly uncomfortable.

If it was a stranger, it would be fine, but Xiang Yi and Xu Tumi were considered his colleagues. Yet, they’re just going to stand at the side and watch the two of them slip into danger…

“Ah!” Xu Tumi screamed, drawing the attention back to Xiang Yi.

The young girl dodged, only to suffer a cut on her cheek but she had also found his weakness and crippled hid arm, kicked the knife far away, and used her knee to restrain him.

2

The man refused to give up and the two of them fought toe-to-toe.

Sweat seeped out from Xiang Yi’s forehead, and her fair face turned red, but she did not forget to remind Xu Tumi, “Leave.”

Xu Tumi’s eyes were bloodshot and her face was stained with tears so she nodded and stumbled towards Jun Han.

Bai Wuxia’s facial expression changed drastically. “Hey, don’t run towards us, what if the man breaks free…”

2

Xu Tumi instantly felt as if a pot of ice water had been poured onto her face, making her turn cold from head to toe.

She pursed her lips and wanted to say something but she was completely weak and powerless.

Xu Tumi remained silent and moved in another direction to stand farther away from Bai Wuxia.

Bai Wuxia was still unsatisfied, and Jun Han griped, “The bad guys were targeting those two women in the first place. Are they not afraid of implicating us and dragging us down? Their emotional intelligence is really too low.”

2

“…” Jun Han did not pay attention to him. Instead, he had been staring at Xiang Yi’s face which was stained with blood and bleeding continuously. She should have been a pitiful little girl hiding behind a man but she had somehow exerted explosive power and single-handedly fought the vicious thugs until now…

2

In that second, his shame overpowered his urge to retreat and courage overpowered cowardice. Jun Han hollered to embolden himself before rushing forward.

1

It also happened that the man almost broke free from Xiang Yi’s grip but he was struck by a cane on the back of his neck by Jun Han. He then let out a muffled groan of pain.

1

Jun Han helped Xiang Yi hold him down. Being a young adult, he was quite strong.

Even so, the two almost did not hold each other down.

1

Fortunately, the staff arrived in time and tied him up.

Soon, the police also arrived.

Before the man was taken away, he glared at Xiang Yi with a look of resentment in his eyes.

Xiang Yi calmly met his gaze without any fear or hatred in her eyes that were filled only with indifference.

It was as if she didn’t care about him at all.

“…”

Everything was set in stone.

The director announced that filming was to be suspended. He then dialed the emergency number, and had the ambulance convey both Xu Tumi and Xiang Yi to the hospital.

chapters.title: Chapter 448 - Ordinary Xiang Yi (6)
chapters.body:
Chapter 448 - Ordinary Xiang Yi (6)

There were dozens of replies to the Weibo post in less than two minutes because Xiang Yi’s name was mentioned.

—— [This is hilarious. It’s just a minor injury, it’ll probably heal completely by the time she gets to the hospital!]

—— [Hah, this is how medical resources are wasted. There are more than ten people surrounding her, what a princess.]

—— [Owner, you called her a starlet? Be careful her fans might come and bite you. Her fans think that she’s an A-lister *dog* *dog*]

Some Spicy Rabbits also noticed the post and raised their own doubts.

—— [Celebrities are humans too. Ordinary people can go to the ER too, so why can’t celebrities do the same?]

—— [I saw the itinerary sent by the official fan club, Xiang Yi is filming for National Mass Workout today. If you get injured at work, your colleagues will accompany you to the hospital. Is there anything wrong with that??]

——— [Xiang Yi got a cut on her face! Even if she’s not an artiste, it would still be serious! There’s only one doctor and one nurse among the ten or so people. Why are you hating on her!?]

…

Dong Mei happily opened Weibo after paying some fees.

There had never been so many comments on her previous posts. Now, there were hundreds of comments because the fans and haters were arguing incessantly.

She felt as if she suddenly had a sense of existence as lots of people were paying attention to her posts now. It had greatly satisfied her need for vanity.

Hence, Dong Mei posted two more threads.

[TheFragranceOfPlumBlossomsComeFromTheBitingCold: I heard from other patients that a stretcher was also used ~ Why would someone who has sustained only a cut on her face, need to lie down on a stretcher?]

[TheFragranceOfPlumBlossomsComeFromTheBitingCold: I met Bai Wuxia when I was paying my bill, and he doesn’t look old in person at all! He’s still as attractive and charming as ever! Tsk, tsk, veteran actors are the best, they’d take the initiative to help the younger generation pay, unlike some D-listers who wrap themselves up like they’re mummies just because of a tiny cut!]

…

As soon as those two posts were posted, it angered many netizens.

The netizens started sending their hate and criticism for Xiang Yi, popular celebrities, and the entertainment industry through their screens, as if they were all qualified judges.

Dong Mei enjoyed reading the comments and she even ignored her son when he told her that he was thirsty.

…

Xu Tumi’s diagnosis report and got a great shock. She had to rest and recuperate well.

Jun Han sustained some abrasions too.

Xiang Yi was the one who was the most seriously injured. Her arms and knees were covered in bruises, and there was a slight fracture in her left wrist. The corners of her lips had cracked and there was a cut on her face.

“Girl, there might be a scar on your face…” The doctor sighed. He had heard of Xiang Yi’s brave feat and he found it a pity that she had suffered such an injury. However, he was afraid that she might be sad so he comforted, “But don’t worry, cosmetic surgery technology is very advanced nowadays. If the surgery goes well, there won’t be a scar.”

Xiang Yi thanked him and handed a piece of tissue to Ah Nan with her right hand. “Okay, okay, don’t cry anymore.”

She didn’t cry but Ah Nan wept miserably. He was even howling and bawling loudly.

“UwU, you scared me, Xiang Yi… It’s all my fault, I should have stayed with you… Ahhhh!” He hiccuped while crying, looking rather amusing yet pitiful.

Xiang Yi said, “I’m really fine, it doesn’t hurt at all! I’ve been hurt much worse than this before and I didn’t even cry…”

In the next second…

A slender and taut figure entered her line of vision.

Xiang Yi suddenly found her wound a little painful.

chapters.title: Chapter 449 - Ordinary Xiang Yi (7)
chapters.body:
Chapter 449 - Ordinary Xiang Yi (7)

Chapter 449: Ordinary Xiang Yi (7)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Shi Sui strode into the emergency room with large steps, only to see Xiang Yi sitting obediently on the treatment chair, her eyes clear and bright as she gazed at him quietly.

The boulder on his chest had finally been lifted.

1

He subconsciously sighed with relief.

However, when he saw the gauze on her face and wrist, he frowned.

The man’s Adam’s apple rolled. He was obviously about to show her his concern, but he suddenly did not know how to put them into words.

All his courtesy and etiquette would not work in front of her.

Xiang Yi said in a soft and tender voice. “Shi Sui.”

1

Shi Sui curbed his fluctuating emotions. “Yes?”

“I’m hungry.” The little girl was a bit aggrieved, “I also miss Xiao Naofu.”

2

The softest corner of her heart seemed to have been struck as she was filled with an indescribable sourness and warmth, Shi Sui raised his hand and rubbed her hair. “I left the electronic tablet in the living room, you can make a video call to Xiao Naofu. I’ll go buy you food now.”

2

Xiang Yi was stunned. ‘Has he found out that Xiao Naofu is not an ordinary kitten?’

4

Seemingly having seen through her thoughts, Shi Sui whispered, “This is our little secret.”

Boom boom…

Her heart was beating wildly as if it was setting off fireworks that were cackling and booming loudly.

1

Xiang Yi’s expression remained calm, but the tips of her reddened ears betrayed her.

…

Shi Sui went to buy dinner, while Xiang Yi made a video call in the lounge.

The call was answered only after two rings.

On the screen, a magnified cat face appeared, and Xiao Naofu meowed eagerly.

“Meow! Meow?”

—— [Silly woman, how are you doing?!]

“It’s me, I’m fine, you don’t have to worry.” Xiang Yi’s tone was gentle and soothing, “Have you eaten your meal?”

“Meow meow! Meow…” Xiao Naofu saw the wound on her face and its ears drooped while tears welled up in its pretty eyes. It clawed at the screen with its furry paws, gently touching Xiang Yi’s face.

‘What a silly woman! How silly!’

‘She always gets herself hurt…’

Xiao Naofu suddenly felt really miserable, thinking to itself how wonderful it would be if it was a ferocious tiger. It would then be able to protect the silly woman from the crooks.

Although it hated to admit it, it couldn’t deny that it could only be a useless cat now…

Little Xiji inched closer and rubbed its cream-colored head, seemingly comforting it.

Xiang Yi and the two of them stayed on the call for a while, but Shi Sui had already returned with the food.

The director of ‘National Mass Workout’ was surprised to see him, as if he didn’t expect that someone like Shi Sui would stoop low and go out to buy food for Xiang Yi.

“Are you here to see Xiang Yi?” The director still had lingering fears when he remembered the scene where Xiang Yi fought with the crooks. He sighed and said, “Thank God we had Xiang Yi. Otherwise, the consequences would be unthinkable today…”

If Xu Tumi were to…

Not only would Xu Tumi be traumatized for life, those in the entire program team who had a conscience will not forgive themselves.

1

Shi Sui nodded with a cold gaze in his eyes as usual.

The screenwriter looked at his back and whispered, “Shi Sui is so aloof.”

The director laughed bitterly.

‘He’s not aloof but angry.’

“But…”

It turned out that someone like Shi Sui would treat others harshly too.

…

Click!

Dong Mei had secretly taken a photo of Shi Sui and immediately posted it on the internet.

3

chapters.title: Chapter 450 - Ordinary Xiang Yi (8)
chapters.body:
Chapter 450 - Ordinary Xiang Yi (8)

[TheFragranceOfPlumBlossomsComeFromTheBitingCold: How delicate can female celebrities be~ It’s just a superficial wound. Trust her to have the cheek to order an A-lister like Shi Sui to go buy food for her. Seriously!]

On the hospital bed, her son said weakly, “Mom, I’m cold.”

Dong Mei snapped impatiently, “I don’t care! Stop being such a pain! I’m busy!”

Her son pursed his lips and fell silent while watching his mother being engrossed in her cell phone.

‘It turns out that her cell phone…is more important than me, huh?’

…

Dong Mei swiped her fingers across her cell phone screen incessantly as she browsed Weibo, thinking that she’d be able to see the netizens arguing or find out some other juicy news. To her surprise, as soon as she refreshed it, the scene changed drastically.

—— [Has Shi Sui gone to visit her at the hospital!?!]

—— [Ahhhh Doggy Shi bought Xiang Yi food but I feel like I’m eating sugar. They’re so sweet!]

—— [Hehe, keep being angry. Shi Sui just likes our ordinary Xiang Yi~]

—— [Oh my God, am I the only one who noticed that Shi Sui is wearing the same pair of sliders that he wears at home during the live stream!?!]

—— [So he’s here to see Xiang Yi? Ahhh, I’m going to bawl my eyes out!]

…

Dong Mei: ???

‘What is going on!?!’

‘Why isn’t anyone slamming Xiang Yi!?!’

In fact, there were still people who slammed her but there were many who really shipped Xiang Yi and Shi Sui together. Thus, their comments drowned out the hateful comments!

However, Bai Wuxia, who was feeling rather diffident, hurriedly sent his team to buy some hashtags on the hot search list.

#XiangYiPutsOnAirs

He felt that what the netizens cared about was not the truth but rather, they just needed an outlet to vent their emotions!

Hence, he wanted to sneakily push Xiang Yi to the target of public opinion while pretending like nothing had happened. He could also get to create the persona of a veteran actor.

The power of the hot search list is terrifying. Once the post was up, countless netizens clicked on it.

When everyone saw the controversial news about Xiang Yi throwing her weight around, behaving arrogantly, and putting on airs, which was posted by Dong Mei, all the netizens began to get really agitated because they had been spited by those words. The keyboard warriors then started to attack Xiang Yi.

—— [No way, seriously? She’s putting on airs?]

—— [Oh wow, do celebrities have special privileges nowadays?]

—— [Can’t she handle such a minor injury on her own? Why must she hog the medical resources!?! The doctors and nurses of our country are already drained and overworked. Doesn’t she know that she should lighten the burden of medical staff???]

…

All of a sudden, Xiang Yi had once again slipped into the target of controversy.

Bai Wuxia also secretly paid some keyboard warriors to praise him for showing concern to his juniors without putting on any airs. He had surprisingly received a very unusual effect.

—— [Mr. Bai is so nice, where can we find such a nice senior?]

—— [Xiang Yi was still a toddler when Bai Wuxia is famous. She actually wants her senior to pay for her? That doesn’t seem right]

—— [Senior Bai is such a good actor but he hasnt been given any opportunities or offered any roles. Yet, an incompetent actress like Xiang Yi has become really famous through the live stream. I’m speechless.]

…

Just when the netizens were criticizing Xiang Yi, the director of ‘National Mass Workout’ posted something on Weibo.

—— [OldZhuFromNextDoor: I was too busy just now and things were very chaotic. Let me clarify, @XiangYi didn’t put on airs. An accident happened during filming today and Xiang Yi got hurt only because she was trying to save someone!]

[Moreover, the ambulance was called because her face was cut and her wrist was fractured. It wasn’t a minor injury at all. There were other injured artistes on the ambulance just now. Three of them squeezed into one ambulance and our crew drove the ambulance. We didn’t use any medical resources!

Dear Netizens, please be mindful of your words and behavior!]

chapters.title: Chapter 451 - Don’T Want To Be A Good Person At All
chapters.body:
Chapter 451 - Don’T Want To Be A Good Person At All

Chapter 451: Don’t Want To Be A Good Person At All

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

The three exclamation marks expressed Director Zhu’s feelings of indignation.

He had been in the industry for many years so he could tell at a glance, the various tricks that went on behind the hot searches. However, he chose to cut Bai Wuxia some slack on the account that he was a veteran actor. Hence, he didn’t mention the matter of Bai Wuxia leaving them in a lurch during the incident.

1

The netizens who had been criticizing Xiang Yi gleefully were dumbfounded.

‘Nani??? Is Xiang Yi that nice? She actually sacrificed herself to help others?!’

1

However, the Spicy Rabbits were melancholic and they immediately felt distressed and heartbroken for Xiang Yi.

—— [Ahhh, what is going on!?!]

—— [Oh my God, she got a cut on her face???]

—— [She suffered a fracture too… What exactly happened? My poor child Xiang Yi, Mommy’s going to cry]

…

There was a storm on the Internet.

The lounge was quiet and warm.

Xiang Yi dug her spoon into the steamed chestnut pumpkin puree while Shi Sui looked down and peeled eggs for her with his bony hands.

1

“Anything else you want to eat?” He asked.

1

Xiang Yi thought for a moment before tilting her head and asking, “Spicy hotpot?”

“You can’t eat spicy food now.”

“I’ll just think about it…”

“Don’t even think about it.” Shi Sui handed over the peeled eggs.

1

“…”

She was depressed and furious. She bit off half of the gg with one bite, only to end up choking so hard that her face turned red. Shi Sui poured her a glass of warm water in time.

“Take your time,” he said helplessly but dotingly.

Xiang Yi calmed herself down and changed the topic to hide her awkwardness. “When…when did you discover about Xiao Naofu?”

Shi Sui answered with raised brows, “Isn’t that obvious? That kitten knows how to act and even does a good job at it.”

Xiang Yi was speechless. ‘That’s true.’

“What else do you know then?” The young girl asked tentatively.

She was just asking a casual question but she didn’t expect Shi Sui to take a deep glance at her before saying, “You weren’t the same person last year as you are now, right?”

1

Xiang Yi was speechless.

She glared at him with incredible shock in her eyes.

‘He can actually tell?!’

Shi Sui’s tone was mellow. “Well at least, I’m a professional actor.”

A lot of things can be acted out but an act is ultimately an unreal act.

Xiang Yi recalled the scene of her transmigration and began to feel a little guilty. “Did…did that version of me do anything to you at the hotel the other day?”

Shi Sui picked up an apple, peeled it, and said a contemptuous and sluggish voice, “Do you think that version of you succeeded?”

He threw the question back to her.

Xiang Yi immediately became even more flustered. “Surely nothing happened between us, right? Are you alright? Did you get bullied? Did anyone take advantage of you? Are you aggrieved?”

1

The handsome man said with a charming gaze in his inwardly hooked and outwardly upturned peach-blossom-shaped eyes, “Xiang Yi, what are you worreid abuot? Are you afraid that I’m not clean anymore~~”

4

As soon as he said that, Xiang Yi’s ears began to turn red and she said, “That’s not what I mean. Chastity is just a secular theory that restrains others. It shouldn’t become a social stigma…”

Whoosh——

Shi Sui closed the distance between him and her while staring at the young girl in front of him with a purely dark gaze.

“So Xiang Yi, do you mean that you won’t mind it regardless of what kind of person I am?”

Xiang Yi vaguely felt that his words seemed to be a trap for her but she was too trusting of him so she instinctively assented softly.

2

“What if I’m a bad person then?” Shi Sui asked with a smile.

Xiang Yi subconsciously retorted, “No, you’re very, very nice.”

2

She then saw the man in front of her saying with a smirk, “What should I do? I don’t want to be a good person at all.”

2

chapters.title: Chapter 452 - Boyfriend (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 452 - Boyfriend (1)

‘Huh?’

Xiang Yi’s eyelashes trembled but she was blindfolded before she could even react.

There was sudden darkness.

“Shi Sui…” She called out to him in confusion with some bewilderment in her voice.

However, she wasn’t afraid.

Shi Sui paused as he was bending forward and asked, “What’s the matter?”

“You…” Xiang Yi bit her lower lip and hesitated for a few seconds before asking, “Are you going to kiss me?”

“…”

Shi Sui was momentarily speechless.

Although he genuinely wanted to be a crook, he was…somewhat embarrassed after being exposed.

The rational villain and the demonic villain in his heart were engaged in a fierce and intense battle.

Xiang Yi blushed and even her voice had become a little shaky but she pretended to be composed and nonchalantly. “Well then, you can kiss me now.”

Bang!

It felt as if fireworks boomed at the end of the century.

Her heart rate increased rapidly and her ears were filled with chaotic noise. There was an instance where she felt as if time had stood still.

Shi Sui’s clear and distinct Adam’s apple moved and he asked in a rather hoarse voice, “Xiang Yi, do you know what you’re talking about?”

Xiang Yi answered, “Ah Nan told me about something recently and I think it makes quite a lot of sense. He said that I…I’m a little lecherous…”

Shi Sui was stunned but a moment later, he smiled quietly and said, “You really…”

Whoosh——

Her heartbeat returned to normal and it was filled with sweetness, as if it had just rolled around in cotton candy.

Xiang Yi waited for a long time and began to be anxious because he still hadn’t kissed her yet.

She felt that Shi Sui was different to her but she didn’t dare to be certain about how much Shi Sui liked her.

She wondered if he liked her as much as she liked him or not…

However, he wasn’t even willing to kiss her now. In that case, it might be the latter…

Due to the visual obstruction, she didn’t know that he had a lustful and burning gaze in his eyes at all.

He had a strong desire to devour the little rabbit in front of him.

He didn’t want to be a nice guy.

However, he also wanted to be nice for her sake.

Shi Sui came close to her ear and his warm breath fell on the side of her long, fair, and slender neck. “Do you like me?”

Xiang Yi said calmly, “Yes.”

“It’s not like the way my ‘Mommy fans’ like me, right?”

“I’m sorry, I’ve become a ‘girlfriend fan’.”

Although she was blindfolded, her sense of hearing had been heightened so she could acutely hear Shi Sui’s soft and low laughter.

He said, “Xiang Yi, I’ll take it that you’ve just confessed to me then.”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘Is something wrong?’

“You don’t have to be a girlfriend fan.”

Shi Sui’s words made Xiang Yi feel as if her heart had been on a rollercoaster and plunged to rock bottom.

Afterwards, it surged all the way up again…

‘Do you want to try being a wife fan?”

“…”

Xiang Yi pushed his hand away but due to a brief moment of distraction, she accidentally used her fractured arm, which caused her to be in so much pain that she inhaled sharply.

Shi Sui frowned and pressed down her wandering hand. “Don’t move.”

Xiang Yi’s doe-like eyes glistened and she asked, “Do you like me?”

Shi Sui didn’t answer her. Although he could affectionately confess his love to numerous actresses in countless films and dramas he acted in, he couldn’t bring himself to do it to Xiang Yi now.

Looking a little helpless, he licked the corner of his mouth and was just about to speak but he suddenly heard Xiang Yi’s firm declaration, “You like me.”

Her voice was firm and full of courage.

Influenced by her, Shi Sui said with joy in his eyes, “Yes, I like you and you like me too.”

Xiang Yi coughed and raised her chin in a restrained manner.

“That means we adore each other. Do you want to be my boyfriend then?”

chapters.title: Chapter 453 - Boyfriend (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 453 - Boyfriend (2)

Chapter 453: Boyfriend (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

It was so quiet in the lounge that only their breathing could be heard.

Even the air seemed to have been filled with a trace of sweetness.

Xiang Yi was open and aboveboard with asking the question. Perhaps because of her upbringing, she never thought that it was an embarrassing thing to admit to having feelings for someone.

2

In her opinion, love should be expressed, be it through words or actions.

Shi Sui answered very naturally, “Okay~” He paused and said with a smile, “But I should be the one saying this.”

Xiang Yi said, “Let’s pretend to do it all over again then. You shall confess your love to me.”

She looked like a conflicted little fox.

1

She was really cute.

Shi Sui was very cooperative. He adjusted the sleeve of his tie and picked up a rose in the case. He then said very ceremoniously, “Xiang Yi, will you be my girlfriend?”

1

Xiang Yi nodded and said, “Yes, you’re my boyfriend now.”

3

When she acted in a childish manner, her smile was pure and radiant.

Shi Sui picked up the apple that had been half-peeled and continued acting childishly together with her. “Hey girlfriend, do you need the fruit to be cut into smaller pieces?”

Xiang Yi gestured with her hands and said, “Boyfriend, I want them this big.”

The two exchanged glances and burst into laughter at the same time.

Shi Sui soon peeled the entire apple. The apple skin was in a long, unbroken strip.

Xiang Yi sat by the bed with the rug wrapped around her body, eating the apple pieces that Shi Sui was feeding her, and dangling her legs blissfully.

1

When Ah Nan entered, he saw her smiling sweetly in a silly manner.

“!”

‘Why has Xiang Yi become a lot less bright than before?’

Ah Nan dashed forward and reached out to touch her forehead. “Xiang Yi are you running a fever…”

Before he could touch the corner of her clothing, a pair of large hands grabbed his tightly to stop him.

Shi Sui said unhurriedly, “There are differences between the two sexes.”

2

Ah Nan blurted, “You and Xiang Yi are sharing the same room. Aren’t you a man yourself?”

“He’s my boyfriend.” After saying that, Xiang Yi wrapped the rug even more tightly around herself, feeling as if she was showing off.

1

Ah Nan was confused.

His eyes were wide open and he stared at Shi Sui in disbelief.

‘Has Shi Sui… won her heart!?!’

1

After a few minutes, Ah Nan finally accepted reality He swallowed his saliva and said, “Xiang Yi, what will your brothers do when they find out… Will they do something to Shi Sui’s legs…”

2

He gestured with his hands the action of snapping something in half.

Xiang Yi exclaimed, “No, I’ll protect him!”

1

Shi Sui grinned with joy in his eyes. “Thank you, Xiang Yi~ You’re so nice~”

“It’s only right for a girl to protect her boyfriend,” Xiang Yi said with a calm expression while dangling her little feet twice.

Ah Nan looked at this in shock.

‘Shi Sui, why have you become such a natural at being a gigolo!?!’

2

Risking death, he said again, “Shi Sui, your fans might think that you’re sponging off of your girlfriend…”

Shi Sui asked with raised brows, “Do you think that that’s something anyone can do?”

Ah Nan murmured, “Ah…”

“Many people can eat the food Xiang Yi cooks but I’m the only one who can sponge off her.”

1

Ah Nan’s gaze began to be dazed.

“Who’s there?” Shi Sui suddenly looked out of the resting room.

Ah Nan quickly went forward to open the door, only to see that there was a woman who was about 30 years old, standing at the door and secretly taking photos.

He said with a sullen expression, “Ma’am, please delete those photos or videos.”

Having been exposed, the woman first panicked a little before muttering softly, “What are you being so aggressive for? Aren’t celebrities meant to have their photos taken by others…”

4

chapters.title: Chapter 454 - Backfired
chapters.body:
Chapter 454 - Backfired

Chapter 454: Backfired

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Ah Nan was speechless.

“Ma’am, celebrities are entitled to their personal time and space too. You are violating her privacy and portrait rights by doing this.”

Seeing his short stature and rainbow-colored hair, which made him look like a gangster, Dong Mei didn’t take Ah Nan seriously at all. She lied through her teeth, “I wasn’t taking any photos, I was just taking a look! Who was taking photos? Don’t spout nonsense and smear me, okay!?! Is there a law that forbids ordinary people from looking at celebrities when they meet them?”

1

Ah Nan took a deep breath, resisted the urge to pull her hair, and tried her best to calm down. “Give me your phone, you can leave after I delete the photos.”

Dong Mei was darting her eyes around and ignoring her. She argued unreasonably, “My phone is my personal property. Why should I give it to you!?! You’re invading my privacy! Don’t you come over. Can a nurse come here please!?! Someone is committing robbery!”

2

Ah Nan was so furious that his head was buzzing.

‘So she can violate the privacy of others but it’s a crime for us to legally defend our rights?’

‘What kind of double standards is that!?!’

Her voice was so loud and she made so much noise that a nurse rushed over immediately to understand the situation.

Dong Mei exclaimed, “It’s him! Nurse, see how much of a gangster he is! He even tried to snatch my phone. The service of your hospital staff is really terrible. How can you let such a person in?!”

Ah Nan was confused.

The nurse had a splitting headache, so she had no choice but to persuade both parties.

Ah Nan was still arguing his case when he turned his head to the side, only to discover that the woman had sneaked away!

“Ugh, what kind of person is she… The difference between humans is larger than that between humans and dogs! Motherf***…”

Si Chuanbai had just exited the elevator when he heard a certain rainbow-colored-haired kid cursing.

He coughed and cleared his throat.

In the next second…

Ah Nan quickly changed his words and said, “Mother’s mother is Grandma, Father’s father is Grandpa…”

1

Si Chuanbai grinned but he still looked like a serious elite. “What’s going on?”

Ah Nan reluctantly recounted the process of everything.

Si Chuanbai said with a frown, “That woman has probably sneakily taken more than two photos. Some time ago, the article she wrote made it to the hot search list but fortunately, Director Zhu stood forth to clarify things.”

The hospital was at a rather remote location so there was low footfall.

He refreshed Weibo to see that Dong Mei had indeed posted a new status with a sarcastic caption.

[@TheFragranceOfPlumBlossomsComeFromTheBitingCold: Oh my God, I really can’t stand how pretentious some female celebrities can be. She actually needs her assistant to feed her food! The stranger thing is that she has a little gangster by her side whose hair is dyed the colors of the rainbow. He looks just like a delinquent! I merely took a few photos and he actually snapped at me aggressively. Thank God I was smart enough to deny taking any photos so he couldn’t do anything to me~~ /Show Teeth/ Show Teeth]

2

In addition to the text, she also attached a a few pictures that she had just secretly taken.

Dong Mei was feeling smug because of her wits. She had set her privacy settings to allow only her followers to coment on her posts. Her number of followers had increased from dozens to thousands. She was extremely agitated.

If it could increase to tens of thousands or hundreds of thousands,she’d become an influencer just by slamming celebrities. She would then be able to earn money from doing nothing!

2

To her surprise, her plan backfired this time.

It flopped terribly!

The fans of the UntimelyCouple rejoiced in euphoria again!

1

—— [??? What assistant? That’s Shi Sui!]

—— [Shi Sui was feeding Xiang Yi food. Ahhhh, I’m dead!!]

—— [Why did he use his hands to feed her? He should have used his mouth! Shi Sui, use your mouth! Do you hear me!?!]

2

chapters.title: Chapter 455 - Backlash
chapters.body:
Chapter 455 - Backlash

Chapter 455: Backlash

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The fans were full of adoration and glee.

‘Look, they must be the sweetest and realest couple of the entertainment industry, huh!?!’

‘It won’t be a loss to join!’

The Shisui Sisters and Spicy Rabbits were somewhat perplexed.

Most people hoped that Shi Sui and Xiang Yi could both stay single but they were actually so close to each other…

They couldn’t help but let their imagination run wild.

‘Could it be…that there’s really something going on between them?’

1

All of a sudden, both their fan bases were discussing what to do if they were really dating each other.

2

…

On the other hand, Dong Mei was also mocked and slammed by numerous netizens.

—— [What a joke. You don’t even know who Shi Sui is. Trust you to call him an assistant at every turn. Do you know that you’re twisting facts by doing this?]

1

—— [How did the rainbow-haired Ah Nan offend you? His hair is clearly very artistic. It’s a hair color that ordinary hairstylists can’t create!]

1

—— [The owner of that post is really annoying by acting so smugly after thinking that she’s outwitted everyone. Xiang Yi may be a celebrity but she’s also a patient. All things aside, secretly taking photos of others without permission is just an immoral act.]

…

Looking at the hateful comments all over the screen, Dong Mei’s expression stiffened.

The public opinion on the Internet was volatile and ever-changing. One might be enjoying endless support from others and trampled to the doldrums in the next moment.

Those who use public opinion as a sword to kill others will definitely die because of public opinion!

She deleted her latest post and tried to pretend that nothing had happened.

1

She didn’t expect the netizens to curse at her even more aggressively!

—— [Wow, wow, wow, do you have a guilty conscience?]

—— [Are you there? Why aren’t you showing yourself? Are you paying respects to your mother’s grave?]

—— [Secretly taking photos of others without their permission is illegal. Be careful, you might receive a warning letter from Attorney @Bunny’sBigBrother]

2

Dong Mei panicked and typed a comment while trembling.

[@TheFragranceOfPlumBlossomsComeFromTheBitingCold: I’m just an ordinary single mother, I happened to run into those celebrities when I accompanied my child to the hospital! I don’t know anything about the entertainment industry, and I was just making mindless criticism but I didn’t expect it to attract attention! Let me off and stop slamming me!]

1

As soon as she posted that statement, everyone’s heart went out to her upon learning that she was a single mother.

All humans are compassionate. It is quite tough for a woman to raise her child singlehandedly. Hence, many netizens not only stopped slamming her but also deleted their spiteful comments.

Dong Mei heaved a sigh of relief when she saw that the comments section gradually became calm.

Suddenly, she heard a nurse yell, “Whose child is this? Why isn’t anyone keeping an eye on him!?!”

Dong Mei walked over in hopes to see a dramatic scene but to her astonishment, the child who had fallen down the stairs was her son!

Her son’s knees were bruised and hands were scraped.Even his IV bottle had been broken and the spot on his hand, which the needle had been stuck into, had started bleeding. It was a frightening sight and the nurse was carefully pulling the needle out for him.

“Mommy, it doesn’t hurt.” His eyes were brimming with tears. “I couldn’t find you, where did you go?”

The people around cast strange glances at them, seemingly chiding her silently.

Anger and irritation surged from the bottom of Dong Mei’s heart. “Who asked you to look for me?! If you had stayed there quietly while being put on the drip, would you have fallen? All you do is cause trouble for me every single day!”

2

Her son trembled with fear and said timidly, “I just… I just wanted to go to the washroom…”

An elderly lady interjected in displeasure from the side, “How can you leave such a young child alone? You’re such a careless mother!”

“It’s none of your business, old hag!” Dong Mei hollered at her while grabbing her son by the collar on the back of his shirt. “How irritating. You’re already so old, can’t you go to the washroom by yourself?”

Her son, who had a full bladder and was urgently in need of relief, was so frightened by the yanking that he immediately peed in his pants.

What he got in response was a slap on the face by his mother!

chapters.title: Chapter 456 - Backlash (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 456 - Backlash (2)

Chapter 456: Backlash (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Smack.

The crisp sound made everyone’s heart jump.

Dong Mei cursed, “Will it kill you to hold it in for a while!?! You’re too old to be peeing in your pants. You’re so disgusting! You’re deliberately trying to embarrass me, aren’t you? Why did I give birth to a son like you…”

1

Her son turned pale as if he had done something terrible. He was in so much fear that his body began to tremble

The elderly lady barked furiously, “You’re such a terrible mother!”

The other passers-by were also indignant.

A young man nearby took a video recording of everything…

2

…

Dong Mei lashed out at all the passers-by around her who criticized her in front of the hospital before taking her son back inside to be put on the drip.

Her son was still wearing his damp, soiled pants and not daring to utter a single word or sit down, for fear that he would dirty the chairs in the hospital.

A nurse took pity on him and gave him a pair of hospital pants for him to change into.

“Thank you,” the little boy thanked obediently.

“You’re welcome.” The nurse smiled at him, raised her hand and rubbed his hair.

She returned to her shift and vaguely heard some patients discussing among themselves. “Ah, the video of this child getting beaten has become viral!”

“People like her don’t deserve to be parents! They’re not fit!”

There were many of such comments. After taking a look at it curiously, she discovered that the woman in the video was the mother of that poor little child!

“!”

The nurse clenched her fist in great pleasure!

…

On this day, countless people had their social media platform feed flooded with that video.

1

The way that Dong Mei had treated her child in the video was flabbergasting!

The last slap and the tears that were welling up in the boy’s eyes and about to fall had tugged at the heartstrings of countless people!

———[Students have to sit for exams to get promoted in school but why don’t parents have to take exams before they’re allowed to be parents?]

—— [She left her child alone and even hit him. Is she his biological mother at all!?!]

—— [After watching this video, I realized that not everyone in this world is worthy of being a parent!]

…

The outrage of the netizens was rather appalling.

Soon, someone found Dong Mei’s personal details and shared it on the Internet.

1

Her Weibo account didn’t escape the sharp eyes of the netizens.

When they saw that she had also posted something on Weibo to denigrate Xiang Yi, their anger doubled.

The backlash of public opinion was also phenomenal. Within just a few minutes, her Weibo account was in total disrepute!

Later on, Dong Mei’s former classmate who exposed her for lying about being asingle mother, also posted screenshots of the photos of Dong Mei on a vacation with her husband and son!

There was concrete evidence!

The netizens who found out that they had been deceived, were all enraged.

‘That woman is taking us for fools, huh!?!’

Dong Mei’s cell phone was flooded with countless calls and text messages. Even her husband’s superiors at work had found out that Dong Mei had beaten her child brutally in public and even created rumors. Thus, he may not be able to keep his job…

1

When she made her first post on Weibo, she totally didn’t expect that retribution would come so quickly!

The woman sat on the ground in the hospital, weeping incessantly in regret.

…

…

In the resting room.

Si Chuanbai strode in and discovered that the atmosphere in the room was different from before.

He pushed down his glasses and said calmly, “Are you two dating?”

1

Ah Nan followed behind him and was dumbfounded to hear his question.

‘No, how can Mr. Si see it at a glance?!’

Xiang Yi nodded.

Shi Sui smirked and said, “Yes, Xiang Yi is my girlfriend~~”

Ah Nan thought, ‘There’s actually such a childish side to Shi Sui!?!’

Si Chuanbai was indeed worthy of being an ace celebrity manager. His first reaction was to consider the steps to take from the perspective of their careers.

“So, are you guys planning to announce your relationship to the public?”

This time, Shi Sui nodded.

However, Xiang Yi said straightforwardly, “What if we break up?”

2

Shi Sui was speechless too.

chapters.title: Chapter 457 - Even The Most Pretentious Person Has To Take His Hat’S Off To You
chapters.body:
Chapter 457 - Even The Most Pretentious Person Has To Take His Hat’S Off To You

It had been less than an hour since they started dating each other officially.

Yet, she was already considering what to do in the case of a breakup!?!

Ah Nan laughed incessantly while throwing out hints rapidly.

‘Xiang Yi, your mindset is too dangerous!’

“Ah Nan, is your throat uncomfortable? I’ll cook you some loquat paste for you when we get back later.” Xiang Yi blinked and looked at Shi Sui before saying in a warm and serious tone, “From a logical perspective, there is indeed a probability that we might break up. When the time comes, we’ll have to publicize it ag again. Wouldn’t that be too troublesome?”

Shi Sui was speechless too.

‘So she doesn’t want to announce our relationship to the public only because she’s worried that we might break up?’

He asked leisurely in a deep and husky voice, “Xiang Yi, do you find me troublesome?”

“Huh? That’s not what I mean, I meant making our relationship public…”

Shi Sui looked down, his long thick eyelashes casting . a faint shadow on his cold, fair skin. He said pitifully, “You don’t have to go on. I understand, I’ll just listen to you.”

Xiang Yi wavered immediately and curled her toes.After being conflicted for a few seconds, she said, “Why don’t we keep it a secret…”

Shi Sui’s dark eyes lit up. He raised his chiseled chin and said, “Xiang Yi, are you willing to give me a proper status? That’s wonderful. It turns out that I’m not just a secret lover to you.”

Xiang Yi panicked. ‘How could I have forgotten that Shi Sui is just a man with a fragile heart? I have to pamper this baby that I love. I can’t let his vulnerable and fragile soul be hurt!’

“No, no, that’s not what I think!”

“Huh? What do you think, Xiang Yi?”

“I=I just think you’re really nice…”

Si Chuanbai and Ah Nan watched as the young girl wrapped in a small blanket coyly buttered Shi Sui up.

Ah Nan : …!

‘Best Actor Shi Sui, even the the most pretentious person has to take his hat’s off to you!’

Si Chuanbai was speechless and couldn’t bring himself to continue looking.

‘What happened to your gentlemanly, refined and ascetic persona?’

‘It’s fake… It must be fake…’

‘Shi Sui’s true nature is being dog-like!’

…

There was a sudden change in the filming plan. Although Director Zhu and the others were as busy as bees, they still took the time out of their schedules to visit Xiang Yi.

An apology was necessary. After all, it was strictly speaking, a mistake on the program team’s part.

“But I have a piece of good news to share with you, Xiang Yi.” Director Zhu was grinning incessantly. “Xiang Yi, that man is a fugitive! The officials have been hunting him down for a long time but he’s really good at being a fugitive. He seemed to have also been an international mercenary too. This time, he was overwhelmed by the carpet search, and there was no way for him to flee so he decided to commit a crime one last time but he didn’t expect to have been caught by you!”

Xiang Yi said, “The credit doesn’t belong only to me. We have to thank Jun Han and the others too. We worked hard together to nab him.”

Director Zhu had an even better impression of Xiang Yi because she was brave to be righteous but didn’t want to take all the credit. She was really nice.

“How’s Xu Tumi?” Xiang Yi asked.

Director Zhu answered, “She’s gotten much better, the doctor told her to rest and recuperate. But… ahem…”

“Director Zhu, feel free to tell us.”

Director Zhu said embarrassedly, “She keeps clamoring and asking to stay in the same ward as you. She also said that if there aren’t any spare beds, she can sleep on the same bed as you…”

Xu Tumi was really frightened. She had already cried several times.

Xiang Yi said, “I’m not going to continue being hospitalized. Can she recuperate anywhere?”

Director Zhu said, “Yes, there are no special requirements for that.”

Xiang Yi gave it some thought and said, “Why don’t you bring her to my place? We have lots of spare rooms.”

Shi Sui, who was at the side, was slowly getting confused.

chapters.title: Chapter 458 - Sweet Couple (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 458 - Sweet Couple (1)

Fact:

I have a girlfriend. My girlfriend has a female friend.

Question:

Who exactly gets to sleep in my girlfriend’s bed first, me or the female friend?

The answer was self-explanatory.

Shi Sui licked his inner cheek in slight displeasure.

Director Zhu’s eyes lit up. “That’s great! Xiang Yi, do you need me to go back with you?”

Shi Sui coughed sulkily.

Only then did Director Zhu realize how ambiguous his words were and he quickly explained, “Don’t be mistaken, I’m just worried about the filming for this episode. If we have to re-film it, Xu Tumi wouldn’t be able to adapt for a while so she can’t get into the right state. I don’t plan to make things hard for everyone but we won’t have enough content for this episode.”

“Xiang Yi’s words reminded me that I can split this episode into three rounds of games and we’ll change the third round to a post-exercise relax time!”

At this moment, Director Zhu still didn’t know that in a few years time, ‘National Mass Workout’ would not only become a variety show with consistently high ratings, but also become a globally famous show.

TV broadcasting companies of foreign countries would even buy the franchise rights to shoot a local edition of the program in their respective countries. However, the counterparts would never be as popular as the original.

Xiang Yi didn’t have any objections to that. “I don’t have an opinion. Director Zhu, just arrange as you please. I’ll do my best to cooperate.”

Director Zhu rubbed his hands, looked at the Shi Sui, and chuckled. “Shi Sui, once we go there, you’ll definitely be in the frame…”

Shi Sui said calmly, “I’m okay with that.”

Apart from “Two Under One Roof”, Shi Sui had never joined any other variety shows. The program team of “National Mass Workout” had invited him before but he had turned down their offer.

Director Zhu didn’t expect to be able to get him agree this time!

Director Zhu gleefully proceeded to discuss with the editor, planner, and others. Before leaving, he didn’t forget to close the door.

Director Zhu suddenly reacted.

A man and a woman sharing a room alone…

‘Could it be that they’re really an item and the rumors are not just meant for publicity!?!’

…

Director Zhu was highly efficient and he soon came up with the filming plan.

Hearing that she could go to Xiang Yi’s home, Xu Tumi perked up and insisted on riding in Xiang Yi’s small and ordinary car instead of her luxurious nanny van.

Although Xiang Yi had become the owner of Tomato Entertainment, she chose to travel around in the same vehicle as before because she wasn’t particular about such stuff.

When Xu Tumi got in the car, Shi Sui also happened to come over.

She asked in puzzlement, “Senior Shi, aren’t you going to ride in your own car?”

Shi Sui replied with a straight face, “Xiang Yi is injured so I’m here to take care of her.”

“Oh…” Xu Tumi replied daftly. After getting into the car, she sat down beside Xiang Yi right away.

She was barefaced and her skin was in good condition but she was extremely pale.

“Drink some hot water.” Xiang Yi handed him a thermos cup.

Xu Tumi twisted the bottle cap, only to find that there were wolfberry and red dates soaked in the water. He took a sip and felt a warm sensation.

Her eyes were welled up with tears as she felt like crying.

Xiang Yi asked, “Are you alright?”

Hearing her soft, gentle, and sweet voice, Xu Tumi couldn’t help it anymore. It seems that humans are just like that. One can be strong and independent sometimes but the sudden care and concern shown by others would easily break down all their walls of defense.

Xu Tumi burst into tears loudly.

She was wailing so badly that her image was ruined as tears and mucus started flowing down her face incessantly.

Shi Sui turned his face to the side to look at the scenery outside the window.

Apart from Xiang Yi, Shi Sui wouldn’t be bothered to comfort other women when they’re crying, regardless of how miserable they may be.

chapters.title: Chapter 459 - Sweet Couple (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 459 - Sweet Couple (2)

Chapter 459: Sweet Couple (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“…”

Xu Tumi was stunned.

The young girl in front of her had a calm and quiet gaze which seemed to have been infiltrated by some tender moonlight.

1

Xu Tumi buried her face in Xiang Yi’s neck and tears began to flow freely. She said sobbingly, “Why are you so nice…”

Xiang Yi patted her back gently and said, “Don’t worry, I’m here.”

“Uwu~ Xiang Yi, if you’re a man, I’d definitely marry you!”

2

Xiang Yi was just about to coax Xu Tumi when she met Shi Sui’s resentful and aggrieved gaze…

2

It was as if Xiang Yi was a heartless jerk who had abandoned her wife and child.

She cleared her throat and said, “It’s impossible between us.”

Xu Tumi was sobbing incessantly as she grabbed Xiang Yi.

“I don’t dare to open my eyes, I see that man as soon as I close my eyes…”

Xiang Yi allowed her to hug her tightly and she said gently, “Are you hungry? I have lots of pigs at home, I can slaughter one and cook it for you.”

2

Xu Tumi stopped crying.

“How about you slaughter a chicken and make a chicken platter? We can have it with noodles too.”

1

Xu Tumi whimpered and burped. “But…but I want o drink some chicken soup too. I haven’t drank any in a long time because my manager keeps making me go on a diet.”

2

Xiang Yi said, “We’ll kill a chicken too then.”

Xu Tumi exclaimed, “Can we be best friends forever!?”

…

The group arrived at the manor.

Li Jianyu looked at Director Zhu and the others in confusion.

‘Aren’t they the gods and goddesses of the variety show industry?!’

Director Zhu greeted enthusiastically, “You’re Little Li, right? I watched the shows that you produced and I’m surprised to find that it’s possible to make one’s daily routine be so interesting!”

“No, no, not at all. Director Zhu, the programs you shoot are really interesting! It’s just like a textbook example that we should all learn from!”

The two shook hands and Li Jianyu felt as if he was in a dream. He even quietly said to Ruan Qing that he was not going to wash his hands for the next two days.

1

Not surprisingly, Ruan Qing shot him a beautiful eye-roll.

As the deputy director of the TV station, Ruan Qing had crossed paths with Director Zhu before. After they exchanged pleasantries, Ruan Qing asked him about his purpose of visit.

Director Zhu said, “Well, it’s just an accident that happened during the filming. In order to make up for the lost run time, we’re going to add a round of games called [Reward Time] that’s aimed at giving off the vibes of resting after a workout.”

Li Jianyu instinctively sucked up to him. “Director Zhu, as expected of you! You can actually come up with such a plan!”

Director Zhu smiled and said, “We have to thank Xiang Yi for being willing to lend us the venue for the filming. Alright then, you guys go ahead and get busy while I proceed to filming now.”

The team of ‘NationalMassWorkout’ was mature and efficient. They systemically mounted the cameras, set up the microphones, and shot the scene of the environment…

Li Jianyu gradually felt that something was not right.

‘What? Are they here to snatch my job?’

He said with his eyes wide open, “Ahhhh, they’re also shooting a scene about the daily lives of celebrities. No, I have to die!”

1

Ruan Qing said, “Finish your work for today before you die.”

1

Li Jianyu said, “Sister Ruan, you seem very much like a capitalist who exploits laborers in a capitalist society.”

1

Ruan Qing smiled and said, “Since you’ve said so, you shall work overtime today.”

2

In the courtyard, the sound of Li Jianyu’s wailing filled the air.

…

Director Zhu originally thought that Xu Tumi couldn’t adapt to it for a while but to his surprise, she went out with Xiang Yi cheekily after resting for a while.

He quickly caught up to them with the cameraman, in hopes of capturing the romantic scene of a young girl drinking afternoon tea in a glass nursery while feeding white doves by the fountain…

1

Afterwards, he saw the two stopping by the chicken pen.

“Which one do you like? I’ll kill it to make you some chicken soup.”

2

Director Zhu was dumbfounded.

chapters.title: Chapter 460 - Sweet Couple (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 460 - Sweet Couple (3)

Chapter 460: Sweet Couple (3)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Xu Tumi’s eyes were glistening. “That one! That one! It looks delicious!”

1

Director Zhu was dumbfounded.

‘Shouldn’t she give an excuse for this!?! Why is she going straight to choosing the chicken!?!’

‘Do you have the emotional burden of an actress at all!?!’

1

Xiang Yi nodded and said calmly, “Okay, kill it.”

1

Director Zhu was dumbfounded.

‘Oh my God, Xiang Yi, do you still remember that the bone of your hand is fractured?!’

‘You’re killing it just like that? What a tyrannical queen who has simply mastered killing!’

However, he also had to admit that this segment was very much like a variety show.

The natural punchlines and humor were far more exciting than those that had been carefully staged and performed!

Xiang Yi took Xu Tumi for a stroll and happily grabbed two old hens, one small sheep, and a few fish in the fish basket.

1

She released the small fish and left only two large ones alive.

Although Xiang Yi really wanted to do it herself, she was stopped.

The final solution was that everyone would handle the ingredients while the recipe would be decided by Xiang Yi at that time.

It was undeniable that the atmosphere of cooking together in this way added a touch of warmth when it was filmed.

There was a lot of content filmed when Jun Han, Bai Wuxia and other people handled the ingredients together with Shi Sui.

Unlike others who kept a low profile, Bai Wuxia had been striking up a conversation with Shi Sui, creating the vibes that the two of them were well-acquainted old friends.

2

Seeing that he was trying to get some clout off of Shi Sui, Jun Han physically and psychologically felt uncomfortable and silently stayed further away from him.

As for Xu Tumi, she was arranged to stay in front of the floor-to-ceiling window. The incense burner on the table was emitting the fragrance of incense that was tranquil and soothes the mind.

Xiang Yi put a small furry blanket on her knees to cover her legs. She then sat cross-legged on the rattan chair unrestrainedly.

Xu Tumi lamented, “I’m totally living like a princess.”

Xiang Yi said seriously, “You are a little princess.”

1

To be honest, Xu Tumi had heard a lot of such fawning compliments but she felt that Xiang Yi’s compliments were different from that of others!

“You’re the princess!”

Xiang Yi smiled and played along. “Cheers, Your Highness.”

The clinking of the ceramic cups caused a crisp sound in the air, symbolizing the quick establishment of a friendship between the girls.

Director Zhu did not give them any more assignments and continued to film, making it seem like a vacation.

They had afternoon tea in the glass nursery. Someone was operating a drone in the Little Rabbit Farms, some were leisurely fishing by the pond, and some were hand-picking fruits in the orchard…

The scene was serene, beautiful, unhurried and relaxed.

…

In the evening, the daily livestream of “Two Under One Roof” began.

Director Zhu wanted to shoot some content about the dinner segment, so he discussed with Li Jianyu for a linkage between the two variety shows.

1

They claimed that it was meant for promoting each other, but Li Jianyu knew that they were the ones who would stand to gain an advantage.

After all, “National Mass Workout” was much more famous than “Two Under One Roof” right now!

1

A fancy spread was prepared for dinner. Not every every artise had good culinary skills so some of the dishes looked awful.

Some people watching the live-stream were upset:

—— [That egg has turned black, how is it edible!?! I’m speechless!!]

—— [What does Xiang Yi mean? There are so many people here, is this how she hosts her guests?]

—— [How long has it been, and now she’s already acting like a spoiled brat who won’t do any household chores? She doesn’t even bother to cook. :)]

…

The pop-ups had just drifted past the screen. When Xu Tumi pushed the plate of awfully-prepared scrambled eggs with tomato towards Xiang, she blinked expectantly.

“Xiang Yi, give it a try. I prepared this for you myself!”

The netizens were appalled.

chapters.title: Chapter 461 - Sweet Couple
chapters.body:
Chapter 461 - Sweet Couple

Chapter 461: Sweet Couple

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

All of a sudden, the pop-up comments were full of laughter.

—— [The shaming comes so quickly like a tornado]

—— [Hahahaha, the awful food that Xu Tum cooked is really awful!]

2

—— [Some people just like holding themselves cheap. You haven’t learned your lesson, huh?]

—— [Why is it Xiang Yi’s duty to cook? She’s a guest, not a cook, okay? She’s being nice and doing everyone a favor by cooking. She’s not obligated to, please don’t take the moral high ground!]

…

With Wang Yao present, the atmosphere quickly became livelier.

It also dawned on the netizens that the numerous people present were not customers but the cast and crew who were there to film the variety show.

“I suggest we all raise our glasses to thank Xiang Yi for being righteous, standing up for justice, and for providing us with the filming venue!” Wang Yao said in a terse and clipped manner.

1

Xu Tumi exclaimed, “Xiang Yi is injured and can’t drink alcohol so I’ll drink on her behalf!”

She picked up the wine glasses and chugged the wine in both her glass and Xiang Yi’s!

Wang Yao began cheering on a whim, “You two should get together! Be together!”

2

The others began cheering too even though they were confused.

In the live-stream:

—— [????]

—— [Waaa! Hurry up and stop your dangerous speech!]

—— [Sweet girl X Gentle girl. What a sweet couple, I’ll stan them for a billion seconds!]

—— [Lmao, Shi Sui went from obsessing over his wife to staring at Wang Yao]

1

…

Wang Yao was yelling with great enthusiasm when he felt a sudden chill down his spine. He rubbed his arms, only to realize that he had gotten goosebumps.

He turned around daftly, only to see that Shi Sui was staring at him with a mirthless smirk.

4

Wang Yao shivered and came back to his senses.

“Xiang Yi, your cat is really clingy. Hahaha…” He changed the topic stiffly.

Xiao Naofu had been nestled in Xiang Yi’s arms since she returned, refusing to go anywhere else. It seemed to be acting coquettishly.

Xiang Yi had no choice but to let it be because she knew that it was worried about her.

Raising her hand and rubbing the back of the Xiao Naofu’s neck, Xiang Yi asked softly, “Would you like to have some goat’s milk?”

“Meow~”

Even its meowing was coquettish.

Shi Sui reached his arms out and said, “Let me carry it for a while.”

1

Xiao Naofu looked rather resistant.

If it were in the past, Xiang Yi would probably have let him carry Xiao Naofu. However, she recalled what Jun Han said and asked, “Did you bully Xiao Naofu behind my back? Did you bring it on a run and threatened to spay it if it didn’t obey you?”

1

Shi Sui was at a loss for words.
