‘Oh dear, I’ve been exposed.’

The young girl puffed her cheeks up and exclaimed, “You’re not to bully it in the future!”

2

Shi Sui squinted with a trace of danger in his long and narrow eyes.

‘The cat is more important than me?’

1

He was exuding a gloomy aura and the atmosphere around the dining table seemed to be rather tense.

However, Xiao Naofu smiled at Shi Sui smugly, as if to say: “I’m the most pampered one!”

1

The fans of the UntimelyCouple were raving over their interaction again!

—— [He’s jealous, he’s jealous, the dog-like man is jealous!]

1

—— [Finally, someone can deal with you! If there isn’t, we’ll replace the cat!]

—— [I strongly suspect that this cat has developed sentience and there is concrete proof to back my claims!]

2

—— [Pretentious Xiao Naofu: Brother, there’s no place for you in this home anymore. Did you do something wrong? Don’t make things difficult for me. You’d better pack up and leave~]

…

The netizens were getting really enthusiastic with the memes and jokes but Bai Wuxia said in a thick-skinned manner, “Xiang Yi was really brave today but if I hadn’t brought a rope here, that fugitive would have escaped!”

2

The crowd was shocked speechless by his bewildering speech.

In particular, Jun Han had been extremely ashamed as he felt really cowardly for not going forth to help immediately.

Bai Wuxia’s words had really changed his perception!

1

In an instant, he was dumbfounded.

Bai Wuxia was still teasing…

…

chapters.title: Chapter 462 - Art Of Language
chapters.body:
Chapter 462 - Art Of Language

“Ah, dear friends and audience, you guys had no idea how dangerous the situation was today!”

Bai Wuxia’s words piqued the curiosity of the netizens who were watching the live-stream.

—— [So what exact happened today?]

—— [I seem to have seen Director Zhu’s Weibo post about Xiang Yi saving the damsel in distress.]

—— [Who did Xiang Yi save? I’m really curious. Teacher Bai, please tell us quickly]

…

Director Zhu’s expression changed slightly and he said, “Come on, Teacher Bai, let’s cheers.”

He intended to change the subject but Bai Wuxia was bent on taking credit so he just clinked glasses with him perfunctorily.

While Xiang Yi was away to make some goat’s milk for for Xiao Naofu, he continued to say,”Our filming location for the afternoon will on the mountain. Who would have thought that a fugitive would be hidden in the mountain!?! I heard that he has been wanted for a long time and he’s a serial killer who often targets women!”

“Tumi was the one who encountered him. The situation was really dangerous at that time! Tumi was dragged away! Fortunately, she was smart enough to have called for help. I rushed over immediately when I heard her voice!”

“I thought that since Tumi was a girl, it’s only right that I protect her. Besides, I’m much older than Tumi and the rest. They’re just like my children. Of course, I have to protect them and make sure that they don’t get hurt!”

The atmosphere at the dining table was extremely bizarre.

Jun Han was so embarrassed and awkward that he kept stubbing his toe against the ground.

The other celebrities who were watching the filming looked at each other in puzzlement.

Reminded of those painful memories, Xu Tumi subconsciously bit her lower lip and held her chopsticks in her trembling hand. She then put down her chopsticks and clutched the hem of her skirt. She was applying so much force that her veins were exposed, looking extremely obvious underneath her skin.

Her negative emotions were consuming her.

Xu Tumi thought that she had already gotten over it but actually, she hadn’t.

She was like a drowning person who had been pulled up to the surface of the water for a breath of fresh air by Xiang Yi but a moment later, she was pressed hard into the water again.

The comments on the live stream suddenly increased.

—— [Oh my God, reality is more exciting than the TV show!]

—— [Teacher Bai is really nice. If only I had such a good senior!]

—— [Ah, Xu Tumi was dragged away? Would she have already… Hehehe]

—— [Seriously, Xu Tumi is so ungrateful. Instead of thanking Teacher Bai for saving her, she even shows Xiang Yi so much kindness. Is she just hanging out with anyone who’s famous? Is she looking down on Teacher Bai just because he’s not famous now?]

…

Bai Wuxia continued to add fuel to the fire with his excellent writing skills and mastery of the “art of language”, so as to blow his trumpet.

He even added a conclusion:

“Humans are humans because we are different from cold-blooded animals! We are emotional and have feelings! When you see others in trouble, you ought to help if you can! People will only be loved when they love other people!”

For a while, many netizens felt that he had a halo behind him.

The comments in the comment section were all compliments for him.

—— [Teacher Bai is really impressive!]

—— [Well said! What a rare gem of the entertainment industry!]

—— [To be honest, Bai Wuxia’s words are really profound. He’s no longer just being kindhearted but rather, he has reached a whole new level of morality and ethicalness! He is an idealist and an ascetic on the path of life! Unfortunately, such an excellent artiste like him isn’t famous. Instead, someone like Xiang Yi who is nothing but a pretty face, is extremely famous. That’s simply unreasonable!]

chapters.title: Chapter 463 - Avoiding Is Not Shameful
chapters.body:
Chapter 463 - Avoiding Is Not Shameful

Chapter 463: Avoiding Is Not Shameful

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

Some generous netizens vented their discontent.

Sometimes, people only believe what they see and hear. They tend to also believe information that comes in from the outside world without thinking about it.

1

At this moment, the people only felt that Bai Wuxia was great and mighty. On the other hand, the matter of Xiang Yi getting injured while saving Xu Tumi became insignificant.

Jun Han and the others couldn’t bear to expose Jun Han.

2

Xu Tumi was in such a bad emotional state that she couldn’t even pronounce the syllables properly.

Shi Sui happened to be absent because Little Xiji bit him and urged him to feed it.

By a combination of coincidences, Bai Wuxia managed to blow his trumpet and act like a big shot.

Even Li Jianyu was deceived.

Director Zhu, who was next to him, looked incrediblym sullen.

1

Others may not know the details of the situation but he had witnessed everything clearly in the director’s room.

Bai Wuxia didn’t save Xu Tumi at all!

1

He had left her in the lurch throughout!

Forget it that he didn’t save her. How could he have the cheek to take credit for everything and even use this matter for clout and publicity?!

Bai Wuxia grinned happily. Little did he know that Director Zhu had already blacklisted him and decided not to ever work with him in the future.

“Tumi, have a warm drink to warm your stomach.” Bai Wuxia scooped a bowl of chicken soup and handed it to Xu Tumi.

Although the chicken was processed by someone else, Xiang Yi was the one who added the seasoning and she stewed it for two hours.

The aroma of the soup was heavenly. Before serving it, Xiang Yi skimmed off the oil and sprinkled some salt on it. Each mouthful of soup would make one sigh in pleasure.

Before that, Xiang Yi gave Xu Tumi two bowls of soup,which the latter finished entirely.

However, when she saw the soup that Bai Wuxia gave her, Xu Tumi felt nauseous. For some reason, she treated Bai Wuxia as the fugitive and barfed before leaving in a wretched manner.

This time, there was a huge uproar in the live stream.

1

—— [How rude of her!]

—— [Teacher Bai served her soup and not only is she not thankful to him, how can she pretend to barf!?!]

—— [Wow, as expected of a friend of Vase Fairy. Indeed, birds of the same feather flock together! Annoying people hang out with other annoying people. Impressive.]

Bai Wuxia pretentiously gave Xu Tumi an out and said, “Ah, Tumi probably hasn’t gotten over it yet. Well, girls tend to take a long time to overcome such matters.”

There was a slew of compliments for his gentleness, meticulousness, and high EQ.

Jun Han couldn’t stand it any longer and he snapped, “Senior, can you not mention this in front of Sister Tumi again? You’re hurting her each time you bring this up.”

Bai Wuxia looked a little embarrassed and he began to act like a life mentor. He instructed, “I’m doing it for her own good. We should all face everything that comes our way with bravery and courage! Only if you dare to face the suffering, can you really overcome the trauma! How can you just avoid your problems and run away from them?”

1

He was the best at giving life advice and there was no way Jun Han could outargue him. He was completely speechless and could only sulk grumpily.

All of a sudden…

A clear and bland voice slowly said, “Is there a rule that says that you can’t run away from your problems?”

The crowd looked over in unison and saw the young girl standing quietly under the bright light with the cat in her arms.

2

Bai Wuxia felt rather guilty and diffident. He sounded a lot less confident too. “Well, that’s the logic…”

“But individuals vary.”

“Why can’t we escape? Escaping is not shameful, nor is it ridiculous.”

“It’s just a type of right to choose.”

chapters.title: Chapter 464 - Beating Chicken Soup With Chicken Soup
chapters.body:
Chapter 464 - Beating Chicken Soup With Chicken Soup

Chapter 464: Beating Chicken Soup With Chicken Soup

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Bai Wuxia tried to defeat Xiang Yi with his life advice. “Xiang Yi, if everyone thinks like you, wouldn’t society be in chaos? This is the same as the possible extinction of humans if all women choose not to have children! So people have to be strong and never be vulnerable. Only with a stronger mindset, can one take on greater responsibilities…”

2

“Sorry, Senior, I can’t agree with your point of view. First of all, reproduction is not a necessary social obligation for women and imposing it on women is a manifestation of sexism in the first place. Secondly,everyone has different personalities. While being extroverted is a good thing, it doesn’t necessarily mean that introverts must also be extroverted.”

1

“Likewise, I’m not denying the significance of being strong and driven. I just think that there is an upper limit to what we should tolerate. If one is already miserable enough, why should they continue to be strong? What’s the big deal about running away from their problems or even crying? Senior, do you think it’s something to laugh at?”

Xiang Yi interrupted Bai Wuxia, leaving him in disbelief.

He was a senior!

1

How could Xiang Yi said, a junior, interrupt him?

Bai Wuxia had indeed been famous when he was young but due to the lack of improvement in his acting skills, he gradually got lesser and lesser offers. However, he had a significant status after all and he was much older too. Thus, wherever he went, he would be addressed respectfully as a senior or a veteran actor.

Having been questioned and doubted by Xiang Yi, Bai Wuxia was furious and subconsciously put on airs. “What do you know!?! A young girl like you has the guts to be so bossy and force your opinions on others just because you’ve received some education, huh?”

1

Xiang Yi didn’t react intensely to his words and instead said calmly, “Senior, since you insist on your own own point of view, I think we have nothing more to say to each other.”

First of all, communication can happen only when both parties are on the same page.

If it was just an exchange of opinions without the acceptance of either party, it would be pointless. Xiang Yi had never been one to force others to agree with her character.

In the live-stream:

A few simple words from Xiang Yi made countless people fall silent.

‘Yeah…’

Since they were kids, they’d often be told to face their failures and overcome all setbacks or difficulties that they face.

However, today they heard a different voice.

It turns out that it is not shameful to escape from one’s problems and there’s nothing wrong with being weak and vulnerable…

1

Many people in front of the screen had a look of bewilderment in their eyes.

Some Spicy Rabbits, however, discovered an interesting point:

—— [Uh, Bai Wuxia seems to be a middle school dropout. What gives him the confidence to lecture Xiang Yi who has at least graduated from one of the two top local universities…]

1

—— [Lmao, the Internet really remembers everything. Back then, Teacher Bai said that he wants to get the Nobel Prize for acting. Back then, everyone mocked him~]

—— [Ummm my boss is exactly the same as Bai Wuxia. You talk to him about money, he talks to you about life. If you talk to him about life, he talks to you about working overtime and even tells you how good overtime culture is to young people. Everyone, wake up, this kind of people simply don’t want to teach you the best truths of life, but rather, they’re trying to meet their own personal desires through the form of preaching.

2

…

The atmosphere at the dinner table was very tense.

Bai Wuxia began to put on airs, thinking to himself that even if Xiang Yi apologizes to him, he had to assert dominance and let her know that there are rules when it comes to treating her seniors!

1

To his surprise…

Xiang Yi ignored him and asked Jun Han who was next to her, “Where’s Xu Tumi?”

Jun Han was stunned for a moment. “She seems to have gone to the bathroom.”

“Thank you.” Xiang Yi nodded picked up the tissue box and small blanket next to her.. “I’ll go keep her company.”

chapters.title: Chapter 465 - Beating Chicken Soup With Chicken Soup (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 465 - Beating Chicken Soup With Chicken Soup (2)

The young girl’s tone was natural and effortless but it made Jun Han’s heart skip a beat.

It wasn’t because of the butterflies that one would get from being in love.

With his limited vocabulary repertoire, the only way he could describe his feelings was that he could sense her gentleness.

Jun Han suddenly understood why more and more people liked Xiang Yi.

The so-called popularity with audience wasn’t about metaphysics but because that man had a special charm.

…

…

In the bathroom.

Xu Tumi sat on the ground and swiped her phone screen with trembling fingers.

Throughout the 22 years of her life, she had always been the center of everyone’s attention and living rather well.

Even after entering the entertainment industry, she had been leading a smooth-sailing life and even her fans treated her like a princess.

It was the first time she had experienced cyber-bullying that was even more terrifying than being called a baldie.

—— [You deserve it for wearing so little clothing]

—— [Surely you didn’t get… Tsk, tsk, it’s so dirty]

—— [Why did they choose to target you and not the others? There must be reason]

—— [I really hate how you pretend to be aggrieved. You must be regretful that they didn’t get what they wanted]

—— [Wow, Xu Tumi, trust you to still have the mood to eat. If I were you, I would have bathed myself ten times in the bathtub!]

…

Through the screen, she didn’t know who she was facing at all but she could sense the overwhelming malice.

The more she read, the redder her eyes became.

‘Is it really… my fault?’

‘Is it because I’m wearing very little clothes? Is it it because I’m problematic? Do I keep encountering such isuses because I’m not a perfect victim…’

Dong-Dong.

Someone knocked on the door.

Immediately afterwards, Xu Tumi asked in a warm voice, “Xu Tumi, are you alright?”

Whoosh——

Xu Tumi covered her mouth and teardrops began to roll down her face.

The back of her hand hurt from the heat.

She said sobbingly, “Don’t come in, I’m just using the toilet.”

As she spoke, she covered her ears and pressed the switch of the faucet, after which water began to flow.

Xiang Yi stayed quiet for a few seconds before saying, “Well, I’m not going in. I’ll stay right outside to chat with you. You can choose to stay quiet too.”

Xu Tumi heard the noise coming from behind the door and it seemed that Xiang Yi had sat down.

The door was separating them.

It was a close distance but one was badly flustered while the other was gentle and did not expose her.

“I just want to tell you that I’m here.”

Hearing this, Xu Tumi couldn’t hold back and cried out, “Uwu, you’re so annoying! I hate you, Xiang Yi!”

“Uh… I’m sorry.” Xiang Yi was a bit at a loss. “I just thought that you’d be more miserable if you don’t have anyone by your side when you’re sad.”

She had experienced that feeling before so she didn’t want Xu Tumi to go through it again.

“If you don’t like it, I’ll leave now. I’ll leave the tissue box and carpet here. If you need it, just open the door and get it. I won’t let others disturb you…”

Before she finished, Xu Tumi opened the door and cried in a ferocious and miserable manner, “You’re not allowed to leave!”

Xiang Yi said in a tender voice, “Okay, I won’t leave.”

“I don’t really hate you…” Xu Tumi had been crying so hard that even the tip of her nose was red. “I really hate the life advice that Bai Wuxia gave me. I also hate that I cry all the time…”

“If you don’t like his life advice, do you want a bowl of chicken soup instead?” Xiang Yi asked, grinning.

Xu Tumi pursed her lips, her shoulders shrugging as she wept. “He has already touched it and contaminated the chicken soup!!”

Xiang Yi said, “It’s alright, there’s still half a pot of soup,I’ll bring you a spoon and you can drink it from the pot.”

Xu Tumi suddenly felt much better.

…

chapters.title: Chapter 466 - His Words Mean Nothing
chapters.body:
Chapter 466 - His Words Mean Nothing

Chapter 466: His Words Mean Nothing

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

…

In the kitchen.

The firewood in the stove was still warm, and even after a long time, the chicken soup was still steaming hot.

Xu Tumi took the big spoon Xiang Yi gave her, puffed and blew the soup a few times before downing it in one gulp. It was so fresh and delicious that she clenched her fists.

1

The fattiest parts under the skin of the old hen were removed before cooking, and freshly picked mushrooms were added to absorb the oil. Hence, the soup was not greasy at all.

The red dates and wolfberries not only added a splash of color to the chicken soup, but also the right amount of sweetness.

After drinking the soup, she took a bite of the juicy mushroom that was filled with the rich chicken broth. It was as if fireworks exploded in her brain .

‘So fragrant!’ She thought, summarizing her emotions into two words!

“Oooo it has such a heavenly aroma, it’s really so fragrant…” Xu Tumi’s eyes were teary. It was unclear if it was because of the heat of the pot or because she was touched.

As for the toxic life advice that Bai Wuxia had given, she had completely forgotten all about them.

‘Bai Wuxia? Who is he? Does it matter?’

‘His words are nothing!’

‘Xiang Yi’s life advice is the best!!!’

…

Without Xiang Yi and Xu Tumi, the atmosphere at the dinner table became even more bizarre.

Bai Wuxia couldn’t get over it, so he furiously took the moral high ground again, trying to prove he was right by undermining Xiang Yi.

“Confucius said that father and son are related by blood, rulers and ministers have righteousness, husband and wife are different, elders and children follow an order, and trust exists between friends. But now it seems that these teachings have been forgotten by young people! It’s ridiculous that they don’t even treat their elders with basic respect!”

2

He had always liked quoting classic scriptures and claim to be cultured by taking advantage of the fact that many artists in the entertainment industry have low education levels.

Many smalltime artists were criticized by him but they did not dare to say anything. Instead they would feel ashamed for being too ignorant.

Unexpectedly, Jun Han retorted, “This sentence was said by Meng Zi, right?”

Feeling embarrassed, Bai Wuxia feigned anger and chided, “What do you know!?! You’ve only read a few books and you already have the guts to refute your senior?”

Jun Han was speechless. “I’ve at least graduated with a major in Chinese language and I have some general knowledge of literature. Senior, surely you don’t think that I can’t even read, right?”

For a while, the comments in the live stream were divided:

—— [Just checked, it is indeed a quote from Meng Zi but Junhan is displaying his lack of EQ by pointing it out just like that!]

1

–[???? What’s wrong with Han Han pointing out the mistakes of his senior? We’re in a modern day and age, why are you people still stuck with a feudal mindset!?!]

Just as the netizens were bickering, Shi Sui returned after feeding Little Xiji.

Bai Wuxia tried to pull him over to his side and recounted what had just happened, and then highlighted the aspects that were in his favor at the time.

1

At the end, he said agitatedly, “Don’t you think it’s necessary to listen to the words of Confucius? This makes sense, right!?!”

Shi Sui said indifferently, “Anyway, I know that Zhou Shuren has never said those words before.”

Bai Wuxia: “…”

He was dumbfounded and he didn’t understand why Shi Sui had mentioned that person. He subconsciously asked, “Who is Zhou Shuren?”

In an instant…

The others at the table struggled to contain their laughter.

The live stream became a sea of joy.

–[Hahaha Shi Sui is so good at being sarcastic!]

–[Since you’re so eloquent, you should talk more! Where can I buy your book?]

–[Are there really still people who don’t know that Bai Wuxia has been pretending to be an intellectual all these years?]

…

In the midst of the awkward atmosphere, Jun Han excitedly said, “I can answer this question!”

He used the tone of an elementary school student reading aloud, and answered, “Zhou Shuren is the famous literary scholar and ideologist, Lu Xun!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 467 - Stepping On Mines (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 467 - Stepping On Mines (1)

When he heard the name “Lu Xun”, Bai Wuxia froze on the spot, feeling as if he was struck by thunder!

‘What, what?!’

The netizens watching the live stream had already started to mock:

—— [Han Han are you in elementary school!?! What’s up with the tone of your voice when you were reciting the poem!?!]

—— [Lmao, first, he said that the words said by Mencius are y Confucius. Then, he exposed himself for not knowing that Zhou Shuren is Lu Xun. Bai Wuxia is really uncultured.]

— —[I’ll give a few examples, feel free to think about it. Xiang Yi graduated from one of the top two local universities, Xu Tumi graduated from Beijing Theatre Academy and Jun Han may have graduated from a school that’s a little worse than theirs but it’s not too bad either. Although Shi Sui didn’t go to college, he was the top performer of his cohort for the college entrance examination. Bai Wuxia is the one junior high school dropout…]

…

Seeing the comparison, the crowd came to a sudden realization and felt as if they had woken up from a dream!

It turned out that among all the people present at the table, Bai Wuxia was the one with the lowest level of education!

Of course, there wasn’t anything wrong with having a low level of education because modern society is still very tolerant. However, it was just so ironic that Bai Wuxia usually tried to give himself the image of an intellectual.

Now, his persona had collapsed completely!

…

Bai Wuxia was instantly furious when he realized what was going on.

‘Shi Sui must have done it on purpose!’

‘If not, why did he mention Zhou Shuren instead of saying Lu Xun directly?’

‘This is obviously a deliberate attempt to make things difficult for me!’

Despite curing his heart out at Shi Sui in his head, Bai Wuxia was still pretending as if nothing happened on the surface. He feigned ignorance and said, “Oh, my memory is really failing now that I’m getting older. Unlike you young people, I can’t remember information easily after just casually memorizing it.”

Everyone was speechless.

‘It’s such a pity that your face isn’t used as a city wall because you’re so thick-skinned.’

Director Zhu was so embarrassed that he felt really awkward in front of Li Jianyu!

Recalling the fact that Xiang Yi had gotten so badly injured in order to save someone’s life and she now had to face such an annoying person, he couldn’t help but want to compensate Li Jianyu. Hence, he said, “I heard that the review of the overseas versions of the program haven’t passed yet, is that right?”

Li Jianyu said heartlessly, “They seem to be going through the process. There’s no hurry. I’m already very content that it can be broadcast in the country during prime time slots.”

Director Zhu was well aware of what was going on. Although it was said that they were just going though the process, who knows which step they’re stuck at?

There must be someone who doesn’t want “Two Under One Roof” to be a big hit abroad.

He pondered for two seconds and said, “I’ll ask around for you. Maybe the overseas version can be broadcast earlier.”

Li Jianyu was dumbfounded, ‘There’s going to be such a good thing?’

‘Is he some kind of big shot?’

‘Why does Lady Luck always smile on him and God gives him such great opportunities!?!’

…

In order to cover up the previous mistakes, Bai Wuxia gave them life advice more frequently and aggressively. He was now just like a walking life coach, spreading teachings wherever he went.

However, there is a saying in this world: The more you speak, the more mistakes you tend to make.

If it was a recorded broadcast, then there was still the chance of saving the situation through post-production editing.

However, unfortunately, today’s live stream was a collaboration of the ‘NationalMassWorkout’ and ‘Two Under One Roof’!

He initially had a small number of literature fans who had come to watch the live stream and to support him.

However, they were completely confused after hearing Bai Wuxia’s lousy ‘life advice’, they were truly confused.

‘Does Bai Wuxia really have any true talent…’

‘Why does it sound strange…’

Shi Sui did not say anything else but he raised his brows slightly when he heard him mentioning about Xiang Yi.

“Why is it that in ancient times there is a saying where men should carve a career outside while women should stay at home? Of course, there is a reason! I’m not used to Xiang Yi’s penchant for showing off. She should just stay at home to cook and do the laundry. Who would like a girl who stays outside like a man?”

chapters.title: Chapter 468 - : Stepping On A Mine (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 468 - : Stepping On A Mine (2)

Chapter 468: Stepping On A Mine (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

In the live stream:

—— [What kind of confusing statement is this???]

—— [Why is Bai Wuxia acting like a hex has been put on him…]

—— [Twisting facts in front of the overprotective boyfriend? Welcome to the scene of accurate mine-stepping]

1

…

As Bai Wuxia spoke, the more worked up he got. He rattled on and on, “She tried to steal the limelight even when we were filming the program, she’s being too much of a showoff! Too much of everything is bad…and she also has no respect for her elders and seniors…”

The next second, Shi Sui said indifferently, “Xiang Yi can see the stars and seas, the moon, flowers, plants,chickens, ducks, pigs and geese, but not garbage.”

2

Whoosh——

Bai Wuxia’s expression froze and he looked at Shi Sui like he was a ghost.

Others at the table were flabbergasted!

Jun Han clenched his fist in excitement. ‘As expected of Shi Sui. Impressive!]

Bai Wuxia gritted his teeth and retorted, “Shi Sui, what do you mean?!”

1

“Nothing.” Shi Sui smirked mirthlessly and said in a gentle tone of voice, though there was a cold and indifferent gaze in his eyes, “I just think that Xiang Yi is a great girl and it’s ridiculously absurd that she has to be judged by some random nobody.”

1

Bai Wuxia was enraged. ‘I’ve at least been famous before. Yet, Shi Sui called me a nobody. Feels worse than getting slapped in public!’

1

…

In the director room, Li Jianyu was dumbfounded, and so was the director next to him.

No one expected that Shi Sui would take a jab at others!

Ruan Qing, however, wrapped her arms around herself, seemingly deep in thought.

‘Is this…a protection of sovereignty?”

1

All along, the relationship between Shi Sui and Xiang Yi in the live stream had been distant, and the two of them did not communicate much but it gave viewers a comfortable feeling.

Things were different today.

Shi Sui showed his possessiveness of Xiang Yi.

Ruan Qing smirked, clicked on the UntimelyCouple forum post, and slowly posted a thread with her private account:

2

[I’ve witnessed some real romantic action.]

1

…

The pop-ups flooded the screen, so much so that it was almost impossible to see people’s faces.

—— [Ah ah ah Shi Sui is so manly!!! (voice cracking)]

—— [Shi Sui ignores everything else but he immediately switches to battle mode once Xiang Yi is mentioned! I love it, I love it]

—— [Bai Wuxia has really gone to far. Of all people, he chose to criticize Xiang Yi. He was just asking for trouble.]

—— [Who said no one loves Xiang Yi? Where are the Spicy Rabbits? Let me see your hands!]

2

—— [It’s the New Year, we should quickly think about where’s a good place for the UntimelyCouple’s wedding. How about the seaside?]

…

The number of online viewers of “Two Under One Roof” had also reached a staggering number, invoking the envy of countless peers.

There were a lot of people who have followed the trend of doing a live variety show recently, but even after exhausting all means, they can at best, only imitate, but never surpass the original production.

Nowadays, there were only a few shows that can exceed a million online viewers.

However “Two Under One Roof” casually garnered several million viewers!

Tonight, the number exceeded nine million!

This figure has made many people in the industry slip into deep pondering.

Why is it that only “Two Under One Roof” can be so popular?

1

What is so appealing about it?

1

…

The doorbell of the living room was suddenly rung when Bai Wuxia was about to flip the table.

In order to ease the tension of the atmosphere, another senior took the initiative to give everyone an out. “Jun Han, go see who is here.”

“Okay!” Seeing that Bai Wuxia had been defeated, Jun Han was in high spirits and skipped over happily to pull open the door.

He was greeted by a bright and shiny banner!

chapters.title: Chapter 469 - Role Model For Youths
chapters.body:
Chapter 469 - Role Model For Youths

Jun Han originally stood in a sluggish and languid posture. After seeing the righteous police officers who were standing in a row outside the door, he hurriedly stood upright with his chest puffed up and his belly tucked in.

In an instant,the netizens watching the live stream all made remarks about his posture.

[He looks like he’s in a military stance during military training.]

Jun Han asked nervously, “Uncle, may I ask, what are you guys doing…?”

“There’s no need to call me Uncle…”

Jun Han said straightforwardly, “Policeman?”

“… You’d better call Uncle. By the way, is Ms. Xiang Yi here? We are here to present a banner to her.”

‘Huh?’

Jun Han froze and quickly said, “Yes, yes, I’ll ask Xiang Yi to come over now!”

He dashed to the kitchen and yelled as he ran, “Xiang Yi! Xiang Yi! There’s a banner for you!!!”

At this moment, Jun Han was still unaware that his reaction would be trimmed and edited into a comedic video, memes, and sticker packs, making a name for himself in the world of memes.

Bai Wuxia was confused.

‘Is the banner that the police officer is holding…for Xiang Yi?’

…

Xiang Yi washed her hands and walked over. Previously, she had already spoken to the police officer who’s now here to deliver the banner to her. Thus, she asked him if he had had dinner yet.

He swallowed his saliva, and then said with a straight face, “No, no, Ms. Xiang Yi, thank you for your great contribution and for helping us with that major fugitive cases. Here’s a gift and a bonus for you!”

He rolled the banner, on which there were some words written in large font:

[Righteous And Courageous; A Role Model For Youths!]

There was also a brand new check. After the cameraman got the consent of the police officer, he went closer to get a close-up shot of the check, on which the amount of 200,000 yuan was written!

The viewers watching the live stream were immediately astonished!

—— [I understand that she’s brave and courageous but what’s up with her being the fugitive?]

—— [This is the second time she received a banner, right? The previous one she received was from the police officer of Mingxi Boys’ High School!]

—— [Damn, a 200,000 yuan bonus is usually given to those who contribute to the arrest of the most vicious criminals! What has that pretty face done to get so much money?!]

—— [Don’t read too much into it. She must have just provided a clue or something. She’s so small, it’s good enough that she doesn’t get frightened into tears when she saw those criminals]

…

Many people thought that Xiang Yi had probably just made a police report after seeing the fugitive but they were soon proven wrong.

“Ms. Xiang Yi, on behalf of the Nancheng Police, I would like to express my gratitude and respect to you! Thank you for standing up for justice and helping to catch the fugitive! All of you! Stand at attention, salute…”

The few police officers all straightened their bodies and gave a standard salute to Xiang Yi.

No one knew better than them that without Xiang Yi, the fugitive might have harmed Xu Tumi and the others, or he might have escaped and continued to roam around, leaving behind victims and broken families.

However, Xiang Yi ended it all!

Director Zhu had specially cooperated with the investigation and sent a copy of the video to the police.

Watching the scene of Xiang Yi fighting off the assailant intensely, the group of men turned red and fell silent.

As for Bai Wuxia who stood by and left them in a lurch…

The few police officers glanced at Bai Wuxia with great disdain in their eyes although they did not say anything.

Xiang Yi bowed and said modestly with a gentle attitude, “Thank you, but I don’t deserve all the credit. I succeeded with the help of Jun Han and the rest of the staff of National Mass Workout.”

Someone in the live stream raised a question.

—— [Hey, how come Xiang Yi didn’t mention Bai Wuxia? Didn’t he give the most credit to himself??]

…

chapters.title: Chapter 470 - Xiang Yi Is The Best
chapters.body:
Chapter 470 - Xiang Yi Is The Best

—— [Hahaha, exactly, wasn’t he blowing his trumpet greatly just now? Why is he as quiet as a chicken now?]

—— [I laughed my head off. You guys, look carefully at the back, Bai Wuxia is hiding from the camera! He must be feeling diffident!]

…

When Bai Wuxia saw that the banner was awarded to Xiang Yi, he was utterly dejected and furious.

This is the equivalent of putting him to shame in front of millions of viewers, isn’t it?

Bai Wuxia wanted to use the excuse of using the bathroom to muddle through it but a cameraman somehow happened to block him.

The cameraman, Zhang, who was Xiang Yi’s exclusive cameraman smiled at him faintly with an ambiguous intention.

‘Hmph, you’re trying to run after stealing credit from Xiang Yi?’

‘Dream on!’

Bai Wuxia: “…”

‘Damn, is this person sick?!’

He was already depressed and vexed enough when Jun Han, who was close by, suddenly applauded and exclaimed “Good, good! Xiang Yi is the best! Xiang Yi is the most outstanding person!”

He was very much like an elementary school student.

The others at the table knew what was going on and also applauded along.

For a while, the scene was like a commendation ceremony where the students went on stage to receive awards…

Bai Wuxia was caught in the middle like an outcast.

He had an awkward expression as he was torn between applauding and not.

There were jeers and mocking coming from the viewers of the live stream but some of Bai Wuxia’s very few die-hard fans tried to defend him.

—— [Xiang Yi is stealing the credit and honor from Teacher Bai, right?]

—— [I’m speechless, she has stolen all the limelight! If it wasn’t for Mr. Bai, how could Vase Fairy have received this banner?]

—— [Teacher Bai looks so pitiful. He’s still being ostracized and alienated at his age! Could it be that a certain actress is ganging up with the rest to exclude Teacher Bai?]

…

Of course, those brainless remarks were quickly countered by the Spicy Rabbits:

—— [Sorry our Xiang Yi is just that outstanding~~]

—— [Great, you’re the only competent one. Only you’re impressive and only you know the truth, okay?]

—— [Some people are pitiful and deserve sympathy but Bai Wuxia is just being pretentious, okay? Why aren’t he putting his eyes and brain to use when he clearly has them?]

…

In reality.

The police said a few more words of encouragement to Xiang Yi before leaving.

Jun Han quickly took the banner from Xiang Yi and said “Xiang Yi, your hand is injured, I’ll help you hold the banner! Let me interview you, how do you feel about holding a banner for the first time?”

Shi Sui was holding a small dried fish and tempting Xiao Naofu with it. He said with a faint and languid smile, “It’s not the first time Xiang Yi has received a banner~”

The crowd was speechless.

“…”

‘Why does it seem that you are more proud than Xiang Yi herself?’

Xiang Yi pursed her lips and said shyly, “I really don’t deserve all the credit. It’ the result of all of our efforts. Director Zhu, please help me to divide this money among everyone. It’s been hard on everyone.”

The crowd all began to refute and said that Xiang Yi deserved to take all the money and that they can’t accept it.

Bai Wuxia, however, suddenly appeared at this time and made himself seem magnanimous as he said, “Since you have said so, I shall act on your behalf and divide this money. On the other hand, I don’t want any of this money, you guys can each be entitled to a greater share!”

Those who were clueless thought that he was being righteous and upright.

Even those who were slamming Bai Wuxia stopped typing hesitantly.

‘Hey, this person doesn’t seem to be that annoying, huh?’

Bai Wuxia was very proud of himself, and he felt that his ability to react on the spot was really superb!

He had turned adversity into an opportunity to gain the liking of others.

‘Young people, you guys are too inexperienced to be fighting with me!’

However, in the next moment, the girl’s tranquil voice sounded.

“Senior, you’re mistaken. I never intended to give you a share of this money.”

chapters.title: Chapter 471 - Destroyed Pathetically (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 471 - Destroyed Pathetically (2)

No matter who Bai Wuxia’s turned to for help, no one who started to speak up for him!

Bai Wuxia was really panicking this time!

The netizens also reacted. In a certain sense, choosing not to take a stand is also making a stand!

—— [I’ve seen people who are not popular with people but I’ve never seen anyone as unpopular as himself…]

—— [People tend to kick people who are down and Bai Wuxia is a good proof of that!]

—— [In other words, Bai Wuxia really did not do anything to help and he might even left them in the lurch. That’s why everyone is upset at him, right…]

The public opinion was rather one-sided, except for the few fans of Bai Wuxia who were still clamoring.

—— [Gossip can be fearful and the power of speech can be destructive! Does it not eat at your conscience when you treat a veteran artiste like this? Who knows if these people are being threatened!?! It’s ridiculous! Show me the evidence if you can! I’m a skeptic, I don’t believe in human evidence! I only believe in physical evidence!]

…

The planner of “National Mass Workout” showed the comment to Director Zhu when he saw it.

Director Zhu was speechless and he stayed silent for a moment before muttering softly to Li Jianyu.

Li Jianyu listened with fear and trepidation. “Ah, this doesn’t seem appropriate. Director Zhu, I’m not deserving, I’m not deserving at all…”

“There are some words that aren’t convenient for me to say. You’ll have to guide it.” Director Zhu smiled bitterly and asked, “Do you want to watch Xiang Yi get criticized and slammed by others?”

Li Jianyu was silent.

After spending such a long time together, he had long been charmed by Xiang Yi’s cooking skills… ahem, personality.

She was such a gentle and determined little girl. If it were not for him, she probably wouldn’t have been embroiled in public opinion.

He sometimes calls Xiang Yi ‘Sister Yi’ but he really treated her as a younger sister.

Xiang Yi should be pampered and not suffer any grievances!

Li Jianyu said, “Okay, I’ll go.”

…

There was a stale tension at the dinner table when Li Jianyu suddenly spoke loudly through the loudspeaker.

“All viewers, please stay tuned to ‘National Mass Workout’ at eight o’clock Saturday night. The newly minted ‘Best Actress’ Xu Tumi, super idol Jun Han, other stars, as well as our dearest Xiang Yi and Shi Sui, and of course, my humble self, will appear for three seconds in 4K HD! Welcome to watch!”

While the guests and the audience were all dumbfounded, he coughed and exclaimed, “Director Zhu, it’s time to tabulate the advertising fees!”

In an instant, the netizens all began to tease him.

—— [What do you mean ‘Director Zhu’? Call him Daddy!]

—— [Son, why do your ads always catch me off guard?]

—— [Wow, there is a three-second-long shot, Little Yuyu is going to make his online debut eh~~]

…

The audience did not understand what it meant but Bai Wuxia did in seconds.

Director Zhu may not seem to say anything, but he was actually making a statement through Li Jianyu ——

Footage.

The crew must have the footage of the happening!

Filled with fear and anger, Bai Wuxia’s emotions reached a critical point and he could not help but vent it all out at Xiang Yi.

“Get out! Get out of my sight! How can an artiste like you be qualified to participate in the filming of the show?!?!”

If it wasn’t for Xiang Yi said, would he have left those who needed help, in the lurch?

If it wasn’t for Xiang Yi said, would he have looked like a clown?

Bai Wuxia grimaced and his face, which was initially still elegant and handsome, became incredibly hideous!

In the midst of all the attention.

The slender and fair girl glanced at him indifferently.

She said composedly in an unperturbed tone of voice, “No offense but I genuinely want to remind you that this is my home.”

chapters.title: Chapter 472 - Dying Pathetically (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 472 - Dying Pathetically (2)

—— [I laughed my head off. You guys, look carefully at the back, Bai Wuxia is hiding from the camera! He must be feeling diffident!]

…

When Bai Wuxia saw that the banner was awarded to Xiang Yi, he was utterly dejected and furious.

This is the equivalent of putting him to shame in front of millions of viewers, isn’t it?

Bai Wuxia wanted to use the excuse of using the bathroom to muddle through it but a cameraman somehow happened to block him.

The cameraman, Zhang, who was Xiang Yi’s exclusive cameraman smiled at him faintly with an ambiguous intention.

‘Hmph, you’re trying to run after stealing credit from Xiang Yi?’

‘Dream on!’

Bai Wuxia: “…”

‘Damn, is this person sick?!’

He was already depressed and vexed enough when Jun Han, who was close by, suddenly applauded and exclaimed “Good, good! Xiang Yi is the best! Xiang Yi is the most outstanding person!”

He was very much like an elementary school student.

The others at the table knew what was going on and also applauded along.

For a while, the scene was like a commendation ceremony where the students went on stage to receive awards…

Bai Wuxia was caught in the middle like an outcast.

He had an awkward expression as he was torn between applauding and not.

There were jeers and mocking coming from the viewers of the live stream but some of Bai Wuxia’s very few die-hard fans tried to defend him.

—— [Xiang Yi is stealing the credit and honor from Teacher Bai, right?]

—— [I’m speechless, she has stolen all the limelight! If it wasn’t for Mr. Bai, how could Vase Fairy have received this banner?]

—— [Teacher Bai looks so pitiful. He’s still being ostracized and alienated at his age! Could it be that a certain actress is ganging up with the rest to exclude Teacher Bai?]

…

Of course, those brainless remarks were quickly countered by the Spicy Rabbits:

—— [Sorry our Xiang Yi is just that outstanding~~]

—— [Great, you’re the only competent one. Only you’re impressive and only you know the truth, okay?]

—— [Some people are pitiful and deserve sympathy but Bai Wuxia is just being pretentious, okay? Why aren’t he putting his eyes and brain to use when he clearly has them?]

…

In reality.

The police said a few more words of encouragement to Xiang Yi before leaving.

Jun Han quickly took the banner from Xiang Yi and said “Xiang Yi, your hand is injured, I’ll help you hold the banner! Let me interview you, how do you feel about holding a banner for the first time?”

Shi Sui was holding a small dried fish and tempting Xiao Naofu with it. He said with a faint and languid smile, “It’s not the first time Xiang Yi has received a banner~”

The crowd was speechless.

“…”

‘Why does it seem that you are more proud than Xiang Yi herself?’

Xiang Yi pursed her lips and said shyly, “I really don’t deserve all the credit. It’ the result of all of our efforts. Director Zhu, please help me to divide this money among everyone. It’s been hard on everyone.”

The crowd all began to refute and said that Xiang Yi deserved to take all the money and that they can’t accept it.

Bai Wuxia, however, suddenly appeared at this time and made himself seem magnanimous as he said, “Since you have said so, I shall act on your behalf and divide this money. On the other hand, I don’t want any of this money, you guys can each be entitled to a greater share!”

Those who were clueless thought that he was being righteous and upright.

Even those who were slamming Bai Wuxia stopped typing hesitantly.

‘Hey, this person doesn’t seem to be that annoying, huh?’

Bai Wuxia was very proud of himself, and he felt that his ability to react on the spot was really superb!

He had turned adversity into an opportunity to gain the liking of others.

‘Young people, you guys are too inexperienced to be fighting with me!’

However, in the next moment, the girl’s tranquil voice sounded.

“Senior, you’re mistaken. I never intended to give you a share of this money.”

chapters.title: Chapter 473 - Destroyed Pathetically (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 473 - Destroyed Pathetically (3)

‘This is my home…’

Those few words kept running through Bai Wuxia’s mind like a magic spell and a song on repeat.

His expression management was completely out of control and he looked as if he had heard something terrifying.

Bai Wuxia had never watched “Two Under One Roof” before nor had he heard the previous conversation between Xiang Yi and Director Zhu. Hence, he had no idea that the manor was Xiang Yi’s home!

At this moment, his pupils suddenly constricted when he heard the news and he almost wanted to vomit blood.

It turns out that this massive manor belonged to Xiang Yi’s family!

Bai Wuxia choked for half a day before he said sternly, “Okay, then I’ll go, I’ll go, okay!?!”

He thought that someone would more or less try to ask him to stay for a while.

However, something awkward happened.

Be it the few veteran actors, Jun Han, Director Zhu, or the members of the program team of National Mass Workout, no one asked him to stay!

That wasn’t actually a big deal.

The greatest blow he suffered was from Shi Sui.

The man was refined, graceful, gentle and poised. He said, “Sorry for the poor hospitality, take care, we won’t see you off.”

Bai Wuxia: …!!!

He was so furious that his brain began to hurt. Though he was unsure if it was an illusion, he felt a fishy sweetness welling up in his throat.

There were lots of pop-up comments strewn all across the screen of the live stream.

—— [Get lost slowly, we’re not going to see you off!]

—— [Lmao, he actually asked Xiang Yi to get lost. How cocky.]

—— [Bai Wuxia has been throwing his weight around as a senior for a long time. Finally, there’s someone who can deal with him. This is awesome~!]

…

Amidst the pale night, Bai Wuxia left wretchedly.

The cameraman Old Zhang decided to be mean chose not to even give him some airtime.

The consequence of offending the cameraman is having no shots of yourself taken. 🙂

For an artist like Bai Wuxia, the lack of popularity is more agonizing than any form of punishment.

…

Bai Wuxia got into the nanny van, thinking he couldn’t be humiliated any further but to his surprise, when he unlocked his cell phone, there was criticism about him all over the entertainment pages of several social media platforms.

—— [Talented and morally upright veteran actor? No, no, no, he’s just a weak and incompetent coward!]

—— [White flawless large rollover scene, click the link below on the face video!

—— [Who would have thought that the pure and flawless Bai Wuxia would leave them in a lurch and not lend a hand to those who need help…]

Bai Wuxia’s blood pressure surged immediately.

He was furious. “How can these reporters write nonsense? Tell them to delete the article! Tell them that I will sue them if they don’t delete it! This is creating something out of nothing! It’s spreading false rumors!”

The assistant trembled. “Mr. Bai, something is wrong…”

…

Auntie Jin had been Bai Wuxia’s die-hard fan since his debut.

She had also gone from being called ‘Little Jin’ to ‘Auntie Jin’ as she aged over the years.

When she discovered that Bai Wuxia was participating in the live stream, she had been watching it.

In the eyes of Auntie Jin, Bai Wuxia came with his own camera filter and he symbolized the beauty of having a crush on someone in her teenage years.

Hence, no matter how flawed Bai Wuxia was, she could find reasons to defend him.

When she saw a pop-up comment saying there was no evidence that Bai Wuxia had left his peers in the lurch, she had a flash of inspiration and thought she had come up with a brilliant idea!

She thought that perhaps the situation at that time, had been filmed by the crew of National Mass Workout!

With the intention to test the waters and strong financial resources, she hired a hacker to try and obtain the footage of the incident at that time.

Surprisingly, after the hacker obtained the video, the more she looked at Bai Wuxia, the more she loathed him. Thus, she decided to expose the video of Bai Wuxia ignoring those who needed help!

The video went viral on the Internet!

This time, there is concrete evidence in addition to eyewitnesses!

The last bit of dignity that Director Zhu wanted to save Bai Wuxia, had been completely destroyed by this enthusiastic hacker!

…

When Bai Wuxia learned of this news, his eyes rolled over and he passed out on the spot!

…

chapters.title: Chapter 474 - Shi Sui Is The Rightful Spouse
chapters.body:
Chapter 474 - Shi Sui Is The Rightful Spouse

“Teacher Bai, Teacher Bai, please wake up…”

The assistant was terrified and rushed to call the emergency number.

…

By the time Bai Wuxia woke up again, the public opinion on the Internet had already escalated beyond control.

The video spread online, in which every word Bai Wuxia said, were physically and psychologically unsettling!

“Let’s stand farther away. In case Xiang Yi can’t take it, the two of us will be doomed…”

“Hey, hey, don’t run towards us…”

“The crook was targeting those two women in the first place, were they not afraid of implicating us…”

“…”

The netizens were furious!

Although the netizens usually liked bickering and insulting each other on the Internet, they could still tell between right and wrong in the face of truth!

—— [Daily fear of men √]

—— [Call himself a man!]

—— [He looks decent but is he speaking humanely? Was what he did a humane thing to do?]

—— [I was so disgusted by Bai Wuxia that I was about to throw up yesterday’s dinner. Call yourself a man. How can you have the cheek to watch Xiang Yi charge forward while you retreated cowardly and even said these hypocritical words!?! Start crawling!!!]

…

In desperation, Bai Wuxia spent money to remove the topics from the hot search list but the words still appeared one after another, and the videos and posts simply could not be deleted.

Public opinion formed an overwhelming wave that quickly slapped Bai Wuxia out of existence!

…

…

In the manor.

In the living room.

Xu Tumi sat cross-legged on the floor holding Xiao Naofu in one hand and Little Xiji in her other. She was totally a winner in life.

Her small stomach was taut and round after she finished the chicken soup, and under the double therapy of food and cute pets, she was completely in a much better state.

Xiang Yi walked over with some pajamas and bath towels in her hand. “The pajamas are made by my third brother. I haven’t worn them yet. The bath towels and towels are also new. I’ve washed and sunned them.”

Xu Tumi took them and smelled the faint floral fragrance on the clothes.

“Are you afraid of the dark? Should I get you a night light?” Xiang Yi asked.

Then she felt that the hem of her clothes was shaken by someone’s hand.

Xu Tumi blinked and said softly and coquettishly, “Xiang Yi, is it okay if I sleep with you?”

Xiang Yi said, “Uh, it’s not impossible…”

“Oh yay, that means it’s okay! I’m taking a shower now!!!”

In the live stream, there was an instant uproar.

—— [Ahhhh, what a sweet and soft couple. I love it!]

—— [Jiang Jiujiu: Hello? Yiyi, do you still remember me from Daming Lake?]

—— [Oh ho ho ho, Xiang Yi’s harem has expanded again! Present the scented capsule, leave the seal, and crown the noble consort ~]

—— [Guys, look at the gaze in Shi Sui’s eyes, I’m laughing my head off.]

…

The crowd noticed Shi Sui’s expression and found that it was really subtle.

For a while, the live-stream comments were full of laughter.

There were also stubborn couple fans stubbornly expressing: [If she wants to start a harem, so be it but Shi Sui is the rightful spouse!]

…

The live stream ended.

Director Zhu was almost done with shooting the content. Although Xiang Yi said they could stay overnight, he still took the program staff to leave.

How can they bear to create trouble for such a nice Xiang Yi?

Li Jianyu and Ruan Qing went to see him off.

“Director Zhu, don’t you forget my three seconds of footage!”

Director Zhu laughed, “That’s a must!”

Ruan Qing expressed her gratitude to him. “Thank you, Director Zhu, for being willing to collaborate with us. Thank you for helping us communicate with the overseas version of the review. Here’s a small token of appreciation, please accept it.”

Director Zhu was about to resist, but he heard Li Jianyu say, “This is salted fish and smoked bacon cured by Xiang Yi and spicy rabbit head and soy beef cubes from Little Rabbit Farm.”

“…”

chapters.title: Chapter 475 - Can’T Be Reserved
chapters.body:
Chapter 475 - Can’T Be Reserved

“How can I do that?” Although his words were more polite than anyone else, Director Zhu was faster than anyone else in picking up the stuff. With a bright smile on his face, he exclaimed, “Ah, Xiang Yi, you’re so smart and skilled!”

The other staff members of the program team of National Mass Workout were stunned speechless.

‘Director, didn’t you say that you won’t accept any gifts? How come you’re accepting them today!?!’

‘Have some backbone!’

‘But then again, the food smells really good…’

‘Slurp…’

…

Xu Tumi went to take a bath so only the two of them were left alone in the living room, together with Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji.

Only then did Xiang Yi realized that she seems to have a boyfriend.

The man sat by the floor-to-ceiling window, casually flipping through a fully English original book. His gold-rimmed glasses were sitting on the bridge of his high nose bridge, hiding his peach-blossom-shaped eyes which had hooked inner corners and upturned outer corners, behind the lenses.

He was clearly trying to keep a low profile but he was so outstanding that his presence couldn’t be ignored.

Feeling a little guilty, Xiang Yi poured a cup of water and moved towards him with small steps.

“Boyfriend, drink some water.”

Shi Sui looked up with an ambiguous gaze in his eyes. “You finally remember that I’m your boyfriend, huh?”

Xiang Yi glanced at him and said, “I’m sorry, I haven’t gotten used to it yet.”

Faced with the pair of starry doe eyes, Shi Sui was helpless.

‘Oh dear, I’ve stopped feeling angry even though she hasn’t coaxed me yet.’

He closed the book and Xiang Yi watched in confusion as he wrapped his arms around her waist and carried her to the small coffee table. He then sat down.

“!”

Xiang Yi began to stutter in her speech, “You…I… this…”

“Get used to my presence, Girlfriend.” The man’s voice was low and alluring. He buried his head in the nook of her fair neck and rubbed it against her gently twice.

While her heart beat rapidly, Xiang Yi thought, ‘Is this what it feels like to be in love?’

It seems… to be more blissful than she imagined.

However, the thought of Shi Sui’s aversion to women made her a little worried.

“Don’t you hate girls? Do ou feel uncomfortable like this?”

Shi Sui chuckled softly and said, “You’re different from others.”

A long time ago he found that he didn’t have any aversion to having physical contact with Xiang Yi but she was still too young at the time so he didn’t imagine that they’d be together at all.

Even now, he was still a little unsure of the validity of their relationship.

Xiang Yi carefully wrapped her arms around his waist in a bid to test him. “How about this?”

Shi Sui made eye contact with her. “No.”

Xiang Yi was a little overjoyed but also a little nervous. She moved her hand upwards and placed it on Shi Sui’s shoulder. She then wrapped her arms around his neck.

It was a very intimate position.

“What about this?”

Shi Sui’s Adam’s apple moved. He seemed ascetic and sexy, which although should be conflicting qualities, were perfectly fused together in his aura, making him incredibly charming.

His voice was hoarse. “Xiang Yi, does what you said at the hospital still count?”

Xiang Yi asked, “What are you referring to?” She thought for a moment, “You mean what I said about kissing?”

Shi Sui’s eyes were dark and he said, “Yes.”

The tip of Xiang Yi’s ears are red and she answered a little fiercely in a tender tone of voice, “Boyfriend, boys should be a little more reserved.”

Shi Sui was speechless.

‘Does this girl have some misunderstanding about me? Am I not reserved enough?’

However, he did not want to force Xiang Yi so he decided to let nature take its course when it came to some things.

All of a sudden…

Muacks!

She left an extremely gentle kiss on his cheeks.

Shi Sui froze.

Xiang Yi forced herself to play it cool. “Okay, okay, on the account that you’re my boyfriend, I’ll fulfill your little request.”

Before she finished, his tall figure loomed and towered over her, exuding a domineering and dangerous aura.

“Sorry, Xiang Yi.”

“I can’t be reserved.”

chapters.title: Chapter 476 - Remove My Glasses
chapters.body:
Chapter 476 - Remove My Glasses

Chapter 476: Help Me Take Off My Glasses

The tired and hoarse voice that had been deliberately suppressed, was extremely intoxicating.

Xiang Yi felt like she was about to pass out as her heart raced wildly.

“There…there are cameras…” There were fixed cameras set up in various spots in the living room.

“They’ve been turned off.”

“What if someone sees it…”

“No one is watching.” Shi Sui rubbed her ears, looking at the rosiness that appeared on her fair skin. “No one knows, huh?”

Xiang Yi assented, feeling as if she was soaked in honey. She was getting dizzy and everything felt sweet to her.

The ambiguous atmosphere fermented uncontrollably. Even the air had become sticky.

The atmosphere was just right, but it was interrupted by Xiao Naofu’s cry.

“Meow meow meow!!!”

Xiang Yi snapped back to her senses like she had just woken up like a dream. She turned her head over, only to discover that Xiao Naofu had jumped onto the coffee table and was looking at her with a look of disbelief.

—— [Silly woman, you’ve actually fallen in love with this dog-like man? This is not true!! No!!!]

Xiang Yi’s face turned warm immediately and said, “Ahem, Xiao Naofu, as you can see, we are dating…” Afraid that Xiao Naofu would not understand, she deliberately explained, “He’s my boyfriend, okay?”

Like a thunderbolt that struck the clear sky, Xiao Naofu took two steps back and sat on the table, as if he could not bear the groundbreaking blow.

“Meow oooooh!!!”

The kitten’s cry was full of misery and aggravation.

Little Xiji scurried over immediately and surrounded the coffee table, circling around it in a silly manner.

Shi Sui was speechless too.

His temples throbbed hard a few times as he resisted the urge to punch the cat, as if to declare sovereignty. He tightened his grip around Xiang Yi’s waist.

“Xiang Yi.” The man’s alluring voice contained a hint of compulsion. “Help me remove my glasses.”

Xiang Yi was still thinking about what delicious food to cook to coax Xiao Naofu, so she absent-mindedly helped him take off his glasses.

In an instant…

Light and shadow intertwined like a scene in a movie. Time seemed to pass frame by frame, and the scene was full of ambiguity.

In the quiet room, the slightest sound was extremely clear.

It went from a lingering, loving vibe to an almost overwhelming possessiveness.

It was passionate, gentle, and charming.

…

During this period of time, Xiao Naofu’s angry meowing and Little Xiji’s barks of confusion filled the air.

…

When everything ended…

Xiang Yi almost lost her balance but fortunately, Shi Sui caught her in time.

He gently wiped away the water stains on her lips with his slightly calloused finger.

“I’m sorry, I couldn’t help myself.”

just a little?

Xiang Yi’s little face turned red and her toes curled up, her hands didn’t know where to put them.

Xiao Naof meowed furiously and leaped over to scratch Shi Sui.

All satisfied, Shi Sui naturally allowed it to scratch as it pleased and soon, a few red welts appeared on his toned forearm.

The man immediately complained, “Xiang Yi, it hit me so hard that it hurt.”

“You deserve it.” Despite saying so, Xiang Yi picked up Xiao Naofu and coaxed softly, “Don’t hit him, you’re hurting him.”

Xiao Naofu: “Meow meow meow?!”

—— [I’m heartbroken too!!!]

Shi Sui leaned down and asked innocently, “Xiang Yi kissed me. Do you want me to kiss you too? That way, you’ll be indirectly getting a kiss from her.”

Xiao Naofu’s little short legs dangled in the air. “Meow meow meow!!!”

—— [This meow language is incoherent.]

Xiang Yi covered Xiao Naofu’s ears and chided Shi Sui shyly, “Don’t say that in front of him! Kittens can’t listen to such impure things!”

Shi Sui chuckled lightly thinking to himself, ‘Not only do I dare to say such things, but I also dare to do it in the future too.’

chapters.title: Chapter 477
chapters.body:
Chapter 477

Xiang Yi had no way to find out what the man in front of her was thinking, and when she saw Shi Sui nodding, she felt much more relieved.

Unbeknownst to her, the man only promised not to say or do anything in front of Xiao Naofu.

However, he did not promise not to do behind Xiao Naofu’s back~

As for Xiao Naofu, it started wailing loudly like a child who had lost a beloved toy.

‘Will my silly woman abandon me after getting together with that dog-like man?’

The more Xiao Naofu thought about it, the sadder it got and it started crying.

“Stop crying, stop crying.” Xiang Yi began to get anxious and she said, “I’ll go get you a can of food, okay?”

She leaped off the coffee table and proceeded to Xiao Naofu’s exclusive snack cabinet to get some snacks for it.

Shi Sui put on his glasses, restoring his gentlemanly and ascetic appearance. However, as soon as he spoke, he was extremely obnoxious.

“Little fatty, you are so ugly when you cry.”

Xiao Naofu: …!

‘Damn it, what the f**k did you say? I’m fat and ugly??

“Uwu…” Xiao Naofu’s crying became even more intense.

While biting onto the hem of Shi Sui’s pants, Xiao Naofu barked a few more times.

“Tsk, you’re quite protective of it,” Shi Sui said emotionally.

Xiang Yi quickly returned and coaxed him in a gentle and tender tone of voice for a long time. Only then did Xiao Naofu eat the canned food sobbingly.

During bedtime, it insisted on sleeping next to Xiang Yi.

Luckily, Xu Tumi didn’t mind having a cat on the bed so the two girls shared the same bed with the little kitten at night.

Little Xiji had nowhere else to go, and soon forgot about the fact that Xiao Naofu had gotten bullied by Shi Sui. It then foolishly ran to his bed and fell asleep.

Shi Sui was speechless too.

Even Xiao Naofu can sleep with Xiang Yi.

Yet, he only has the dog with him.

It was just really annoying.

…

…

Xu Tumi lived in the manor for a few days and followed Xiang Yi around every day while the latter planted flowers and vegetables. From time to time, they would also go to the Little Rabbits Farm to experience the joy of high-tech farming. When her manager, Sister Yan, came to pick her up, she refused to leave.

“I’m not leaving! I want to stay at Xiang Yi’s house!”

Sister Yan was speechless.

“… Tumi, do you still remember that you’re an actress? You just won the Best Actress award.”

“I don’t want to listen to it! It’s time for me to go feed the pigs!”

“…”

In the end, Sister Yan had no choice but to ask her bodyguards to pick up Xu Tumi and force her into the nanny van.

Xu Tumi looked out of the car window and cried incessantly. She was totally in a mess, “Xiang Yi! I can’t bear to part with you! UwU, please feed that pig Xiao Hei more. If it’s too skinny, its meat is going to be too tough!”

Xiang Yi was initially feeling a little melancholic about parting ways but she couldn’t help but burst into laughter when she heard that.

“I’ll take note.”

This scene was broadcast live in its entirety.

The netizens were laughing hysterically.

—— [What kind of a fairy girl is this?!]

—— [Hahahaha Xu Tumi cried while thinking about eating. That’s really funny!!]

—— [UUUwUUU is the sweet and soft couple going to be forced to split up just like this? No… I really stan them!!]

…

She froze in place.

A limousine suddenly stopped next to Xu Tumi’s car.

The car door opened automatically and everyone saw a pair of long and straight legs.

She was wearing sports shoes, jeans, and a white pullover.

Although her outfit was simple and clean, she gave off an artistic and fashionable vibe.

The cameraman moved the camera over in confusion to allow the netizens to see the face of the person who arrived.

It was a pale and frail-looking teenager who had the beautiful face of an angel. The wind was blowing and he used his hand to cover his mouth as he coughed twice. His fingers were fair and slender, and his bones are well-defined.

There was a red rope wrapped around his wrist, which looked rather eye-catching.

…

chapters.title: Chapter 478 - Remember Me?
chapters.body:
Chapter 478 - Remember Me?

Chapter 478: Remember Me?

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

There was a huge uproar in the comments section:

—— [Is this little angel a guest?!]

—— [I like a sickly brother! Xu Tumi, hurry up and leave. I’m going to go stan a new couple!]

—— [Xu Tumi: ??? Is my couple name with Xiang Yi going to lose its right to have a name so soon?]

—— [Ahhhhhh it’s Little Nocturne! The main anchor of the music section of Starry Live! His piano-playing skills are very impressive!!!]

…

Across the distant distance, Ling Ye stared at Xiang Yi for a few seconds while his long and curly eyelashes fluttered lightly like the wings of a butterfly.

Shi Sui whispered, “Do you know him?”

Xiang Yi shook her head and said, “I don’t.”

A voice with a suppressed northern accent sounded. “Hey, are you guys all here to receive us? You guys are too polite.”

Only then did the crowd notice that there was a smiling middle-aged man standing on the other side of the car door.

“!”

‘They actually invited the famous folk musician, Tian Zhi?!’

Tian Zhi had performed at the Lunar New Year Gala several times and could be said to be a household name. He was also famous for playing the Suona (Chinese double-reed horn) for a long time.

In the past two years, he had occasionally participated in variety shows.

As long as he was part of the program, there would definitely be humorous scenes.

However, it was surprising that people have been ignoring such a special existence for a long time.

The only reason was that Ling Ye’s face was way too eye-catching.

Tian Zhi was the guest for today’s episode. Shi Sui, Xiang Yi, and the other people came forward accordingly.

After exchanging a few pleasantries, Tian Zhi introduced, “This is my little apprentice, Ling Ye.”

The netizens in front of the screen were all stunned.

This was the first time they had ever met a big shot like Tian Zhi, who rarely accepted apprentices.

When he does, he would only accept personal apprentices, like masters who pass on their legacies to their disciples in martial arts novels.

The crowd looked at Tian Zhi, who was clutching his stomach, and then at Ling Ye, who was pale and coughing incessantly. They slowly typed question marks.

There was a pop-up comment that resonated with everyone’s inner thoughts:

[Mr. Tian, please spare me for being straightforward, but you two seem completely different…]

The crowd imagined the scene of Ling Ye puffing his cheeks up while playing the suona…

No matter how angelic his face is, he definitely can’t play a roguish instrument like the suona!

Pretending to be angry, Tian Zhi exclaimed, “What’s up with your expression? Apart from the suona, I can also play the flute and the ancient zither!”

It is no exaggeration to say that Tian Zhi was all-rounded in terms of musical talent.

Ling Ye took the initiative to introduce, “I was three years old when I started learning the ancient zither from my master. Let me take the liberty to chime in and also ask for your guidance.”

So that’s how it is.

With his explanation, both the staff at the scene and the audience in front of the screen were secretly relieved.

To their surprise, Ling Ye’s words had once again sparked an uproar.

“Sister, do you still remember me?”

The young man’s pupils were clear and amber in color. His eyes were rounded and he would glance at Xiang Yi from time to time.

The crowd turned to look at Xiang Yi in unison.

“…” The young girl’s eyes were filled with confusion. “Have we met before?”

1

Ling Ye’s long eyelashes drooped; his thin lips pursed tightly, and his tone of voice sound lost.

“Sister, you really… don’t remember me.”

For a moment, Xiang Yi felt that many female staff members were looking at her like she was a scumbag who had abandoned her husband and children…

“I’m sorry.” She apologized.

Ling Ye said, “Sister, you didn’t do anything wrong, you don’t need to apologize to me.” He handed over a gift box, “This is my gift to you, Sister.”

“Huh?”

Xiang Yi opened it to see that there was a delicate and antique bamboo flute, which was very small and suitable for girls.

Tian Zhi did not forget to help his young apprentice. “Ling Ye crafted everything himself, from cutting the material, lacquering and drilling the holes, to calibrating the sound, winding the threads, and engraving the characters!”

Ling Ye’s pupils were watery. Nervous and expectant, he asked, “Sister….can you accept it?”

chapters.title: Chapter 479 - Paranoia
chapters.body:
Chapter 479 - Paranoia

Xiang Yi was always much more tolerant when it came to good-looking children.

Moreover, this one was also really polite.

Xiang Yi said, “I won’t stand on ceremony with you then. Thank you for the flute, it’s beautiful.”

The corners of his mouth curled up slightly when he saw her accept it, adding some more vitality to his pale face.

‘Xu Tumi’s nanny van was driven away, and the crowd walked towards the living room.

Halfway.

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows, he asked meaningfully, “Don’t you know?”

Xiang Yi said innocently, “I really don’t know…”

The conversation between the two people reached the ears of the live netizens.

—— [Tsk tsk a certain Best Actor is jealous~]

—— [Shi Sui: You guys, look at my hair color, is it dyed with a touch of green?]

—— [Hahaha as long as I stan the couple enough, I can enjoy double the sweetness and double the happiness!]

The courtyard, the gazebo.

Although it was very inconvenient for Xiang Yi to use her hands, she could add spices with no problem. She asked in a warm voice, “Senior Tian, Ling Ye, is there anything you want to eat at noon?”

Tian Zhi said, “Oh, I’ve lost weight recently. We can just eat some steamed food. Otherwise, I’ll be scolded again when I get home.”

Everyone knew that Tian Zhi was henpecked. As soon as he spoke, the netizens in front of the screen could not help but laugh.

Ling Ye’s eyes were clear and bright. “I’m not picky, I’ll love to eat whatever you make, Sister.”

Xiang Yi nodded slightly. ‘He’s not a picky eater, huh? Seems like he’s a kid who can be fed well.’

“What about you?” The young girl looked at Shi Sui.

Shi Sui’s expression did not change, “Let’s have pickled fish.”

Xiang Yi muttered softly, “Don’t you dislike sour food?”

Shi Sui looked at her leisurely.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

In the live-stream:

—— [Hahahahahaha, the look in Shi Sui’s eyes is perfect]

—— [The aura between these two people, seems somewhat amazing!]

——[Shi Sui: I’m a pickled fish, sour, full of vegetables, and redundant /Aggrieved/pointed fingers]

Tian Zhi and Shi Sui went fishing together.

Xiang Yi sat by the floor-to-ceiling window, casually flipping through a medical book about food therapy.

The condition of her second brother’s hand had been mostly improved after acupuncture, and she wanted to nourish him again through food therapy.

Ling Ye asked for Xiang Yi’s permission and helped organize the bookshelves obediently.

The breeze brushed through the creamy yellow curtains, forming a warm and serene scene.

“Hiss.”

In the quiet living room, Ling Ye suddenly inhaled sharply.

Xiang Yi looked up and discovered that he had been hit on the head by a book that had slipped off the top of the bookshelf.

She frowned, got up and walked towards Ling Ye.

Ling Ye quickly apologized, “Sister, I didn’t mean to dirty your book…”

However, Xiang Yi asked, “Does it hurt?”

Ling Ye froze and a puzzled gaze flashed in his amber eyes but he quickly hid it. “It doesn’t hurt.”

“Go get some rest.” Xiang Yi picked up the book and casually inserted it into the bookshelf. “It’s just a book. It’s okay, you don’t have to take it to heart.”

Whoosh——

Ling Ye propped himself up against his arms on the bookshelf. From afar, it looked like he was holding Xiang Yi in his arms.

The red rope on the wrist was old-fashioned but beautiful.

“Sister,” he said obediently with a sweet tone of voice.

“Huh?”

Xiang Yi turned her face to the side, only to find that the two of them were a little too close together. She frowned in displeasure and tried to back away, but Ling Ye’s other hand blocked her.

It was a standard Kabedon.

“Actually, I didn’t recognize you at first, Sister. It was when you were playing with Jiang Jiujiu that I did.”

Ling Ye’s hair was naturally curly and soft. However, a strong paranoia surged up from the depths of his eyes.

“But, I’ve traveled with you so many times, I’ll be sad if you forget me, Sister.”

chapters.title: Chapter 480 - I Will Be Good In The Future
chapters.body:
Chapter 480 - I Will Be Good In The Future

…

…

Meanwhile…

Xiao Naofu got tired of fluttering the butterfly in the garden but it was rushing to the living room on its short legs, all ready to go to Xiang Yi to act coquettish with her and ask for dried fish.

Little Xiji tagged along behind it.

As soon as they stepped into the living room, Xiao Naofu’s pupils constricted and the hairs on its body stood up!

It stared at Ling Ye, confused.

‘He’s a transmigrator!’

‘What’s going on?!’

‘The stupid woman has already finished all her missions, so why would she still cross paths with a transmigrator?’

…

Bang!

There was a violent sound coming from the bookshelf.

Ling Ye’s kabedon lasted only for a few seconds before Xiang Yi pressed him against the bookshelf.

The young man’s good-looking face was pressed against the cold oak bookshelf and slightly squeezed to the point of being a little warped.

The corners of his lips curled up and he said, “Sister, don’t be so mean.”

Xiang Yi had already deduced his identity from his few words.

Her eyes were quiet, and her emotions did not change because of Ling Ye’s words.

“Little friend, if you move your hands again, don’t blame me for being ungracious.”

There was some hidden threat in the tone of the young girl’s voice.

A huge uproar was sparked in the live stream.

—— [What the hell? There’s a thing going on between Xiang Yi and Ling Ye??]

—— [They’ve already gone on a trip together! How can we not know each other!? Vase Fairy is really disgusting!]

—— [I suddenly feel really sorry for Emperor Shi. He respects himself so well and he has never gotten into any scandal with other actresses, but what about Xiang Yi? She goes around getting romantically involved with those young hunks, she’s just like a wanton woman!]

…

For ordinary people, transmigrating is too unbelievable for ordinary people.

The netizens took it for granted that ‘traveling’ was understood as a man and woman going on a vacation alone.

Ling Ye’s wrist and fingers were extremely long and slender. His beautiful hands were bound by Xiang Yi.

As soon as his fingertips touched the red rope, Ling Ye seemed to have unintentionally but also deliberately said, “This is a gift from you, Sister. I’ve been keeping it well.”

Xiang Yi’s expression changed slightly.

In several S-ranked realms, there were often more than one person playing a supportive role.

She had indeed teamed up with the same person in several high-difficulty and unavoidable missions. During those missions, they had also given each other a red rope of blessing taken from a certain realm.

However…

In those realms, the ones she teamed up with were female… Wait, no.

“You… ” Xiang Yi was actually shocked, which was rare of her. “Are you dressed like a woman?”

Ling Ye blinked and asked, “Sister, did you just find out? I thought you had always known it, Sister.”

The conversation between the two made the netizens gossip with enjoyment.

—— [Damn it, this is too much information!]

—— [It can’t be like what I think, right? Does Xiang Yi treat Ling Ye as a girl and have they been out together on a trip?]

—— [The case is solved, no wonder Xiang Yi does not know Ling Ye. To be precise, she does not know the Ling Ye who’s dressed like a man!]

—— [What’s the big deal with drag!?! Don’t forget that Shi Sui also wore Xiang Yi’s jacket! Shi Sui won’t lose when it comes to drag!]

—— […Some Shisui Sisters have such strange mentalities when comparing themselves to others]

…

Perhaps because his hand had been pressed by her for a long time, Ling Ye began to show weakness. “Sister, it hurts.”
