Xiang Yi didn’t realize what was going on for a long time and couldn’t help but be a little slow with her reaction. Hearing that she was about to let go, she sudden heard Ling Ye acting coquettishly. “Sister, I’ll be good. Can you not be so rough with me next time?”

Xiang Yi was confused.

A clear and lazy voice suddenly filled her ears. “Xiang Yi.”

Xiang Yi: !

She suddenly turned her head around, only to find that Shi Sui had stood at the doorway at some point, with his back straight and suave.

chapters.title: Chapter 481 - : Mr. Shi, Do You Like Sister Xiang Yi?
chapters.body:
Chapter 481 - : Mr. Shi, Do You Like Sister Xiang Yi?

Chapter 481: Mr. Shi, Do You Like Sister Xiang Yi?

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

…

When the camera panned over to Shi Sui, the netizens watching the live-stream instantly got excited.

—— [Ahhhh it’s a social situation! What a famous scene!]

—— [Start fighting, start fighting! Shi Sui is going to tug at Ling Ye’s hair!]

2

—— [Xiang Yi looks really cute when she’s dumbfounded. Shi Sui, what are you waiting for? Hurry up and go kiss her! Let me see the evil of society!]

1

…

Xiang Yi finally realized what was going on and she immediately let go of Ling Ye.

She scurried towards Shi Sui and stopped a few steps in front of him.

“Why are you back? Did you catch any fish?”

1

“Get some water for Senior Tian.” Shi Sui’s tone of voice was rather natural and he felt that it was redundant to give Ling Ye a glance. “Is your hand okay?”

The pain of the fracture was nothing to Xiang Yi. Besides, she had already gotten much better after several days of recuperation. However, she was somehow really petulant and vulnerable in front of Shi Sui.

She said in a soft and tender voice, “It hurts a little.”

Seeing that Shi Sui’s brows were furrowed, Xiang Yi regretted it again and said, “Just a little.”

Ling Ye was leaning against the bookshelf in the distance. His body was very sensitive to pain, and even though Xiang Yi didn’t apply much strength just now, there was a sharp and distinct pain in his wrist.

As pale as a sheet, cold sweat seeped out from his forehead as he watched the interaction between Xiang Yi and Shi Sui with a light trace of envy hidden deep in his eyes.

Shi Sui coaxed her and sat her down on the beanbag by the floor-to-ceiling window, not forgetting to give her a lumbar cushion.

The small blanket was laid on her legs and the charging cable was pulled towards her. In addition to medical books, he also placed magazines in front of her, as well as fruit, snacks and flower tea.

1

“Rest well,” Shi Sui admonished in a warm voice.

Xiang Yi nodded and sat down obediently.

Ling Ye: “…”

‘She so cold and cool in front of me just now. Why has she become such a vulnerable little girl in front of this man?’

Seeing that Shi Sui had taken out a pot of cold brewed tea from the refrigerator, Ling Ye stepped forward and said, “Mr. Shi, let me accompany you.”

Shi Sui nodded slightly.

Side by side, the two of them walked to the pond.

After taking a large stride, both of them were at peace with each other. The netizens were a little disappointed, but they heard Ling Ye drawl, “Mr. Shi, do you like Xiang Yi?”

The netizens were flabbergasted.

—— [Damn it, brother, you’re a little aggressive!]

—— [Ahhh, what a straightforward boy! I love it! I love it!]

—— [Good question! I’ve been wanting to know what Shi Sui feels about Xiang Yi]

The photographer panned the camera to Shi Sui’s chiseled face. He had a smooth jaw line and he looked flawless from every angle.

The Shisui Sisters in front of the screen all felt that Shisui Sisters could certainly solve the issue easily with his emotional intelligence.

1

For example, he could say : “Xiang Yi is really outstanding so who would hate her?”

For example, he could say: “Kid, why are you asking such a question? Do you want to get into a relationship at a young age? Are you not afraid that I will inform your parents about it?”

However, to their surprise…

Shi Sui said indifferently, “Yeah, I do.”

1

In a instant…

The photographer’s hand shook and he almost dropped the expensive equipment.

The pop-up comments section in the live stream seemed to be empty.

After one second, two seconds…

Swish!

The overwhelming comments were strewn all over the screen!

—— [????!!!!]

—— [Like? Did Shi Sui say that he likes her?]

—— [He admitted it! This dog of a man has finally admitted!]

—— [The whole building is filled with my chicken-like shrills! Come and say it loudly with me the UntimelyCouple….is real!!!!]

1

chapters.title: Chapter 482 - Trust Her Taste
chapters.body:
Chapter 482 - Trust Her Taste

Chapter 482: Trust Her Taste

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

No one expected that instead of directing their questions elsewhere or throwing the question back, Shi Sui would just admit it so openly!”

Not only did the live stream cause a stir, the topic #Shi SuiConfessed quickly made it to the hot search list and various forums.

It would be no exaggeration to say that it a hot topic on the entire Internet!

…

Ling Ye was stunned for a moment, not expecting such an answer from Shi Sui.

He adjusted his mood and said with a smile, “After all, who wouldn’t want to be near someone as warm as sister?”

Shi Sui glanced at him indifferently.

For no apparent reason, Ling Ye felt a dangerous aura on the other side.

He had transmigrated through a few worlds and had met various powerful and authoritative figures but none of them could make him as scrupulous as the man in front of him.

‘This guy…’

‘What kind of existence is he?’

Ling Ye was suddenly unsure.

He tilted his head and asked with a harmless smile, “Mr. Shi, are you afraid that I will steal Sister Xiang Yi away?”

His features were exquisite and his hair was slightly curly. He was truly an angelic young man.

It was still debatable whether Satan lives in his heart or not.

Shi Sui said, “You can’t snatch her away.”

Ling Ye asked curiously, “Are you that confident?”

The mature and reserved man looked down and chuckled. “Because I believe in her taste. She will definitely choose the best one.”

1

Xiao Naofu, which was stealthily following behind the two, felt an urge to spit out the hairball as its face scrunched up.

1

It had never seen such a shameless person!

Ling Ye initially still though that Shi Sui was a gentleman who was modest and well-mannered but the system’s voice suddenly rang in his mind.

“According to my speculation, there is a 90% probability, he and Miss Xiang Yi are dating.”

1

“…” KAM!

Ling Ye was in a very complicated mood that couldn’t be put into words.

Soon, it was time to walk to the pond.

Ling Ye obediently poured a cup of water for his master, and then accompanied him to fish together.

Tian Zhi tasted it and praised, “Osmanthus Oolong tea? Tsk, it turns out that cold-brewed tea also has a unique flavor.”

Shi Sui said, “Xiang Yi made a lot of tea bags recently. Senior, if you like it, bring a few more tea bags of different flavors to try before you leave.”

Ling Ye heard the system saying again, “Look, he has started behaving like the master of this place. I think we should forget it. Miss Xiang Yi is such a great girl, she’s destined to be someone you cannot get.”

1

“…”

Thinking about how popular Xiang Yi was in other transmigration worlds, Ling Ye fell into silence for a moment.

Transmigrators have often experienced life-and-death situations, betrayal, parting, and deception…

Although some people have completed their tasks well, they ended up losing their humanity.

Yet, Xiang Yi could still treat others with gentleness, which was even more precious.

He was restless and did not catch a single fish even after resting for half a day.

On the other hand, Shi Sui had caught numerous fishes as all the fishes kept taking the bait.

Tian Zhi also caught a lot.

Tian Zhi said,”I think it’s about time, let’s pack up and go back.”

Shi Sui assented and threw the small fishes that he had caught, back into the pond.

The release of small fishes was considered an old tradition of anglers. Tian Zhi asked, “Do you go fishing often? What is your highest record?”

While people would normally answer the number of fish caught or the rare species that they had caught, Shi Sui smiled and said, “Those who were willing, took the bait.”

‘I caught a mermaid, Xiang Yi.’

1

Tian Zhi had a lot of experience in life so he instantly understood Shi Sui’s words. He squinted and smiled without saying anything.

In the next second…

The cat’s meowing drew the attention of the crowd.

The soft and fluffy Xiao Naofu who had white-colored fur, stopped in front of Ling Ye and meowed ferociously, though it sounded gentle.

“Meow meow meow!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 483 - Big Bug
chapters.body:
Chapter 483 - Big Bug

—— [Hold still! Don’t move! I have something to say to you!]

Although Ling Ye couldn’t understand cat language, his system understood and it signaled him to stop.

“Has this cat gained sentience? No, this realm is a godless one. It’s impossible that it can suddenly gain sentience…” The system muttered, “According to speculation, it may be a creature from another realm, not ruling out the possibility that it might be a transmigrator.”

Ling Ye thought, smiled at the cameraman who was following him and said, “It’s too dangerous for the kitten to be alone at the river. I’ll accompany it for a while. Uncle, can you go back first?”

Not many people in this world can resist such a smile.

The photographer dizzily agreed to Ling Ye’s request.

Shi Sui pushed down his gold-rimmed glasses and squinted slightly.

Tian Zhi said, “Children are just that playful. Let him stay with the kitten. Go go go, I’ll teach you to play the suona when you’re back.”

Shi Sui burst into laughter.

The netizens knew that Tian Zhi was joking but they were still amused and burst into incessant laughter in front of the screen.

…

By the pond.

Xiao Naofu held its head high and roared domineeringly, “Meow!”

—— [No bullying that silly woman, she’s under my protection!]

Ling Ye listened to the simultaneous translation in his head, crouched down and tried to scratch Xiao Naofu’s jaw. “You? What are you going to guard her with?”

What he got in response was a “vicious claw” from Xiao Naofu.

Ling Ye inhaled sharply, a bloodstain immediately appearing on the back of her pale hand.

“It’s quite fierce, huh?” He remarked.

“Hmph!” Xiao Naofu rolled its eyes at him.

Ling Ye sat down on the ground, not minding the fact that it was dirty at all. He coughed twice softly and said, “To show my sincerity, I promise you that I won’t hurt her but shouldn’t you also explain your identity, huh? Little kitten?”

Xiao Naofu flew into a rage.

It screamed while the system translated, “Are you blind? I’m not a kitten. Damn it, you’re stupid. Motherf***er… Ahem, the expletives have been blocked for you, Host. Uh, it mentions the system and transmigrating.”

Ling Ye raised his eyebrows and asked, “Are you a transmigrator?”

Xiao Naofu stared at it warily with cautiousness in its icy blue pupils.

“My system is #522, perhaps you know of it? I heard that it has a good reputation among systems now.”

Xiao Naofu’s eyes lit up.

Each system had its own character. For example, #522 was the kind that was full of righteousness.

Xiao Naofu was in the mood so it told the story of its failed reincarnation.

“I will pass it on to the main system for you.” Ling Ye said with a warm smile, “You are so nice, Xiang Yi must like you very much, right?”

He gently rubbed the back of Xiao Naofu’s neck twice with his long and slender fingertips.

Xiao Naofu thoroughly enjoyed the compliments and did not dodge this time.

Ling Ye easily gained Xiao Naofu’s trust but he had also gotten lots of information.

When Xiao Naofu was coaxed and satisfied, it skipped back to the villa. He remained still on the spot and smiled, unable to bear the scene.

“What a simple little kitty. You believe whatever I say.”

In fact, his system was not #522 at all.

The system was silent for a while before it asked, “Do you need me to transmit the bug information to the main system?”

“No, save it and intercept.” Ling Ye coughed a few more times and clenched the hem of his shirt with his fingertips. “There must be something wrong with this realm.”

His voice was full of compulsion as he asked, “Baby, don’t you want to transcend?”

System: “…”

Not every transmigrator had a system that was firm in its beliefs.

“Maybe we can use the small bugs in this realm to get a big bug.”

Ling Ye’s eyes lit up in a shocking manner.

chapters.title: Chapter 484 - Beijing Opera (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 484 - Beijing Opera (1)

Chapter 484: Beijing Opera (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

…

Back at the villa, Shi Sui consciously went to handle the fish.

Tian Zhi said in surprise, “Shi Sui, you actually have this skill too?”

With swift actions, Shi Sui said, “I learned it from Xiang Yi.”

With a bang, he smacked the fish and knocked it unconscious.

1

The next scene was overly bloody so it wasn’t filmed in the live stream.

Tian Zhi showered Shi Sui with compliments but he had only been in the kitchen a few times in his life, so he had no choice but to sneak off to the living room,

He hummed two lines of a Beijing opera song his voice. Although he wasn’t too loud, Xiang Yi heard it and turned her head to look at him. She asked with a faint smile, “Are you singing ‘Capsule’? Senior, you sang so well.”

Tian Zhi was overjoyed. “Hey, little girl, you know Beijing opera too?” Seemingly realizing that what he said was inappropriate, he corrected, “For the record, I don’t mean to discriminate against women in any way and I’m only representing my personal views. I don’t intend to start a debate and encroach on public resources, please forgive me for any inappropriate language.”

He spoke in a subdued manner, with his own sense of humor. The viewers of the live stream burst into laughter.

—— [Mr. Tian’s desire to live is so strong. Hahahaha]

—— [Tian Zhi is a walking joke. He’s really just standing there. Just looking at him can make me laugh all day!]

…

Xiang Yi burst into laughter, making her fair and tiny face look even more bright and stunning.

“I’m not exactly proficient in it but my grandfather often listened to Beijing opera when I was little so I know a few classic tunes.”

Tian Zhi was a huge fan and in addition to folk music, he also liked singing Beijing opera. However, his singing was mediocre.

However, he really liked teaching others how to sing, especially young people.

Tian Zhi cleared his throat and said, “It’s not okay to just listen to it. Come on, little girl, I’ll teach you to sing a few lines!”

Xiang Yi froze, closed the medical book in her hand and said with a grin, “I’ll have to trouble you then, Mr. Tian.”

In the live stream, a large number of question marks appeared.

—— [Xiang Yi, sober up!]

—— [Don’t don’t don’t, Child, others sing for money but did you forget that you sing badly!?]

—— [If you don’t understand why people are sending question marks, you can search for a single that was once released by Xiang Yi…]

There were some that were curious but also really proceeded to search.

The name of the song was: The Café Is Closed On Rainy Days

‘Wow, it looks quite artistic at first glance.’

They clicked the ‘play’ button.

The moment they heard “Xiang Yi” sing…

Their expressions gradually cracked.

‘No way, no way?’

‘Why is she so bad at singing when she has such a good voice!?!’

Soon, a group of netizens who were in a trance appeared in the live stream:

—— [After listening to half of the song, I want to become a monk]

—— [Where’s the music editor? The sound is not the original sound, right?]

—— [A person who is proficient in so many musical instruments is actually tone-deaf? That is f***ing outrageous]

Someone replied: [Dear, it’s not that there are no editors. The version you have just heard is the edited verson~]

Everyone was dumbfounded.

They suddenly understood why Xiang Yi would be hated by the entire Internet….

chapters.title: Chapter 485 - Beijing Opera (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 485 - Beijing Opera (2)

Chapter 485: Beijing Opera (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Thus, the comments in the live stream were divided into two camps. One was silently raving over her attractiveness faction while the other was full of hate and were screen-recording the session.

Tian Zhi drank a mouthful of water to moisten his throat. He cleared his throat and said, “Come on, let’s sing!”

The haters: [Tsk tsk, when people teach others to sing, they teach one line at a time. Yet, Mr. Tian has to teach Vase Fairy one word at a time. Well, you can imagine what level Vase Fairy is at in his heart~]

However, once Tian Zhi spoke, the crowd was dumbfounded.

The word “spring” alone sounded as melodious as flowing water as it fluctuated, though with a unique rhythm.

“!”

‘Damn, this is way too challenging!’

That was the common thought of countless netizens who were in front of the screen.

However, in the next second, Xiang Yi hummed along. As she did, her voice was full of perfection.

“!!!”

‘How did she learn it in one go!?’

——That was the cry of countless netizens who sang along. However, they realized that they could only sound like ducks and geese.

Tian Zhi was also surprised and couldn’t stop praising, “Good! Very good! This little girl is very talented!”

He began to get the hang of teaching and Xiang Yi was very attentive when learning too.

He taught more vigorously, and Xiang Yi also learned very seriously. After teaching each word, Tian Zhi said, “I’ll sing a complete sentence. Listen up.”

Fearing that Xiang Yi would be stressed, he added, “It’s okay if you can’t learn it all at once!”

It was rare for him to come across as such a quick learner. He would be willing to teach her a few more times even if he had to.

Tian Zhi clapped rhythmically while singing an entire sentence.

The netizens posted lots of pop-up comments, saying that Xiang Yi would never be able to learn an entire sentence since she couldn’t even learn to sing a single word well!

Some haters sneered and mocked:

—— [Sitting and waiting for a large flop]

—— [A word is a word, a complete sentence is a complete sentence. How can Vase Fairy master everything in one try!?!]

—— [I think this is similar to learning English. Everyone knows all 26 alphabets but not everyone knows how to put them together into proper words, let alone coherent sentences.]

However, the Spicy Rabbits ignored them and were all focused on supporting Xiang Yi.

—— [Go, our dearest Xiang Yi!]

—— [Xiang Yi, Mommy believes that you are the best!]

—— [Xiang Yi, just sing as you please, don’t feel stressed~]

…

“Come on, let’s go—— ”

Tian Zhi continued to clap rhythmically for Xiang Yi.

The young girl started singing along with the rhythm. “The storm outside Spring Pavilion~~”

‘Huh?!’

The netizens who had left their audio on were shocked speechless!

‘Oh my God, how is this possible?!’

The netizens who didn’t turn on their audio were still joking around:

—— [Don’t sing, I’m one of us!]

—— [“The eyes of the beauty, a beautiful soul, a beautiful voice, a total heartbreaker]

—— [She seems to be quite immersed in the singing. Those of you who have turned on your audio, are you guys okay?]

However, after waiting for a long time, they still did not see anyone criticizing Xiang Yi. Instead, a bunch of strange comments appeared:

——[I-I…what the heck?]

—— [This is not real…]

—— [She must be lip-syncing, right? She must be!]

The camp that had muted their speakers: Huh??

‘We’ve been waiting for so long, you guys, start criticizing her.’

‘Is it so terrible that they don’t even know how to criticize her?’

Someone stretched out a little leg to test the waters and even turned the volume up a notch.

They happened to hear Tian Zhi saying excitedly, “Genius! Little girl you… Ahem, you’re so talented!”

“…”

Tian Zhi seemed to constantly be on the edge of cursing an expletive.

Xiang Yi said embarrassedly, “I happened to have heard this song before.”

Tian Zhi’s eyes lit up and he exclaimed, “Then sing it yourself and let me hear it!”

Xiang Yi then tried to sing a portion of it.

Tian Zhi slapped his thigh and exclaimed, “Excellent singing! Little girl, I’ll learn from you! Teach me!!”

Everyone was speechless.

‘What??? Mr. Tian??? Are you the teacher or is Xiang Yi the teacher!?!’

chapters.title: Chapter 486 - My Master, Your Grandmaster
chapters.body:
Chapter 486 - My Master, Your Grandmaster

…

After returning from fooling Xiao Naofu, Ling Ye heard the master of this body he was occupying, pointing to Xiang Yi and saying half-jokingly, “This is my master, your Grandmaster.”

The young man was confused.

‘I’ve just left for a short while to trick the kitten. Why has Sister Xiang Yi’s status risen so quickly?’

Xiang Yi said, “Senior Tian, quit joking. I don’t dare to accept being called ‘Master’ by you. If you like Beijing Opera, we can exchange more pointers in the future.”

Tian Zhi laughed and exchanged contact information with Xiang Yi.

Ling Ye’s eyelashes trembled lightly and he coughed a little before saying softly, “Sister, can I add you?”

Xiang Yi could not bear to see a good-looking person showing such a pitiful expression so she quickly added him.

There was a buzz.

It was a message from Ling Ye.

[Little Nocturne]: Sister Xiang Yi, don’t you want to know what my mission is this time?

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Well, it seems that she had been fooled by the appearance of the young man.

‘Little angel? He’s clearly a little devil.’

She replied: [It has nothing to do with me].

Ling Ye licked the corner of his mouth and tapped the screen gently with his slender fingers which were moving elegantly, as if they were dancing on the black and white keys of the piano.

[Sister Xiang Yi, you’re so cold and aloof~]

He clicked on the sticker pack and took a long time to pick the most satisfactory sticker— a pitiful-looking cat. He sent it but a prompt soon appeared on the screen.

[The message has been sent, but rejected by the recipient.]

‘Did she…block me?’

Ling Ye’s facial muscles twitched.

On the other hand…

Tian Zhi received a message. He closed his phone and looked at Li Jianyu. “Director Li, the newly accepted apprentice whom I mentioned to you, has come over.”

Li Jianyu frantically said, “Then I’ll arrange someone to pick him up.”

Tian Zhi was introduce by the former director, Director Yan, and it was a great honor to have him on the show. Hence, when Tian Zhi proposed to bring two young apprentices to the show, Li Jianyu naturally had no problem with it.

He acquiesced that the other apprentice was from the music industry, so he didn’t place much emphasis on the other person’s identity.

Xiang Yi glanced at the kitchen and said, “Shi Sui is busy, I’ll go get it.”

Ling Ye chimed in, “I’ll go too.”

“That’s fine, you two young people go ahead and run errands, I won’t go. I want to listen to what Xiang Yi just sang.” Tian Zhi took out his cell phone to listen to the audio clip that he had recorded just now when Xiang Yi sang the Beijing Opera tune.

Netizens jokingly said that Tian Zhi had ended up finding himself a master instead of an apprentice, which he had set out to find.

…

On the way to the entrance of the manor, Ling Ye tried to strike up a conversation with Xiang Yi several times. However, regardless of whether he was being cute or acting pitiful, Xiang Yi kept a distance and treated him politely.

She was rather distant.

Ling Ye clenched his fingertips, somewhat indignant.

The netizens in the live stream room could not stand it any longer:

—— [Xiang Yi, don’t ignore the little boy!]

—— [Xiang Yi, you jerk. He’s going to cry soon ahhh]

—— [Ling Ye is really such a softie. He’s so well-behaved, why can’t he get Xiang Yi’s favor!?]

—— [???? I don’t quite understand you women. You gender swap and you actually dare to start a harem that will garner over 10,000 hateful comments. Why are you so excited about having a harem?]

—— [None of your business!]

—— [Do you need a reason to ship a couple? / Dog’s head]

…

The summer breeze was sticky and warm.

A black commercial car was parked at the door. While it was seemingly low-key, it actually had a hefty price tag.

Ling Ye went up and pulled open the door for the person in the car.

A familiar face was reflected in Xiang Yi’s eyes.

She frowned slightly.

Qin Wanyan, who was wearing exquisitely makeup and clad in a long dress, looked at Xiang Yi as if she had been transformed, and her eyes were filled with a strong sense of superiority.

Now, she had been chosen to become a transmigrator!

‘What is Xiang Yi compared to me? What a joke.’

chapters.title: Chapter 487 - Playing The Suona (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 487 - Playing The Suona (2)

Chapter 487: Playing The Suona (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“Hello, Miss Qin.” Xiang Yi greeted her calmly. She wasn’t familiar with her but she was extremely polite.

Qin Wanyan smiled at Xiang Yi and said, “Hello, Xiang Yi, I’m Mr. Tian’s new apprentice. Please guide me along in the future~”

The netizens were appalled.

—— [Hello? Isn’t that Qin Wanyan?]

—— [I take my hat’s off to her. How did she manage to greet Xiang Yi with a straight face? If it were me, I’d be really embarrassed!]

—— [Is there… something wrong with Teacher Tian’s vision… Qin Wanyan previously pretended to be a pure and innocent with her main account. She also used her private account to send hate to Xiang Yi. Has everyone forgotten how she got exposed?]

1

However, Qin Wanyan had previously accumulated a bunch of loyal fans. After several purges and rounds of abusing her fans, the remaining fans of hers were the hardcore ones that would continue to support her and justify her behavior even if Qin Wanyan commits murder and arson.

Their combat power was rather amazing and they wouldn’t hesitate to lash out at others:

1

—— [Stop sending hate to our Fairy Qin, okay?]

—— [Fairy Qin was taken in by Mr. Tian because of her musical talent. Some maggots should stop being jealous of our fairy]

—— [Our little fairy is too straightforward by nature and said a few words about the truth. That’s why she was boycotted by that vicious woman, the Vase Fairy! It’s too bad that she’s too outstanding and got the role of a strong, alpha female who will abuse scumbags~~]

…

The people who saw those comments immediately formed a bad opinion of Qin Wanyan.

Sometimes, the comments of fans would in turn result in a huge impact on artistes.

Qin Wanyan took the initiative to take Xiang Yi’s arm, but Xiang Yi dodged effortlessly.

She had no choice but to retreat and leave with Ling Ye.

To her surprise, Ling Ye shook her off after taking a few steps and chased after Xiang Yi pathetically. While gasping for breath, she said, “Sister, wait. You’re walking too fast.”

1

Qin Wanyan was speechless.

‘No, what’s wrong with this person?’

‘Didn’t Ling Ye come to assist me and get a perfect life?’

1

‘Why is he so clingy to Xiang Yi instead of treating me well!?!’

Xiang Yi glanced at the cold sweat on Ling Ye’s forehead and slowed down her pace appropriately.

There was nothing but silence throughout the journey.

They returned to the living room.

As soon as Tian Zhi saw Qin Wanyan, his eyes narrowed as he grinned and took the initiative to introduce to the crowd, “This is my new little apprentice, she is a great suona player!”

1

Qin Wanyan’s expression stiffened.

She merely wanted to use the identity of Tian Zhi’s apprentice as a springboard to climb step by step to the top of the entertainment industry, not to really engage in folk music!

Besides, it was an instrument like the Suona, which wasn’t exactly very presentable by her standards!

Qin Wanyan was filled with resentment towards Tian Zhi. ‘Why is he making me play the suona in front of so many people!?!’

The truth was that Qin Wanyan’s fears and worries were not uncalled for.

As soon as the live stream viewers heard Tian Zhi’s introduction, they burst into laughter.

The most dumbfounded person was none other than her fans.

—— [????]

—— […What? Fairy Qin knows how to play the suona? Is it not the ancient zither??]

—— [Our little fairy must also still look like a fairy when she’s playing the suona… Right…]

…

At the mention of his apprentice, Tian Zhi rattled on and on. Knowing that Qin Wanyan wanted to become famous, he decided to help her increase her presence in front of the netizens.

“Come on, Wanyan, play a piece for everyone!”

The scene was… extremely awkward for a moment.

“Hey, don’t be shy, why don’t you ask Ling Ye to help you accompany? Teacher Xiang, you do know how to play string instruments too, right? Can you give me a hand?”

“Alright.”

“Yes.”

Qin Wanyan had no choice but to slowly take out the suona with a grave expression on her face, as if she was going to go to a graveyard.

chapters.title: Chapter 488 - Playing The Suona (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 488 - Playing The Suona (2)

Chapter 488: Playing The Suona (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Ling Ye carried an ancient zither with him in the car. When he took it out, the elegant and ancient style of it stunned many people.

1

The people only knew that he hadn’t high attainments in piano, but at this moment, they were curious about how far he had advanced in playing the ancient zither.

1

Xiang Yi took out her own three-string bandore.

1

The ancient zither was black and embellished with patterns that were painted on with a brush and red lacquer. The bandore was rather exquisite as both sides of its body were covered with snake skin.

Both instruments had an ancient charm.

Meanwhile, the suona that Qin Wanyan pulled out was exquisitely crafted by Tian Zhi. The mouth was golden in color and there was a large red silk cloth tied to the top.

It looked… very festive.

Qin Wanyan tried to secretly pull off that red cloth, only to meet Tian Zhi’s sorrowful gaze. “Child, this is so beautiful ! Why is it that you just can’t understand my aesthetics and beauty standards!?!”

“…” She said with a fake smile, “Master, I like it, I was trying to organize it.”

“Let me do it.” Tian Zhi volunteered, went up and removed the large red silk cloth. He thought about it and re-tied it into a fluffy bow.

1

‘Yeah, she’s a little girl, she should like it like this.’

Little did he know that Qin Wanyan had already cursed him numerous times.

‘What kind of a bow is this? It’s really ugly!’

She hated Ling Ye. There were clearly so many musical instrument skill cards in the system store. Yet, he recommended her to choose the [Suona card], which she felt was a deliberate trap for her.

1

However, she was confused again when she met Ling Ye’s innocent and flawless gaze.

‘Perhaps, Ling Ye is purely just kindhearted?’

1

With all the complicated feelings intertwined in her heart, she heard Tian Zhi say, “In this case, let’s play ‘Carrying the Sedan Chair’. Shi Sui ah, stop fiddling with the fish and come out to listen! This song is festive!”

After Shi Sui heard the sound, he wiped his hands and came out from the kitchen.

When he saw that the girl’s hair was slightly messy around her ears, he took a big step forward and fished out a hairpin with a bow from his pocket, which he then used to pinned the loose strands of hair for her.

2

Xiang Yi licked the corner of her mouth uncomfortably and said, “… thanks.”

Shi Sui chuckled and said, “You’re welcome.”

Qin Wanyan was vexed and disgruntled.

Xiang Yi’s butterfly knot was like a scene from an idol drama.

Hers was like a scene from a village drama!

Gritting her teeth, Qin Wanyan plucked up the courage and picked up the large suona.

‘I’m the one who can get a perfect life.’

‘A mere Xiang Yi is nothing!’

‘That stupid bastard must not even know what transmigration is!’

2

At the same time, Ling Ye and Xiang Yi played the prelude. The tone of the ancient zither was like high mountains an flowing water, deep and distant, while the three-stringed bandore was thick and clear like a gel.

1

In terms of timbre alone, both of them are not really suitable for this piece, but after their delicate and skillful interpretation, they gave off a unique vibe.

The netizens who were full of praises, began to leave comments too:

—— [Wow, this tune is so melodious!]

—— [Xiang Yi and this young boy have such good chemistry. The two of them are like soul mates when it comes to music.]

2

—— [Jiang Jijiu, What about me? It’s obviously a story of three people, but I don’t deserve a name? /smile/smile]

1

…

However, the moment Qin Wanyan puffed up her cheeks and blew the suona…

Nothing could be heard anymore at the moment, be it the plucking of the ancient zither, or the slide of the three-string bandore.

1

Their ears were filled with the shocking penetrative sounds of the rogue of instruments, the Suona.

In particular, the cameraman deliberately gave a close-up shot of Qin Wanyan.

On the screen, Qin Wanyan puffed out her cheeks and shook her head as she played.

1

Qin Wanyan’s loyal fans: ????

‘Where is our little fairy?’

‘I just-just suddenly want to stop being a fan of hers….’

chapters.title: Chapter 489 - Court Him
chapters.body:
Chapter 489 - Court Him

This scene was so delightful that it even overshadowed their hatred for Qin Wanyan.

—— [Hahahaha I can’t, I’m running out of breath because I’m laughing so hard!]

—— [I’ve gradually forgotten that Qin Wanyan was once the lead singer of a female group…]

—— [To be fair, she plays it quite well but why are her cheekbones so large?]

…

The outsiders were listening for the sake of fun while those who were proficient in music, paid attention to her skill.

Others only thought that Qin Wanyan was funny but Tian Zhi was absolutely mesmerized.

She was a good junior that was rare to come by in ten years!

Her lung capacity, rhythm, and emotion were all right!

A little bit would be too much and a little less would be too little.

However, Shi Sui felt a strong sense of being cut.

It was very familiar to him.

He slowly knocked his slender and bony fingers on the table.

He suddenly stopped.

Shi Sui raised his hand to hold up his gold-rimmed glasses, with an obscure gaze in the bottom of his eyes.

He finally remembered where he had felt this feeling before.

It was when he was with “Xiang Yi” last year.

Qin Wanyan was like a completely different from her usual self when she was playing the suona.

It was as if the person playing the suona was not her but something inside her body that was controlling her to play it….

…

Xiao Naofu, which was in the cat villa, was awakened by the sound of the suona. It looked at the source of the sound wearily.

“Meow!” It’s hair instantly stood on ends.

Little Xiji, which was sleeping at the side, quickly licked it with doubts in its watery, dark pupils.

“Woof?”

Xiao Naofu pushed Little Xiji away with its fleshy paws. Its icy blue cat pupils were wide open as it glared at Qin Wanyan menacingly.

Little Xiji nestled next to it with its ears drooping down.

Xiao Naofu was completely dumbfounded.

‘How can there be another transmigrator!?!’

‘This is not scientific!!!’

‘There must be…there must be something wrong somewhere…”

…

The song ended.

Qin Wanyan put down the suona, her face muscles feeling a little sore.

In fact, she couldn’t play the suona at all, and every time she played it , the skill card was in effect.

“Good!” Tian Zhi exclaimed and grinned especially brightly as he tried to applaud for his little apprentice.

Out of courtesy, Shi Sui clapped twice too.

Seeing him applauding, Qin Wanyan’s eyes lit up.

Does it mean that… Shi Sui is impressed with me?

‘Does he actually like the unrestrained version of me today?’

She asked the system in her mind, “I want to rip him off, think of a solution for me.”

The system assigned to Qin Wanyan was a newly launched one. “Host, he is not within the scope of your mission…”

Qin Wanyan said, “Isn’t your existence to help me get a perfect life? Then I need to have love in addition to my career, so he is also a part of my plan to perfect life!”

The System: “You… wait a moment, I need to go to the database to check.”

Qin Wanyan said in displeasure, “You’re so useless.”

The system sobbed.

“Anyway, I have Ling Ye to help me. Helping me is his task, so it is only natural for him to help!” Qin Wanyan was full of confidence as she said, “Help me redeem another beauty filter card!”

“Host, points are precious. It’s not recommended to redeem those items as they will only enhance your original beauty…”

“Are you defying me? Believe it or not, I will replace you.”

“… It has been successfully redeemed for you.”

Qin Wanyan couldn’t wait to use the card. Her long skirt swayed and she walked towards Shi Sui.

Tian Zhi encouraged, “Keep up the good work!”

“Thank you, Teacher.” Qin Wanyan smiled sweetly, then looked at Shi Sui. “Senior Shi Sui, what do you think of my playing?”

Shi Sui said, “Miss Qin, your double eyelid sticker fell off.” After a short pause, he sincerely asked, “Do you need glue?”

chapters.title: Chapter 490 - Fraudulent Donation? (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 490 - Fraudulent Donation? (1)

Qin Wanyan’s expression collapsed.

Her heart was filled with anger and panic. She hurriedly turned her back to the camera and used her phone as a mirror to look at herself.

Half of her double eyelid sticker had indeed fallen off her eyelid.

She was thinking about how to remedy the situation when a pair of pale, slender fingers suddenly appeared in front of her and tore off her eyelid stickers.

Ling Ye said with an innocent look on his face, “Sister Wanyan, where is the glue? I’ll help you stick it back on.”

Qin Wanyan: ???

‘Okay, but why did you tear it off?’

And tearing off the double eyelid sticker, one of Qin Wanyan’s eyelids turned into a monolid, and even with the support of the beauty filter, her beauty was greatly affected.

The netizens in the live stream were laughing hysterically.

—— [Best Actor Shi Sui is such a straight man!]

—— [Brother Ling Ye is also very straightforward. He wants to help her stick it back on. Hahaha]

—— [Ah, it’s true that eyelids have a significant impact on one’s appearance. Even a ravishing beauty like our Fairy Qin can’t escape it]

—— [How dare you have the nerve to call her beauty in front of Xiang Yi? Xiang Yi’s beauty can easily beat her cake-face that’s covered in heavy makeup. Just close your eyes and keep boasting]

…

At the side, Xiang Yi sneezed and before she even reached out for the tissue box, Shi Sui had already stuffed the tissue into her hand and stood up to go pour her a glass of warm tea.

When he came back with the tea, he wrapped a small blanket around her.

His movements were fluid and natural.

Qin Wanyan was dumbstruck.

The netizens watching the live stream were also dumbfounded.

—— […Who said just now that Shi Sui is a straight guy?]

—— [Ahhh, the way he lowers his head to cover Xiang Yi with the blanket is incredible!]

—— [What kind of a godly man is this? Seriously, from now on, I can match a face to the heroes in romance novels!]

—— [Shi Sui’s double standards really resonate with me. As Xiang Yi’s maiden family, I’m very pleased with him~ I just wonder if Xiang Yi has realized it yet. Uwu, Xiang Yi, do you know that this man carries a torch for you!?!]

…

Tian Zhi began to give Qin Wanyan, who was done with her makeup, some pointers in playing the suona. He said, “You can perfect your playing. First of all, you have to begin on the technical level…”

Qin Wanyan listened with her heart in her mouth, feeling that the old man was simply annoying.

With the system, which was like a golden finger, she didn’t have to be worried about not knowing how to play the suona well.

Tian Zhi seemed to have realized that she was getting annoyed but he didn’t get angry. Instead, he sighed and said, “Wanyan, you have to calm yourself down. Look at Teacher Xiang. There’s a good saying that goes, it takes a thousand days to master the pipa and a hundred days to master the ancient zither, but you can never master the three-stringed lute even after learning for half your lifetime. She must have put in a lot of hard work to be able to have such achievements at a young age…”

Qin Wanyan got even more frustrated.

‘How can Xiang Yi be compared to me? I’m a transmigrator! Who is Xiang Yi?’

‘I’ve found the cheat code to life, why would I need to painstakingly put in so much effort to learn such a useless skill!?!’

Tian Zhi sighed but he saved Qin Wanyan from the embarrassment and chose not to express her displeasure in the live stream.

Qin Wanyan wasn’t paying any attention to him at all. Instead, she kept chasing after Shi Sui.

She watched as the refined, ascetic, cool and reserved man roll up his sleeves and go to the kitchen to cook fish while Xiang Yi leaned against the door frame to explain to him the steps of cooking.

Every now and then, they would make eye contact.

Shi Sui would smile affectionately and warmly at her every single time.

He never smiled at Qin Wanyan like that.

Qin Wanyan’s fingertips dug into her palm and she slowly exhaled a breath as she walked over to Xiang Yi, pretending like there was nothing wrong.

“Xiang Yi, I heard that you have done a lot of charity and donated a lot of money to the Spring Flower Fund. I recently read some reports about the lack of female hygiene products for girls who don’t live with their parents and I want to do my part. Can you tell me what to do?”

chapters.title: Chapter 491 - Fraudulent Donation? (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 491 - Fraudulent Donation? (2)

Chapter 491: Fraudulent Donation? (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Hearing Qin Wanyan’s words, Xiang Yi’s haters who were watching the live stream, were all stunned.

‘Huh?’

‘It turns out that Vase Fairy is running a charity too?’

Philanthropists are usually viewed as kindhearted people.

The crowd immediately had a better impression of Xiang Yi.

There were also people who said that they would never hate on Xiang Yi again.

—— [I was wrong, the Vase Fairy… Oh no, it turns out that Vase Fairy is so kind. I can’t hate her anymore!]

Xiang Yi said indifferently, “You can consult a professional body.”

1

Qin Wanyan pretended to be surprised, “Huh?Don’t you do charity on your own?”

1

Xiang Yi shot her an odd look, “What do you think is considered to be doing charity?”

“At least… Well, you should at least personally go to the orphanage and elderly homes to accompany the poor old people and children, and then give them some rice, food and oil supplies or something.”

Xiang Yi nodded and said, “I see.”

She ignored Qin Wanyan again and went to help Shi Sui make the pickled fish.

1

The netizens were confused.

‘This is it? That’s it?’

—— [Qin Wanyan is quite good at making others like her…]

—— [Has Xiang Yi really done charity? Why does it feel like she has never done any of those things Qin Wanyan said?]

1

—— [Damn it, there’s gossip to watch, friends! Mrs. Cen and the Spring Flower Fund have released statements on their official Weibo accounts!!]

The current state of the Internet: Everyone flocks to gossip.

The netizens were like badgers in the melon field as they flocked to read the Weibo post.

The Spring Flower Fund was a private charity but it was widely known because the founder was Mrs. Cen, a famous socialite in Nancheng. She was elegant and often shared photos and updates of her daily lives online. She had a large number of followers and just a few minutes ago, she updated a personal post on Weibo.

[@CenSuqin: Lies can grow in all seasons.]

The official Weibo account of Spring Blossom Foundation, also updated its status.

[@SpringFlowerFund: Because we have received so many private messages, we solemnly declare that our organization has never received any donations from @Ms. Xiang Yi. Thank you all for your support of the Spring Flower Fund and we would like to express our gratitude to the caring people from all walks of life. Doing charity is not easy, and we have no intention of encroaching on public resources. We only hope that a small organization like us will not be used for clout again.]

1

…

The two Weibo instantly caused another uproar after they were released.

This is too much information!

—— [Nani Nani, so who’s lying?]

—— [Haven’t they already made it very clear that they didn’t accept a single cent from Xiang Yi~]

1

—— [Everyone, calm down. Qin Wanyan was the one who said that Xiang Yi donated, not Xiang Yi herself!]

1

—— [So did Xiang Yi lie about her donation? Why did she say she was doing charity if she didn’t donate?]

1

—— [Oh, is that so? I didn’t know she was such a person! It’s disgusting!!]

—— [Damn, Xiang Yi lied about her donation? Such a juice piece of news must be on the top of the hot search list!]

…

The more the rumors spread, the more absurd they became. Towards the end, the netizens simply didn’t care what the truth was. When they saw the words “Xiang Yi fakes a donation”, they started criticizing her immediately.

They don’t hate philanthropists but philanthropists who use charity to clear their names are detestable!

Not to mention faking donations to get clout!

The Spring Flower Fund had increased awareness and raised a large number of donations in a short time.

…

Qin Wanyan hid from the camera, and sneakily fiddled with her phone. After seeing how things turned out online, she sent a message to Mrs. Cen.

[Mrs. Cen, don’t forget the resources you promised.]

1

She locked the phone screen and the corners of her mouth were lifted.

‘Xiang Yi doing charity? How is that possible?’

Qin Wanyan had known her for a year and knew the nature of “Xiang Yi” very well. She knew that she was an extremely selfish egoist!

2

She deserved to be called out for making fake donations.

chapters.title: Chapter 492 - Delicate Baby
chapters.body:
Chapter 492 - Delicate Baby

…

Except for Qin Wanyan, none of the other guests were aware of the online public opinion.

Li Jianyu and the others did see it and were getting a headache as they figured out how to deal with it.

“Why does it seem like the Spring Flower Fund is scamming Xiang Yi…” Li Jianyu criticized.

Normally, it would take official Weibo accounts some time to react when they encounter such things.

Yet, Spring Flower Fund actually released a statement to clarify the matter immediately after Qin Wanyan asked about it in the live stream.

The timing was too peculiar.

Ruan Qing said, “Go ahead with the normal livestream first. The public relations department of Tomato Entertainment should be handling it. Let’s wait and see. If there’s a need to, we will let Xiang Yi address it in the live stream so that it would be more effective.”

Watching her arrange everything neatly and methodically, Li Jianyu scratched his head and said, “… I suddenly feel that I’m worrying for nothing.”

Well, indeed, Xiang Yi was now the president of Tomato Entertainment.

The president of Xing Chen Entertainment was her uncle, and the co-founder Lin Chen Law Firm was her eldest brother. Their power of these two people alone is enough to overturn the entertainment industry.

Not to mention that she also has her second brother, third brother, fourth brother, and grandparents…

…

Three dishes and one soup were served to the table.

Xiang Yi had been feeling a strong urge to fry dishes and cook with her uninjured hand but Shi Sui stopped her.

“All of you try it. If you don’t like it, don’t force yourselves. We can still order takeout,” Shi Sui said with a gentle and elegant smile.

Although the people had different thoughts, they still had to eat. Hence, they started moving their chopsticks one after another. The first dish they tasted was naturally the main dish of pickled fish.

The fish used was a large and fleshy carp caught by Tian Zhi.

Shi Sui cut the fish diagonally into slices while Xiang Yi added the seasoning and egg white before mixing them well, so as to ensure that each slice of fish was evenly coated with egg paste, which is the secret to make the fish fresh and tender.

She then sautéed pickled pepper, peppers, peppercorn, garlic cloves, etc. in hot oil before adding the pickled cabbage and fish slices to the pot for stir-frying. Next, she slowly added the separated fish meat and fish bones to a casserole and simmered it.

The final product was a creamy and fragrant fish soup with fresh and tender fish meat. The pickled cabbage was shiny and the chili pepper was bright red in color. Both the fragrance and visuals were very impactful.

Tian Zhi tasted a chopstick, and then praised, “Oh, Shi Sui your culinary skills are really excellent! Any girl who marries you will be really lucky!”

Shi Sui smiled.

However Tian Zhi had a change in his tone of voice and he said, “But it’s a new era now where the sexes are equal. I’m a live-in husband myself and my wife and I have been in a loving marriage for years! I don’t mind sponging off her! I’ll do it openly, there’s nothing to be ashamed of!”

The netizens were dumbfounded.

The people stopped slamming Xiang Yi for making fake donations because their attention had been captured by something else.

—— [Live-in husband? If Shi Sui becomes Xiang Yi’s live-in husband… That doesn’t sound like a bad idea!]

—— [Isn’t Xiang Yi hiding her lover in her manor now~ Shi Sui is Xiang Yi’s beloved little lover!]

—— [Once you accept the setting that Shi Sui is a dainty little lover… gosh I want to write the same person!]

—— [Sister in front, take the keyboard, quick!]

…

Under the focus of the crowd, Shi Sui smiled and said, “Thank you for the guidance, Seniors, I will consider it.”

Xiang Yi began coughing after hearing their words. She wanted to spit out her food but the rubbish bin was too far away.

The next second, the man’s fair white and slender hands appeared in front of her eyes.

Shi Sui tilted his head slightly. He had already removed his gold-framed glasses at some point, and his peach-blossom-shaped eyes seemed to contain some deep devotion. It was extremely attractive.

His voice was low and alluring, void of any reluctance.

“Spit on my hand.”

chapters.title: Chapter 493 - Oh My, So Sweet
chapters.body:
Chapter 493 - Oh My, So Sweet

Ling Ye, who had picked up the rubbish bin and was about to move it to Xiang Yi’s feet, stiffened immediately.

Wow!

‘This man is so much better at flirting than those transmigrators with romance tasks, that I have met before!’

Qin Wanyan’s eyes were full of disbelief.

‘Why is this man who is so aloof and out of reach to me, being so nice to Xiang Yi!?!’

‘I’m Heaven’s favorite.’

On the other hand, Tian Zhi was wearing a heartened smile on his face, as if he was leading the fans to ship the couple at close range.

…

Xiang Yi was stunned. She shook her head and gestured that it was dirty.

However, Shi Sui said, “It’s okay, I’ll just wash my hands later.”

His words seemed to carry a compelling, magical power as Xiang Yi subconsciously spit the pickled pepper onto his hand.

The clear lines of his palm were stained with food residue.

He was a clean freak and yet, he was smiling at her warmly without any change in expression.

The fans of the UntimelyCouple exclaimed: [Oh my God, so sweet!]

Xiang Yi had a sweet, warm and fuzzy feeling in her heart, feeling as if she was soaked in a jar of honey. She was no longer as calm as before and was instead smiling brightly at this moment.

She was very much like a young girl.

Ling Ye watched their interaction with a yearning gaze in the depths of her eyes.

Not everyone was willing to be a transmigrator and carry out missions forever.

Killing, scheming battles, the fear of death and parting… They would travel from one world to another, seemingly with no chance to catch their breaths at all.

No matter how deep the friendships they form are, they will be reduced to nothing when they arrive at the next world.

The more memories you have, the more painful it is.

Ling Ye’s desire to stay in this world became stronger and stronger.

He had a fatal attraction to Xiang Yi, which was more than just romance. Instead, he felt a sense of belonging with her.

He could sense that he was being jealous of Shi Sui.

Ling Ye coughed softly twice before reaching out to scoop himself some pickled vegetables and fish. However, he was a little distracted and out of sorts so he accidentally spilled the soup!

In an instant, the fish and pickled vegetables were spilled while the soup flowed down the table.

Ling Ye was rarely in such a mess. He grabbed some paper towels and wiped the table with them anxiously but he quickly ran out of them. In a moment of panic, he quickly tried to use his shirt to wipe it but Xiang Yi stopped him.

The young man looked up with some tears in his amber eyes. “Sister Xiang Yi…”

Xiang Yi said, “Sit still, I’ll get a rag.”

While she proceeded to get a rag, Ling Ye felt as if he was on tenterhooks. He was rarely afraid of anything but now, he was a little scared.

He was afraid that Xiang Yi would scold him.

However, Xiang Yi just brought a few rags over and gave one to Shi Sui.

Shi Sui began to wipe the table skillfully. He was clearly used to doing household chores.

Xiang Yi handed another rag to Ling Ye and said, “There you go, wipe your hands.”

Ling Ye waited carefully for her to continue speaking but he only heard her saying, “Why? Did you get scalded?”

“…”

Ling Ye couldn’t put his feelings into words at the moment. He pursed his lips and said, “I’m sorry to have spilled the food.”

“It’s an inevitable mistake that everyone will make.” She wiped the parts of the table that Shi Sui had already wiped, and then asked, “There’s still some more in the pot. Can you bring another bowl over?”

Qin Wanyan retorted, “Xiang Yi, Ling Ye’s hands are used for playing the ancient zither and piano. How can you make him do such chores…”

She thought she had voiced Ling Ye’s inner thoughts.

The next second, Ling Ye said without even thinking, “I can do it!” After saying that, he gave Qin Wanyan the side-eye. “The hands of a man can be used for carrying out any chores!”

Qin Wanyan was dumbstruck.

chapters.title: Chapter 494 - Submissive To The Tenderness Of A Young Girl
chapters.body:
Chapter 494 - Submissive To The Tenderness Of A Young Girl

Chapter 494: Submissive to the Tenderness of a Young Girl

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

No, so are you my helper or Xiang Yi’s dog?

1

How can you commit mutiny just like that!?!

1

Qin Wanyan was puzzled.

On the other hand, Ling Ye went to get some food as if he was going to accomplish some major mission.

“Wait a minute.” Xiang Yi suddenly called out to him.

Ling Ye turned around nervously. “Well? Sister?”

“Don’t fill the bowl with too much food. You will get scalded if it spills.”

He knew clearly that Xiang Yi was just giving a casual explanation that she would have given to anyone else. However, Ling Ye’s heart seemed to have suddenly missed a beat.

Even in the most fearful and desperate world, he had an unyielding will.

He would submit to her tenderness, only in front of her.

Ling Ye found that he indeed, still had no resistance to her.

Qin Wanyan volunteered, “I’ll go with him!”

She did not let the cameraman follow along. When they passed through a section without surveillance cameras, she signaled Ling Ye to turn off the microphone.

Ling Ye switched it off lazily. “Did something happen?”

Qin Wanyan was a bit indignant, “Ling Ye, what do you mean? You’re putting me down in public!?!”

“Yes?” Ling Ye blinked innocently. His angelic face would look more pitiful than a girl whenever he showed his weakness. “Sister Wanyan, you misunderstood me, I’m just trying to perform well. Once I’m popular, I can better help you.”

Qin Wanyan obviously faltered.

The young seized the opportunity and questioned, “Sister Wanyan, do you not trust me? If so, I may not be able to help sister.”

Qin Wanyan was anxious. “Don’t you want to complete the task?!”

“Of course I want to.” ‘I want to? My foot.’

A safe and stable realm like this was unattainable, and to Ling Ye, it was similar to a tourist vacation.

Of course he didn’t want to leave.

He even wanted to stay forever.

“But…” Ling Ye seemed to be conflicted. “But Sister Wanyan, if you don’t trust me, I won’t be able to cooperate with you properly…”

“…” Thinking of the convenience Ling Ye created for herself, Qin Wanyan felt that he still had some value and that she could use him so she eased her tone and comforted nicely, “Don’t think too much, I’m just afraid you’ll be charmed by that woman,Xiang Yi. She’s just a dimwit. See how the netizens are slamming her…”

1

Ling Ye suddenly squinted, his amber eyes filled with a touch of menace.

“By the way, is there any way that I can quickly rip off Shi Sui? It’s better for me to directly replace Xiang Yi as the resident guest of Two Under One Roof so won’t I be able to accomplish my career and gain love at the same time?”

1

“Sister Wanyan, you want ne to steal Xiang Yi’s stuff?” Ling Ye asked.

Qin Wanyan felt a great sense of superiority. “That should have been mine, I am the chosen one, what is she? She’s just an ordinary person!”

1

Ling Ye smiled and said, “Sister Wanyan, being too greedy is not good ~”

Qin Wanyan frowned. She always felt that Ling Ye meant something else but his expression was too harmless.

She suppressed her suspicions about Ling Ye and threatened, “If you don’t help me properly, I’ll make sure you fail to complete the task!”

Ling Ye lowered his head and said meekly, “I know it.”

…

When a new bowl of pickled fish soup was brought over, the comments in the live stream were already unbearable.

There was an influx of countless netizens on Weibo who were either sarcastic or full of righteous indignation. Without exception, they were all blaming Xiang Yi!

—— [Thank you Ms. Xiang, for the air you donated to the Spring Flower Fund~]

—— [Nothing has been done and you still want to suck blood? Dream on! Come out and get beaten!]

—— [You’re still in the mood to eat, huh? Do you know how many children can’t even afford to eat?]

…

….

chapters.title: Chapter 495 - Loving Family
chapters.body:
Chapter 495 - Loving Family

These people, who came only after seeing the gossip about Mrs. Cen and the Spring Flower Fund, self-righteously targeted their hate at Xiang Yi.

Even though Tomato Entertainment’s PR department was the first to clarify that Xiang Yi did not say she would donate to the Spring Blossom Fund but Qin Wanyan who mentioned it, but there were still people who slammed Xiang Yi.

[If you didn’t donate, then why didn’t you refute it when Qin Wanyan mentioned it? Why did you try to get clout instead?]

The PR department was speechless.

This batch of netizens were really too aggressive.

‘Are all of you reincarnates of Archimedes?!’

Meanwhile…

The official Weibo account of Spring Blossom Fund updated their status with a long Weibo post with photos. They even devotedly described that their organization went to the mountain village and donated sanitary products to the girls there.

One of the paragraphs in the Weibo post read: “Xiao Zhu is 13 years old and her monthly allowance is only 20 yuan. Buying sanitary napkins is a huge financial burden for her, and she once thought about dropping out of school. However, our arrival made the stars appear in Xiao Zhu’s eyes.”

There was a picture of a young girl in a mountain village smiling at the camera with an innocent expression on her face, and a handwritten letter with childish handwriting. It tugged at the heartstrings of many netizens, especially the female ones.

—— [Oooh little sisters, you’ve had a miserable time. I will donate money to you!]

—— [Don’t be afraid, I’m here. I won’t let you suffer what I had you suffered back then]

—— [Spring Flower Fund is really doing charity! Celebrities like Xiang Yi who are only after clout are way too disgusting!!]

——[After the comparison, it really seems to be the case. They’re both pretty and rich. Ah, Madam Cen is really an angel on earth. Hah, Miss Xiang, there are some maggots that you can forget about washing. There’s no way to clear your name~ ~]

…

The Spicy Rabbits were confused.

‘What’s up with these people’s logic?’

‘Who’s using who for clout?’

Although Madam Cen is famous, she was only an influencer.

Xiang Yi was the popular celebrity of “NationalMassWorkout” and a certified A-lister!

As for the Spring Flower Fund, it had received many donations but it had been a long time and there wasn’t even a financial disclosure. Hence, no one knew where the money had gone.

Even if Xiang Yi had really not done any charity, what was there to mock?

At first, there were Spicy Rabbits who were angry and went against the netizens but they were soon supressed by the fans.

“On the Internet, we represent Xiang Yi. We can’t invite hate for Xiang Yi! Fellow rabbits, let’s take it easy for now. We have to believe in Xiang Yi!”

The quality of the Spicy Rabbits was extremely high. After some guidance, most of them calmed down except for a small number who were much more excited.

‘That’s right, we have to trust Xiang Yi.’

…

On the other hand, Ms. Cen bought herself several places on the hot search list and for a while, she was in the limelight on Weibo as her number of fans began to rise rapidly.

…

At this moment, in the Xiang family’s group chat.

Xiang Qi, who liked to surf the Internet forwarded a Weibo post to the group and sent a large number of angry emojis.

[Third Treasure]: This is really infuriating. What a pure breed fool. I want to smash a sewing machine at her!

[Third Treasure]: Who changed the group nickname? It’s so tacky! Come out to die!

[Big Treasure]: Xiang Yi changed it.

[Third Treasure]: “Third Treasure” has withdrawn a message.

[Third Treasure]: Wow! The name Xiang Yi gave the group is so cute, warm and loving! First Treasure, Second Treasure, Third Treasure, and Fourth Treasure… We’re an auspicious and happy family ~ @FirstTreasure, Big Brother, do you agree~ Big Brother, are you thirsty? Are you hungry?]

[Fourth Treasures]: … Third Brother, you have no modesty at all.

chapters.title: Chapter 496 - Hot Search Slaughter List (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 496 - Hot Search Slaughter List (1)

Xiang Chen did not reply.

Instead, Xiang Li sent a smiling emoji with an unknown meaning.

[Third Treasure]: Second Brother, don’t smile like this, I am scared / tears / tears

[Fourth Treasure]: Third Brother, don’t make a fool of yourself, maybe he’s not smiling at you.

[Third Treasure]: ????

Jokes aside, they had to protect their sister.

[Third Treasure]: Hmph, isn’t it just a hot search list? Anyone can be on it!

Soon after posting that, the hashtag #HadesPersonalShow made it to the top of the hot search list.

The fashion world was shocked to see it.

The fashion prodigy Hades, who had been on a hiatus for a long time, is coming back?!

Hades’ studio not only announced that he would be holding a show, but also released a collage of photos of clothing!

Each one of the designs was incredibly beautiful!

However, the studio stated that those were just the nine most unsatisfactory ones out of all the designs that Hades had made this time!

Instantly, all the bigwigs in the fashion circle shared the post but they were all attached with captions like: [????]

Countless fashion designers tearfully typed: [Is this what a prodigy is… I’d die without regrets if I can design something like that just once in my lifetime!]

The netizens’ comments also exploded.

—— [Crap, they’re gorgeous! Is there a link?]

—— [This year’s fashion style seems to have been redefined]

—— [Hades? What’s his relationship with seaweed strips (Hai Dai Si)? Are they biological brothers?]

Seeing that the netizens’ attention was shifting, Madam Cen couldn’t let go of the popularity so she splurged on another place on the hot search list again.

This time, the Spring Flower Foundation released a video interview with the female orphans. In the video, there were several girls with timid eyes who dodged the camera. However, from their mere words, one could feel their helplessness and heartache.

Coupled with the sensational music, artistic editing techniques, and the support of hot search traffic, the video quickly went viral.

The phrase “Spring Flower Foundation” once again occupied the first place in the hot search!

But within a few minutes, a new phrase appeared in the search, #LogicTeamWorldChampionships

The first to go viral was the gaming circle.

‘Damn!’

‘Championship?!’

‘No need to say anything, Logic is awesome! Just brag and it’ll all be over!!’

For a while, Weibo became a carnival for gaming fans.

Although ordinary netizens cannot understand the gameplay clips, this was the World Championship! A world tournament!!!

No matter what, they deserved to be praised for emerging as champions in the world tournament!!

In particular, when the video of Logic’s five-man team receiving the award on stage went viral, the popularity reached a terrifying level!

—— [Ahhhhh who is the brother in the center position!?]

—— [*Screams* Such a good-looking face! Are you sure you’re not debuting as an idol?]

—— [Damn it, his side profile and height are so attractive. When his teammate hugged him,his shirt was lifted and his abs were revealed. Isn’t this the standard starter pack of an e-sports idol!?!]

…

Ms. Cen watched as the position on the hot search list that she bought, dropping to the bottom!

She called the staff to question but the other party gave a very vague reply, “We can’t help with that. Their position on the hot search list comes from real traffic. Our server is almost down…”

In other words, they were trying to tell her that they were not to blame for her fake popularity.

Ms. Cen was speechless for a while and she soon said in frustration, “I’ll pay you more money! You have to make sure that I stay within the top three!!”

The staff agreed, thinking that since her position on the hot search list had already been pushed down twice, she…probably wouldn’t be that unlucky.

chapters.title: Chapter 497 - Hot Search Slaughter List (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 497 - Hot Search Slaughter List (2)

Chapter 497: Hot Search Slaughter List (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

After paying the additional amount of money, Ms. Cen felt the pinch.

1

She was afraid that the money had gone down the drain, so she contacted Qin Wanyan and asked her to make sure she mentioned the Spring Flower Fund on the show, preferably by speaking directly to Xiang Yi.

Ms. Cen had realized that Xiang Yi was now a walking traffic generator!

1

As long as she was used to create a buzz, the Spring Flower Fund would definitely receive more donations!

2

After Qin Wanyan received the news, she got a little anxious.

Her last mention was already obvious enough. Wha if she invites trouble for herself if she were to post another one?

But…

Ms. Cen was introduced to her by Ling Ye, and she was still planning to use her to mingle with the circle of upper-class socialites.

For the sake of this valuable connection, Qin Wanyan gritted her teeth and made her mind up to be ruthless. She then tagged along behind Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi was confused.

Qin Wanyan said with a fake smile, “Xiang Yi, where are you going? I’ll accompany you.”

“The wine cellar.” She noticed that Tian Zhi liked peach wine very much, so she thought of bringing two altars for him and taking them away when she left.

2

All visitors are guests and her grandfather had always taught her since she was a child, to treat her guests with courtesy.

2

Hence, she was also polite to Qin Wanyan.

Little did she know that it gave Qin Wanyan the illusion that Xiang Yi was a pushover and that Xiang Yi wouldn’t hold it against her for what happened previously.

She affectionately went to take Xiang Yi’s arm, but Xiang Yi dodged effortlessly and smoothly.

1

“…” Qin Wanyan pretended to ruffle her hair to hide her embarrassment. She blinked her eyelids, which were covered with delicate eye makeup and asked, “Wow, Xiang Yi, you have a wine cellar at home! I’m so envious. My family has been poor since I was a child and they live in the village. We have a cellar at home too but it’s used for storing sweet potatoes…”

Qin Wanyan’s words had aroused the sympathy of many people.

2

They were both goddess-like women but their lives were worlds apart.

—— [Ah, Qin Wanyan is quite pitiful too. She started from the bottom and got to where she is now, unlike Xiang Yi who was just born with a golden spoon in her mouth]

—— [Oh, Xiang Yi is just being extravagant and lavish! Other people’s cellars are used to make a living, but hers is used for enjoyment and pleasure! Comparison really drives one mad!!]

—— [You are so rich, what’s wrong with doing some charity? No wonder they say that the richer, the stingier!]

…

The comments were full of scoldings and hateful remarks directed at Xiang Yi, as if it was a huge sin for her to go collect some wine.

Qin Wanyan started influencing others and by the time they reached the cellar, she was already parched.

The small system reminded her several times to not to speak more than she should because she tended to make mistakes when she was too talkative. However, Qin Wanyan would clap back at it again and again.

‘What kind of a lousy system is this? I’m the host, it should be listening to me!’

2

Right from the beginning, Xiang Yi had been rather indifferent towards her. She brought two jars of peach wine over for Tian Zhi and even politely asked Qin Wanyan if she wanted some of the wine she brewed.

Qin Wanyan didn’t like her wine at all as she was afraid that there might be bacteria that would cause her to get food poisoning after drinking it. Her eyes rolled around and her gaze soon landed on the wine shelf not far away.

She pointed to a bottle of red wine, on which there was some writing that she couldn’t understand. “Xiang Yi, can I have this?”

Xiang Yi said, “Sorry, the wine over there belongs to my brother’s collection. I can’t make decisions for them. The wine here are brewed by me, feel free to choose the ones that you want.”

Although the Xiang family siblings were close, they were very principled people. Even for Xiang Yi’s childhood toys, her brothers would never give them to other children without her permission.

Qin Wanyan pretended to be surprised and covered her mouth in shock. “Aren’t you very close to your family? Ah, I’m sorry, I’m being too talkative. It’s okay, Xiang Yi, I don’t want it….”

chapters.title: Chapter 498 - Hot Search Slaughter List (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 498 - Hot Search Slaughter List (3)

Chapter 498: Hot Search Slaughter List (3)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Her words seemed thoughtful and understanding, but in fact, they were provocative and she was clearly trying to sow discord.

The netizens listened and instantly thought, ‘In fact, the relationship between Xiang Yi and her brothers is not that close!’

2

Otherwise, why can’t she even give away a bottle of wine?

1

Unfortunately, Qin Wanyan underestimated the extent to which the Xiang family was protective of their fellow members…

Xiang Yi frowned and said, “Firstly, I don’t think this has any direct relation to whether our family is close-knit or not. Secondly, a good relationship does not mean that we can dispose of one another’s belongings at will. Moreover, perhaps things that I find useless hold precious and beautiful memories for my brother.”

Qin Wanyan was shocked speechless.

The Spicy Rabbits defended Xiang Yi against the hateful comments directed at her.

—— [Ahhhhh I totally support Xiang Yi’s values and worldviews!]

—— [Is there something wrong with Qin Wanyan? Did she forget that she had betrayed Xiang Yi? Xiang Yi may be nice to you but we won’t be nice. Go play your suona *smile* *smile*]

2

—— [The other day, my mother gave my favorite hairpin to my cousin and I was really angry. I cried and she reprimanded me for being stingy! I wish I had a family member like Xiang Yi]

1

There were also people who were so bored that they screenshotted a photo of the bottle of red wine to identify the brand. She then instantly sprung up from the sofa.

—— [The bottle of red wine that Qin Wanyan wanted costs six figures! How can she have the cheek to say that she wants it!?!]

1

All of a sudden, they had an extremely poor impression of Qin Wanyan.

1

Besides, Xiang Yi had already said that she would give her the wine she brewed on her own.

She would take whatever she was given.

Giving gifts to the host is the basic etiquette that is expected of guests, but not only did Qin Wanyan not give any gifts, she even took the initiative to ask for something. Uhh… this is a little inappropriate, right?

1

Qin Wanyan did not expect that the good image that she had easily painted for herself by playing the suona would disappear because of a few words!

It was right that the more one says, the more mistakes they tend to make.

However, Qin Wanyan didn’t feel anything at all. She pretended to be magnanimous and said, “Xiang Yi, you’re right. By the way, my friend recommended me to Spring Flower Fund and I think it’s quite reliable. Why don’t we donate some money together?”

Xiang Yi said, “Sorry, I’m not interested.”

Qin Wanyan said, “Ah, Xiang Yi said, I thought you were so kind that you would be willing to donate money to such a loving cause…”

1

Xiang Yi looked at Qin Wanyan with confusion in her eyes. ‘Why does she keep saying such strange things?’

1

Qin Wanyan was still trying to bring more attention to herself as she said, “Oops, maybe I’m too saintly. I can’t standing reading such news about society at all. Every time I see it, I want to help others…”

1

Xiang Yi found a basket, placed two small jars of wine into it and held it in one hand. “That’s not too bad. Being kind is to feel sorry for a person and want to help them. Being saintly is to demand that the whole world helps a single pitiful person.”

Qin Wanyan was secretly happy. ‘This dimwit Xiang Yi is actually praising me for my kindness?’

‘She’s really brainless.’

“In my opinion, the essence of charity is…” Xiang Yi revealed her understanding of charity. “I don’t have the right to make others do anything but I can decide what I do.”

In an instant, some netizens criticized her.

[But you didn’t do anything!

Seeing this scene, Ms. Cen, quickly had someone take a screen shot of those words that Xiang Yi said and posted them online out of context, not forgetting, of course, to include the key words like ‘Spring Flower Foundation’ and ‘Ms. Cen the loving philanthropist.’

#XiangYiSaidHelpingOthersIsASaintlyAct

#XiangYiLacksSympathyButQuestionsMs. Cen

Ms. Cen thought, ‘This time, I’m definitely going to be on the hot search list!’

2

However, she did not expect herself to drop several positions on the hot search list again….

chapters.title: Chapter 499 - Hot Search Slaughter List (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 499 - Hot Search Slaughter List (4)

Chapter 499: Hot Search Slaughter List (4)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The hot search list was full of topics about a news video that the official financial Weibo account posted.

“In the past two years, the development of our national businesses in the US has been repeatedly hampered, especially the recent banning of the products of Light of Tomorrow Technology Company which has aroused widespread concern from all walks of life. The company launched an intelligent AI voice wearable product that triggered a technological revolution in the field, but it was banned in the US for no reason…”

2

The reporter was standing in front of a magnificent building that looked like a court of law.

“In order to defend the legitimate and rightful rights of our national businesses, the Light of Tomorrow Technology Company has hired a team of excellent lawyers with Attorney Xiang of Lin Chen Law Firm as the core member. Today is the day of the court trial and more than six hours have passed since the trial started… Ah! I see Attorney Xiang!!”

1

A large number of reporters flocked to the scene. Some belonged to local media firms and some were from foreign media platforms.

Xiang Chen stood in the crowd. Even if he wasn’t standing in the center, he would attract the most attention.

Even after a long trial, he still looked as suave as ever and there wasn’t a single trace of fatigue on her face.

1

The tailor-made dark-colored suit outlined his broad shoulders and long legs. His tie was tied meticulously and his hair was all gathered back, looking like an elite model. He looked down and adjusted his cuffs while the people around him seemed to be talking to him. He was frowning an listening attentively.

The reporters had already crowded in front of the lawyers in a flash.

Numerous microphones and cameras were aimed at Xiang Chen.

“Attorney Xiang, what is the outcome?”

“Attorney Xiang, how is your mood now?”

“Attorney Xiang, do you have anything to say?”

“…”

Xiang Chen looked up. His chiseled face was just like God’s careful carving.

“We won the case,” he said indifferently.

The audience cheered.

Some people were so excited that they threw their hats and jackets up into their air while screaming.

The reporter from the financial channel could not control his emotions and began sobbing. He exclaimed, “We’ve obtained a big victory in the court trial! The Chinese tech industry wins!”

The video was fixed at a scene where Xiang Chen’s thin lips were slightly curled.

Even though he was describing the most exciting moment, he had a calm and quiet smile on his face.

He was like icicles on the snowy lands that were gradually getting melted by the sunlight.

He somehow touched the hearts of many.

The netizens in the comment section were already crying.

—— [We would have been beaten up if we fell behind! But we have become stronger!]

—— [The legal team has worked really hard! I heard that Attorney Xiang did a lot of work for this case. He’s really impressive!]

—— [Ooooo while looking at Attorney Xiang laughing, I’m crying like a dog in front of the screen. Despite withstanding so much pressure, he can still stay so calm and composed. Attorney Xiang, respect!!!!]

…

That Weibo post had undoubtedly made it to the hot search list within seconds, causing the position that Miss Cen had bough, to be pushed all the way down!!

Miss Cen was on the verge of a breakdown so he called, “Is this how you get the job done? Why has my position on the hot search list dropped to the bottom!?!”

The staff was feeling helpless too. “This is a big event… Such a sensational thing has stirred up everyone’s zeal. The real-time traffic and popularity is simply not something we can control…”

“…” Ms. Cen mellowed down and said wearily, “In that case, bump me up to the top five. Nothing must go wrong this time!”

After all, Qin Wanyan would be participating in the stream of “Two Under One Roof” for one day so after tomorrow, there wouldn’t be such a great opportunity to promote the Spring Flower Fund anymore.

Before she finished, the staff said, “Uh… I’m afraid I can’t guarantee that because…there’s a new topic on the hot search list…”

Miss Cen: ???

chapters.title: Chapter 500 - Hot Search Slaughter List (5)
chapters.body:
