Chapter 500 - Hot Search Slaughter List (5)

Chapter 500: Hot Search Slaughter List (5)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

She opened Weibo, and as expected, the fourth place of the hot search list was occupied by a single phrase.

#OverseasVersionOfTwoUnderOneRoofBecomesHugeHit

Miss Cen: …

‘What the hell is this?!’

Clicking on the hashtag, she found that the details of it were that the overseas version of “Two Under One Roof” had seen a huge success and was the top stream on various major video websites and media platforms overseas after its broadcast at 12 midnight.

The total number of plays exceeded more than a billion!

1

Recently, there had been a tremendous development of variety shows in various countries, and most of the time, local variety show producers would try and get the rights of franchise of foreign variety shows. Although there were also local variety shows that were big hits in the country, they did not have a high impact in the international stage.

This time, “Two Under One Roof” had done the opposite!

For the first time, a Chinese variety show had a huge impact on the international scene!

The comments at the bottom were all over the place.

—— [Ah this, is this real data?

—— [Damn it, lousy little variety show is actually so impressive! It’s not convenient to watch the live stream abroad. The internet connection speed is too slow and I have been watching the compilation of highlights and short clips of the original video. I cannot imagine that there is an official version! Hurry up and support it!]

—— [I translated a few of the most liked comments on foreign video sites, everyone, take a look for yourselves.

“Mysterious cooking techniques from the East!”

1

“This little elf meets all my imagination of Chinese cuisine”

“So this is the difference between land and sea civilization. I’m so envious of such a beautiful idyllic life, God please, let me go experience it once in my lifetime!

…

All the program teams of major variety shows sent their blessings to “Two Under One Roof”.

Even the official Weibo account of Muyao TV, also sent a comment: [May the variety shows in China become better and better].

To matter how fierce the competition is in the country, the foreigners are always the common enemy!

1

“Two Under One Roof” is a fight for the glory of Chinese variety shows! How can they be a stumbling block at such a critical juncture?

Of course, they still had to compete in private and would also attack each other when necessary…

However, the major variety show program teams reached a rare but unanimous harmony.

The netizens also felt honored and proud, thinking that they had a really enjoyable time surfing the Internet today.

There was so much gossip!

The popularity of the Spring Flower Fund dropped again and again, and was now temporarily staying at the fifth position. Ms. Cen thought she should barely be able to keep this position so she refreshed the page, only to find that the position of the words about the Spring Flower Fund, dropped again!

Miss Cen was flabbergasted!

She watched as the top spot in the search was dropped!

That’s right, it plunged!

Ms. Cen went to ask around and realized that this position was reserved for news about major scientific research discoveries or national news!

As long as the conditions are met, they would get her the position! No matter how much money she had to spend, she wouldn’t let her position to be bumped to the bottom!

In other words, the first position meant the willpower of the officials!

1

# XiangLiNominatedForTheNobelPrizeInMedicine

[@NanchengDaily: Dr. Xiang Li has discovered a new component of the drug for cancer treatment, sea primrose. Detailed scientific results can be found in the latest issue of the thesis “The Lancet” Like, share, and congratulate Dr. Xiang!]

…

As soon as the post was released, there was a huge uproar on Weibo!

… ‘It’s the Nobel Prize!?!’

Some people doubted its authenticity but they immediately faced some backlash.

—— [Are you blind? It’s already been officially recognized!!]

—— [I’ve just checked the thesis and it’s of such a high standard. It’s something that I will never be able to write in all my life. I’m looking up to the big boss in a lowly manner now…]

—— [Hey, have you guys discovered that the hot search list on Weibo has been occupied by Xiang Yi and her brothers today!?!]

chapters.title: Chapter 501 - : This Is My Boyfriend, @Shisui
chapters.body:
Chapter 501 - : This Is My Boyfriend, @Shisui

Everyone seemed to have woken up from a dream.

The hot search for Logic’s battle team was not obvious yet but Hades had clearly made it public himself!

Needless to say for Xiang Chen, he almost never accepts any interviews from reporters but this time, he accepted it for the first time.

As for Xiang Li… Nominations for the Nobel Prize in Medicine are usually kept confidential unless the nominee himself is willing to disclose!

Could it be that… he has casually publicized the news of being nominated, just to help protect his sister and suppress other news on the hot search list?

The speculation seemed a little too unbelievable, but…

It was definitely true.

…

The netizens on the were discussing incessantly but Xiang Yi’s family had already started a childish “competition”.

[Third Treasure]: Ahhh you guys are such copy cats! How dare you all copy me!

[Fourth Treasure]: Isn’t it very normal for one to make it to the hot search list after winning a competition?

[Third Treasure]: Psht! Don’t think I don’t know that you deliberately showed off your abs in front of the camera!

[Fourth Treasure]: … It was an accident.

[Second Treasure]: Copycat? *smile*

[Third Treasure]: You… you are!

[Big Treasure]: ?

Seeing that his eldest brother, Xiang Chen, had typed a question mark, Xiang Qi, who was in front of the screen, shivered and quickly tapped the ‘delete’ button.

Then, he received a prompt that told him that the message cannot be deleted.

“God is going to kill me…” Xiang Qi wailed, having a strong feeling that he would definitely be beaten up if he were to see his eldest brother again next time.

…

Xiang Yi returned to the living room with the wine while Shi Sui handed her phone to her. “Your phone has been ringing.”

“Huh?”

‘Could it be that someone is looking for me urgently?’

Xiang Yi took it and found that it was a group message that kept vibrating.

It was her third brother, Xiang Qi, sending out all kinds of kneeling, begging and miserable crying emojis.

The corners of the young lady’s mouth curled up as she sent an adorable picture.

[Little Treasure]: Your_little_cutie_suddenly_appeared.jpg

In an instant…

Xiang Yi’s brothers began chatting incessantly in the group chat.

[Fourth Treasure]: Xiang Yi, I won the game, and also emerged as the MVP. I’ll give you the trophy when I go home.

[Third Treasure]: Sister, Sister! I made you a new skirt and shoes! And socks with lace, too!

[Second Treasure]: Little Rabbit, how is your injury?

[Big Treasure]: Make sure to get enough rest.

Seemingly feeling that he did not show enough concern to his sister, Xiang Chen frowned during the celebratory banquet. He typed seriously as if he was dealing with a complex case.

[Big Treasure]: Bunny, drink more hot water.

…

Looking at her brothers’ concern for her, Xiang Yi felt a warm and fuzzy feeling in her heart. She shared her recent daily routine with her brothers, and also posted a few photos to prove that she was twice as fit and in a good mood.

She sent five photos and every man in front of the screen, began to save his sister’s photos without exception.

Four of them discovered that something was wrong as they saved the pictures.

[Fourth Treasure]: How com all the photos are with Brother Shi Sui?

[Third Treasure]: Ahhhh I’m so angry, how is that dog-like man worthy of taking pictures with Xiang Yi!?!

[Second Treasure]: /smile/smile

[Big Treasure]: Hah

…

Seeing her brothers’ replies, Xiang Yi shivered and finally realized what was going on.

However, she couldn’t be blamed because recently, the photos on her phone were all photos taken with Shi Sui…

She rarely took photos of herself and most of the photos were taken by Shi Sui or the staff members. It couldn’t be helped because her boyfriend really liked taking photos and she had no choice but to pamper him.

Little did she know that Shi Sui had long been prepared for it…

Xiang Yi put her fingers together and hesitated for a few seconds before making a bold operation.

[System Alert]: Little Treasure has invited Shi Sui to join the group chat.

[Big Treasure]: ?

[Second Treasure]: ??

[Third Treasure]: ????

[Fourth Treasure]: ????

In the next second…

[Little Treasure]: Allow me to introduce to everyone, this is my boyfriend @Shi Sui *Rose* *Rose*

chapters.title: Chapter 502 - Hello Brothers~~~
chapters.body:
Chapter 502 - Hello Brothers~~~

Chapter 502: Hello Brothers~~~

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

There was a huge uproar in the Xiang family’s group chat.

Xiang Chen and Xiang Li could still remain calm but Xiang Yu and Xiang Qi had already gone mad.

A gaming god, a sewing expert, two people with amazing typing speed who can send more than 99 messages within minutes…

If not for Shi Sui who had spoken up, they would have probably already raised the number of notifications to “999+”…

[Shi Sui]: Hello, Brothers ~~~~

2

The fluctuating waves successfully made her brothers grit their teeth.

In the eyes of Xiang Yi…

The young girl rested her cheeks in her hands and felt that her boyfriend was really cute. Even the messages he sent were adorable.

1

She shook her little feet and seriously edited a message.

[Little Treasure]: Shi Sui is the man I like and my brothers are my most important family members. To me, we are a close-knit family that loves each other. /handshake/handshake

1

‘Love each other?’

‘Love each other, my ass!’

2

The expressions of Xiang Yi’s brothers who were in front of their respective screens, became extremely sullen.

1

…

Xiang Yi rested on the balcony.

The program team set up a safe area where the celebrities could go to to rest for a while if they were tired from the live stream.

Propping himself up against the railing with both hands, Shi Sui climbed over effortlessly and suavely. He sat down on the rattan chair beside Xiang Yi and said softly, “Why are you suddenly giving me a proper status?”

Xiang Yi stared at him suspiciously. “Boyfriend, why do I feel that you were really skilled when you climbed over the balcony…”

1

Shi Sui’s face remained unchanged. “I acted in a similar scene previously. After doing it several times, I managed to master it.”

“I see…” Xiang Yi blinked and asked with some embarrassment, “Do you do not want to make our relationship public? I just think it’s not a good idea to hide it from the brothers…”

“I listen to Xiang Yi.” Shi Sui lowered his eyelashes, “Xiang Yi can do whatever she wants to me.”

1

Xiang Yi’s ears were flushed and she said, “Then… are you not afraid that I will do bad things to you…”

1

Shi Sui looked up at her and asked with a gentle smile, “What bad thing do you want to do, Xiang Yi? Can you give me some teasers?”

1

Xiang Yi’s ears turned even redder and she waved her hands, “I-I was just talking nonsense.”

‘Oops, I can’t lead Shi Sui astray.’

1

The young girl looked down at her phone and found a few more messages in the group.

[Big Treasure]: Bunny, I booked a midnight flight back home.

[Second Treasure]: Little bunny, I’ll come to you after I collect the Nobel Prize.

[Third Treasure]: Once I finish sewing the last dress for Xiang Yi, I’m going to kill you, Shi Sui!!!

[Fourth Treasure]: Sister, wait for me to meet you with the trophy. By the way, what is the effect of smashing a human with a trophy like?

3

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘My brothers don’t seem to like Shi Sui very much…’

1

‘Why is that so? Shi Sui is clearly so nice.’

1

The young girl blamed herself and said self-reproachingly, “Sorry, if I had known earlier, I would not have added you to the group…”

Shi Sui gently rubbed her fingertips as he held her hand and said, “Xiang Yi, I’m very glad that you took me to see my family. I just feel… that I have gained a few more family members.’”

1

Shi Sui, who had grown up all alone without his parents by his side, began thinking of the strained kinship of the Shi family. Xiang Yi suddenly got a little sad and slipped her slender fingers through his equally slender fingers. She then firmly interlocked fingers with him.

“This is just a meeting on the internet. Next time, I’ll take you to meet them in life.” The young girl firmly promised, “I will definitely protect you!”

Shi Suiwas slightly stunned and joy immediately appeared in his dark eyes. He said gleefully, “Xiang Yi, you’re really nice.”

Xiang Yi said, “You’re very nice too.”

Shi Sui chuckled. “Are we…praising each other?”

Xiang Yi shook her head and said, “Complimenting my boyfriend is the right thing to do!”

Bang!

He felt as if his heart had been targeted by a sniper.

3

Shi Sui understood that he had nowhere to run.

He also never wanted to escape, ever.

chapters.title: Chapter 503 - Really Fallen For Her
chapters.body:
Chapter 503 - Really Fallen For Her

…

…

The program team handed out a vegetable harvesting mission card.

Tian Zhi was particularly interested in planting and harvesting vegetables. He dragged his two young apprentices to the vegetable garden.

Ling Ye was physically weaker so he was already panting badly after walking such a short distance.

"You should take the doctor's advice and exercise more," Tian Zhi mouth said. Although he sounded stern, he was actually very worried for Ling Ye. Thus, he quickly handed him a piece of tissue.

"… Thank you, Master." Ling Ye had always been reluctant to accept the kindness of others. He thought that he would have to leave sooner or later anyway. However, perhaps because he had been influenced by Xiang Yi, he suddenly found Tian Zhi to be rather likable.

He and Tian Zhi had a chat about planting vegetables while placing the vegetables that they had picked, into the basket.

Qin Wanyan disliked the two of them and so she didn't want to join in.

She stood aside in the shade under the tree, worried about the getting her shoes dirtied by the vegetable garden. She even constantly sprayed some sunscreen onto her skin, for fear that she would get tanned from the ultraviolet light.

The more "sophisticated" she was, the more displeased the audience.

—— [Qin Wanyan has no professionalism at all. Seriously, you are filming a variety show. Yet, you're afraid of the sun and getting dirtied by the ground]

—— [Even Ling Ye is harvesting tomatoes out there. Qin Wanyan is not going to do anything, huh?]

—— [Qin Wanyan is so lazy. Xiang Yi's hand is fractured so she had to carry the wine in one hand. Qin Wanyan didn't even help.]

…

Even though there was a small system to remind Qin Wanyan to do some chores, Qin Wanyan still wasn't willing to move.

'Oh please, I'm the Chosen One. Who wants to do such dirty and laborious task?'

'Isn't it enough to have a beautiful face?'

'Why do I need to be hardworking?'

'I'm not going to be as stupid as Xiang Yi who finds tasks to do when there's clearly nothing to do, out of her own accord!'

Besides, with Ms. Cen promising her resources, what else did she need to worry about?

Qin Wanyan eagerly opened the chat window with Ms. Cen, only to find that she didn't reply to her messages.

What happened?

'Didn't she promise to take me to the tea parties that many socialites are attending!?!'

Qin Wanyan was flustered and she frantically opened Weibo, only to be dumbfounded.

What's up with this hot search…?

Not only were the first five hot searches occupied by other news, there were also other phrases which almost filled up the top 20 hot searches!

What does it mean to top the charts!?!

That's it! Yes!

…

The vegetable harvesting task was completed.

Dejected and lost, Qin Wanyan followed Tianzhi and Lingye back.

Seeing that Ling Ye was struggling a little, Tian Zhi suggested, "Wanyan, you can share some of the load for Ling Ye."

Ling Ye declined, "That's not necessary, Master, I'm still strong enough to carry it."

Qin Wanyan went along with it. "I won't be polite with you then."

The netizens were dumbfounded.

'Such a cute and pitiful angelic boy. You must have a heart of steel to be able to say such heartless things to him!'

They happened to run into Shi Sui and Xiang Yi on the way to Little Rabbit Farms.

The two of them drove the bumper cars that they got from nowhere. It was somewhat tough for Shi Sui, who always wore high fashion apparel and had an extraordinary appearance, to bend his long legs in the cartoon bumper car. He then slowly followed behind Xiang Yi's bumper car.

He never seemed to mind accompanying Xiang Yi to do some childish things.

Seeing that Ling Ye was panting heavily, she furrowed her brows, jumped out of the car and went to Ling Ye. "Give me the basket."

Ling Ye subconsciously said, "I am a man…"

Swish-

Not giving him a chance to reject at all, she effortlessly carried the basket, shook it relaxedly, and said, "Kids shouldn't be carrying such heavy things, or your growth will be stunted."

She tossed the bumper car keys to Ling Ye and said, "Drive it back."

Ling Ye's Adam's apple rolled.

"…"

'F*ck. It's over.. I've really fallen for her.'

chapters.title: Chapter 504 - So Sister Xiang Yi Gets Shy So Easily? (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 504 - So Sister Xiang Yi Gets Shy So Easily? (1)

Ling Ye wanted to pull some scheming tricks on Xiang Yi at first but now, he had completely dismissed all thoughts of doing so.

He subconsciously felt that those dirty and filthy things should not appear in front of Xiang Yi.

Qin Wanyan said in an untimely manner, "Xiang Yi, why are you so nice to Ling Ye?"

For a moment, Tian Zhi's expression was extremely sullen.

Even though he admired Qin Wanyan's talent in playing the suona, he couldn't tolerate her low emotional quotient!

Shi Sui stepped on the brakes of the bumper car and turned the steering wheel lazily every now and then. His deep-set eyes were slightly squinted behind the lenses as he firmly fixed his gaze on the young girl.

Xiang Yi said in a tone full of bewilderment, "Isn't it expected of an adult to take care of children? Besides, he's a kid who's here at my place as a guest for the first time."

Qin Wanyan looked at the 1.8-meter-tall Ling Ye and burst into laughter. "Him? He's considered a kid?"

"All underage people are kids," Xiang Yi said.

Ling Ye suddenly had a warm sensation in his heart.

Others did not understand Xiang Yi's logic but Shi Sui understood it very well.

Xiang Yi had always been treated as a little child by her family until she became an adult. She had grown up in a sheltered environment where everyone pampered her. That was why she wasn't stingy with her kindness towards others.

Reason being in her world, it was naturally the right thing to do.

Some netizens watching the live stream felt a strong urge.

—— [I'll stand for a second, just one second.]

—— [Ling Ye is so obedient and meek in front of Xiang Yi! I stan!!!]

—— [Gentle Older Girl X Sickly Boy. I love such romance that's centered around redemption!]

There were also netizens who have come to a sudden realization.

—— [I suddenly understand why Xiang Yi is so nice to meek and docile pretty boys. It turns out that she simply treats them as kids!]

…

After comparing the emotional quotient of Xiang Yi to that of Qin Wanyan, Tian Zhi let out a long sigh.

'Forget it. No one is perfect.'

After all, she was his apprentice and he thought that she was just insensible. She could just teach him slowly in the future.

However, Tian Zhi suddenly had a trace of puzzlement in his heart at this moment.

'Just why did I impulsively take Qin Wanyan in as an apprentice?'

He had seen lots of young and talented people with great potential over the years but when Qin Wanyan finished playing the suona the other day, he seemed to have been bewitched as he immediately decided to break his usual rule, and took her in as his apprentice.

'This is really odd.'

…

Ling Ye got inside the bumper car and felt an urge to start driving but he hesitated again after glancing at the the basket in the young girl's hand. "Sister Xiang Yi, can you carry such a heavy load on your own?"

Xiang Yi said, "I won't be the one carrying it."

Qin Wanyan shrieked and said, "Xiang Yi, I'm not criticizing you but how can you let Shi Sui do this kind of thing…"

Before she finished her pretentious speech, Xiang Yi fished out her cell phone and fiddled with it twice. Soon, a cute robot came out from a nearby room, dragging a small cart behind it.

Xiang Yi placed the basket on the robot which then hummed a nursery rhyme as it moved towards the set destination with a basket full of vegetables.

"Humans are the most remarkable creatures on earth. We learned to cook and developed intelligence through evolution. We started learning to make and use tools, but the unbelievable thing is that we often choose not to use them."

After Xiang Yi finished saying that, she looked at Qin Wanyan and imitated Tian Zhi as she said, "I don't mean to be harsh or hostile. There's no sarcasm in my words either, I'm only expressing the literal meaning without any implied meaning. The above expression only represents my personal views and is not intended to trigger a debate and encroachment on public resources. Please forgive me for any inappropriate language used."

Qin Wanyan's face instantly turned red!

'What does this mean? Is she mocking me and calling me brainless!?!'

chapters.title: Chapter 505 - So Sister Xiang Yi Gets Shy So Easily? (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 505 - So Sister Xiang Yi Gets Shy So Easily? (2)

Hearing Xiang Yi rebutting others, the Spicy Rabbits watching the livestream were elated.

—— [Hahahaha as expected of Xiang Yi. What a good rebuttal!]

—— [The importance of studying is really shown here. Xiang Yi is so impressive, unlike me. All I do is curse my heart out]

—— [That's right. Qin Wanyan can totally find a tricycle or something to help. She didn't get any work done and yet, she's making sarcastic remarks. Um… Is she here to be a guest or what?]

…

Qin Wanyan thought about it for a long time and finally found an excuse to turn it down. Without even looking at her, she immediately walked toward ShiSui's bumper car.

Xiang YiShe noticed that Shi Sui was driving a two-seater bumper car.

She didn't know if it was by chance or necessity.

"Pretty boy, can I take a ride?" The young lady seemed unperturbed, but in fact she was so shy that her fingertips curled up slightly.

Shi Sui smiled and said, "Your Highness, please."

Xiang Yi grinned and did a curtsy before getting into the bumper car.

The interaction between the two was really natural and sweet. The netizens who shipped the cult couple had a vivid interpretation of what an instant defection was.

—— [Kam! I'm dead, I'm dead!!!]

—— [Xiang Yi's brothers are driving too, sisters!]

—— [Oooh I'm so envious of this kind of interaction where my joke is continued after me. I will be picked up after throwing the stems, the way Shi Sui and Xiang Yi get along is really too comfortable!]

…

Shi Sui started the car, placed his bony hand on the cartoon steering wheel. They were pale, slender, and kind of good-looking. Those who took screenshots loved pretty-looking hands.

"Sister…" Ling Ye mumbled.

Xiang Yi looked over in confusion. "Yes?"

The young man's skin was a little pale, and his lips were red too. His body was thin, and he seemed to be able to be blown away by the wind.

However, his amber eyes contained a burning gaze.

All of it, however, was extremely well hidden by Ling Ye.

"Sister Xiang Yi, come back early. I will be good and wait for you." The young man titled his head with a smile as he stood in front of a gorgeous sea of flowers and a flowing fountain. White doves were flying up into the sky. It was as if he was an angel that descended on the mortal world.

It was as if it was the cleanest and purest smile in the world.

Many people in the pop-up comments were screaming.

[What a soft and obedient boy, I totally like him!!!]

However, Xiang Yi's response to Ling Ye was just an indifferent assent.

Ling Ye: "…"

The young man looked down despondently, standing against the light. He slipped into dark shadows, looking rather lonely.

Tian Zhi let out another sigh.

'Why are these two apprentices so worrisome?

The four sufferings of life, greed, anger, hatred, love and separation, and the inability to seek.

'Kid, you're going to suffer greater if you don't withdraw soon.'

Seeing how pitiful Ling Ye was, Xiang Yi moved her lips in a bid to tell him that there were snacks in the living room. However, Shi Sui started the car and drove forth without even turning around.

The young girl cocked her tiny face to the side and said "You're speeding over the limit."

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows. "Is there a traffic law here?"

"Yes." Xiang Yi pointed to herself and said seriously, "This is my home, I call the shots."

Shi Sui slowed down the car.

Xiang Yi quipped, "That's good. It will be dangerous if you drive fast."

The Untimely Couple's fans had their hearts sink when they saw that scene.

'Xiang Yi is not treating Shi Sui as a kid too, is she?'

'Don't, no please, don't!"

Wouldn't that become the existence that Shi Sui likes!?

In the next second…

Shi Sui chuckled and said, "Okay, Sister~"

Xiang Yi was speechless.

She looked at Shi Sui in disbelief with her eyes wide open.

The man's voice was muffled as it rang in her flushed ears.

"So Sister Xiang Yi gets shy so easily too, huh?"

chapters.title: Chapter 506 - Double Standards
chapters.body:
Chapter 506 - Double Standards

The ending tone of his words was alluring and even more enchanting after he deliberately tried to suppress it.

Not only was Xiang Yi stunned.

The netizens watching the live stream went mad.

—— [This man is really so darned sweet. Ahhhh!]

—— [I'm in need of oxygen. Damn it, Shi Sui is so good at this!!]

—— [Crap, I never thought I would get giddy because of the simple word 'sister'. My legs have gone limp too. This is even more exhilarating than fake wine!!!]

…

Xiang Yi pinched her palm and her ears had already turned red but she was still vehement. "How…how can you call me sister!?! You're clearly older than I am!"

"Can't I call you sister just because I'm older than you?" The man asked rhetorically as a matter of course, and his low laughter sounded like currents of electricity, blossoming into a cackling little flower. "Sister, do you think I'm old?"

Xiang Yi was flabbergasted!

She took a deep breath, exhaled, and repeated several times before calming her overwhelming emotions.

"I don't. You…you can call me whatever you want." The young girl forced herself to play it cool and took out her phone. "I'll ask Ling Ye what they want to eat tonight…"

She forgot that she had already blocked Ling Ye.

However, Shi Sui did not know that she had blocked him and instead squinted slightly. He turned the steering wheel and said aggrievedly in a soft but hoarse voice, "I'm not good enough? Why don't you ask me what I want to eat, Sister?"

Xiang Yi's hand shook, almost dropping the phone.

She swallowed, "You don't call me sister…"

"Oh? But didn't you just say that it's okay to call you whatever I want?"

"…"

Xiang Yi suddenly felt that she had dug a pit for herself and jumped into it without hesitation.

The redness of her ears spread to her fair, swanlike neck, her perfectly right-angled shoulder, and slender back. Xiang Yi put on the hood of her jacket and asked, "Then…In that case, what do you want to eat?"

"I want to eat…" Shi Sui said lazily. "Sister…"

The netizens in the live room were flabbergasted.

'What an ultimate couple, they're displaying their affection in public!!'

'Want to eat Sister?'

'What kind of lecherous words are those!?!'

After a short while, Shi Sui slowly said, "I'll think about it."

—— [You don't need to think about it! Just eat Sister Xiang Yi!!]

—— [A friendly reminder, rabbit meat taste excellent when roasted or barbecued!]

—— [Yes, yes, eating in the study, kitchen, and by the window would all be delicious!!]

The pop-up comments were appearing extremely rapidly.

To Xiang Yi, the word 'sister' was just like a precise shot to his heart.

"Well…" The young girl covered her face with her hands, unable to deal with it at all. "You…take your time to think, I want to get off for a walk."

"You're already in my car, you still want to run?" Shi Sui laughed and said, "It's too late."

Hearing this sentence, the netizens felt that they had had too much sugar today!

…

The scene switched to the yard.

Tian Zhi was so exhausted that he was painting heavily. He touched his cup, only to realize that it was already empty.

Qin Wanyan pretended not to see it and played with her phone.

Tian Zhi wanted to say something, but eventually chose not to.

Ling Ye, however, stood up to pour Tian Zhi a cup of water.

The pop-up comments that were targeted at Qin Wanyan surged over like a flood. Qin Wanyan was indignant and she began to talk about Xiang Yi's fraudulent donations.

Unfortunately, no one will buy it this time.

A Spicy Rabbit questioned: [Even if Xiang Yi did not do charity, has Qin Wanyan done any charity?]

Qin Wanyan's fans weren't confident enough.

[Fairy Qin isn't born to a wealthy family, unlike Xiang Yi!]

Another Spicy Rabbit asked: [Have you done charity then? *smile*]

Qin Wanyan's fan: [I… I'm just an ordinary person!]

The netizens: ????

'Aren't these double standards!?!'

chapters.title: Chapter 507 - Plot Twist
chapters.body:
Chapter 507 - Plot Twist

They're both humans. Why must Xiang Yi be compelled to do charity while Qin Wanyan can get away with a hundred excuses?

The Spicy Rabbits quickly caught the loopholes in the haters' words and counterattacked with it.

—— [Your reason for attacking Xiang Yi is that Xiang Yi doesn't do charity. Well then, what have you done yourselves?]

—— [Xiang Yi did not steal, rob, or break the law. She comes from a family of elites who all rely on their own hands to make money. It's up to them to decide if they want to donate or not]

—— [That's hilarious. Seems like you're very good at practicing double standards. Xiang Yi is injured but she's still so diligent. What about your Qin Wanyan? She won't even pour a cup of water for her master. What a nice girl~]

…

Qin Wanyan's fans gradually lost the upper hand.

…

In the living room.

Qin Wanyan waited anxiously for Ms. Cen's reply but she didn't receive anything after waiting for a long time.

She opened her Weibo, only to immediately see that there were all kinds of comments about her!

Qin Wanyan was confused.

'Why are all the netizens scolding me?'

When she saw the comments slamming her for being emotionless and lazy, and that her fans were disgusting… Qin Wanyan began to panic.

She came to participate in "Two Under One Roof" with the intention to get more fans, not lose fans!

'Oh right…'

'Xiang Yi embezzled donations!'

Her eyes were rolling and she wanted to continue making an issue out of this matter so she pretended to have a "slip of the hand" and liked the post about Xiang Yi faking donations of the Spring Flower Fund.

However…

Meanwhile…

A user named "Brilliant Mountain Flower" published a long Weibo post that went viral.

[@BrilliantMountainFlower: I saw the news of Sister @XiangYi being accused of lying about making donations today and I found it unbelievable. So, I watched the replay of the live stream and realized that she didn't say she had donated money. I really don't know why the meaning of her words was misinterpreted. The elementary school in our mountain village was built with the money she donated a few years ago, and the school is very clean and beautiful.]

[She is really a meticulous and kindhearted person. She not only helped us build the school, she also provides all three meals for free every single day. People who have not experienced severe hunger may not understand how happy it is to finally get to eat a full meal. Free toilet paper and sanitary napkins, which the girls can use at will, are also provided in the school's restrooms…]

[I'm really grateful. If it wasn't for her, I might not really get to use sanitary napkins during my period every month and have to end up using tissue paper instead… Once, I felt that having my period was a very shameful and costly thing. It's no exaggeration to say that it was Sister Xiang Yi, who gave me my dignity. I would like to say that she has really, really done a lot of kind deeds. May there be a little more kindness, gentleness, and wonderful things in this world.

May there be more people like Sister Xiang Yi.]

…

This Weibo post was not only filled with plain and touching words, there were also photos.

Although the building in the photo was not as luxurious as the city, it was also clean and beautiful.

The bathroom was stocked with female supplies. Although they were of ordinary popular brands, they were enough to meet the needs of the young girls.

At first, the Spicy Rabbits were the ones who shared the post and after the popularity of the post rose, more and more people were surprised to find that the Xiang Yi really did not lie about donating and had indeed done charity!

After the first brave person spoke up, more and more people whom Xiang Yi had helped, stood forth too.

In the end, the netizens searched the Internet and found that Xiang Yi and her family had donated to dozens of elementary schools, orphanages, and public health organizations!

They would spend a massive amount of money on doing charity each year but her family had never actively publicized it!

What a big twist of events!

The Internet was in an uproar!

chapters.title: Chapter 508 - Plot Twist (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 508 - Plot Twist (2)

Xiang Yi and her family have actually been silently doing so much charity?

The crowd continued to enjoy the gossip, only to find that for the charities and foundations that the Xiang family, the details of the funds were clear, and follow-ups were made consistently.

For example, the price of each of the free meals supplied to the school and even the price per kilo of potatoes, peppers, and vegetables, would be publicized.

It was clear at a glance!

Clean and clear!

Seeing these, the netizens had mixed feelings.

When one is rich and free, they can easily do some chairty.

However, since they've done it to this extent, anyone can tell that it is definitely not a show!

Rather, they were sincere about it!

The netizens' comments, too, gradually tended to be objective:

—— [Frankly speaking, Xiang Yi and her family are quite good]

—— [Nowadays, you have to wait a while before reading the news because there may be a twist]

—— [She raised for providing free meals and free feminine products. How nice!]

…

Netizens followed the trail and found another fishy thing…

The Spring Blossom Fund had received so many donations, but it had never been publicized where the money goes?

Some people questioned this in the comments of Spring Flower Fund's Weibo account, but the comments were deleted in seconds!

The more they were deleted, the more backlash they caused!

The more people questioned, the more they threatened to report to the relevant departments. Hence, Ms. Cen got anxious and had a list made up and publicized.

As a result, the crowd took a look and were instantly dumbfounded.

[Sanitary napkins, 10 packs/person, 500 yuan.]

[Toilet paper, 10 packs/person, 200 yuan.]

…

The netizens were dumbstruck.

—— [50 yuan for a pack of tissues/towels? She's being overly charitable]

—— [Frankly speaking, instead of donating expensive imported feminine products to these girls, they could help more people by providing free affordable feminine products like they do in the school built by Xiang Yi!]

—— [… Am I the only one who thinks that there is something wrong with the list? This list is obviously confusing… I had previously done an asset evaluation for my company and I have seen the company's financial statements that state that each employee uses up an average of several thousand yuan worth of toilet paper each month! It's the procurement department being greedy]

…

Flaws tend to be emphasized through comparisons.

The Spring Flower Fund was originally well-received, but it tried to get clout from Xiang Yi and instead, it ended up spurring others to find the examples of charity that Xiang Yi had done.

In comparison, the Spring Flower Fund seemed less professional and proper.

Some industry PR firms have reported that the Spring Flower Fund spends tens of millions of dollars on marketing each year!

Netizens, especially those who have donated money to the Spring Flower Fund were enraged!

'We donate money so you can do charity work, not so you can use it to pay for marketing!'

Ms. Cen didn't escape the fate of being picked on, and with the help of the amazing netizens, all of her controversial history of being a mistress and engaging in pyramid schemes were exposed!

The people then realized that the Spring Flower Fund and Qin Wanyan's operation was out to frame Xiang Yi.

'Atrocious!'

'How dare they use us as a gun!'

The crowd worked together and first reported the Spring Flower Fund for breaking the law before flocking to Qin Wanyan's Weibo page!

…

Qin Wanyan's fans were aggressive at first but they were now put to shame just as terribly!

The fans she had left were already few and far between, and after this incident, even the most loyal fans came to their senses and unfollowed her!

…

…

When Qin Wanyan saw all this, her face was full of shock and fear.

She quickly sent another message to Ms. Cen, only to find that she had been blocked by the latter!

Qin Wanyan: !!!

chapters.title: Chapter 509 - Live Stream Sales? (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 509 - Live Stream Sales? (1)

The unprecedented sense of frustration and dejection overwhelmed her.

Qin Wanyan did not understand. In her opinion, she was obviously the Chosen One. Since she was chosen to be a transmigrator and was about to get a perfect life, why did it turn out like this?!

'It's Xiang Yi…'

'It's all because of Xiang Yi…'

'Why does she have to do so much charity?'

'If she hadn't done it, wouldn't this matter have not involved me?'

Qin Wanyan was full of resentment and she atributted all of i to Xiang Yi.

…

On the other hand…

The other side, Ms. Cen was also having a hard time. She had received a lot of calls from socialites and wealthy men's wives recently, all of whom were asking her about the situation of the Spring Flower Fund.

After a round of pushing things around, Ms. Cen was incredibly exhausted.

As a result, her phone rang again.

She picked it up and saw that it was from her assistant.

Ms. Cen picked it up impatiently and snapped, "What's the matter? Why do you have to bother me at this time?"

The assistant shivered and said, "Ms. Cen, it's not good, something terrible happened…."

…

On Weibo, a new melon broke out again.

The authorities released a Weibo post saying that they had begun to intervene in the investigation of the Spring Flower Fund's illegal fundraising case!

The netizens were in an uproar.

'Damn it, it seems that the Spring Flower Fund is really questionable!'

Otherwise, the word [case] would not have been used! It was the same as qualifying it as a violation of the law!

The Spring Flower Fund, which had created quite an uproar, could never have imagined that it would end up with such a fate!

Some netizens sighed and quoted a line from a play:

[Watching him build a building, watching him hold a feast for his guests, watching his building collapse]

Ms. Cen's social media platforms were suddenly deleted and it was as if she had suddenly vanished from the Internet.

The netizens speculated that she was probably afraid that her previous high-profile posts that were meant for showing off her wealth on Weibo would deleted.

Since it involved the law, she should never think of getting lucky.

…

…

Little Rabbit Farms.

Shi Sui parked the double bumper car. Xiang Yi leaped down lightly and the man behind her helplessly admonished, "Be careful."

"Got it."

Wang Shunli, the general manager of Little Rabbit Farms came over to greet her. "Miss Yi, you're here!Do you want to try the new products?"

Thanks to Xiang Yi who started the Little Rabbit Farms, the employment problem of many people was solved. After learning the techniques, they could leave to start their own businesses. Wang Shunli was genuinely grateful to Xiang Yi.

"Good." As soon as Xiang Yi took two steps out, she seemed to have recalled something and stopped in her tracks. She then turned around.

Wang Shunli was puzzled but he soon turned his head too. "What's the matter, Miss Yi?"

"I'm waiting for Shi Sui."

Wang Shunli was speechless.

'Why does it feel like Miss Yi is still a student and she's waiting for her best friends to go to the bathroom together?'

Shi Sui strode over towards Xiang smilingly.

Although there was no need for Xiang Yi to wait for him as he'd also be able to quickly catch up, the feeling of having someone waiting…

It really was different.

The Shisui Sisters in front of the screen keenly felt that Shi Sui seemed… more relaxed.

He had always treated others politely but with a sense of detachment. However, in front of Xiang Yi, he was particularly at ease.

Although he really did not want to admit it…

But he had to admit it…

Shi Sui genuinely liked Xiang Yi.

…

Wang Shunli brought the two of them over to an old tree where they sat down.

The tree canopy was lush and there were stone tables and stools. The clouds and breeze were particularly relaxing.

"These are the noodles we made according to Miss Yi's recipe. There are three flavors, noodles tossed with scallion oil, noodles tossed with meat sauce, and noodles tossed with special spicy sauce!"

Wang Shunli introduced the dishes one by one.

The netizens in the live stream room were excited,.

—— [Ahhhh finally a new product is coming!]

….

chapters.title: Chapter 510 - Live Stream Sales (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 510 - Live Stream Sales (2)

"Huh?" Xiang Yi was puzzled. "Is there a problem with the Internet?"

Wang Shunli refreshed the page, only to see that the status was still showing that the product had been de-listed in the online store.

He scratched his head with a look of confusion on his tanned face.

"Uh… I'll have someone take a look."

Wang Shunli was a professional-level talent when it comes to planting and growing crops but he wasn't very familiar with the business management of e-commerce stores.

"Could it be that one of the keywords has violated the guidelines or something, so the product was de-listed by the authorities?" Xiang Yi guessed.

The fans watching the live-stream were screaming.

—— [Xiang Yi, wake up! It's because the products have been sold out!

—— [How many years have you people been single? Why are you such fast-clickers? How come the stocks are all sold out when I've just opened the webpage!?]

—— [I'm crying, the goods sold out in 10 seconds. Even the items for sale at famous e-commerce stores don't sell this fast, right? Xiang Yi is almost on par as a live stream goods promoter!]

…

The technician quickly gave Wang Shunli a reply.

"Sold out?" Wang Shunli was confused, "We prepared a large stock of goods this time. There are several thousand items!"

The Little Rabbit Farms was complete in all aspects of the administrative procedures but in order to pursue the fineness of products, it was rather small in scale. Its output was almost equivalent to that of a small studio so a few thousand portions was really a lot.

Besides, the price of the tossed noodles this time wasn't cheap either.

A small bag goes at 38 yuan while a large one goes at 58 yuan. Wang Shunli also thought it would be a bit difficult to sell them.

A fan of Little Rabbit Farms criticized in the live stream comments:

[Wang Shunli, you have a serious misunderstanding of the word 'large'! A few thousand portions aren't enough for everyone! Quickly produce more! Do you have enough manpower at the factory? If you don't, I'll apply for a position at your factory now!]

Xiang Yi was quite shocked by the results too. She didn't pay much attention to the online store of Little Rabbit Farms as she didn't bother much about the revenue generated by it either. Most of the revenue from the online store was used as the research fund of Little Rabbit Farms.

"So our products are selling quite well, huh?" Xiang Yi said in shock.

The netizens were dumbfounded!

'Is this the trouble of a rich girl? She can't even handle her own business?!'

Wang Shunli said, "I'll go arrange the production plan then."

Xiang Yi said, "You don't have to rush the production but the quality must be ensured." After a pause, she tilted her head and asked Shi Sui, "What do you think?"

Wang Shunli froze and subconsciously looked at Shi Sui.

'Uh… This… Miss Yi is not only lusting over his body, she's also after his heart, isn't she!?!'

Shi Sui said in a warm voice, "Xiang Yi, everything you say is right. I'll go along with your decisions."

"Okay." Xiang Yi nodded and said, "It's settled then. I'll go back and refine the proportions of the chili oil recipe."

Wang Shunli was overjoyed. "The chili oil you make will definitely sell well, Miss Yi!"

He had tasted the chili oil made by Xiang Yi and it was absolutely delicious!

Once it was added to porridge, there wouldn't be a need for vegetables at all because it would make the porridge taste heavenly!

The fans who were foodies were excited but sad too.

They were excited because the goods produced by Little Rabbit Farms were definitely of the finest quality!

The upsetting thing was the shortage of supply. What kind of business is this?!

Hence, the comments in the live room became like this:

—— [Xiang Yi, I have money! Please take my money!]

—— [I have a friend who has cancer and wants to try Xiang Yi's chili oil while he's still alive *dog's head emoji*]

—— [Damn it, there are already people reselling the tossed noodles produced by Little Rabbit Farms, on a certain second-hand goods platform! The price for the smaller portioned packs have gone up to 200 yuan a pack!]

—— [Wow, it's so expensive, let's not buy it! They're just hyping up the price!]

—— [As if I'd believe you, you must have secretly placed an order yourself!!]

—— [Ahem, don't expose me]

The pop-up comments were rather harmonious, and the hashtag #WipedOutFromShelvesInTenSecondsHowScary made it to the tail of the hot search list….

chapters.title: Chapter 511 - Live Stream Sales? (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 511 - Live Stream Sales? (3)

"Huh?" Xiang Yi was confused.

—— [To the person who posted the comment above, wake up. The items sold in Little Rabbit Farms' online store are snapped up almost as soon as they're in stock. You have to be fast enough to snatch them. You can't just buy them because you want to / dog head / dog head]

…

In the midst of all the expectations, Wang Shunli tore open the packaging of the noodles.

The packaging of the noodles was in the usual design that Little Rabbit Farms adopted for all its products. It was simple and classy, with the cute exclusive rabbit logo printed on it.

The contents of the packet were a pack of noodles and a sachet of seasoning.

The packet of tossed noodles was a semi-finished product so the noodles had to be cooked and warmed up before consumption.

Wang Shunli prepared three small electric pots and asked, "Miss Yi, shall I cook it?"

Shi Sui naturally took the noodles and said, "I'll do it."

"No, no, no, you are a big star, how can you do this kind of work…" Wang Shunli was a little nervous, but when he saw Xiang Yi smiling while gazing at Shi Sui, he suddenly understood what was going on.

'Miss Yi looks at him in the same way she looks at spicy rabbit head!'

'Miss Yi is lusting over this man's body!!'

'But… this big star is really handsome. His nose and eyes are decent and his legs are long too.'

A silly and unpretentious smile gradually appeared on Wang Shunli's face…

…

The noodles were quickly cooked.

Shi Sui scooped the noodles into a bowl and added the seasoning mix.

The pale yellow soba noodles are sinewy and slender. After being mixed with the seasoning, they were bright and glistening.

"Taste it," Shi Sui said with a gentle gaze as he handed a pair of chopsticks to Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi first tried the scallion noodles and the first thing that wafted to her nose was the rich fragrance of spring onions. However, it didn't seem too greasy.

She nodded and commented, "The noodles are smooth, the scallions are fragrant, and there is an appropriate balance of sweetness and saltiness. Not bad."

The noodles in all three packages were the same. The difference lied in the seasoning.

Next, she tried the noodles with minced meat sauce.

The minced meat in the sauce was not too finely minced and the mouthfeel of chewing meat was still there. The pork used was a mix of fatty and lean parts, providing an appropriate fragrance.

"The sauce is on the sweet side. Those who like sweet food should like this." After giving her comments, Xiang Yi asked Wang Shunli to help send a carton of noodles to her uncle, Xiang Feng.

Lastly, there was the noodles mixed with spicy sauce.

The chili used in the sauce was a variety of peppers grown in the Little Rabbit Farms itself. It was spicy but more fragrant than ordinary chili pepper. Once the hot sauce was poured onto the noodles, it was bound to be mouth-watering.

Xiang Yi took a mouthful of it and her eyes lit up with pleasure. She was about to have some more but Shi Sui took away the small bowl in front of her.

"The injury in your hand hasn't healed yet. You cant eat strong-tasting foods."

"I'll take one last mouthful, just one!"

"Be good, Xiang Yi." A teasing smile appeared on Sister's face. "Or do you want to hear me continue to call you Sister?"

Xiang Yi was speechless.

'Fine I won't eat, I won't eat. I can resist the temptation of food but not the temptation of my boyfriend!'

The fans of the UntimelyCouple were satisfied with the sweet interaction.

Other netizens were already salivating.

—— [Xiang Yi's standards are too high. I can already smell the fragrance through the screen!]

—— [Ahhh it's sugar-free soba. I must have such healthy food!]

—— [Do you guys feel that watching Xiang Yi eat is particularly appetizing? I've already started watching this like it's a food livestream!]

…

Xiang Yi ate the noodles rather quickly but because of her small face, her cheeks were puffed up when she was eating, making her look like a little hamster sneakily eating.

Moreover, she was serious when it comes to eating, giving everyone a feeling that everything she eats is delicious.

After Xiang Yi announced that the product testing passed, Wang Shunli said, "I'll have someone launch these noodles on our online store then. Okay, done…. Huh? Why did it suddenly get removed?"

chapters.title: Chapter 512 - Live Stream Sales (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 512 - Live Stream Sales (4)

The operator behind [CelebrityExposéExpert] was the person who used to get traffic from hating on Xiang Yi and he had registered several accounts after discovering that revenue can be realized through traffic.

He didn't run the account very well at first because he did not know the rules, and had been reported several times, which caused his account to be blocked.

Later he got the hang of it and slowly developed the account, pushing it to success. He even signed a contract with a special PR company.

The man in front of the screen was bearded and the content displayed on the screens of his computer, tablet and cell phone were all different.

"Two Under One Roof" was the object of his focus. When he saw the hot search about the ten-second de-list, he started typing away.

[Vase Fairy actually became a live stream promoter instead of focusing on being a celebrity? That's so distasteful…]

The man scratched his hair in annoyance, thinking about how the public opinion online was showing trends of becoming positive lately.

He anxiously tapped on the table and when he saw a certain host promoting goods with all his might on another screen, he suddenly thought of a good idea…

The man deleted all the words he just typed and replaced them with new content.

[CelebrityExposéExpert]: The goods that Xiang Yi promoted actually sold out in ten seconds. In contrast, the performance of top live stream host Yan Kaikai, who has been promoting products in live streams lately too, is getting worse and worse…

That account had lots of fans in the first place and compared to the influential content, Yan Kaikai's fans rushed over to the "battlefield"!

—— [Is there something wrong with you? There was a huge e-commerce sale previously, which resulted in a high sales volume. It's only normal for the volume to decrease slowly now,okay?]

—— [I'm carrying our dearest Kaikai away. He can't compare to celebrities but he's the best live stream host when it comes to promoting products~ *hands on waist*]

—— [This is really funny, Kaikai is lucky enough to be compared to Xiang Yi, the ultimate "A-lister". Why are you in such a hurry to post this? Are you rushing home to pay respects to your mother's grave?]

…

As a top live stream host, Yan Kaikai had always had a stable number of viewers and had even earned himself a bunch of loyal fans.

Seeing that Yan Kaikai had been criticized, his fans subconsciously vented their anger and resentment on Xiang Yi.

The other marketing accounts followed suit, taking this point of entry and successfully driving a wedge in the relationship between product promoters and Xiang Yi!

Nowadays, the fans of live stream hosts who promote goods are not to be underestimated. Their fans buy things through the live stream every single day and the host would also gossip a little besides promoting the product. Over time, the fans felt as if they had developed a friendship with the host.

Seeing that a celebrity had been discredited, most people snicker and think it's just boring gossip.

But how could they tolerate seeing their friend get undermined?

They couldn't!

Chaose broke out in all major marketing accounts.

The two sides were arguing incessantly.

…

They returned to the living room.

Li Jianyu suddenly cued Xiang Yi and said, "Uh, Xiang Yi said, someone is looking for you."

She was puzzled. "Who is it?"

Li Jianyu coughed, "Yan Kaikai a famous anchor who wants to exchange pointers with you and to get to know you."

The fans of "Two Under One Roof" and Yan Kailai basically do not overlap. Be it from the point of view of interest or public opinion, Li Jianyu felt that it was better to be honest and open.

Yan Kaikai was running a live stream too. They were both connected to the microphone, and thus opened the video.

"Hello Xiang Yi, hello Best Actor Shi, and hello Mr. Tian." Yan Kaikai had a lively and cheerful personality. He took the initiative to greet, "I am Yan Kaikai, you can call me Kaikai."

This scene made Yan Kaikai's fans, who angrily left messages, even more agitated.

—— [Kaikai, blink when you are threatened!!!]

….

chapters.title: Chapter 513 - I'M Crazy To Begin With
chapters.body:
Chapter 513 - I'M Crazy To Begin With

—— [Oooh Kaikai is so pitiful, is he being forced to connect his microphone?]

—— [Is it a big deal to be rich? Do you think you can do whatever you want just because you're rich? Who are you to bully our Kaikai!?!]

…

The fans had a preconceived notion that Yan Kaikai was forced to connect his microphone so they vented all their anger.

Yan Kaikai had an assistant who kept an eye on the comments at all times while he himself would glance at the comments from time to time.

Seeing that the pop-up comments were dominated by such angry comments, Yan Kaikai frantically laughed and explained, "Xiang Yi kidnapped me? God, is there such a good thing? I'm going to eat so much that Xiang Yi's family goes bankrupt. Haha."

Yan Kaikai used to be a foodie who did Mukbangs, which was different from other hosts who tried to be people they weren't. He really had a huge appetite and his fans liked making fun of his ability to eat large amounts of food.

With him regulating the atmosphere, the fans calmed down a little.

Li Jianyu was a little worried, afraid that Xiang Yi wouldn't know how to respond to Yan Kaikai's joke. He quickly made a hand gesture at Shi Sui to hint for him to get ready for emergency rescue.

Surprisingly, Xiang Yi had not only caught the joke, she responded very well.

"Eat till my family goes bankrupt? That might be a bit difficult." Xiang Yi did some serious counting and continued, "We still have dozens of black piglets, more than twenty chickens, more than ten ducks and geese…"

The more serious she was, the more contrastingly adorable it was. The viewers were thoroughly amused and they even burst into laughter. The comments left by the two fan bases had clearly become a lot more harmonious.

Yan Kaikai's assistant, Guan Guan, was a lively girl. Hearing those words, she exclaimed, "We can't let Kaikai go, otherwise it will be like releasing a pig into the granary!"

Pretending to be angry, Yan Kaikai chided, "Guan Guan! You can't behave like this! Our friendship is coming to an end!"

Guan Guan winked at him and teased, "Our friendship is coming to an end? Does that mean that sparks of love will fly between us?"

Yan Kaikai blushed and stammered, unable to speak.

The two of them had been working together for a long time, and they obviously loved each other but Yan Kaikai was very shy when it comes to relationships. The two of them had yet to break through the last stage to romance.

Hence, Guan Guan would tease him everyday. Yan Kaikai was very shy so the fans enjoyed watching the interaction between the two.

The two of them were mature live stream promoters, and thus, they managed to quickly stabilize the scene.

Xiang Yi naturally started chatting with them leisurely and Tian Zhi would even say some jokes from time to time. Shi Sui glanced at Xiang Yi smilingly.

This time, it can be said that the rumors were shattered by facts.

Xiang Yi and Yan Kaikai were not at odds!

The audience gradually relaxed, and from time to time, they laughed out loud in front of the screen.

…

On the other hand, in the glass nursery.

Qin Wanyan paced back and forth anxiously. As son as Ling Ye arrived, she lashed out at him and questioned, "Ling Ye, are you out of your mind? You know what the consequences will be if you don't complete the mission, don't you?!"

"I know, Sister Wanyan." Ling Ye meekly hung his head low like a stray cat on the roadside on a rainy day. "Why are you angry? Is there something I didn't do right?"

His self-deprecation was hidden in his eyes below his lowered eyelashes.

—— [I'm a crazy person, to begin with.]

Qin Wanyan barked furiously, "Didn't you say that joining Two Under One Roof would be of help to my carrier? But go online and take a look at how the netizens are slamming me!"

Ling Ye said innocently, "Sister Wanyan, I don't know anything about the Spring Flower Fund…"

Qin Wanyan choked.

Her gaze was shifty and she was extremely diffident.

Ms. Cen, indeed, was not a connection introduced to her by Ling Ye, but her own contact…

Lacking confidence, she said, "So you're blaming me for messing up? How can you do that?!"

chapters.title: Chapter 514 - Shaming Qin Wanyan
chapters.body:
Chapter 514 - Shaming Qin Wanyan

Chapter 514: Shaming Qin Wanyan

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Ling Ye placed his fingers on his lips and coughed a few times. “I-I’m cover the lips, low cough a few times, “Yes, sorry, I will try my best to help you, Sister Wanyan. Simmer down, it’s not good to be angry.” 1

The more he took it in his stride, the more Qin Wanyan despised it.

Qin Wanyan had a complete sense of superiority in front of Ling Ye.

Reason being she felt that Ling Ye was like an object that existed for her so there was wrong with scolding him twice?

If she failed to complete the task, Ling Ye will also be trapped here for life!

Thinking of this, Qin Wanyan threatened, “Brother, if I’m not well, then everyone can forget about living properly. So, you’d better be more sensible.”

The young man nodded and said, “I will, I will definitely think of another way to make you rise to fame but you…”

He paused again, choosing not to say what he wanted to.

“Yes?” Qin Wanyan was acting like a smart alec. After lashing out at him, she hurriedly tried to comfort him again. She asked softly, “Ling Ye, if you have something to say, just say it. I treat you as my younger brother.”

Ling Ye looked up and said, “Sister Wanyan, can you listen to me in the future? I won’t harm you but you…you might be a little unlucky, that’s why so many incidents have happened to you.”

He was tactful with his words and he didn’t state outright that Qin Wanyan was stupid.

He used euphemisms and did not say outright that Qin Wanyan actually had a bad brain.

‘Yes, I’m just unlucky this time,’ she thought.

Who would have thought that Ms. Cen would flop so quickly and cause her to be slammed by netizens!?! 1

If she listened to Ling Ye and relied on playing the suona, she would indeed be able to get some fans even though it seemed corny…

Qin Wanyan was filled with regret.

She frantically said, “Okay, then I will listen to you. Brother, you must help me!”

After saying some nice things to Ling Ye for a long time, Qin Wanyan finally returned to the living room,all parched and trying to appear in front of the camera.

However, just as she left the glass nursery, she was stopped by the staff.

“Sorry, Miss Qin, you can’t enter the live stream area.”

Qin Wanyan: ???

“On what grounds? I’m the guest of the show today!”

“This is a notice issued by our program team, I hope you won’t give us a hard time, otherwise… we will h call have to call the bodyguards over.” 1

Xiang Yi’s brothers were very protective and had arranged for ten bodyguards to take care of her. They now guard the manor in shifts every day.

Suddenly reminded of something, Qin Wanyan’s expression changed dramatically and she asked, “Is Xiang Yi behind this? Is she deliberately not allowing me to participate? Get out of my way, I’m going to confront her!” 1

‘Why? How dare that stupid bitch suppress me!?!’

The staff didn’t give in at all. “Miss Qin, if you continue to be unreasonable, I will really have to resort to some extreme measures.”

Qin Wanyan threatened, “Do you believe I’ll expose you on the Internet and let the netizens know how weird your program team is!?! How dare you blatantly forbid guests from participating in the filming…”

She cursed and rattled on and on, making the staff really annoyed. He interrupted her directly, “It’s not Xiang Yi but Teacher Tian.” 1

“…” Qin Wanyan froze right on the spot.

The staff snapped hostilely, “Mr. Tian said that you will not be allowed to join the filming because you’ve disgraced him! Just now, he even secretly apologized to Xiang Yi and Shi Sui!”

“No…he is my master… how can he do this to me?” Qin Wanyan was terribly flustered. 1

She resented Tian Zhi for being a huge bumpkin but without Tian Zhi, she would be nothing!

The staff looked at her with a pitiful gaze and said, “Teacher Tian also said that his abilities are limited and he can’t teach you.”

“Miss Qin, you are no longer Mr. Tian’s disciple!” 1

chapters.title: Chapter 515 - Joint Stream (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 515 - Joint Stream (1)

Bang…

Like a bolt from the blue, Qin Wanyan's confidence was all destroyed at this moment!

"How, how could…" Her jaw dropped, completely unwilling to accept this reality.

'Teacher Tian clearly likes it when I play the suona!'

Qin Wanyan's back was cold. She felt as if she had been kicked down the mud before she could even climb to the clouds!

Not far behind him, Ling Ye calmly watched that scene.

The reason that Tian Zhi would take Qin Wanyan as a disciple was actually a small prop in addition to the system suona skill card that Qin Wanyan redeemed.

Props were his rewards from other worlds. After completing the task, those skills wouldn't be of much use, but it had the effect of bewitching others.

He was just giving her a push.

If Qin Wanyan were to let nature take its course and behave herself, Tian Zhi wouldn't have thought much about it even if he noticed something unusual. He probably wouldn't think much about it either and would instead groom Qin Wanyan and do his best to get resources for her.

This can be seen from his willingness to bring Qin Wanyan to participate in the variety program.

However, Qin Wanyan's performance was no longer just poor but terrible!

The best result that Ling Ye predicted was that Tian Zhi would be disappointed with Qin Wanyan and would leave her hanging for a while, which would hinder her progress in completing the transmigration mission.

He did not expect that Tian Zhi would be so ruthless.

This is good.

If Qin Wanyan couldn't complete her tasks, he would be able to continue to stay in this world.

"I want to see my master! Get out of the way! Ah——you guys get out!" Qin Wanyan was so emotional that she wanted to go in front of Tian Zhi and blow suona again.

However, the staff had long disliked her.

'Oh please, is Xiang Yi someone you can trample on just because you want to?'

Hehe 🙂

They called the bodyguards over and dragged Qin Wanyan away.

Qin Wanyan appeared in a glamorous manner, but she was in an extremely wretched state when she was dragged away!

"No! You can't do this…"

Her cries faded away but no one sympathized with her.

…

The living room was extremely well soundproofed, and the sounds of the commotion outside didn't spread in.

The short-lived microphone-linking ended, and it clarified all the false rumors.

The traffic of the livestream that Yan Kaikai was holding surged greatly. It can be said that he had taken the initiative to show goodwill, only to end up benefitting from it.

He was currently the best streamer in product promotion livestreams, with Hao Han, a subject of ridicule, second to him.

The two were rivals, and their popularity was usually almost on par.

Moreover, Hao Han has recently got a lot of low-priced sources, thus vaguely showing a tendency to overtake Yan Kaikai.

Hao Han's team obviously did not want to see Yan Kaikai gaining popularity so they reacted very quickly, and it did not take long for the paid netizens to set the rhythm right.

—— [I'm Xiang Yi's fan. Seriously speaking, Yan Kaikai must be trying to use Xiang Yi's clout~]

—— [The goods I bought in Yan Kaikai's livestream previously are all counterfeit. I really pity Xiang Yi, she stil has to link her livestream with his]

—— [I really can't stand Yan Kaikai's livestream. It's just another form of TV shopping. The live variety show that Xiang Yi and Shi Sui are in are so much better~ I think Hao Han's live stream style is good too]

The public opinion seemed quiet, but there were actually undercurrents surging on the Internet.

…

"It's getting late, everyone can start preparing dinner." Li Jianyu smiled and gave out mission cards to the crowd.

Everyone had one, except Xiang Yi.

The young girl looked around with confusion on her small face. "Where's mine?"

"Xiang Yi said, today you have a special task~" Li Jianyu deliberately teased her.. "I'll tell you if you act cute."

chapters.title: Chapter 516 - Joint Stream (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 516 - Joint Stream (2)

Chapter 516: Joint Stream (2) 3

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

He finished speaking.

The live stream room was lively.

—— [Son, have you become conceited?]

—— [Hey! Sinner, is this how you talk to Xiang Yi?]

—— [How can you have such shameless thoughts!?! It’s just Xiang Yi being coquettish. Who cares to watch!? (Whispering softly: Hurry up, I want to see it, I want to see it!)

…

… Upon hearing the request for her to “act cute”, Xiang Yi froze but before she could react, Ruan Qing had already put a pair of cat ears on her head.

“I… I haven’t agreed yet.” Xiang Yi protested.

Ruan Qing smiled and stroked her head. “It’s nice, isn’t it?” She looked over at Shi Sui.

Shi Sui chuckled and assented softly.

Xiang Yi initially wanted to remove the cat’s ears but she quickly retracted her arm.

‘Well…since the boyfriend likes it, I’ll let him look at me for a little longer.’

Each and every single transmigration task that Xiang Yi had was very rushed and she rarely paid attention to the romantic relationships of others. Hence, she had almost no experience in this field.

However…

Almost no experience doesn’t equate to zero experience.

She had once witnessed the love story of an auxiliary subject and a few of her husbands in a matriarchal realm…

She doted on her husband greatly.

Xiang Yi gradually felt that she ought to spoil and dote on her man.

With cat ears on her head, her fair and tender face was expressionless and her aura was calm and serene as usual. However, countless people were stunned by her adorableness!

She tilted her head and asked, “What’s considered acting cute?”

That one action alone was enough to spark an uproar in the live stream!

—— [Ahhh, baby, why are you so cute!?!]

—— [Our baby doesn’t need to act cute! She’s naturally cute!]

—— [Oh my God, her face, her voice, and those cat ears. Uwuuuu I’m a woman but even I crave for Xiang Yi too]

…

Ruan Qing said with a smile, “Just do as you deem fit.”

Li Jianyu deliberately made decided to be playful and he pretended to be austere. “You don’t look cute at all now.”

Xiang Yi frowned bitterly and she thought, ‘Can’t I just go cook some dishes or kill a pig? Why am I given such a difficult task?’

‘It’s way too much.’

“IN that case… I’ll teach you the essence of wow.” Xiang Yi was extremely serious and she started explaining the three secret steps to acting coquettishly that Xiang Qi had taught her. “First, you have to say ‘Waa’ in the second tone. Remember to drag it out, followed by an ‘oh’ remember to switch it. And then you have to say ‘wow’ in an undulated tone like waves…”

Xiang Yi’s voice was warm and tender. She was extremely patient and after saying that in detail, she asked, “Did I make myself clear? Do you need me to repeat myself again?”

She subconsciously inched closer to the camera. The magnified view of her flawless and tiny palm-sized face appeared on the screens of the netizens who were watching…

The netizens were dumbfounded.

Wow!

‘Who can stand this!?!’

—— [Ah! I’m dead, I’m gone!!!]

—— [Xiang Yi must have grown up eating cuteness potions!]

—— [I’m going to faint. Little Vase, no I declare that from today onwards, Xiang Yi is my favorite little baby!]

…

At this moment.

Countless fans who were fixated on good looks, were thoroughly pleased.

Countless haters put down the keyboard and immediately switched to becoming her fans.

At this moment, the attention of the crowd was all on the outstanding Xiang Yi.

However, there were some fans of the UntimelyCouple who paid close attention to Shi Sui’s movements.

The crowd saw the handsome man picking up a glass of water and drinking a few mouthfuls of it.

His clean and clear Adam’s apple was extraordinarily obvious, undulating and rolling as he drank water.

He was ascetic…but he also seemed to show a trace of breaking the rules.

The girl who seemed to have bionic eyes, immediately made their remarks online.

—— [Cold water! Sisters, he’s drinking cold water!]

(End of this chapter)

(End of this chapter) The group’s pet cutie became a full level Big Brother-518.Chapter 517 – 69 Books

Chapter 517, Even the TV!

—— [Ah, can Shi Sui manage or not? He needs to have iced water after just seeing her put on some cat ears. Is he going to have to take a cold water bath next time? Hehehe]

—— [He can’t. Next question] 1

—— [Hahahaha it’s okay, even if he can’t, Xiang Yi can!]

—— [Friendly reminder: If you move too fast, you will be blocked~]

—— [You reminded too late, my friend has lost her account and she’s cursing her heart out now]

…

After imparting the secret of ‘wow’ tp the crowd, Xiang Yi proudly raised her delicate chin to indicate Li Jianyu, “You can talk now.”

Li Jianyu cleared his throat and exclaimed, “No, that’s not a pass, I don’t think it’s cute enough!”

In the next second…

Xiang Yi raised her eyebrows and said, “Say that again?”

The invisibly powerful aura exuded by the young girl cannot be offset even by her soft and adorable outfit.

Li Jianyu immediately chickened out. “Okay, I will announce the task card for you!”

All of a sudden, the live stream was full of laughter and mockery about Li Jianyu having no modesty.

…

Online.

The netizens hired by Hao Han’s team were still messing things up tirelessly.

“Did it work?” Hao Han had yet to start his live stream today. He kept refreshing Yan Kaikai’s live stream, watching his soaring data enviously.

“Uh… now the netizens have learned to be smart. You can’t start a conflict so easily…”

“Just a bunch of fools. They started to distust it after some influence?” Hao Han scoffed.

“There were some effects at first. Yan Kaikai’s fans have now flocked to the live stream of Two Under One Roof to slam Xiang Yi! But, but…”

“Why are you hemming and hawing? Hurry up and say what you have to!”

The staff was extremely aggrieved. “Xiang Yi’s fans are too peace-loving. Not only did they not take the bait, they also reported a lot of accounts! Now the company that hired us is asking for a compensation…”

Nowadays, such companies were well-developed. Apart from bots, there were also many human-operated accounts.

The operation of these accounts required money. For example, they had to pay to hire a group of people and assign tasks for them to create fake orders.

The higher the level of the account, the longer the time given to work and the more posts uploaded, which meant that they had to pay a higher price!

The paid keyboard warriors company were also troubled at this moment because they had never met such fans before!

Putting aside veteran actors who had real acting chops, the fans of celebrities who generate high traffic, all seem to be very useless these days.

A sentence can spark a heated argument among feisty fans.

However, the Spicy Rabbits were different.

Not only did they say that things like “I won’t be angry even though others are, lest I affect my health”, they even posted photos, GIFS and short clips of Xiang Yi whipping up delicious dishes. Many of them stopped taking on tasks to post fake comments and even declared that they were either going to eat or order takeout!

It was clearly toxic in the eyes of Hao Han’s team.

When the team learned all this, they were speechless and were trying to persuade Hao Han to stop. However, his eyes lit up and he exclaimed, “Hey, why did Yan Kaikai suddenly go off air? Hahahaha did he have some kind of accident? Great, it’ll be best if he can never hold a live stream again!”

The staff looked at each other quietly.

They were all used to the fact that Hao Han was uncultured and uncouth.

Suddenly…

Someone weakly raised his phone and said, “I seem to know, what Yan Kaikai has gone to do…”

…

In the manor.

Li Jianyu announced, “Thanks to the invitation of Nancheng TV, Xiang Yi your task for the day is to… promote goods during the live stream! Yan Kaikai will be coming over later to help us promote the agricultural products of Nancheng! The host of Nancheng TV will also be having a joint stream with us!”

Hao Han’s team: ???

‘We’re sending you two hate, why did you cooperate so quickly!?!’

‘We care about our pride too!’

….

chapters.body:

Yan Kaikai will be coming over later to help us promote the agricultural products of Nancheng! The host of Nancheng TV will also be having a joint stream with us!"

Hao Han's team: ???

'We're sending you two hate, why did you cooperate so quickly!?!'

'We care about our pride too!'

chapters.title: Chapter 518 - Joint Stream (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 518 - Joint Stream (4)

There was an uproar in the live stream!

Xiang Yi actually wants to do a livestream with Yan Kaikai in cooperation with Nancheng TV?

That's simply incredible!

Hao Han and his team were dumbfounded.

There were numerous celebrities and hosts who wished to have such resources and yet, Xiang Yi and Yan Kaikai managed to get them easily.

"That scoundrel Yan Kaikai must have spent money to pull some strings with his connections. Otherwise why would they have chosen him over me?" Hao Han cursed, "Shit! Are the people of Nancheng TV all blind!?!"

The staff: … This is probably the rage from his incompetence.

…

Yan Kaikai was a native of Nancheng, which was in fact, one of the major reasons that Nancheng TV would choose him to promote the goods.

This resource was originally given directly to Xiang Yi.

It was an impromptu decision of the staff at Nancheng TV to let Xiang Yi and Yan Kaikai host the livestream together because they saw the positive effects of the joint livestream between Xiang Yi and Yan Kaikai today.

It happened to be time for Yan Kaikai to stop his livestream. The two parties agreed to come over and help with the livestream as soon as they approached each other.

Yan Kaikai and his team arrived at the manor.

Shi Sui, Tian Zhi, and Ling Ye were performing their tasks, and Xiang Yi came over to receive them.

Yan Kaikai first alighted from the car. He was thinner in person than he seemed in the live stream, and his skin tone was slightly darker too.

"How are you, Xiang Yi?" Yan Kaikai greeted enthusiastically, not forgetting to go around to the other side to open the car door for Guan Guan.

Guan Guan turned pale. She actually didn't seem as energized as she was during the livestream. She smiled at Xiang Yi and said, "Hello, Xiang Yi, I'm a Spicy Rabbit."

"Hi guys." Xiang Yi looked at Guan Guan and asked, "Can I take your pulse?"

Guan Guan was stunned. "Huh…? Of course you can."

Xiang Yi raised her hand to touch Guan Guan's wrist and took her pulse with unerring precision.

A few moments later, Xiang Yi withdrew her hand, "You have a little bit of Qi deficiency, probably due to overexertion. But don't worry, there's no big issue. Just come in and rest for a while."

Yan Kaikai frowned and said, "Why didn't you tell me that you're not feeling well? I will…" He paused in embarrassment.

Guan Guan smiled and asked, "What will happen to you? Will you be worried about me?"

Yan Kaikai digressed, "Get some rest later."

When audience saw this scene, they had a heartened smile on their faces.

…

In the living room.

Yan Kaikai was busy confirming the equipment needed for the livestream with the program team while Xiang Yi laid Guan Guan down on a couch by the floor-to-ceiling window.

The hot water, pillows, and small blankets were arranged in a row, and Xiang Yi also brought an incense burner in. She lit an incense.

"This incense has a sedative effect. Why don't you take a nap?" Xiang Yi suggested.

Guan Guan was accustomed to a fast-paced work schedule and even if she got severe menstrual cramps that were excruciatingly painful, she would subconsciously think that getting some rest is a sinful thing. "The livestream is still ongoing, how can I lie here…"
