"Since you're tired, you need to get some rest." Xiang Yi placed a blanket over her and said, "I don't think the audience would want to see a host dragging her fatigued self to work. Besides, exhaustion is inevitable in life."

The viewers of the livestream:

—— [Xiang Yi is really gentle UwU]

—— [Bosses who are yelling '996' come here Xiang Yi's words!]

—— [Oh my God, I've suddenly realized the reason why Two Under One Roof is famous. It's because it's realistic and authentic enough. However, it's not the cruel truth either]

…

After a mere few sentences, it calmed Guan Guan's anxious mood.

The smoky aroma filled the air, like the smell of fir on a snowy day, interspersed with a faint scent of Chinese medicine.

Guan Guan unknowingly fell asleep and woke up to see that a thermos flask in front of her.

She removed the lid to see that it contained brown sugar ginger tea.

She suddenly felt her nose crinkle.

chapters.title: Chapter 519 - Joint Stream (5)
chapters.body:
Chapter 519 - Joint Stream (5)

The livestream industry may be thriving but being a live stream host is no easy job.

The industry norm was to make women work like men while treating men like beasts.

Corresponding to the high-intensity work, is the invisible mental and emotional pressure.

It can't be stopped.

Guan Guan understood that Xiang Yi must have known that she wasn't feeling well from the time she took her pulse, which was the reason she got to rest.

However, Xiang Yi didn't take credit for it and merely showed her concern quietly.

She acted appropriately and maintained a distance.

The feeling of suddenly being treated with tenderness after being tired for too long, was completely irresistible.

Guan Guan sniffled and took a sip of the hot brown sugar ginger tea, feeling as if her heart and body had been warmed up by it too.

She was being courteous when she called herself a Spicy Rabbit when she entered but now, Guan Guan was genuinely a fan of Xiang Yi's!

She was a die-hard fan!

…

Hao Han was not happy with the resources Yan Kaikai got so he quickly spent more money to get his team to buy another wave of views.

This time, he chose to directly skip the middleman and instead went straight to the account.

[CelebrityExposéExpert] was one of them.

The livestream held by Xiang Yi and Yan Kaikai had yet to officially start but there were already hateful comments directed at them all over the Internet.

—— [Kaikai is the best livestream goods promoter. Who is Xiang Yi? Don't be a burden and drag Kaikai down with you]

—— [Xiang Yi is so outstanding. Why would she stoop so low as to do a livestream with Yan Kaikai? That's such an insult to Xiang Yi]

—— [No, no, seriously? Surely there are people who know that the data about Yan Kaikai's livestreamss are all fake, right? They will definitely flop today's live stream. Agricultural products? What's there to sell about that? I'd rather watch Hao Han's live stream in the evening. Today is the e-commerce foodies' day, and there's a lot of delicious food~]

…

Compared to Yan Kaikai, Hao Han was a lot more willing to spend money on marketing so his popularity was boosted very quickly.

Besides, he posted a product teaser for the livestream tonight, which included the snacks of many influencers.

For example, there were sugar-free milk tea, spicy crawfish, strawberry cookies and so on.

Many netizens left comments under the preview Weibo post, saying they must lock Hao Han up in the live stream tonight!

In addition, there were netizens influenced by marketing numbers as the comments underneath were all criticism about Xiang Yi and Yan Kaikai's livestream.

The other things are fine but selling agricultural products?

It'd be strange if these things can be sold for a good price! They're just millet, mung beans and sesame.

…

The clock hand points to six fifty-nine.

The livestream for "Two Under One Roof" live stream was open and Yan Kaikai opened his live stream too."

Seven o'clock.

Yan Kaikai ai shouted at the top of his lungs, "Friends and viewers, this is Kaikai! My livestream has begun, quickly share the live link to the Weibo post! This is best friend! Xiang Yi, let's all take a photo!"

chapters.title: Chapter 520 - Joint Stream (6)
chapters.body:
Chapter 520 - Joint Stream (6)

The staff hesitated, not knowing whether they should show it to him or not.

Hao Han was an impatient person so he urged again.

The staff had no choice but to show the data to him.

The data from each of the three livestreams was displayed on three electronic tablets.

The comparison of the number of people watching the streams was simply jarring!

Hao Han's livestream: 3492051!

Yan Kaikai's live stream: 5847329!

Two Under One Roof's livestream: 8542245!

Hao Han: ????

'Yan Kaikai must have hired people to manipulate these data, huh!?!'

'Otherwise, how could the data be almost twice as much as mine?!'

'What's wrong with the netizens? They agreed to watch my livestream but why have they all slipped away to watch Yan Kaikai's and Two Under One Roof's livestream?!'

The thought of having spent so much money without achieving the desired results made Hao Han so furious that he shut out everyone right on the spot!

…

Xiang Yi and Yan Kaikai weren't aware of the little tricks that Hao Han had pulled.

The two cooperated and began to show the products they were going to promote today.

"Dear friends and audience, the first treasure we recommend buying tonight is… Nancheng's red honey sweet potato, which is a new variety cultivated by the Nancheng Academy of Agricultural Sciences. It's not only delicious, but also healthy!"

We fought for a very favorable price. The original price is 9.9 yuan for 500 grams, but today, it's going at 39.9 yuan for 2.5 kilograms in our livestream. In addition, each set comes with a free gift of a one-kilogram pack of white honey sweet potato, which boasts of a softer texture! The price is equivalent to…"

Guan Guan was usually the assistant during livestream, and she would calculate the prices for Yan Kaikai before the start of every livestream.

Today, he had a temporary change of partner. The two did not have enough time to get to know each other better, so Yan Kaikai began to panic and sweat broke out on his forehead. Thoughts ran through his mind quickly, and he thought about how he could give both of them an out.

However, he heard a warm and soft voice in his ear.

"5.7 yuan."

Yan Kaikai was stunned for a second, and then quickly answered, "Wow! This price is really very affordable, actions are better than words! Right, Guan… Uh, Xiang Yi!"

Although Yan Kaikai was an experienced host, habit was really a very powerful force. Even though he had a rich experience, he nevertheless made a mistake by having a slip of the tongue.

Xiang Yi said calmly, "Well, honey potatoes can be steamed or fried and made into wet potato puree. You may also add some raisins, nuts or something."

Yan Kaikai was flabbergasted!

What kind of incredible partner is this!

He was moved to tears. 'Xiang Yi is really too reliable!'

Yan Kaikai was somehow influenced. He calmed down and started being as professional as he was.

"About the red honey sweet potato… In fact, it is also related to the poverty alleviation movement in Nancheng TV. Because it is also related, let us connect with Nancheng TV…"

Duh…

The livestream and Nancheng TV connected successfully.

The host smiled and said, "Xiang Yi, Yan Kaikai, how are you? Today's cooperation is unprecedented in Nancheng TV. Now, let's have our spokespeople promote our agricultural products and hear the story behind the fight against poverty…'

Nancheng TV changed the style of traditional media and attached each agricultural product with a short video that lasted less than a minute each. Instead of portraying the products in an emotional manner, they adopted a vivid and interesting approach this time, which leaves the viewer laughing.

The livestream proceeded in an orderly manner.

"The following product we recommend is millet…"

"Millet is more stomach-friendly when made into porridge. It can also be cooked with pumpkin…"

"The next product we have here is awesome, it's black sesame…"

"Stir-fry these black sesame seeds and keep them sealed for preservation. A small handful every day will help with hair care…"

Coupled with the funny short clips attached by Nancheng TV, the netizens watched with great interest and could not stop buying.

Some netizens couldn't help but voice their thoughts with great emotions: [This is simply just like Kaikai reporting the name of the products while Xiang Yi provides recipes for them!]

chapters.title: Chapter 521 - Ordinarily Outstanding~
chapters.body:
Chapter 521 - Ordinarily Outstanding~

…

In the living room.

Xiang Yi and Yan Kaikai were hosting a livestream.

Guan Guan was keeping an eye on the staff next to her who were uploading the links and giving out coupons, etc.

The three men were preparing dinner in the kitchen.

Tian Zhi showed his culinary skills and made some duck soup.

Shi Sui tossed a few cold salads and he was neither fast nor slow.

Ling Ye was helping her cut some vegetables.

The door was left ajar so he could hear Xiang Yi and Yan Kaikai's conversation in the living room. Although it was purely just a simple cooperation, he actually felt a trace of envy towards Yan Kaikai.

The man's inferiority complex made him feel that way. Even though he knew that Xiang Yi didn't belong to him, he still had a strong and impulsive desire to possess her.

In contrast, Shi Sui was rather composed as he mixed some candied tomatoes, looking indifferent, noble, and graceful.

Ling Ye couldn't help but secretly wonder if he really carried a torch for Xiang Yi.

'How do you remain so indifferent?'

He felt a sense of possessiveness towards Xiang Yi.

Seemingly having sensed Ling Ye's gaze, the young Shi Sui turned his head to the side and asked with a deep gaze in his eyes, "Have the vegetables been washed?"

Ling Ye answered, "Yes, I have drained the water."

Shi Sui nodded and said, "Thank you."

Ling Ye handed the bok choy over to him. Seeing that Shi Sui was relaxedly getting ready to make some boiled bok choy, he couldn't help but ask, "Mr. Shi, Sister Xiang Yi is doing a live stream with another man."

"So?"

Ling Ye choked and said, "Nothing, I just think that you don't seem to care much about Sister Xiang Yi."

Shi Sui slowly and methodically fastened his apron before asking rhetorically, "What do you think it means to care about her?"

Ling Ye's long, thick, arched eyelashes drooped and he had a meek expression on his pretty, delicate face. He answered, "I don't know."

In fact, he had the answer in his heart.

'It's to possess.'

"Everyone's understanding may be different, but at least, caring for someone shouldn't equate to bothering them. It's not limiting each other's friendships and restricting each other's freedom. Giving each other enough space is called caring."

Shi Sui's words made Ling Ye stunned.

He also obtained the agreement of fans in the livestream.

—— [I love Shi Sui's worldviews! He's such an upright person!]

—— [Yes, yes, even if you like someone, you don't have the right to deprive them of their freedom!]

–[Now, those trending jokes about locking your significant others in the basement and so on are actually quite annoying. Love should be built on respect.]

…

The Xiang family's old residence.

Xiang Yin, who had learned to shop online, was now staring at the screen and ready to put the speed of a doctor's hand to play by snapping up all the goods that his granddaughter promotes!

On the other hand, Grandma Xiang was sending voice messages to the Sunset Crimson Sisters group chat.

"Oooh yeah, that's right this person who's doing a live stream together with Xiang Yi is my granddaughter. Sisters, do show some support ~"

"No, no, she's not as good as you guys say, her excellence is just mediocre~~"

"My old man is buying things. Self-taught? He's not that smart, it's our precious Little Bunny who taught him to shop online~~"

"…"

Grandpa Xiang's face reddened when he heard that. He coughed and said, "Okay, stop it."

Grandma Xiang snickered, "Old man, are you shy?"

"No, I'm not!" Xiang Yin said righteously, "Am I the type to get shy!?!"

Deciding not to expose him, Grandma Xiang continued to send voice messages to the group chat.

'Well, the group owner Mrs. Zhou always loves to show off her little grandson.'

'My little rabbit is the best! Hmph!'

…

The one-hour livestream ended.

The sales volume was tabulated immediately.

Not only was Yan Kaikai looking forward to it, even Hao Han was also waiting for the results.

When Guan Guan saw the data, her eyebrows were slightly curved. She did not pay attention to Yan Kaikai and instead looked at Xiang Yi.

"Xiang Yi, congratulations, your livestream sales revenue exceeded 100 million yuan!"

"The amount is 200 million yuan!!!"

chapters.title: Chapter 522 - Official Recognition (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 522 - Official Recognition (1)

The data quickly spread.

–[Damn, 200 million?!]

–[The point is, their stream lasted for just one hour!]

— [This data has broken the industry record… I reckon that the capitalists are going to enter the market and seize this opportunity. Having celebrities promote goods may become the norm…]

On the Internet, countless people expressed their views.

"What do you mean? Two hundred million?!" When Hao Han got off the air, he heard the data that his assistant told him, and his face was full of unbelief written on it, "Where is my data?"

He still had a last glimmer of hope left in his heart and thought that perhaps, it might just be because there is good traffic today and that he might achieve the same results too.

His assistant murmured fearfully, "More than 200…200 million…"

His sales revenue was not only far from that of Xiang Yi's and Yan Kaikai's stream, it was below the norm too!

The reason was none other than the overly large market for goods promotion in livestreams. Hence, with Yan Kaikai's livestream generating more traffice, he was much more popular and Hao Han was bound to be affected.

It was nearly a ten-fold difference and Hao Han was so enraged that he smashed a lot of things on the spot.

When he thought about the mid-year celebration of the live-streaming industry, he realized that he would definitely meet Yan Kaikai then.

At that time, how can he hold his head high in front of Yan Kaikai?

…

In the living room of the manor.

Yan Kaikai was in a good mood when he heard the data.

His usual sales revenue was about a few tens of millions per day and the highest amount clocked had only exceeded 100 million by a little.

He didn't expect that today's temporary cooperation with Xiang Yi would allow his revenue to exceed 200 million!

"Xiang Yi, here's a toast to you! Cheers, feel free to do as you please!"

Yan Kaikai picked up the wine glass and chugged it all in one go.

Xiang Yi's eyes glistened brightly, looking at the fruit wine in the porcelain cup in front of her. She was craving for it so much that she subconsciously licked the corner of her mouth.

Noticing a burning gaze that was fixed on her, she looked up and met Shi Sui's eyes.

The man smiled, as if he had seen through her mind.

'Xiang Yi is a little bit of an alcoholic.'

Feeling diffident, Xiang Yi was about to pretend that nothing happened and continued to drink as she picked up her wine glass with her bony fingers.

"Xiang Yi is injured so she can't drink, but she has accepted your goodwill. I'll drink on her behalf," he said in a low voice that rang in the ears of the crowd. He was gentlemanly and there was nothing about his behavior to pick on.

The man raised his neck, and his well-defined Adam's apple began to roll as he drank.

His thin lips were stained with water, which he slowly wiped away with his long, slender fingers.

'How sexy.'

Staring at him, Xiang Yi couldn't help but clench her fists.

The netizens watching the stream started cheering.

—— [Shi Sui drank for Xiang Yi! How sweet, we're getting diabetes!!}

—— [I'm about to pass out. I'm so attracted to Shi Sui's Adam's apple! I want Xiang Yi to touch it!]

—— [The way Xiang Yi is looking at Shi Sui seems so heartbreaking! It's like she's looking at some kind of gem!]

–[Uh, am I the only one who thinks that Xiang Yi seems to want to drink too…]

…

After three rounds of toasting…

Men tend to have more nonsense to say after having a tad too much to drink.

Yan Kaikai didn't dare to make eye contact with Guan Guan but he wasn't that restrained with Xiang Yi. The two of them chatted about the topic of promoting goods during livestreams, which the Spicy Rabbits found quite normal, but was very much to the displeasure of Yan Kaikai's fans.

In their opinion, Yan Kaikai was neglecting Guan Guan!

— [I'm speechless. Yan Kaikai is letting Guan Guan down after all that she has done for him!"

–[Does Xiang Yi have a problem! She's talking to Yan Kaikai just because he's talking to her? She has such a low EQ!]

—— [I feel so sorry for Guan Guan. It has been so long but he still hasn't made her his official girlfriend. She even has to suffer watching the person she adores, chatting happily with another girl in public….]

chapters.title: Chapter 523 - Official Recognition (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 523 - Official Recognition (2)

…

The most intuitive result of letting one's imagination run wild is that some people can't control their emotions and would end up criticizing immediately!

—— [Is Xiang Yi suffering from an illness where she will die if she doesn't have a man? Must she throw herself at just anyone as long as they're male!?!]

—— [Xiang Yi is so pretentious, all she does is put on a front. She doesn't know to be reserved in front of men at all!!]

—— [She was being nice to Ling Ye just now and now, she's chatting with Yan Kaikai so enthusiastically. She's even keeping Shi Sui on the hook and making him drink on her behalf. What a resourceful woman with superb tactics. *thumbs-up* *thumbs-up*]

…

The netizens were cursing furiously but Guan Guan suddenly said, "Excuse me, I'll go out for a while."

As soon as she left the seat, there was a huge uproar in the livestream!

There was a long string of [I pity Guan Guan] comments that were densely plastered across the screen. In addition, there were also comments that were slamming Xiang Yi and Yan Kaikai.

It was as if they had committed an unforgivable sin by having a casual chat with each other!

However, within a few minutes, Guan Guan returned.

She walked into the living room with a huge cardboard box in hand and when Xiang Yi saw it, her first reaction was to get up and go carry it for her.

Yan Kaikai was a step slower to react. "How can you girls carry out such labor!? Let me do it!!!"

"You can't." Guan Guan said disgustedly.

Yan Kaikai blushed and exclaimed, "You…you watch your words! This is a livestream!"

Guan Guan was confused.

She began to reflect on just what she saw in this silly man.

Xiang Yi avoided using her injured hand and lifted the big box with her other hand. She remarked, "It's a little heavy."

Guan Guan's eyes instantly changed, flowing with adoration and shining light.

"You're amazing, Xiang Yi! Wow, you can even lift such a heavy box with one hand!!!"

Yan Kaikai was speechless.

'I've carried things for Guan Guan before, why has she never praised me like that before?!'

"Let me do it, I'm a man, I can't let you girls carry out such labor…" Yan Kaikai snatched the box from Xiang Yi's hand, and just as it reached his hand, he stumbled because it was too heavy.

Yan Kaikai: ???

'Is this box filled with stones!?!'

'Why is Xiang Yi, who looks like a weak and vulnerable girl able to hold it up with one hand without any difficulty?'

The viewers of the livestream were thoroughly amused by this scene and burst into laughter.

—— [Hahahaha Yan Kaikai is so manly but he's not the kind that turns people off]

— [I'm about to throw up from laughing. Yan Kaikai, you're probably clueless about Xiang Yi's strength! She's a cute girl who can carry a pig's head with a straight face!]

…

In order to defend his dignity as a man, Yan Kaikai he still insisted on carrying the box to the dining table even though his face was already as red as a tomato.

Tian Zhi looked over and asked, "Hey, what good stuff have you guys gotten?"

Ling Ye, who was next to him, had his head hung low as he was playing with the game console that Xiang Yu had left behind. He looked obedient and docile but he was extremely shrewd and ruthless in the game, so he could easily kill his opponents with one move.

Guan Guan unpacked the box and pulled out the contents one by one.

"Xiang Yi, this sunscreen cap is superb!"

"Xiang Yi, do you like spicy food? These spicy fries are delicious!"

"Xiang Yi, this detergent is not only effective, it smells good too. You must have it!"

"…"

The more people listened, the more they felt that something was wrong.

'Why does it seem that all the things in the large box that Guan Guan is carrying, are for Xiang Yi?'

Li Jianyu voiced out the question that was on everyone's mind, "Guan Guan, are these all for Xiang Yi?"

Guan Guan's grinned and answered, "Yes, yes! I like Xiang Yi very much, so I must give her everything that I think is good!"

The netizens who were just criticizing Xiang Yi were dumbstruck.

'What kind of an amazing plot development is this!?!'

chapters.title: Chapter 524 - Official Recognition (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 524 - Official Recognition (3)

Xiang Yi was stunned for a moment and she said, "Wait a minute, I'll go get something for you."

Not long after…

Xiang Yi returned with a large pile of food and drinks.

The food items included the tossed noodles that had just been launched by the Little Rabbit Farms today, as well as the signature product of spicy rabbit head, five-spiced beef, as well as her very own pickled vegetables, salted duck eggs, brewed wine, plum wine and so on.

It was so full that it filled Guan Guan's box again and there was a lot more jutting out of the box.

Guan Guan was shocked and she asked, "Are all these for me? Xiang Yi, you're so nice! Ahhh, I must be the happiest fan in the world!!!"

The young lady said with a calm expression, "This is a return gift."

However, Shi Sui noticed that her fingertips were poking the hem of her coat again and again. She was lively and happy.

Clearly, Xiang Yi was overjoyed to receive the gifts.

The bottom of his eyes were also filled with joy.

For some reason, he couldn't help but smile when he saw her smiling.

On the other hand, Yan Kaikai stood at the side, with puzzlement and confusion written all over his face.

He suddenly felt that his presence was redundant.

In the livestream, the Spicy Rabbits counterattacked although they were late to it.

— [Hahahaha, some fans are really too dramatic. It's such a pity that you people aren't actors]

— [Are you sure it was Guan Guan who was neglected and not Yan Kaikai? He's like a tool]

–[The friendship between girls is really too cute! How therapeutic!]

…

Many of Yan Kaikai's fans who had been slamming Xiang, were so ashamed at this time that their faces turned red in front of the screen!

…

Yan Kaikai only came to cooperate with Xiang Yi to promote goods, and now that the task had been completed, he had other work to do later. After dinner, he got ready to leave.

Before leaving, Guan Guan pulled Xiang Yi and talked reluctantly for a while.

The girls exchanged contact information and gave each other their home address so that they could deliver gifts to each other in the future.

Yan Kaikai could only chat awkwardly with Shi Sui.

"Shi Sui, I wonder when I can see your new movie."

Shi Sui smiled and said, It depends on fate."

Hearing these words, many of Shi Sui's fans were a little disappointed.

Shi Sui had already won the 'Best Actor' award grand slam at a young age and even reached the peak of his career. Even if he now announced his retirement now, he would probably still be put on a pedestal and worshiped by fans in the future.

But… they still want to see Shi Sui achieving more honor and glory in the rest of his life.

Hearing this, Guan Guan curiously asked Xiang Yi, "Xiang Yi, can you act in movies?"

Yan Kaikai went along. "Hey, I feel like you two can work together!"

The two were simply chatting, but accidentally ended up stirring lots of waves with their words.

–[There you have it, the joke of the year is born]

–[Please, pretty girl, I will buy the magazines you shoot for and watch the livestreams where you promote goods but please don't hurt my eyes on the silver screen!]

–[I've put up with it for so many days, but today I can't stand it anymore! I don't have a problem with the couple speculation, but the work of a film director is not to be tarnished! His superb acting skills are not to be wasted on a woman like Xiang Yi who can only glare and pout!!!]

…

Yan Kaikai wanted to go on but Guan Guan quickly and secretly pinched his arm when she realized that she had said something wrong.

She tried to mitigate the situation. "Hah, we are joking, you are now doing a livestream everyday, that's as good as a movie! When I get rich, I'm going home to farm too!"

Xiang Yi didn't think that much about it, but Shi Sui raised his eyebrows.

"Cooperation?" He looked at Xiang Yi, his eyes as gentle as the shimmering lake under the sunlight.. "Of course I am willing, I just don't know if Xiang Yi is willing to cooperate with me."

chapters.title: Chapter 525 - Official Recognition (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 525 - Official Recognition (4)

The netizens were dumbfounded.

'Is Shi Sui so overwhelmed with love that he can't even see through Xiang Yi's acting chops!?'

Those words caused some of the professional fans to be upset.

—— [Shi Sui, are you out of your mind? Must you put a woman like her on a pedestal? She's not fit enough to act with you!]

-[I accompanied you from rock bottom to the peak, and I've been so worried for your career. If you choose to destroy your own future, I will stop being your fan without room for negotiation :)]

— [I hope that you can cherish yourself as an actor. Even if you do not have the motivation to continue your career in the field of the arts, I hope you won't leave a stain in your career.]

…

Of course, while there were those who reacted intensely, there were also those who looked forward to it.

Xiang Yi now had all sorts of fans, some who liked her for her looks, some who liked her for the food she made, some who saw her as their child, and some who saw her as their granddaughter… In particular, those who were older and had never watched the distasteful idol drama series that "Xiang Yi" had once starred in, all felt that she was adorable and lovable. They also felt that she was absolutely cut out for being a movie actress!

Recalling the movie that Shi Sui had been hesitating to accept, Xiang Yi blinked and said, "If you need me, I can cooperate."

After all, she was titled the "Perfect Assistant" by the transmigrating system. Hence, Xiang Yi knew a thing or two about acting.

Shi Sui asked with his brows raised, "Shall we give it a try then?"

Xiang Yi wasn't wishy-washy about it either. "Sure."

In the night, the man's thin lips curb into a smile and even the dull surroundings seemed to have come alive with vibrancy in an instant. She said, "I hope we have a happy cooperation, Xiang Yi."

The netizens were dumbfounded.

'What's going on? Are the two of them really going to cooperate?!'

Some of the career fans immediately made their attitude clear in the pop-up comments.

—— [I've stopped being a fan, bye.]

—— [Shi Sui, you don't care about the feelings of your fans at all!]

—— [I've just burst into tears. I feel that I've wasted all my time liking him all these years. I'm even more concerned about his career than he is. What about himself?]

…

However the emotional comments were soon followed by a wave of pop-up comments that appeared on the screen,.

— [Oh my God, I'm so proud of Xiang Yi! She has been praised by the official accounts!]

Huh?

The crowd was curious and searched it on Weibo, only to find that there was a trending phrase on the hot search list.

#OutstandingYouthsXiangyiAndYanKaiKai

When they saw it, they thought that someone had paid for that hashtag to make it to the list.

However, when they clicked it, they found out that it was a Weibo post uploaded by China Daily!

[@ChinaDaily: Today, Nancheng TV tried to use new media to help alleviate poverty by promoting agricultural products through a livestream sales session, and the sales were rather ideal. Thanks to #OutstandingYouthsXiangYiandKaiKai, we have only solved the urgent needs of farmers, but also explored a new model of livestreams with positive energy. Let's praise these outstanding youths!]

Many class representative accounts had come online to analyze the deep meaning behind that Weibo.

——[Oh my God, Xiang Yi and Yan Kaikai are really impressive!]

–[Yan Kaikai's position as the top livestream host seems to be stable!]

—— [This is a signal given by the officials pertaining to the official recognition of the legitimacy of the profession of livestream hosts and positive livestream sales sessions!]

…

Ordinary people who didn't have a deep understanding of the livestream industry somehow felt that the two young people were really quite good.

The fans are excited.

They felt as if their children had obtained an award in kindergarten.

What is there to wait for?

They just had to praise them!!!

Hence, a large number of bootlickers came online to praise Xiang Yi and Yan Kaikai together or separately. In short, they were showered with compliments everywhere!

At the same time, another hot search with a surprising degree of popularity appeared in sight….

chapters.title: Chapter 526 - Exposé
chapters.body:
Chapter 526 - Exposé

#WhoIsThePrettyGirlInNationalMassWorkout

The one who sent the tweet was a well-known humorous blogger who, in addition to accepting contributions from netizens, was particularly funny in her own daily life with her family.

In particular, whenever the short video of her bickering with her brother was refreshed, it would move up the hot search list.

[@HowToConquerAHandsomeYoungMan: Hahahaha I didn't expect my little brother who's totally a typical guy, to fall in love one day too! He's a miserable high school student who just came back from school. On the other hand, I was lazing on the couch and eating some strawberries. My brother barked angrily when he saw that!]

[In the end, he saw Xiang Yi on TV and instantly got shy and nervous. He clenched his fist with his head hung low and then asked stammeringly, "W-Who is this beautiful sister?" Now that my brother knows her name, he has obediently gone to wash my car for me ~ ~ ~ ~]

Everyone in the comments section was laughing out loud.

–[Hah, men are just like that]

–[Shocked! His younger brother actually gets shy?]

—— [Is he the same younger brother of yours who tugged your hair for the sake of a bowl of instant noodles?]

–[Xiang Yi is really a beautiful sister! Not to mention your brother, even I want to lick the screen even though I'm a woman!!}

…

Nowadays, most young people don't watch much TV because of the developed livedstream industry in China. Hence, although this topic had a high position in the hot search list, it would mostly stay in the 10th place.

Until…

At 9:30 p.m., "National Mass Workout" was broadcast on TV, and at the same time, the online version of this episode was uploaded online on Star Video.

Many fans who were using the PC version of the app were the first to arrive at the battlefield.

—— [Jun Han, press on, my child! Mummy's coming!]

–[Hey, Xu Tumi is in the episode too. I like her so much]

—— [Spicy Rabbits will never admit defeat. Let's bring glory for Xiang Yi!!]

…

At this moment, countless people were lying on either the sofa or the bed, enjoying the rare, midday leisure time.

The familiar opening credits ended, and what caught everyone's eyes was a delicate and fair face.

The young girl was holding a black recurve bow, with her curly hair tied into a butterfly knot. She was wearing a bright and soft outfit but her eyes were quiet with a trace of coldness. She squinted, aimed, and drew the bow!

Phew–!

Xiang Yi did not look at the results, but lowered her head to get the next arrow.

The audience in front of the screen: !!!

The pop-up screen was in an uproar in an instant.

–[Damnnn, what a pretty sister!!!]

–[Xiang Yi has shot my heart with her cuteness!!]

–[Is this the legendary expert who never looks at the ring count after shooting arrows? Coach, I want to learn this!]

…

The fans who were familiar with the flow of "NationalMassWorkout" began to sense that something was wrong.

The first to appear was naturally the main guest of this episode.

The main guest is usually more popular and respected than Xiang Yi, so what right does Xiang Yi have to be the main guest!?

It's ridiculous.

Many people flooded the comment section with hateful comments, polluting it for a while.

However, the footage of this episode was personally directed by Director Zhu, the industry's top variety director. His aesthetic standards had always been superb and this time, he has showed his abilities to keep up with the pace. There was incessant laughter.

The audience's attention soon shifted and they no longer dwelled on the main guest.

The famous scenes of Xiang Yi drawing a cartoon arrow, Xu Tumi shooting the wrong target, and Xiang Yi shooting the tenth ring in the tenth ring, all made everyone laugh incessantly.

The number of fans of both of them was rising like crazy.

Some rejoiced while some were worried.

Bai Wuxia looked at the variety show, his eyes were full of disbelief.

'All my footage was removed in this episode??!!!'

chapters.title: Chapter 527 - Exposé (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 527 - Exposé (2)

Chapter 527: Exposé (2)

Bai Wuxia had plunged into the whirlpool of public opinions lately and his reputation had been ruined. No one asked him to star in a drama either.

NationalMassWorkout was his only exposure.

He initially thought that Director Zhu would more or less give him some leeway ev en if he was going to get lesser scenes!

If not, they could just blur out his face. Some people might then be curious about who he was and try to find out, giving him some popularity.

However, she never thought that Director Zhu would be so desperate!

The editing made his appearance in the show redundant!

Bai Wuxia pounded his chest, filled with regret.

He was so angry that he posted several posts on the Internet.

[@BaiWuxia: No one knows where the shoe pinches, but he who wears it.]

[@BaiWuxia: In this world, people will only kick you when you're down. They won't ever give you a helping hand in need.]

[@BaiWuxia: Perhaps, I'm the real-life example of an "extra" character in literary works!]

A netizen commented: [Yes, you are really extra]

There was an article about Bai Wuxia clapping back at the netizens who were cyber-bullying him, and even summoned his fans to scold a certain netizen.

The confusing operation resulted in countless mockery.

Seeing that so many people were slamming him, Bai Wuxia decided to go all out, thinking to himself that bad publicity is still good publicity. He hoped that he could stir some waves so he declared that he would be exposing something on Weibo.

[@Bai Wuxia: Let me tell you guys, a certain female celebrity is lesbian! During filming, the two girls were hugging each other and it was really disgusting!]

[@Bai Wuxia: There's also a certain actor who has secretly sent three food trucks to a certain actress! Don't ask me who it is, everyone knows it already! These two people are clearly having an affair! Hah!]

…

After the two juicy news were posted on Weibo, Bai Wuxia's Weibo immediately became very lively!

Like Sherlock Holmes and Detective Conan, countless netizens were constantly speculating, analyzing, decoding, and picking out the details in the Weibo posts posted by the staff of the program team, and so on. In the end, they finally decoded Bai Wuxia's exposé.

A gossipy netizen posted a summary of the answer.

—— [Exposé 1: That female celebrity should be referring to Xu Tumi. The two celebrities hugging each other are Xu Tumi and Xiang Yi. I found a clip of a certain episode of the variety show, which features the scene of Xiang Yi teaching Xu Tumi to shoot arrows. It was as if she was holding Xu Tumi in her arms and I also searched the staff's Weibo accounts. Someone posted some content about shipping the two of them on the same day! Theyre probably the lesbians that Bai Wuxia mentioned. Well, but the two of them seem to really get along well.]

——[Exposé 2: This should be referring to Xiang Yi and Shi Sui. On that day, Xiang Yi received a total of four food trucks. One was from her fan club but based on the screengrabs that were spread in the fan club chats, Xiang Yi has returned the money to her fans. She even asked her fans not to spend money for her anymore. I found a post about those three food trucks in a certain forum. It was posted by the staff of the service staff that were operating the food trucks. They even said that the food trucks were chartered by Shi Sui's manager.]

…

Bai Wuxia waited for a long time but he still didn't receive any calls.

'Could it be that no one is paying attention?'

He picked up his phone and found the two Weibo posts, one with a few thousand comments and the other with over 10,000 comments!

Bai Wuxia was overjoyed, thinking that he was about to gain popularity soon. However, he was dumbfounded when he opened the comments' section to take a look.

–[Ahhhhh I'm totally shipping this soft and cute couple!]

–[Shi Sui actually gave Xiang Yi a support food truck? There's so much public display of affection!]

Apart from that, most of the comments were similar to this:

–[Thank you for the exposé! Anyway, you're already condemned, why don't you switch career paths to become a paparazzi instead!?!]

Bai Wuxia: ????

chapters.title: Chapter 528 - Well Deserved!
chapters.body:
Chapter 528 - Well Deserved!

…

Bai Wuxia's failure to condemn Xiang Yi with the exposé and the comment made by the netizen who asked him to become a paparazzi instead, was soon shared by several humor accounts on Weibo.

The new buzz phrase was "Since you're already condemned, why don't you switch careers and become a ____ instead?"

In a sense, Bai Wuxia had achieved his goal—the topic had indeed started trending.

However, what followed was not film directors inviting him to star in their productions but various tabloids and free media platforms extending an olive branch to him…

…

It was the second round of the games segment of NationalMassWorkout.

In the picture, Xiang Yi was wearing a neat and immaculate camouflage attire with a belt around her waist, accentuating her svelteness. Her hair was tied into a bun and she looked cold and indifferent while carrying a sniper that wasn't proportional to her body size at all.

However, she was unexpectedly…suave and beautiful.

In particular, when she shot, there was a blizzard of pop-up comments on the screen, such as "Ah, I died", "Sister Xiang Yi has shot my heart with the gun", "screen in front of me repeatedly died" and so on.

However, when the crowd discovered that she had "killed" her teammate, Jun Han, they burst into tears laughing.

For that part, Director Zhu used editing techniques that were similar to those used for movies about war. The camera kept switching between each person, and many impressive details were added post-production, with a variety of exciting and bloodthirsty music that left many fascinated. Some even forgot that it was just a variety show…

She froze in place.

The scene on the screen turned into an intense push-and-pull, pulling the crowd back to reality.

Some people criticized: [What's up with the shaky camera? It's making me so dizzy]

At that moment, the screen turned black and the subtitles, which were added during post-production, appeared on the screen, providing a brief description of the incident that happened to Xu Tumi on the day of filming…

When the audience read that Xu Tumi had been chased by a fugitive on the loose, the sounds of Xu Tumi crying and gasping for breath while running that Director Zhu added, were played. The edit was simply heart-wrenching!

–[Ahhhhh how could this happen!?!]

–[Oh my God, I've broken out in cold sweat through the screen]

–[Although I know that Xu Tumi is safe and sound, it's still heartbreaking to hear this clip!]

The gasps were getting more and more terse and in particular, a single scream of hers was enough for the audience to imagine the horrible scene at that time…

The psychotic fugitive chasing after a vulnerable and helpless young girl, like a beast hunting in the jungle…

But in the next second.

Swish-

The screen lit up.

As if it was a light at the end of the darkness, the dull light became brighter and brighter before finally being fixed on the scene of Xiang Yi running towards Xu Tumi.

The young girl was like a lean but athletic wild leopard as she pounced towards him!

Meanwhile…

The background music was a voice recording of Bai Wuxia's cynical remarks at that time, though his voice had been edited to sound different from his original voice.

"Let's stand farther away, in case Xiang Yi can't hold out, we'll both be doomed!"

"Hey, don't run towards us!"

"Aren't they afraid of dragging us down? Their EQ is really too low!"

"…"

The image of the young women fighting with all their might, coupled with those heartbreaking words, brought about a strong impact!

There was a slew of pop-up comments.

—— [I f**king cried out loud!]

—— [Why is Xiang Yi so nice?! They way she scurried over righteously really tugs at my heartstrings!]

–[Don't think I don't know who that person is just because the voice has been edited! Bai Wuxia, you'd better be condemned! I want you to be canceled!!!]

…

Even those netizens who started out by nitpicking and doubting Xiang Yi's qualification to be the main guest, began to tear up.

All the pop-up comments on the screen were uniform.

–[She deserves to be the main guest!]

–[She deserves to be the main guest!]

–[She deserves to be the main guest!]

chapters.title: Chapter 529 - Her Name Is Xiang Yi
chapters.body:
Chapter 529 - Her Name Is Xiang Yi

…

At this point in the broadcast, there was no longer anyone questioning whether or not Xiang Yi was worthy of being the main guest.

Reason being, there was nothing to be doubted!

The #WhoIsTheBeautifulSisterInNationalMassWorkout went straight to the second place of the hot search list!

The first place was occupied by another hashtag.

#HerNameIsXiangYi!

The person who posted it was the official Weibo account of Xiang Yi's fan club.

[@ProtectMySpicyRabbits: She's not a vase, she's just has a pretty face; she's not pretending, she just knows a little bit about everything; she's not an actress, she has her own name – #HerNameIsXiangYi.]

There was a collage of photos attached to it, each of which were gorgeous photos of her.

There were photos of Xiang Yi washing her hands before making soup; her holding a silver needle for acupuncture; her playing the banjo, and her receiving a banner…

The photos seemed random, but they were actually taken intentionally.

It was to show everyone that she really was a very outstanding girl.

On this day, countless people got rid of their stereotypical labels of Xiang Yi.

They finally genuinely got to know Xiang Yi again!

…

It was the third bonus round of games in NationalMassWorkout – that is, the part where the crew went to Xiang Yi's home to shoot.

After a thrilling experience, the viewers felt immense bliss when they finally got to see a serene and peaceful scene.

It turned out that mediocrity is also a kind of happiness.

Accustomed to the traffic of the big city and bright lights, the audience felt like they were in paradise when they saw the beautiful scene.

The rhythm of the second half was slow but not flat; detailed but not draggy.

This episode of National Mass Workout finally ended with one sentence.

"The game is just a game, but friends are not just friends."

The audience smiled in resonance when they saw that sentence, seemingly having understood something.

Although they were smiling, they realized that their eyes were filled with tears when they came back to their senses.

There were many viewers who, after watching the variety show, called their family and friends instead of continuing to surf the Internet as usual.

"Mom, I miss the chicken soup you made…"

"Sister! We haven't seen each other for a long time. Let's go out for a meal!"

"Brother, how are you doing lately? Hahaha life seems to be going well for you, eh? Call me Daddy!"

"…"

The rating of "National Mass Workout" surged on the video platform app. This episode was hailed by countless people as a "textbook example for variety shows", a work with "divine editing" that's "comparable to an art film". It even became a classic in the history of variety shows.

…

Everything on the Internet did not seem to affect the people in the manor in the slightest.

After the live broadcast, the people went back to their respective rooms to rest.

The night was getting darker, and Xiang Yi was all snuggled up in bed and reading a book while Xiao Naofu was sleeping soundly on the pillow next to her, snoring incessantly.

It was raining and there was the dull rumbling of thunder.

When Xiang Yi got up to go to the living room to get water, she vaguely heard a rustling noise coming from the utility room.

'Thief?'

The young lady frowned slightly, casually picked up the wooden sword that she usually used for morning practice and kicked open the door of the utility room!

It was dark.

She made eye contact with Ling Ye.

His complexion was pale and he seemed to be terrified. He was nestled in the cramped space, as if it was the only way to feel safe.

Xiang Yi looked at him for a few seconds and then walked away.

Ling Ye tried to grab her coat, but he could not reach her.

A bitter smile appeared on his lips and he thought that perhaps, this was retribution.

'Sister Xiang Yi must think… that I'm acting.'

His body was getting colder and colder. Ling Ye started coughing and a lamp suddenly appeared in sight.

The lamp wasn't bright enough but the light was very warm.

It was a warm, orange night lamp.

….

chapters.title: Chapter 530 - I Will Be Good
chapters.body:
Chapter 530 - I Will Be Good

"…"

The stars in the sky were few and far between, and it was quiet indoors.

In the boundless darkness, there was suddenly an extra trace of light.

Stunned, Ling Ye suddenly felt his nose getting a little sore as he looked at that light.

Immediately afterwards, the warm, tender, and soft…Little Xiji stuffed itself into his arms.

The little Shiba Inu was dazed as it opened its watery eyes and tilted its head in confusion. "Woof?"

"Little Xiji is very obedient, can you let it accompany you?" asked Xiang Yi whose voice was mellow and sweet, like a heavenly melody in the night. "I once read in a paper that pets can effectively relieve human anxiety and tension."

Ling Ye's Adam's apple rolled and he finally managed to suppress his incessant coughing. He said in a hoarse voice, "Thank you…"

"You're welcome." Xiang Yi gazed at him calmly and didn't discriminate him or try to give him any life advice. Instead, she asked, "Do you need me to close the door?"

She did not demand him to be normal and strong or force him to try and get better.

Yet for the first time, Ling Ye felt that he was being respected.

He heard his own nearly broken murmur. "Sister Xiang Yi… can you not go?"

Before Xiang Yi could answer, the angelic and pretty young man with exquisite features, said self-deprecatingly, "How can I deserve…" His fingertips curled up hard and he murmured, "I'm sorry, Sister Xiang Yi."

Xiang Yi blinked gently and pointed in the direction of the bookshelf. "I'll leave a crack in the door while I go outside to read. If you're afraid, knock twice on the door and if I hear you, I'll also knock twice on the bookshelf. Is that okay with you?"

Ling Ye looked at her in disbelief. He didn't even know if he nodded, and by the time he came back to his senses, he was shrouded in darkness again.

The difference was that there was a chubby Shiba Inu in his arms, rubbing itself against his chest and actively baring its belly for him to rub it.

There was a small night lamp beside him, which was extremely dim and faint but stubbornly glistening against the infinite darkness.

He looked through the gap in the door to see that the area where the bookshelf was had been lit up. The light seemed to have a fatal attraction to him and for a moment, Ling Ye suddenly understood why moths are destined to swarm towards light.

That beaming light is what the heart yearns for.

He tentatively knocked twice on the door lightly before quickly retracting his hand.

He was afraid she wouldn't hear him but also afraid that she would.

He was conflicted and stuck in a dilemma.

A few seconds later, the calm and composed sound of bones being knocked against solid wood came in through the door.

All the confusion and agony seemed to have been muted at this moment.

Ling Ye's heart was beating extremely quickly as he clenched his fist.

The system sensed his abnormality and remained silent.

Even though the salvation was short-lived, it was still salvation.

At least in this moment, the host is blissful.

…

…

Xiang Yi was reading a book attentively when she suddenly sensed another figure beside her.

Unable to hold himself back any longer, the figure tugged the corner of her shirt.

"Sister Xiang Yi."

Xiang Yi looked in the direction of the sound and discovered that Ling Ye had come over at some point and was now sitting cross-legged on the floor, looking up at her without blinking and facing her with his pretty face.

"Is there something wrong?" Xiang Yi frowned and said, "The floor is cold, get up."

'Sister Xiang Yi is showing me concern.'

This realization made Ling Ye feel excited yet miserable.

"Sister Xiang Yi, can I keep staying by your side?"

"Sister, I will be very good."

"Sister…"

His voice was nasally and he sounded like he was acting coquettishly or even pleading her.

Xiang Yi said calmly, "Ling Ye, don't get lost. You should go home."

Hearing this, Ling Ye suddenly laughed bitterly.

He said, "Sister Xiang Yi, not everyone wants to go home."

chapters.title: Chapter 531 - Even You Betrayed Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 531 - Even You Betrayed Me

Xiang Yi was slightly stunned.

Ling Ye looked up at her and said in a hoarse voice hoarse, "Sister Xiang Yi, you know, no one will wait for me to go home, no one…"

A hint of a fruity scent with citrus notes suddenly wafted up to the tip of his nose as Xiang Yi squatted down in front of him.

"It's okay, when you finish all the tasks, you can choose a favorite realm to stay in."

"Can I… choose to stay in your realm, Sister Xiang Yi?"

As soon as he said that, his expression suddenly changed.

His face became visibly pale and it as if he had lost all vitality in an instant. Ling Ye parted his lips before pressing them together again. His pupils were dilated and he seemed to be talking to the system in his head.

Xiang Yi vaguely heard a few words.

"No…it's impossible…"

"You betrayed me? Even you betrayed me?!"

"Who else could it be except you…"

Bang…

The young man fell to the ground.

Xiang Yi quickly checked on him.

"Sister…"

Ling Ye called out and tried to grab Xiang Yi's hand but to no avail. Before he could even touch the corner of her shirt, he fell to the ground…

…

…

Late at night, the hospital.

Seated on the long bench in the corridor, Xiang Yi began to get distracted as her gaze was blank.

A man's jacket was suddenly draped on her slender shoulders and she was asked a question.

"Ling Ye is awake." Shi Sui said, "Do you want to go see him?"

Xiang Yi snapped out of her thoughts and nodded.

She walked to the door of the emergency room, and saw the dazed young man through the clear glass but she felt as if she was looking at another person.

She suddenly stopped in her tracks.

A moment later, Xiang Yi looked down and said, "Good that he's alright."

However, there was no longer a need to look at him.

Well because he was no longer the same Ling Ye.

'Where did he go? What happened? Is he still… alive?'

Xiang Yi sighed, unable to control herself even though she told herself to stop thinking about it.

Someone suddenly held her fingers and interlocked his fingers with hers.

"Xiang Yi, I'm here."

"Yes." Xiang Yi assented and rested her forehead on his shoulder. She said, "Boyfriend, lend me your shoulder for a while."

Shi Sui sensed the change in her mood. Seeing that she did not want to talk about it, he did not probe any further and instead just gently patted her back with his other hand.

A few moments later.

Xiang Yi got a grip on her emotions and said, "Boyfriend, let's go home."

The words 'go home' hit the soft spot of his heart and he said with some mellow emotions, "Okay, anything you say, Xiang Yi."

Before leaving, he glanced at Ling Ye who was in the emergency room and suddenly squinted his long, narrow, and dark eyes.

'Was Xiang Yi's body swapped in such a manner back then too?'

…

…

It was an eventful and chaotic night.

Firstly, Ling Ye suddenly passed out and was conveyed to the hospital. Out of concern for his beloved apprentice, he drove to the hospital overnight but he ended up getting into a traffic accident.

The next morning, the news about Tian Zhi and his apprentice being hospitalized became viral on the Internet.

Qin Wanyan never thought that she would draw flak for this matter.

The netizens were slamming her because she was a jinx!

Qin Wanyan was so furious that she started trembling. 'Why? Just why!?!'

'I'm the chosen one!'

The system coaxed her for a long time but she retorted so hostilely that it didn't dare to answer anymore.

All of a sudden, the system made a "huh" sound and said, "The system has detected a problem with the helper and has now erased the helper. You have been assigned a new task and you will earn a generous reward for completing it!"

Qin Wanyan beamed with joy when she heard that there was going to be a reward.

"What task?"

"Wooing the president of Xing Chen Entertainment, Xiang Feng!"

chapters.title: Chapter 532 - It Will Be Terrible If You Pass It To Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 532 - It Will Be Terrible If You Pass It To Me

…

…

"Ah-choo-" Xiang Feng, who was standing in front of the floor-to-ceiling window with the black coffee bought by the new assistant, sneezed for the sixth time this morning.

He sipped a mouthful of coffee, only to be scalded by it. "Ugh, it's hot. What on earth is this? It tastes awful…"

The assistant's face turned as pale as a sheet, overwhelmed with so much fear that her legs started shaking.

'Am I going to lose this job that I've painstakingly clinched!?'

In the next second…

The handsome, charming, and domineering CEO said in a deep voice, "Miss Lai, I need you to do something for me."

Assistant Li spluttered, "You-you-you please…"

"Go downstairs to the junk… Ahem, go to the fast food restaurant to get me a cup of soy milk to-go. Remember to take a sachet of white sugar too!"

The stunned Assistant Li said, "Mr. Xiang, it seems that the soy milk in the fast food restaurant is not made of ground soybeans but soy milk power. It's not very healthy…"

Xiang Feng was confused. "I'm already eating junk, do you think I still care about health?"

Assistant Li was confused.

"By the way, why is your face covered in dirt? Wash your face before you come to work the next time." Xiang Feng used his face as an example and pointed at his jaw, cheekbones, nose and other parts of his face. "Look at this, this and this. You're at least a beautiful girl in this city and you have to pay attention to your image."

Assistant Li: "…"

If she remembered correctly, those spots on her face that he mentioned, were actually the spots that she had applied makeup on to contour her face.

'Why did he say that I didn't wash my face?'

"Also, you're so cold that your nose has turned red. Is it really that cold? You may increase the temperature of the the air conditioner later."

Assistant Li was speechless again.

She was not feeling chilly. She had just deliberately put some blusher on the tip of her nose to make herself look pitiful and vulnerable!

"Don't catch a cold…" Assistant Li was feeling touched when she saw Xiang Feng taking a few steps back warily. He said, "It would be troublesome if you end up passing it to me."

Assistant Li was speechless.

She finally understood why Xiang Feng is still a singleton 🙂

…

…

In the manor.

Perhaps because she had caught a cold last night, Xiang Yi sneezed twice when she woke up in the morning for a workout.

She didn't take it seriously and was about to practice a set of swordplay when she head an exclamation that was full of gusto. "Xiang Yi!"

The young girl's hand shook in fear and she almost dropped her sword.

Dumbfounded, she turned around and the look on her face was replaced by a gleeful expression the moment she saw the person who was walking over.

"Brother!"

She skipped towards Xiang Qi but he hollered, "Stop it! Don't move!"

Xiang Yi stopped in her tracks and looked at him in confusion.

His tall stature gave him an advantage and he could easily defeat countless male models. If he were to do a catwalk on the runway, he would look really cool and stylish.

He took off his long trench coat and put it over ehr head.

"…"

Xiang Yi opened her mouth but before she could speak, she heard Xiang Qi chiding her fiercely, "I'm telling you, I'm really angry! I'm very angry! You'd better stay quiet!!!"

As he spoke, he quickly helped Xiang put on the trench coat.

Xiang Yi wasn't short but Xiang Qi's trench coat was still too big for her and it was almost reaching her ankles.

With his hands on his waist, Xiang Qi chided, "Who gave you the permission to sneeze!?! I'm telling you, you're not allowed to sneeze! You have to stay healthy!"

Xiang Yi was amused. 'Why is Xiang Qi acting like a child?'

"Why are you laughing? What's so funny?"

Xiang Yi blinked and asked, "Can I talk now? My dearest brother who's the most handsome and best brother in the universe~"

Whoosh——

Xiang Qi's ears reddened immediately but he pretended to be calm and said, "What did you say? My hearing has been kind of bad lately so you have to repeat it a few more times before I can hear you clearly."

chapters.title: Chapter 533 - Social Situation
chapters.body:
Chapter 533 - Social Situation

Xiang Yi said smilingly, "Brother, you are the most handsome and the best ever~"

Xiang Yi said, "Continue, I'm still deaf."

Before she finished, a cold and aloof voice came from behind her. "Sister, what does that make me?"

"Hey…Fourth Brother…" Xiang Yi looked at Xiang Yu, who was dressed in a black tracksuit.

The teenager was holding a huge and grand trophy, with a cold expression on his face and messy hair. He seemed to have taken a long journey to travel all the way here.

Xiang Yi hurriedly said, "Fourth Brother, you treat me the best!"

In the next second…

The next moment, a gentle and refined voice sounded slowly. "Bunny, if you say so, I will be sad."

Xiang Yi was speechless.

'Second Brother is back too!?!'

She swallowed her saliva and somehow felt that it was a social situation from a comic…

'Second Brother, you're the best!'

The next next second…

"Oh? Is that so?" Like a cold tree on the distant mountains that had shaken off a handful of snow from the treetops, there seems to be a magnetic field in the man's voice, absolutely alluring.

It was her eldest brother, Xiang Chen.

Xiang Yi scurried towards Xiang Yu and hid behind him cowardly while Xiang Yu hid behind Xiang Qi, and Xiang Qi hid behind Xiang Li…

It was as if they were playing the game of 'Eagle Catching Chicks'. Xiang Chen was the ferocious eagle while Xiang Li was the mother hen.

Xiang Chen had clearly just disembarked from the plane. However, he was always dressed neatly and his hair was always tidy, just like the elite he was.

He adjusted his snow-white cuffs and glanced across the crowd before looking at Xiang Yi.

He slowly got closer.

Xiang Yi was so frightened that she closed her eyes.

After a short while, she felt a weight on her shoulders.

The young girl quietly opened her eyelids a little, only to discover that…

Xiang Chen was expressionlessly giving her another layer of jacket outside of her trench coat.

"…"

She whispered, "Big Brother, I'm not cold…"

Xiang Chen said, "You're cold."

"I…" Faced with her eldest brother's deep, dark, and serene eyes, Xiang Yi was forced to give in. "I-I'm cold."

Xiang Chen rubbed her little head and said, "Wear more layers in the morning."

His gentleness was reserved exclusively for his younger sister. He wasn't that polite to his younger brothers.

He looked around and the people on whom his gaze landed, couldn't help but stand up straight.

"Each and every one of you, have you all got a lot of time on your hands?"

They were well-behaved like elementary school students and answered Xiang Chen's question.

Xiang Yu answered feebly, "I-I just finished a tournament. I'm on a two-day break."

Xiang Qi whistled diffidently before saying, "I'm a freelancer to begin with. I'm free all the time."

Xiang Li supported his glasses and said, "I'm tired from doing scientific research so I came back to relax. It's important to have good work-life balance."

Xiang Chen nodded in response.

Seemingly having sensed something, he suddenly looked at a certain spot, his sharp gaze darting through the air and crushing through the mist before fixating on someone.

Shi Sui was clad in a gray hooded sweatshirt and looked clean and fresh, just like a college student.

With a thermos flask in hand, he followed Xiang Chen's line of sight and walked towards Xiang Yi. "Xiang Yi, have some warm water."

Xiang Yi grabbed it and thanked him, "Thank you, Boyfriend~"

Before she finished, she was the first to react and wanted to cover her mouth but it was too late.

She regretted it but to her surprise, Shi Sui put all the blame on himself with a simple sentence.

"Girlfriend, you're welcome."

Xiang Chen pulled up his sleeves.

Xiang Li removed his silver-framed glasses.

Xiang Qi bent down and started to take off his shoes.

Xiang Yu held the trophy tightly in hand, filled with an urge to take action.

The air was filled with tension but Shi Sui nonetheless, blinked calmly and smiled faintly at the Xiang brothers.

"Good morning, Brothers~~"

….

chapters.title: Chapter 534 - King Of Pretentiousness (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 534 - King Of Pretentiousness (1)

The man’s tone of voice was sluggish and familiar, but also with some…coquettishness that was hard to ignore…

The Xiang brothers: …!!

“This dog-like man is very arrogant, huh?” Xiang Qi cursed and elbowed Xiang Yu before ordering, “Xiang Yu, take his trophy and knock it against his head!”

The young gaming god had a cold and aloof expression on his face.

He knew that Xiang Qi was just trying to coerce him into courting death.

“You should hit him with your shoe instead,” said Xiang Yu who wasn’t going to fall for his trick at all.

Xiang Qi was speechless.

‘Well, I-I don’t dare to.’

Shi Sui and Xiang Chen were of the same age. If Xiang Chen was the great demon king who dominates and takes control of the crowd, Shi Sui would be the second demon king that grins beside him…

Xiang Qi was good at verbal arguments but when it comes to “actual battles” he wouldn’t dare to retaliate at all.

“Are you going out for a run?” Xiang Yi tried to get Shi Sui out of this awkward situation. “There you go, a towel for you.”

Xiang Yi handed him a towel, which was pink and soft. It obviously belonged to her.

Shi Sui took the towel and slowly put the towel on his neck. He seemed to be moving at 0.5x speed.

“Thank you, Xiang Yi~ ~”

The Xiang brothers: …!!

“You can even tolerate that?” Xiang Qi continued to fan the flames.

Xiang Yu gritted his teeth and shoved the trophy into Xiang Qi’s hand. “Hold it for me.”

He zipped up his battle team uniform and walked towards Shi Sui expressionlessly. “Are you going for a run? Let’s go together.”

Xiang Yi wanted to stop them but Xiang Qi pulled her back by her collar so she had no choice but to stop in her tracks like a little chicken.

“Fourth Brother, don’t bully him…”

Although Xiang Yu was a professional e-sports player, he was not the type to neglect working out. On the contrary, he was very fit and had even completed a marathon during vacation break last month.

‘Shi Sui is such a delicate man. How can he beat Fourth Brother?’

Shi Sui wasn’t aware that his image in Xiang Yi’s heart had already collapsed. He smiled faintly and agreed, “Sure, let’s do three kilometers?”

“Hah, let’s do five.” Xiang Yu sneered and moved his wrist and ankle, his tone filled with the brashness of teenage angst. “You can have a head start.”

If Smog’s fans were here together, they would probably scream in unison.

How…arrogant.

However, he was very suave too.

Yearning for more drama, Xiang Qi put his finger on his mouth and whistled clearly. “Ready, start!”

The two figures, one dressed in black and the other in gray, gradually ran away.

Xiang Yi was on tenterhooks, fearing that Shi Sui would gas out halfway through or force himself to keep up even though he could no longer go on.

Incredibly vexed and anxious, Xiang Yi paced back and forth on the spot.

Xiang Chen and the others were much more relaxed and calm. They sat down on the stone table and stone bench of the courtyard while Xiang Qi fawningly brought some brewed tea to Xiang Chen.

Only after taking a mouthful of it did Xiang Chen frown. Although he didn’t say anything, he didn’t take another sip of the tea after the first mouthful.

“Xiang Yi, can I trouble you to make a few cups of coffee?” Xiang Li asked in a warm voice.

The anxious young girl’s heart nodded distractedly and went back to the room to prepare the drinks.

As soon as she left, Xiang Chen’s aura became even colder and even Xiang Li couldn’t resist it.

“Xiang Yi seems to have really grown up,” Xiang Li lamented.

Xiang Chen sneered, “She’s just confused and bewitched by his charm.”

Although the rest of his brothers had never seen Shi Sui’s true colors before, he had.

Those who step out of the darkness are not shrouded in light but covered in a mask.

Xiang Qi thought of something and blurted, “I think driving a wedge between them is a better approach than stopping him. Since we are worried that he might toy with Xiang Yi’s feelings, the solution is very simple. Why don’t we let her toy with the feelings of men?”

For a while, Xiang Chen and Xiang Li looked at him with… sheepish gazes.

chapters.title: Chapter 535 - Pretentious (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 535 - Pretentious (2)

Chapter 535: King of Pretentiousness (2)

Xiang Qi said righteously, “I think what I said is very reasonable! Why do you guys look at me like this? You’re making it look like I have no brains…”

Xiang Li asked, “You do?”

Xiang Chen asked, “You have?”

Xiang Qi was speechless.

‘Ouch, that hurt.’

“This logic of yours is equivalent to letting Xiang Yi become a jerk in order to keep her from meeting scumbags.” Xiang Yi clucked her tongue against the roof of her mouth. “We have the same genes, I totally can’t understand how you can be so stupid.”

Xiang Qi was speechless.

‘I was just giving a suggestion. Why am I getting attacked?’

As they spoke, Xiang Yi came out with a coffee pot and poured a cup for each of them.

The aroma of hand-brewed coffee wafted into the air and the taste was mellow and slightly bitter.

Xiang Chen’s brows were obviously relaxed as he held onto the cup of coffee, taking a sip at a time.

Xiang Li complimented, “Xiang Yi’s skills have become better again.”

“Hey hey, they’re back. They’re back!” Xiang Yi’s eyes were sharp and saw the two people who came back from running.

Unlike what Xiang Yi imagined, Shi Sui was too delicate to run.

The man looked calm, breathing evenly, only a slight sweat on his forehead.

Xiang Yu was as tired as a dead dog, panting heavily and sweating profusely as he followed behind.

A look of bewilderment appeared on Xiang Yi’s tender face.

‘Is my boyfriend that strong!?’

While Xiang Li and Xiang Chen could still maintain their composure, Xiang Qi’s expression management was out of control. He looked at Shi Sui with his eyes full of disbelief.

‘What the hell?’

‘That dog of a man is so strong!?!’

Shi Sui stopped in his tracks and started wiping his sweat with the towel given by Xiang Yi, as if he was deliberately showing off.

Xiang Yu bent his knees, his heart beating even faster than it did when he was competing in the world tournament.

The two of them had indeed run five kilometers but ordinary people would usually speed up in the last few hundred meters. However, Shi Sui ran at a faster speed for at least two kilometers! Two kilometers!!

‘Who can withstand this?!’

His physical strength was quickly depleted, but on the contrary, Shi Sui was acting as if nothing happened. Xiang Yu doubted that he could continue to run.

‘This is really perverted! How twisted!!’

“Brother, are you tired?” Shi Sui asked. Xiang Yu shivered and said, “Brother Shi, Brother Shi, don’t call me Brother…”

“How can that do? I’m Xiang Yi’s boyfriend. Of course I have to call you guys ‘Brother’ like she does~~”

“…”

Shi Sui grabbed a new towel and wiped Xiang Yu’s sweat for him in a friendly manner. He even handed him a bottle of sports drink and said, “Brother trains hard in e-sports everyday but he’s also very good at sports.”

Xiang Yu was shocked!

Although it was a very shameful statement…

‘Feels great! Ahhhhh!!!!’

The brother that he admired since childhood complimented her, which was undoubtedly a huge recognition for the boy.

Not only that, Shi Sui also added, “I don’t know if Xiao Naofu has woken up yet… Recently, it seems to have grown fatter. Its face is round and its belly is soft…”

Whoosh——

Xiang Yu couldn’t help but clench his fist. “It-it is not fat! Don’t call it fat, Brother Shi! It will be sad when it hears you!!”

“Sorry, it was a slip of the tongue.” He said, “It’s not fat, it’s just fluffy.”

Xiang Yu was flabbergasted!!!

His furry pet lover instincts kicked in and he was completely irrational. Not feeling physically exhausted at all, he rushed into the living room in a flash, looking around for Xiao Naofu.

“Mimi…Mimi Mimi…”

Shi Sui looked at Xiang Yi and sneered silently.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

She suddenly realized that her boyfriend was a little…evil.

chapters.title: Chapter 536 - King Of Pretentiousness (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 536 - King Of Pretentiousness (3)

After successfully getting the upper hand, Shi Sui said gently and innocently, “Brothers, it’s been hard on all of you to travel all the way here. It’s time for breakfast.”

Xiang Qi thought he found a blind spot so he sprung up and exclaimed, “You actually dare to make my sister cook breakfast? There isn’t a rule in our family that states that girls have to cook!”

Although Xiang Yi was a good cook, the Xiang family had never really let her do the cooking.

Even when she cooked, the male members of the family were the ones who would usually clean up and do the dishes.

Xiang Yi coughed and said embarrassedly, “Uh… Shi Sui has been the one cooking lately.”

Her hand injury was actually not that serious but Shi Sui treated her like a child who couldn’t take care of herself and refused to let her touch the woks, pants, and spatula.

Xiang Yi was dying to cook and she wished she could swing the large wok dozens of times.

“…” Xiang Qi didn’t expect to hear that answer. After staying silent for two seconds, he gave full play to an aggressive arguer. “Isn’t it only right for boys to do household chores? It’s already rather late and you still haven’t served breakfast to Xiang Yi. Are you trying to make her starve?”

In Xiang Yi’s eyes, this scene resembled that of a drama in which a vicious and bossy mother-in-law reprimands her young and meek daughter-in-law who concedes for the greater good…

The little girl gently tugged his sleeve and said, “Brother, don’t be mean to him…”

Shi Sui answered in time, “I’m fine, Xiang Yi, Brother is right. I’m going to go make breakfast now.”

Xiang Yi looked at Shi Sui whose eyelashes were drooping nicely. He looked vulnerable and docile, as if he was abiding by the Xiang family’s rules where boys are not allowed to eat at the dining table.

The two looked at each other. Shi Sui seemed to have “reluctantly” forced himself to smile before proceeding to take a quick shower. He then began to busy in the kitchen.

The porridge was cooked in advance in the rice cooker at regular intervals. Shi Sui whipped up two dishes, and served the porridge with some pickled vegetables and salted duck eggs. It looked like a sumptious eal.

He placed the dishes on the table and set the table. Just as he was about to take his seat, Xiang Yi stood forth to pick on him again, “We have rules where boys don’t get to sit at the dining table for meals!”

Xiang Yi’s eyes widened in shock and she asked, “Since when did this family rule exist? And you’re a boy too, Brother….”

Xiang Qi added, “All boys except for your brother!”

“…”

Well, he was indeed very much like an evil mother-in-law.

Shi Sui whispered, “I’ll do as you say, Brother. You guys carry on, I’ll go to the side and eat some food.”

As he spoke, he carried a bowl of porridge to the stool at the side and sipped on it slowly, taking one mouthful at a time.

He really looked weak, helpless and pitiful.

This scene sounded extremely sad!

Xiang Yi obviously couldn’t tolerate it. She moved over to sit next to Shi Sui with a bowl of porridge, silently protesting against her brothers’ “old-fashioned mindset”.

“Here’s a duck egg yolk for you.” Xiang Yi gave Shi Sui her duck egg yolk.

Shi Sui declined, “Xiang Yi, don’t bother about me, go back and eat with your brothers.”

“I can’t watch you suffer this mistreatment!”

“It’s okay for me to suffer a little.”

Hearing the conversation between the two, Xiang Qi was puzzled.

‘Excuse me?’

‘I just want to bully Shi Sui, why did I end up pushing Xiang Yi to him instead!?’

“By the way, Xiang Yi, I accidentally broke your apron…” Shi Sui sighed and said, “That’s the unique apron that Brother exclusively made for you. I’m sorry, I will try to sew it up later.”

The two of them were listening to their conversation attentively and when they heard this, they became anxious.

“You know how to sew? Bullsh*t! Where’s the apron? Let me do it!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 537 - King Of Pretentiousness (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 537 - King Of Pretentiousness (4)

“Brother, it’s okay, I can sew it. Although I can’t sew well, I will try my best.” Shi Sui was totally behaving like a pretentious person.

Xiang Qi was furious. “How dare you touch my masterpiece knowing that you can’t sew well?!”

Xiang Qi was tolerant in most aspects except his work and designs. When it comes to work, he was an absolute perfectionist who focused on excellence, precision, and flawlessness.

Looking rather aggrieved, Shi Sui said, “Brother, I was wrong.”

Xiang Qi snapped aggressively with anger, “Let me tell you, it’s my job to sew for my sister! Don’t try to steal it from me! Never ever in this life! I’m the only one in this world who can make the most beautiful dress for my sister!”

“I really envy Xiang Yi for having such a nice brother.”

His words were just what Xiang Qi wanted to hear.

Xiang Qi coughed and suddenly felt that Shi Sui was much more pleasing to the eye.

‘Well, that’s not too bad.’

‘Anyway, he’s so unskilled that he definitely wouldn’t be able to pose a threat to my position in Xiang Yi’s heart.’

At the thought of this, Xiang Qi felt greatly relieved and he gave Shi Sui the side-eye, with his hands in his pocket in a highly mighty manner. He hummed a tune and proceeded to sew Xiang Yi’s apron.

Xiang Yi was dumbfounded by that.

‘This… That works too?’

She suddenly realized that her boyfriend was really god a dealing with viciousness.

Xiang Li and Xiang Chen watched coldly as Xiang Yu and Xiang Qi were conquered one after another.

The two wise and intelligent men naturally wouldn’t be deceived by Shi Sui’s little tricks.

Shi Sui wasn’t in a hurry either. After having porridge, he proceeded to take the initiative to clean up the table and even pretentiously chose not to use the dishwasher. Instead, he washed them by hand.

It can be said that he was extremely virtuous!

Xiang Li answered, “He’s acting.”

Xiang Chen chuckled.

The two people were not moved or convinced by him at all.

However, he had gradually formed a good impression in their hearts.

…

In the living room.

Xiang Yu let himself go and hugged Xiao Naofu while kissing it. However, Xiao Naofu looked like it was forced to accept the affection…

The skilled Xiang Qi sewed some aprons for Xiang Yi before tying a few butterly knots for her.

Xiang Chen was replying to emails with his laptop and he would pinch his forehead from time to time.

The atmosphere was harmonious for a while, as Xiang Li was discussing with Xiang Yi about the cooperation between Little Rabbit Farms and the Nancheng’s Research Institute.

However, when Shi Sui walked out of the kitchen, the balance and peace were broken.

Seeing that the tension was rising, Xiang Yi hurriedly eased the atmosphere and casually asked, “Shi Sui, who was the winner of the last Nancheng Agronomy Awards? I kind of want to grow that super pumpkin that he cultivated…”

Shi Sui said, “Let me think about it.”

Xiang Li sneered and said, “You still need to think about it? Well, it makes sense. After all, you haven’t been to college and it’s only normal for you to be unable to answer such questions. The winner of the last Agronomy Awards is…”

Xiang Li was suddenly at a loss for words.

The reason that a genius is called a genius is because he has an impressive memory.

However, there is a basic prerequisite for being able to remember things well, and that is, to read the content beforehand.

Even a genius wouldn’t be able to answer a question regarding something that he had never seen or heard of at all.

Xiang Li had dabbled in content about pure agronomy but he really hadn’t paid any attention to the winner of the Nancheng Agronomy Award.

“It’s Mr. Lin Zhengyu, right?” Amidst the nearly suffocating silence, Shi Sui lightly uttered a name, and then delivered a speech that was really extremely pretentious. “Brother, you’re already doing very well. Sometimes, it’s normal to lack knowledge in some aspects~~”

Xiang Li was speechless.

‘Damn it!!!’

…

chapters.title: Chapter 538 - Let Brother Vent His Anger
chapters.body:
Chapter 538 - Let Brother Vent His Anger

Shi Sui asked, “Huh? Brother is angry? I’m sorry, I’m sorry, I didn’t mean to…”

Xiang Li said, “I didn’t.”

Shi Sui tugged Xiang Yi’s sleeve and said, “Xiang Yi, Brother is angry with me, it’s all my fault for affecting his mood…”

Xiang Yi was softhearted so she pleaded, “Brother, simmer down, okay? Shi Sui is right. Brother, you’re being too strict with yourself. Geniuses are not omniscient.”
