“Also, the reason that Shi Sui didn’t go to college isn’t that he doesn’t want to study, but because his family faced some changes. Brother, you have no right to mock him with this!”

Xiang Li was speechless.

He was really furious but he still had to keep smiling.

Xiang Li, who had suffered an unjustifiable loss, held up his glasses as he felt somewhat depressed.

‘Forget it, I’ll resign to fate.’

‘It’s my fault for being negligent and careless.’

He had underestimated Xiang Yi’s feelings for Shi Sui.

But…

‘Big Brother hasn’t made a move yet.’

Xiang Li smiled ambiguously and sat down on the sofa in a comfortable position while waiting for Shi Sui to get abused by Xiang Chen.

As expected…

When Xiang Chen clicked the last ‘return’ key…

He looked up and raised his eyebrows slightly at Shi Sui. “It’s been a long time since we met. How about we get some exercise?”

Xiang Yi knew that Xiang Chen definitely wasn’t referring to working out in the park…

Without even thinking, she stood in front of Shi Sui to shield him, “Big Brother, he’s very delicate and weak. Don’t hit him, just hit me!”

Xiang Chen was confused.

The others: ????

Shi Sui was the only one who was first stunned for a few seconds before smiling gleefully.

‘The taste of being protected by Xiang Yi…’

‘Is not too bad.’

Xiang Chen said expressionlessly, “Xiang Yi, come here.”

The young woman trembled and said, “Big brother…”

“Come here.”

Xiang Chen had an imposing aura, which even Xiang Li and the others could barely stand, let alone Xiang Yi.

All of a sudden…

Shi Sui took Xiang Yi’s little hand and held in tightly in his palm as if there wasn’t anyone else around.

“I’ll go with Xiang Yi.”

Xiang Yi’s doe-like eyes lit up all of a sudden.

Xiang Chen was speechless.

Xiang Chen secretly criticized him from the side, “This dog man really think we are dead?!”

Xiang Yu: “You can’t beat him.”

Xiang Qi: “(ˉ▽￣～) Psht~~ I just can’t be bothered to strike, got it?”

Xiang Yu: “You can’t beat him.”

Xiang Qi: “As long as I get serious, even Big Brother will be defeated by me!”

Xiang Yu couldn’t be bothered to answer him at all. He retorted, “If you can do it, go ahead.”

“… ” Xiang Qi placed his fingers on his lips, coughed twice, and said, “Solving problems with violence is a way to resolve disputes that only low-level creatures would adopt.”

In the next second…

Xiang Chen took off his suit jacket and casually threw it onto the arm of the sofa next to him. His voice was low, mellow, and as cold as a cedar. “Xiang Yi, move aside.”

“Big brother you can’t sneakily bully him under the pretext of ‘exercising’…” Xiang Yi argued, “You…you will be guilty of intentionally causing hurt to others!”

“You’re wrong, I’m not going to secretly bully him.” Xiang Chen folded his shirt sleeves and exclaimed, “I’m openly bullying him!”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

However, Shi Sui chuckled and let go of her hand before looking into her eyes.

“Close your eyes.”

He felt her eyelashes fluttering against his palm.

He whispered, “Let Brother vent his anger. I’m fine and I have long been mentally prepared to be beaten up. After all…”

“I am abducting their most cherished and beloved little bunny.”

chapters.title: Chapter 539 - Don’T Cry, Sister
chapters.body:
Chapter 539 - Don’T Cry, Sister

Hearing Shi Sui’s words, the tip of Xiang Yi’s nose suddenly turned sore.

His vision turned dark but his sense of hearing was extraordinarily keen.

The sound of gasping, walking, fists and feet striking his body…

Each sound was like a thump on her heartstrings.

Xiang Yi gripped the corner of her shirt tightly.

…

Shi Sui and Xiang Chen didn’t say much and since their strength was on par with each other, it was difficult to distinguish the winner.

Xiang Yi felt thankful and thought to herself that he had fortunately not made a move…

Once he did, he would definitely be beaten up…

After exchanging a few dozen blows, Shi Sui gave in a little and took a few hits.

Xiang Chen sensed the difference and frowned tightly before grabbing Shi Sui by his collar and pressing him against the wall.

There was a bang.

He said in a deep voice, “I don’t need you to give in to me.”

Shi Sui had taken off his glasses at some point, revealing his peach-blossom-shaped eyes that had hooked inner corners and upturned outer corners.

“Brother, are you tired? Do you need a break?”

His question was full of provocation.

The veins on Xiang Chen’s forehead were jumping and he was about to continue to hit him. However, he inadvertently glanced at Xiang Yi’s face…

The young girl clutched the corner of her coat tightly and she was applying so much force that her slender and soft fingers were as pale as a sheet. Her eyelashes quivered uncontrollably and a teardrop rolled down her face, catching her off guard…

She cried.

Xiang Yi cried.

The perception left Xiang Chen at a momentary loss.

Xiang Yi had never suffered any mistreatment when she was a child and she would cry incessantly once she started.

However, since her parents had gotten into an accident, she rarely cried and it was as if she had suddenly grown up overnight.

If that was the price of growing up, Xiang Chen hoped that she will never grow up.

At this moment, Xiang Chen’s heart was about to break when she cried.

He slowly loosened his grip on Shi Sui’s hand.

Suddenly, all his venting of anger seemed to be pointless.

Following his line of sight, Xiang Li and the others also noticed Xiang Yi’s tears.

“!”

The few men panicked.

“Sister, don’t cry.”

“Sister, Brother is here.”

“Xiang Yi, have a candy, okay?”

“…”

The three men surrounded the young girl and coaxed her with all sorts of words.

Xiang Chen did not go forward and instead looked calm and profound.

Shi Sui’s Adam’s apple moved and only the little girl in the distance was left.

All of his schemes and tricks seemed ridiculous at this point.

He was doing it step by step.

She had never thought about it before.

Shi Sui licked the corner of his mouth with his tongue, on the spot where he had just taken a punch from Xiang Chen. The pain was still sharp and excruciating.

He wanted to get close to her but he felt that he wasn’t worthy of it.

…

Xiang Yi was a little upset at first but after being coaxed by her brothers, she burst into tears that flowed non-stop from her eyes.

Feeling disheveled and embarrassed, she turned away to have her back facing them. She then covered her face with her hand and started sobbing softly.

Her brothers panicked immediately.

“Xiang Yi, what’s wrong? What’s the matter?”

Xiang Yi complained sobbingly, “This is so embarrassing. I’m already so old and yet, I’m actually crying like this…”

“How is that embarrassing? Crying is a human instinct!”

“Yes, yes, you can cry all you want in front of us, your brothers!”

“Bunny, in our eyes, you will always be a little kid who can be as willful and presumptuous as you wish.”

“…”

Xiang Yi painstakingly stopped herself from crying any longer. She looked at Xiang Chen from afar, her beautiful doe-like eyes still wet and teary. The corners of her eyes were red like that of rabbits and it was as if she would tear up again in the next second.

Although she didn’t say anything, it meant more than words could express.

How could he bear to let his sister be sad?

The expression on Xiang Chen’s face changed and his smooth jaw muscles were a little tensed.

He looked askance at Shi Sui with his deep-set eyes, gritted his teeth, and seemed to be dissatisfied but also a little helpless. He said in a deep and hoarse voice, “You got away with it this time.”

chapters.title: Chapter 540 - I Won’T Let Her Down
chapters.body:
Chapter 540 - I Won’T Let Her Down

Those words meant that Xiang Chen accepted Shi Sui despite being upset.

It was because Shi Sui was the person that Xiang Yi liked.

Shi Sui took a deep breath and tried to contain his emotions, which was evident in his voice.

“I won’t let her down.”

“I hope you can understand the significance of that statement,” Xiang Chen said with an austere gaze that was full of a warning.

After saying that, Xiang Chen walked out of the living room without looking back.

He needed to smoke a cigarette to calm down.

However, Xiang Yi hated the smell of tobacco.

…

Xiang Yi adjusted her emotions and scurried towards Shi Sui. “Does any part of your body hurt? I’ll see if it’s serious…”

The Xiang brothers saw that and found it a huge eyesore.

However, Xiang Chen had been akin to the head of the family since they were kids and his attitude was clearly proof that he had accepted Shi Sui.

Xiang Yu clenched his fist and said seriously, “Brother Shi, I have always respected you like you’re an older brother since we were children. My sister is the precious gem that our family has cherished and doted on since she was born, so I hope you will treat her well.”

Xiang Qi’s tone was much more aggressive. He warned, “Shi Sui, let me tell you, if you let my sister suffer, I will not let you off!”

Xiang Li wiped his glasses with an alcohol wipe and his aura was rather graceful and scholarly but the words he said made others shudder for no reason. He said, “You’d better understand that Xiang Yi is definitely not a girl that you can treat casually.”

Shi Sui nodded and said, “I’ll take your words seriously, Brothers.”

“…”

‘What should I do? I still feel like beating him up when I hear him calling me ‘Brother’.’

They suddenly understood why Xiang Chen went outside.

The three men stayed silent and left the living room unanimously.

They were afraid that if they were to stay any longer, they wouldn’t be able to resist the urge to beat Shi Sui up.

Until they left, Xiang Yi was still stunned and overwhelmed with disbelief.

“Have my brothers…approved of our relationship?”

Shi Sui chuckled and said, “Looks like it.”

“!”

Xiang Yi’s eyes lit up. “Great, great, great!”

“Thank you, Xiang Yi, for taking me to meet your family, and for giving me a proper status.”

At that, Xiang Yi was still a little embarrassed. “It’s only right to take your boyfriend to meet your family.”

Shi Sui rubbed her soft hair, and said in an apologetic tone, “I’m sorry, Xiang Yi, I’m afraid I can’t take you to meet my family for now.”

Xiang Yi had heard a little about Shi Sui’s family situation.

Shi Sui was brought up by his father, and the two of them were very close. His father was a famous painter who had high attainments in art and could be considered a master but unfortunately, he had been suffering from mental problems and was currently receiving treatment abroad.

His mother was a businesswoman who had previously been bankrupt but managed to make a comeback. She was a bona fide career woman and Xiang Yi had once heard that she and Shi Sui had a deep conflict, but she wasn’t clear about the details.

“It’s okay, just let nature take its course.” Xiang Yi not only did not take it to heart, but also comforted Shi Sui instead. “Uncle will definitely get better.”

The two of them were talking when they were suddenly interrupted by the sound of footsteps.

“Oh my gosh, Xiang Yi, how come you summoned all your brothers?” Li Jianyu danced with excitement and asked, “How long are they staying at the manor?!”

Xiang Yi thought for a moment before answering, “They should be here all day today.”

Li Jianyu dashed towards Xiang Yi with an exaggerated sliding knee. “You know what, Xiang Yi? You have a halo around your head!”

‘The four brothers of the Xiang family are all together. How interesting and newsworthy this must be!’

Other guests would make the director worried sick.

Guests like Xiang Yi were hard to come by!!

chapters.title: Chapter 541 - Famous Abs
chapters.body:
Chapter 541 - Famous Abs

Chapter 541: Famous Abs

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Not only did they not have to worry about her, but she also brought guests to the show with her too. It was absolutely wonderful!

Xiang Yi said, “They have no problem with being filmed. I just don’t know if today’s guests will mind.”

Today’s guests seemed to all be prominent figures.

The guests that were currently on the show were invited by Li Jianyu who spent a good deal of effort to do so before “Two Under One Roof” rose to popularity.

Although it was a livestream show, Xiang Yi was worried that the guests will mind having to share the camera and airtime with the other guests.

“It’s okay, Director Zheng is very nice.” Shi Sui explained in a warm and gentle voice, “He won’t mind it.”

Director Zheng was a drama series director who had previously directed the drama series that helped Shi Sui win the ‘Best Actor’ award. The two of them were very close to each other.

“That’s good, that’s good.” Li Jianyu was relieved. He looked at the time to see that it was almost time so he quickly said, “Director Zheng is probably about to arrive soon. I’ll go meet him at the entrance. By the way, Shi Sui, why do you look so disheveled…”

There was still a footprint on the fabric of the sweatshirt on Shi Sui’s chest area.

The man replied with a straight face, “I’ll change out of my clothes and join you.”

He went back to the room.

Shi Sui changed into another pair of pants, took off his sweatshirt, and grabbed a random sweatshirt from the checkroom. Someone then started knocking on the door.

He could tell from the familiar rhythm of her footsteps that the person was Xiang Yi.

His thin lips were slightly curled and he put the shirt back onto the clothes rack before proceeding to open the door.

2

The young girl carrying the medicine box appeared in front of him.

Xiang Yi raised her tiny face and when she saw that Shi Sui was topless, her eyes widened in shock but he pretended to be calm. “Aren’t you cold?”

Shi Sui was still smiling as he asked instead of answering, “Is it nice?”

Xiang Yi immediately felt like her face was burning up.

‘W-What should I do?’

1

She felt that Shi Sui had a handsome face, a nice Adam’s apple, beautiful collarbones, and gorgeous abs…

Each one of them happened to fit her aesthetic standards.

The tips of her ears were red as she peeked at Shi Sui’s V-line. “Well… Uh, don’t… don’t let your imagination run wild. I’ll help you check.”

The man’s had a cold and fair skin tone but with a thin layer of muscle, he didn’t seem weak.

There were a few bruises that seemed particularly eye-catching.

Xiang Yi rubbed them a few times with her hand while asking Shi Sui how he felt.

The girl was relieved after confirming that none of his bones were hurt.

‘It seems that Big Brother does know when to stop.’

She raised her small face and exchanged glances with Shi Sui’s deep and dark abyss-like eyes.

“…”

Her heartbeat suddenly started beating chaotically.

“Do you like it?” She heard Shi Sui ask in a hoarse voice.

Xiang Yi’s ears reddened even more and she shoved the medical kit to him. “Apply some medicinal oil or ointment yourself. How can you leave it alone? You have to protect yourself well in the future, don’t wear such revealing clothes.”

Shi Sui chuckled and asked, “Xiang Yi, are you afraid that others will take advantage of me?”

Xiang Yi said solemnly, “The human heart is unpredictable. There is no guarantee that there are bad people with malicious intentions…”

Swish-

He suddenly grabbed her hand and placed it on the area that his fans call “famous abs”.

1

Xiang Yi said shyly, “D-Don’t do that, I feel like I’m taking advantage of you…”

“I’ll let you be the only person who can take advantage of me, okay?” he asked, his voice making her scalp turn numb.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Her tiny face was tensed up and her tone was very serious.

“Shi Sui, I have a secret to tell you.”

“Huh?”

“I seem to have… a devil within me who wants to…do some bad things to you.”

4

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows.

Xiang Yi assured, “Don’t worry, I’ll snuff it out…”

Before she finished her sentence, a pair of warm hands was placed on the back of her neck.

His breathing became a little deeper and he asked, “Xiang Yi, do you want to do whatever you want, for once?”

2

chapters.title: Chapter 542 - Warm And Faint Light
chapters.body:
Chapter 542 - Warm And Faint Light

The spots that her long and delicate fingertips touched felt somewhat ticklish as if wisps of electricity were passing through them.

Xiang Yi instinctively swallowed her saliva.

The man’s handsome face was right in front of hers and his peach-blossom-shaped eyes were dark and full of devotion.

“Y-you… Put your clothes on, boys should behave decently…”

“Xiang Yi, don’t you like it?”

“…”

“Huh?”

The two were extremely close to each other, so close that they could clearly hear each other’s breath.

There was a tinge of redness on her slender neck and her voice was as soft as a mosquito’s buzzing. “I do like it…”

Not only did she like it, but she also wanted to touch his abs too.

Shi Sui laughed and grabbed Xiang Yi’s hand before placing it on his abdomen.

“How about now? Are you happy?”

Xiang Yi was flabbergasted!

The redness spread from her neck to her ears and she was just like a deep-fried spicy crayfish that had just been fished out of a hot pan.

He had well-defined eight-pack abs, and a smooth V-line that drew close to the edge of his pants.

Apart from the head of his body, Xiang Yi could even feel the explosive power contained under his muscles.

Her fair and tender fingers trembled slightly and she curled her fingertips before saying softly, “I’m happy…”

“Let me tell you a secret.” Shi Sui came close to Xiang Yi’s ear, the warmth of his breath landing on the nape of her neck as he breathed. “There’s also a dark villain in my heart who is horrible, despicable, filthy and has long planned to do something to you. It harbors designs on you and is scheming against you in the dark…”

Xiang Yi listened quietly.

This is the first time that Shi Sui revealed his innermost thoughts to someone.

He gazed at the young girl’s clean and clear doe-like eyes before speaking in a raspy voice.

“Xiang Yi, this version of me doesn’t seem to be worthy of being liked by you…”

Before he finished, Xiang Yi interrupted him, “I know.”

“… huh?”

Xiang Yi looked straight at him and repeated, “I know, I know everything.”

It wasn’t that she didn’t know anything.

She just chose not to understand.

“Shi Sui, I have many, many flaws too. I’m just like you. We’re not perfect, but it’s okay…” With a gentle but bright smile on her face, she said, “Let’s get better together, okay? ”

The boulder on his chest seemed to have vanished at this moment and all he could see was Xiang Yi.

Shi Sui’s Adam’s apple rolled. He had envisioned countless answers that she may give, but he never thought that Xiang Yi would respond in such a manner.

“You… don’t mind me scheming against you?”

Xiang Yi blinked and said, “I think it’s really cute when you play little tricks. In fact…” She was a little embarrassed and her cheeks started burning. “In fact, I’m also worried that I may not be good enough for you and I’m worried that I can’t occupy any space in your heart. That’s why I make sure to present my best self to you every single time. I’m not actually that good…”

He held onto her small hand tightly.

Shi Sui said, “You are very good.”

Xiang Yi said, “You’re very nice too.”

The two looked at each other and then burst into laughter while being dumbfounded.

“Now, can you put your clothes on?” Xiang Yi cleared her throat and continued, “Do you think, I don’t know that you’re being topless on purpose?”

Shi Sui chuckled and asked, “You found out about that too?”

The little girl looked around and tiptoed to inch close to his ear when she realized that there was no one else around.

“Your abs are indeed worthy of being famous. The netizens didn’t lie to me.”

After saying that, Xiang Yi was burning hot and she scurried out in her slippers.

Shi Sui stood rooted to the ground and grinned widely.

–The dark villain in his heart finally received a gentle ray of light that he wanted to pursue without restraint.

chapters.title: Chapter 543 - I’M Worried About You (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 543 - I’M Worried About You (1)

Chapter 543: I’m Worried About You (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

…

The brothers of the Xiang family were in a very complicated mood when they saw Xiang Yi running out of the living room blushing.

How can anyone be happy about their little sister being smitten with a dog-like man?

1

Not long after, Shi Sui changed into a fresh set of clothes and came out in a simple white shirt that made him look fresh and clean.

As a basic hospitality, Xiang Yi went with him to greet Director Zheng at the door.

The two of them arrived at the door when Director Zheng’s car happened to drive over.

Director Zheng was of an average build, just slightly chubby. He was a good-hearted person who liked wearing sportswear and looked younger than his actual age.

Another person got off the car together with Director Zheng…

It was Zhuo Yi.

The man was clad in sweat-absorbent athletic wear, which accentuated his solid and taut muscles. His tan skin made him look sporty and healthy while his handsome features gave him the aura of a valiant warrior.

Xiang Yi frowned at the first sight of him.

The audience, however, got excited.

–[Damn it, what did I just see?]

–[Friends, express your shock on the public screen!!!]

—— [Amazing! This lousy little variety show actually managed to invite Best Actor Zhuo?]

–[Wow, Best Actor Zhuo is still as glamorous as he used to be. He’s really handsome!”

…

Li Jianyu was incredibly upset to see Zhuo Yi.

Zhuo Yi also had a livestream variety show to shoot,which was ‘Eating Well For All Three Meals’, the “copycat version” of Two Under One Roof’, produced by Muyao TV. Although it wasn’t as popular as ‘Two Under One Roof’, the combination of a live variety show and food elements propelled it to popularity.

Those who didn’t know would probably think that there was a link between the two variety shows.

Director Zheng had an introverted personality, and although he had a good relationship with Shi Sui, he was quite a reserve person and coupled with the fact that it was his first time participating in a livestream, he remained silent after a simple greeting.

Zhuo Yi came uninvited but he did not feel awkward at all. He started talking to them enthusiastically.

“Shi Sui, it’s been a long time since we met! You’ve become even more handsome lately! Ah, you must be Xiang Yi, huh? You’re as adorable as a little doll!”

Shi Sui nodded slightly in response.

Meanwhile, Xiang Yi’s attitude was even more indifferent as she remained silent.

At first glance, they seemed rather rude but some netizens immediately began to voice their opinions.

1

–[Is this the attitude you should have when you have guests over at your place??]

—— [Oh please, Best Actor Zhuo is a senior! Don’t you have any manners at all?]

—— [Best Actor Shi Sui is considered to be on par with Best Actor Zhuo after all. It’s fine for him to be cold and indifferent but who does Xiang Yi think she is? How dare she give Best Actor Zhuo that attitude!?! Shes unforgivable!!]

…

… The atmosphere during the walk from the entrance to the manor was unusually awkward.

Zhuo Yi had the persona of a “silly uncle”, which had earned him quite a number of fans over the past two years. Seeing that he was working hard to ease the tension while Xiang Yi and Shi Sui didn’t respond at all, many of Zhuo Yi’s fans were enraged.

—— [Do Vase Fairy and Shi Sui not know to treat their guests politely?]

–[I’m feeling embarrassed for Emperor Zhuo even through the screen. He tried so hard to break the ice and give everyone an out but no one paid any attention to him…]

— [I’ve seen people who put on airs but I’ve never seen people throw their weight around in front of their seniors. Shi Sui and Xiang Yi are really incredible! They totally deserve to be hated for life!]

…

After finally making it to the courtyard, Zhuo Yi took the initiative to chop some firewood and even tidied up the courtyard.

His diligence brought him a lot of fans.

However, Xiang Yi ignored his presence and slowly made some tea for Director Zheng. She even prepared some exquisite pastries and desserts.

Given the comparison, there were even more haters….

1

chapters.title: Chapter 544 - I’M Worried About You (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 544 - I’M Worried About You (2)

Even the Spicy Rabbits were rather puzzled as to why Xiang Yi, who had always been polite to everyone, would be so cold and indifferent towards Zhuo Yi.

Some of the fans of the UntimelyCouple even came forward with a bold speculation.

—— [When Zhuo Yi acted alongside Shi Sui in a certain film, Zhuo Yi deliberately broke Shi Sui’s ribs during a fight scene. Could it be that Xiang Yi is… expressing her dissatisfaction by doing this?]

The moment this statement was released, the Shi Sui Sisters mocked the person who posted it.

–[She just has no manners. Why are you trying to clear her name and justify her actions?]

–[Please don’t try to use our dear Shi Sui for clout. Thank you~]

–[Vase Fairy just has low emotional intelligence. How can her actions possibly be for the sake of Shi Sui?]

…

In the manor.

Xiang Yi’s actions were very fluid and pleasing to the eye when she was brewing tea, exuding a classic and elegant beauty.

The brewed tea was clear and bright, with a fresh fragrance that wafted up to everyone’s noses. Director Zheng was knowledgeable in tea. He gave it a taste and couldn’t help but praise, “Such a fine tea!”

“It’s good that you like it.”

“Miss Xiang, do you know a lot about tea art?” Director Zheng asked with great interest.

“Not quite, I only know a little bit about it.”

“Miss Xiang, you’re being too modest.” Director Zheng sighed and said emotionally, “The drama I’m currently shooting happens to have a scene about tea art. Miss Xiang, are you interested in playing a cameo role?”

It was a normal conversation between the two but people soon began to interpret it differently.

–[Did you hear that? Director Zheng said that Xiang Yi is a fine tea!]

—— [She is already a green tea b*tch (a pretentious girl), so this role is very suitable for her.]

–[Does Vase Fairy still need to act? She just needs to act like herself. Hahahha]

…

There was a lot of bickering going on in the comments section while in reality, Zhuo Yi came up to Shi Sui who was trimming the flowers.

“Shi Sui, how are you doing lately?” The first thing you need to do is to take a look at the situation.

Shi Sui said calmly, “Not bad.”

He obviously did not have the intention to continue with this topic but Zhuo Yi continued speaking, “I envy you young people. You have lots of dramas to film, unlike me. Now that I’m older, there are very few dramas and films that are suitable for me…”

Between the lines, his tone was full of envy and the sorrow of a hero.

Shi Sui glanced at him and asked, “Senior, have you never considered switching to another style?”

These years, Zhuo Yi had been developing in the style of a celebrity martial artist, and most of the films or drama series he acted in were about martial arts too.

Zhuo Yi laughed cheerfully and asked, “After all, I have a martial arts dream. If I don’t film any, who else in this circle will still persist?”

These words were said with great class and it suddenly invoked empathy in lots of people for a moment.

— [I feel so much nostalgia for the glory days of martial arts films]

–[When I was a child, I wanted to be a warrior and roam the world with a sword in hand but unfortunately, there are fewer and fewer martial arts films made these days.]

—— [Best Actor Zhuo really doesn’t have it easy. I feel that he’s really kind and easygoing. He’s totally the kind that would sacrifice for others and do the things that others don’t want to, for the greater good~]

— [Shi Sui really pales in comparison. He has acted in a lot of commercial films, right? He has no emotion at all, unlike Emperor Zhuo, who still holds on to his original intention! Shi Sui only has eyes for money, right?]

…

When the discussion was getting heated, a straightforward and puzzled voice reached everyone’s ears.

“Dude, isn’t the reason you only do martial arts movies because you suck at acting?”

Everyone was dumbfounded.

Who? Who is it?

Do you still want to be part of the entertainment industry? How dare you say something like that!?!

The camera shook, panned, and was eventually fixed on a very non-domineering CEO…

…

chapters.title: Chapter 545 - I’M Worried About You (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 545 - I’M Worried About You (3)

Chapter 545: I’m Worried About You (3)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The viewers in front of the screen seemed rather dumbfounded.

‘Who…who is this person?’

The photographer was also a little confused and he didn’t move the camera for a long time.

The netizens were discussing incessantly.

—— [This is too hurtful!]

—— [So rude. Do you even know how to chat properly!?!]

–[To be fair, he’s quite good-looking, I just don’t know why he looks so silly and daft…]

…

Zhuo Yi’s expression changed when he saw the face of the person who came.

If it were someone else, he definitely wouldn’t swallow his pride, given his status in the entertainment industry.

However, in the face of the real bigwigs, Zhuo Yi was still very good at observing the situation and going with the flow. He said with a smile, “Mr. Xiang, you must be joking. I’m just a nobody when it comes to acting, I can’t compare to those who graduated from the film academy…”

Although he seemed to be humble, he was actually trying his best to convey a signal.

As an actor who did not graduate from a professional film academy, he had already reached a high level of achievement.

To his surprise, a confused Xiang Feng questioned, “Joking? You misunderstood, I’m dissing you very seriously!”

Zhuo Yi was speechless.

He felt worse than he would if he were to eat flies.

The audience of the livestream was about to criticize him but someone copied a paragraph of the content of a Wikipedia page.

—— [Xiang Feng, the current president of Xing Chen Entertainment Group, which subsidiaries are Starry Entertainment, Starry Videos, Starry Live, and Starry Literature Web, graduated from the Haslington University with a business degree…]

1

The crowd of netizens was astonished.

‘What!? I dare say this person is the most domineering of all domineering presidents!’

In a flash, the pop-up comments on the screen immediately changed.

–[So it’s the sponsor!]

—— [Mr. Xiang is really shrewd. He hit the nail on the head!]

–[Mr. Xiang is really nice and not pretentious, unlike those sleazeballs out there!]

–[No wonder Zhuo Yi was still so polite even though they took a jab at him. He’s really a big boss. Since he started running a business, he has been especially blessed even though he’s silly. He repeatedly create business miracles, such as Starry Live, which was a company that had folded but was acquired by him. In the second year since the acquisition, he turned his losses into profits. Don’t underestimate him!]

…

The comments section was full of boasting. Even when he was criticizing Zhuo Yi, the crowd also felt that he was being genuine and straightforward.

Xiang Yi’s eyes lit up when she saw him. She made a cup of honey yuzu water and handed it to her uncle.

Xiang Feng, who had a sweet tooth, took a large gulp of the drink while ignoring Zhuo Yi who was next to him.

“Yeah, it’s great. It’s sweet and nice.”

“If you like it, take a can with you when you leave. I also made some that are passion-fruit-and-lemon-flavored.”

The conversation between the two of them were rather normal but the netizens naturally felt sour when they heard it.

—— [Tsk, tsk, she’s giving Best Actor Zhuo the cold shoulder and currying favor with the whale. Are you worthy of sucking up to him??]

1

—— [Vase Fairy is really toxic and mean. She didn’t even give Best Actor Zhuo a glass of water since he entered. He’s a guest after all. Is that how she treats her guests?]

1

—— [She’s such a snob. I don’t understand how a girl like her can be liked by so many people. Is there something wrong with me, or is there something wrong with society?]

…

The netizens were passionate about the joint stream but Zhuo Yi started trying to force an awkward conversation. “Xiang Yi and Mr. Xiang share the same surname. Their ancestors were from the same family generations ago!”

As the one with the lowest IQ in the family, Xiang Feng looked at Zhuo Yi with a sense of superiority. “What are you counting for? The two of us are from the same family, to begin with! I’m Xiang Yi’s uncle!”

1

In an instant, those netizens who were just done being keyboard warriors were dumbfounded.

1

chapters.title: Chapter 546 - I’M Worried About You (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 546 - I’M Worried About You (4)

‘What’s going on?’

The whale that countless people dreamed of gaining support from, was actually Xiang Yi’s uncle?

There was nothing they could hate on her for!

Zhuo Yi was even more dumbstruck.

He was completely dumbfounded and flabbergasted, feeling that he had sucked up to the wrong person!

However, after realizing that Xiang Yi was really from a wealthy family, Zhuo Yi’s eyes lit up.

Many young women find it difficult to resist the charm of an older man.

Although he was already married, he could accompany this little girl to play.

‘When the time comes, I would get both the beauty and resources, wouldn’t I?’

Zhuo Yi had a good plan in mind but his heart jumped when he inadvertently looked into Shi Sui’s eyes.

The man’s eyes were deep and sullen, with an inexplicable trace of ruthlessness.

Although he was just a junior, Zhuo Yi couldn’t help but shiver.

He subconsciously avoided Shi Sui’s line of sight.

“Hahahaha so you two are relatives. That explains why you two look so similar!” Zhuo Yi was the kind of person who thought that others should be the ones to feel awkward as long as he didn’t feel awkward himself. He continued to speak to Xiang Yi enthusiastically and even called her ‘Sister Yi’. “Sister Yi, I heard that you’re preparing to shoot for a drama series, right? Do you need me to give you some pointers? Well, I’ll speak from experience…”

Xiang Yi said coldly, “No thanks.”

Zhuo Yi laughed awkwardly and remarked, “Hahaha Xiang Yi really has a personality…”

The livestream viewers were all riled up again.

—— [???? What’s wrong with Xiang Yi? How can you talk to your seniors in such a manner!?]

–[I’m speechless. Best Actor Zhuo is nice enough to offer to give you pointers based on his experience, but not only did you not accept it humbly, you even outrightly turned him down!?!]

—— [I only started watching this today. Is this the persona of the gentle Xiang Yi that you guys are praising all the time? She obviously has a really low EQ. I can’t go on any further, I’m going to switch it off soon]

In the next second…

Xiang Feng snapped hostilely, “Why would Xiang Yi need your guidance? Are you even worthy of giving her pointers!?”

This dramatic scene directly pushed the plot development to the climax!

A lot of viewers who liked to see drama happen, were watching with great interest while snacking on melon seeds.

‘Fight fight fight, hurry up and fight!’

Xiang Yi’s cold and aloof attitude was still tolerable but once Xiang Feng snapped at him, Zhuo Yi broke out in cold sweat immediately.

‘What exactly did I do wrong? How did I end up offending the president of Star Corporation!?!’

“Mr. Xiang, yes, yes, yes, I’m not worthy…” Zhuo Yi’s tone was humble and he tried to flee. “I see there is a water tank in the kitchen, I’ll go get some water.”

There was tap water in the manor and a well that provided fresh and potable water, which was slightly sweet.

While walking, Shi Sui walked over to put his arm around Shi Sui’s shoulders as if they were siblings. “Shi Sui, let’s go together and try to quickly fill the bucket…”

Swish-

His arm was clutched by a fair hand, and thus was hanging in mid-air at the moment.

Stunned and puzzled, Zhuo Yi stared at Xiang Yi who was in front of him.

Xiang Yi said expressionlessly, “Don’t touch him.”

Zhuo Yi chuckled and asked, “Are you mistaken about something, Sister Yi? I’m very close to him, okay? Isn’t that right, Shi Sui?”

He thought that Shi Sui would more or less save him some embarrassment but to his surprise, Xiang Yi directly interrupted him and turned to look at Shi Sui. “Are you two really close?” After a pause, she continued aggressively, “With me around, you can tell the truth.”

Shi Sui gazed at her quietly and smiled after a few seconds as he answered, “No, we’re not.”

“Shi Sui, you…” Zhuo Yi glowered at him.

“Heard that?” Xiang Yi warmed in an icy cold tone of voice, “Stay away from Shi Sui. You’re not fit to appear in front of him.”

“No one cares for him but I care for him.”

…

chapters.title: Chapter 547 - Ender Of Pretense: Xiang Feng
chapters.body:
Chapter 547 - Ender Of Pretense: Xiang Feng

The trend seemed to have stopped.

Everything fell silent. It was as if someone had pressed the pause button.

Zhuo Yi’s expression changed. He tried to hold back, but eventually could not calm down.

Although the popularity of ‘Eating Well For All Three Meals’ wasn’t too bad, it can never be on par with ‘Two Under One Roof’.

The gap between the two variety shows was getting farther and farther.

‘Two Under One Roof’ had a tendency to be a popular hit, but Eating Well For All Three Meals was gradually going downhill.

Zhuo Yi couldn’t figure out why the popularity of the two shows was so different, even though they were both themed around food and romance.

He used all means to come over personally to see what was going on.

However, he didn’t expect them to put him to shame like that!

Zhuo Yi was afraid that the old matter from back then would be brought up so he decided to act before they did and exclaimed in exasperation, “Xiang Yi, you’re being overboard by saying that! Fine, since I’m not welcome here, I’ll just leave!”

His acting skills were not weak so he could get immersed in the role in minutes. He took a large step forward and brushed his sleeve to walk away. He rushed towards Li Jianyu and said, “I came here to support your show and yet you’re treating me with such a hostile attitude. Why should I come here to suffer this mistreatment!?”

The atmosphere was a bit stagnant for a while.

There were empathic netizens who were influenced by Zhuo Yi and started getting emotional too.

–[This is really infuriating. How can you say that about Mr. Zhuo!?!]

–[What did Best Actor Zhuo do wrong? Why must they treat him like this!?!]

–[Shi Sui and Xiang Yi are really the same kind of people. They’re both oddballs, it’s no wonder that they can get along well!]

…

Zhuo Yi was really good at acting and this scene was probably the pinnacle of his career over the years.

His act would be convincing under the premise that he never meets Xiang Feng, the ender of all acts and pretense.

Unfortunately, this time, he ran into Xiang Feng.

Xiang Feng questioned, “Uh, what’s-your-name, no one invited you here, right? Didn’t you come all the way here out of your own accord!?!”

As one of the sponsors of ‘Two Under One Roof’, Xiang Feng had long perused the guest list, and he remembered clearly that Zhuo Yi’s name wasn’t on the list.

“…” Zhuo Yi stopped in his tracks.

The netizens in front of the screen were dumbstruck.

‘What? The lousy variety show didn’t invite Zhuo Yi?’

‘So Zhuo Yi came uninvited today!?!’

Xiang Feng shook his leg in a somewhat ungraceful manner, completely not bothering to maintain his image as a domineering president. “You started panting as soon as someone called you chubby. Who are you putting on an act for? Don’t you know why Xiang Yi criticizes you all the time?”

“…”

Zhuo Yi suddenly had an ominous premonition.

“When you were filming a movie with Shi Sui back then, you threw your weight around as a senior because Shi Sui was still a newcomer then, and ended up hitting him for real during a scene. You even ended up breaking his ribs. Do you really think that you can erase things from the Internet?”

Xiang Feng didn’t cut Zhuo Yi any slack at all. “Before questioning the attitude that others have when facing you, why don’t you reflect on yourself and ask yourself how you treat others? Did your brain leave your body to go feed the penguins in Antarctica?!”

Xiang Feng spoke extremely quickly like a machine gun but there was a large amount of content.

The netizens were stunned.

‘So something like that actually happened?’

The Shi Sui sisters all came forth to chime in.

——[That’s right!!! It’s true!!!]

——[It made headlines at the time, but Shi Sui wasn’t that popular then so it ended up not happening]

— [Zhuo Yi didn’t even bat an eyelid when asked about it during an interview. He even said that it’s only right for seniors to hit their juniors. His malicious comments can be found on Starry Videos.]

…

Zhuo Yi’s body swayed a little. He completely didn’t expect to have gotten himself in trouble instead of getting the clout that he had intended to!

chapters.title: Chapter 548 - I Can Fight
chapters.body:
Chapter 548 - I Can Fight

Not to mention passersby, even the Shi Sui Sisters had no idea what happened back then.

Now that it had been exposed, the netizens were shocked and furious!

Zhuo Yi broke Shi Sui’s bones during filming. What a scum!

It was obvious that he was deliberately bullying Shi Sui!

Shi Sui was a popular actor at the moment but if he wasn’t, would he get beaten up into a pulp during filming but can only suck it up?

No, are there any other victims apart from Shi Sui!?

Some proactive netizens had already started to search deeper.

Now, Zhuo Yi wanted to dig a crack and bury himself in it.

He could not leave nor stay and was now in a difficult position.

Xiang Yi suddenly said, “I’ll walk you out.”

The photographer wanted to follow, but Xiang Yi gestured with a hand for them to stop filming.

Although he did not understand her intention, the photographer still stopped.

Shi Sui frowned and wanted to follow, but was stopped by Xiang Yi.

“Be good, I’ll be right back.”

“…” The man stayed silent for two seconds and nodded slightly.

Xiang Yi made a gesture. “Mr. Zhuo, please.”

Zhuo Yi couldn’t figure out what Xiang Yi was thinking for a moment, but out of fear towards Shi Sui and Xiang Feng, he had no choice but to nod stiffly.

…

There was no conversation all the way to the gate.

Xiang Yi stopped in her tracks and looked at Zhuo Yi.

The young lady had clear eyes and delicate features, making Zhuo Yi’s heart beat rapidly when she glanced at him.

Zhuo Yi looked at Xiang Yi with an affectionate gaze, thinking that he was really charming. “Xiang Yi, is there something you want to tell me?”

“That’s right.”

Zhuo Yi smiled even more brightly and combed his hair back. “Yes? Tell me, I’m listening…”

Xiang Yi was confused.

She was completely unable to understand what the man in front of her was thinking. He was obviously so ordinary, but why was he so confident?

“Our Shi Sui is generous and kind. He has a soft and delicate heart.”

Zhuo Yi: >

‘Can Shi Sui be described as soft and delicate!?!’

“He’s not vengeful but I am a very petty person, I just can’t watch him suffer.”

Zhuo Yi, ????

Xiang Yi calmly tied up her hair and rolled up her sleeves. “So I am ready to stand up for him.”

Zhuo Yi was quite amused. “Little girl, so you really like Shi Sui. But…did I forget to tell you that I am a martial artist?”

Their generation of martial arts stars had to have real combat skills. Otherwise, he would not have been able to break Shi Sui’s bones that easily.

He has thought about it. Once Xiang Yi moved, he would hold her down and force a kiss onto her. He thought that she might be attracted to him…

He thought that with his kung fu skills, he’d be able to subdue a young girl easily…

“Ka-chow–”

“Ah–”

The crisp sounds of bones getting dislocated filled the air together with a scream that sounded like the shriek of a pig that was about to be slaughtered.

Xiang Yi struck so quickly that Zhuo Yi simply did not even have time to react before his arm was dislocated.

“I also forgot to tell you, I can fight.”

Xiang Yi didn’t spout any nonsense. She exerted some force and precisely put Zhuo Yi’s dislocated arm back in place.

“Ahhhhh-”

A series of miserable screams scared away the flying birds perched on the branches.

Zhuo Yi was in so much pain that he broke out in cold sweat, but he heard an even more frightening sentence.

“I also forgot to tell you, I can not only fight, I can also heal.”

The young lady looked at him with a gentle and harmless smile.

chapters.title: Chapter 549 - The Apple Of Everyone’S Eye
chapters.body:
Chapter 549 - The Apple Of Everyone’S Eye

Chapter 551: The Apple Of Everyone’s Eyes

…

…

In the living room of the manor.

Xiang Feng rubbed his ears and asked, “Did you guys hear any movement?”

No one replied him.

Shi Sui looked down, seemingly thinking about something.

Xiang Yi’s brothers knew that Xiang Feng was chatterbox who definitely wouldn’t stop after just saying one thing.

As expected, Xiang Feng kept chattering non-stop and within just a few minutes, the entire Internet knew that he had eaten six soup dumplings for breakfast today; climbed a tree to pick peaches yesterday; and went to the hospital to get his ears washed the day before yesterday, only to have a large pile of earwax pulled out, which allowed him to hear very clearly now…

The netizens were dumbfounded.

‘Is this person really a domineering president? Is he not a silly diwmit?’

Xiang Feng was extremely talkative and if Shi Sui hadn’t given him water, which caused him to stop and drink some water, he would probably be able to continue.

At this juncture, Xiang Yi returned.

The gaze in Xiang Yi’s eyes were quiet and her pace was calm as she settled on the sofa.

As soon as Xiang Feng saw her, he smiled and said, “You’re back? Are you tired? I’ll wash some peaches for you…”

Before he finished, Xiang Yu handed them a fruit plate.

There was some cleanly washed peach that had been cut into small pieces, on the plate.

Xiang Feng was speechless.

“I remember you like walnuts the most. I’ll go get you some walnuts!”

Xiang Qi stuffed the clean, peeled walnuts into Xiang Yi’s hand while looking like he was waiting to be praised. “It took me a hard time to peel them. Quickly praise me!”

Xiang Feng was speechless.

“I’ll make you a cup of milk tea then…”

“Xiang Yi, here’s your favorite jasmine green milk tea.” Xiang Li’s voice was warm, and the milk tea, which was freshly made and still piping hot, was placed on the small coffee table in front of Xiang Yi.

Xiang Feng was speechless too.

He really couldn’t think of anything else to do for Xiang Yi, so raised his hand to grab the tissue box. “Here, wipe your mouth if you’re tired of eating…”

The next second, Xiang Chen, who was having a conference call, passed by while fluently speaking in English legal jargon. He smoothly took out a handkerchief from the pocket of his suit and handed it to Xiang Yi.

Xiang Feng was dumbfounded. Meanwhile, Shi Sui had already naturally started chatting with Xiang Yi about canned food for cats while holding Xiao Naofu in hand.

“That salmon and cod we fed Xiao Naofu last time was good. It was the one Xiao Naofu had the most of it.”

Xiang Yi said, “I’ll buy some more then.”

Xiang Feng: “…”

He really suddenly felt rather redundant.

The netizens watching the livestream were green with envy and jealousy.

–[Xiang Yi is really the apple of everyone’s eye!]

–[This is the princess-like life I’ve been dreaming of]

–[What a divine life to have a family and a man! Xiang Yi must be the happiest person in the world!]

…

The morning was calm and leisurely, but countless people in front of the screen watched with great interest.

It turned out that family quabbles or even silence while being together in the same room; with someone reading a book, someone doing crafts, someone busy working, and someone playing games can also be heartwarming and happy.

In the director’s room, Li Jianyu suddenly realized something and took out a note pad, on which he frantically scribbled something.

Someone had come to ask him about work but Ruan Qing sent them away. The smart and domineering woman actually chose to stay by Li Jianyu’s side quietly at the moment.

…

It was close to mealtime and Shi Sui was about to go cook but Xiang Yi couldn’t help but plead coquettishly, “Let me cook once, just once! Just once, please!”

Before Shi Sui could respond, there were objections from all over the room.

“No!”

chapters.title: Chapter 550 - Willing
chapters.body:
Chapter 550 - Willing

Chapter 550: Willing

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“Your hand is still injured. How can you cook?”

“Don’t even think about it, be obedient and stay in your seat!”

“…”

Voices of disapproval and objections came from all directions.

Xiang Yi clenched her fists and flexed her muscles. “It’s okay, my injury is not a big deal. I can really do it! Brother, I’m very strong!”

1

The netizens were dumbfounded.

–[How is Xiang Yi so cute!?!]

1

–[Sisters, I totally dig this! She’s cute and righteous. Ahhhhh!]

–[Brothers, just give in to her~ UwU~ Let our dear Xiang Yi touch the spatula! Look at how much she wants to touch it. She’s experiencing withdrawl symptoms because of her addiction to cooking!]

…

Shi Sui was speechless.

And so was Xiang Feng.

The brothers of the Xiang family: “…”

The few men had almost never had any telepathy but at this moment, they surprisingly shared a common thought——

Honey/YiYi/Sister/Little Bunny/Bunny is so cute!!!

“I am a very principled person,” Xiang Chen said calmly while the rest stood up straight or sat down, just like schoolboys listening to a lecture from the head teacher. “Xiang Yi, do you really want to cook?”

“Mm-hmm!”

The young lady nodded her head vigorously.

Xiang Chen said, “Okay, then let’s do it together.”

1

Everyone was dumbfounded.

‘Huh?! This is what you mean by being a principled person?! Your principle is that you have no principle for Xiang Yi, right!?!’

Xiang Yi rubbed her hands together in anticipation. “Huh?”

…

It turned out that Xiang Yi’s expectations were overly idealistic.

The “cooking together” that Xiang Chen mentioned was essentially Xiang Yi watching from the side while the rest did the cooking.

“Hey, Fourth Brother, let me do the dishes…”

“How can a girl do this kind of work?”

“Oooh Third Brother, I’ll peel the garlic! I’m the best at it!”

“Sister, you have to sit properly! Is it cold? Shall I get you a blanket?”

“Uwu~ Second Brother, let me make the soup, please!”

“Good little rabbit, you can place the lid on the casserole later, okay?”

“Ooo Big Brother… I’ll just fry a pill! Just a little!!”

1

“Bunny, be good.”a

“…”

Xiang Yi turned around leisurely without getting to do any work. She aggrievedly moved towards Shi.

1

Shi Sui smiled faintly and said, “Your Highness, can you do me a favor?”

“Hmm?” The young girl’s doe-like eyes lit up and she exclaimed, “Tell me! I can do any job!!!”

Shi Sui pointed to the gas switch and spoke in a gentle tone of voice, “Can you please turn it on for me?”

1

Xiang Yi scurried over and turned the switch.

Shi Sui said, “Thank you, Your Highness, for your hard work.”

The young girl turned her tiny face away, her eyebrows curved into the shape of a crescent moon.

Xiang Feng was puzzled as he walked past. “What? Your Highness? Are you two playing? How old are you? You’re actually still playing such a childish game.”

The comments in the livestream:

–[Someone kill me and offer me to Shi Sui and Xiang Yi!!]

1

–[This is too sweet, way too sweet. Shi Sui is really good at this. This is the right way to coax your wife!]

—— [Xiang Yi’s smile is beautiful. Mr Xiang is so irritating!]

…

In the director’s room.

Li Jianyu finally stopped writing and drawing. He leaned against the wall, the corners of his mouth curled into a wide grin.

“Do you have some inspiration now?” Ruan Qing asked.

“That’s right.” Li Jianyu chuckled nd said, “Xiang Yi is simply my muse. I want to do a variety show centered around the relationship between family members next! Shall we do it together?”

Ruan Qing laughed lightly. “Haven’t I drained you enough?”

Li Jianyu coughed in a daft and nervous manner. He rubbed his hands together, his soft voice sounding like a mosquito’s hum.

“I’m willing to be drained by you.”

2

chapters.title: Chapter 551 - : Bringing The Pot
chapters.body:
Chapter 551 - : Bringing The Pot

The temperature in the room seemed to rise all of a sudden.

Li Jianyu finished speaking and he felt really embarrassed so he grabbed the book and fanned himself but he still couldn’t dispel the dry heat that came from within his heart.

He stood up and his chair let out a creak, “Ahem, it’s too hot, I’ll go out for some air.”

Whoosh——

Someone suddenly grabbed his wrist and he saw that it as a woman’s tender fingers that were wrapped around it. Her nails were neatly trimmed and painted with nail varnish of a classic red hue, clean and beautiful.

“Want to try it? Let’s do it together,” Ruan Qing asked with a smile.

The room was so quiet that the sound of Li Jianyu swallowing saliva was extraordinarily distinct.

The usually eloquent man was stammering uncontrollably at the moment.

“I-I-I want to ask, when you..you…you said together, are you referring to the same thing as I am?”

Ruan Qing smiled and said, “Or else what?”

Li Jianyu was flabbergasted!

He cautiously and carefully asked, “What should we name our child then?”

Ruan Qing was dumbstruck.

“I’m sorry it was a slip of the tongue! A slip of the tongue!” Li Jianyu, who had accidentally said what was in his mind, blushed as red as a tomato. “So, are we now superior and subordinate, or an exclusive couple?”

Ruan Qing moved her fingers from his wrist to his jaw, gently sliding them across his raised Adam’s apple, where there was some slight stubble that pricked her a little.

“Superior and subordinate, of course.”

Li Jianyu’s eyes dimmed.

However, he soon heard Ruan Qing say calmly, “But we’re more like an exclusive couple.”

Li Jianyu was flabbergasted!

‘Damn it, I’m no longer a singleton!!!!’

…

Living room, dining table.

With the efforts of the crowd, a sumptuous spread for lunch was laid on the table.

Although not everyone’s cooking skills were excellent, each of them made a dish or two and the atmosphere was extremely pleasant as they sat down together to eat.

Of course, the few men eventually couldn’t resist Xiang Yi’s coquettishness and eventually allowed her to make two cold dishes.

The group of people gathered around the table, while most of the viewers were sitting in front of their computer screens a home with the takeout that they had ordered or some home-cooked food.

They thought that they could treat today as a food livestream as usual, but surprisingly, tension suddenly arose at the dining table.

Xiang Qi first took out his large bowl, which amused countless people.

The crowd was laughing incessantly but they soon discovered that Xiang Yu had expressionlessly reached into his shoulder bag to take out a large…basin!?

The young gaming god seemed to be at ease as he put the basin in front of him.

The netizens were dumbfounded.

— [One of them has a bowl and the other has a basin. Do the Xiang family members all like to bring their own tableware?]

–[Hahaha, this basin is huge. It looks like the kind of stainless steel basin that you’d get as a free gift when you buy instant noodles!]

—— [Wait, why did Mr. Xiang bring a pot for no reason? It seems to be a hotpot!!!]

The viewers stared at their screens in disbelief as the domineering president, Mr. Xiang Feng, calmly brought in an electric pot with a divider, that was usually used for hotpot.

#AsLongAsMyPotISBigEnoughI’mNotAfraidOfNotBeingAbleToEat!

“Go on and eat, why aren’t you guys eating? Dig in,” Xiang Feng said.

Director Zheng, who had been very quiet and calm, widened his eyes in shock when he saw that scene.

‘That…that works too?’

The netizens watching the livestream were laughing their heads off.

— [Hahahaha this is so funny]

–[Damn it, this family really amuses me!]

–[In the old days, Mulan went to the army for her father, and now, Mr, Xiang has brought a pot out. /thumbs up/thumbs up]

–[No, it’s just a lunch. Why does it look like they’re going to war!?!]

Just as the netizens were remarking in awe, Xiang Yi took the lead in moving her chopsticks so the battle began!

chapters.title: Chapter 552 - Home Is Where Family Is
chapters.body:
Chapter 552 - Home Is Where Family Is

Brush brush brush-

Several pairs of chopsticks were coincidentally shoved towards the cold dish that Xiang Yi made!

The men of the Xiang family moved their chopsticks quickly like the wind.

The cold dishes were empty in an instant.

The Xiang family left no stones unturned!

When it was time to taste each other’s dishes, the Xiang family began to get ready to diss each other.

“This duck with ginger is making me throw up as soon as I take a mouthful!”

“I never thought there would be such an unpalatable fish in the world!”

“You managed to make a simpled dish like tomato and scrambled eggs taste horrid. Uncle you are really bad at cooking.”

“…”

It was noisy but warm.

Xiang Yi rested her small face in hand, smiling at the scene.

This was the reason that she still chose to return home firmly no matter how many transmigrated worlds she crosses.

Home is where family is.

“Come on, cheers–” Xiang Feng liked liveliness. As long as he was around, there is no atmosphere that cannot become lively. He started egging everyone to raise their glasses.

The little alcoholic Xiang Yi’s eyes shone brightly and she was about to raise her glass when the glass in in front of him was suddenly replaced with a small bottle of milk.

Xiang Chen said with a serious face, “Children have to drink this instead.”

Xiang Yi was speechless and displeased.

She did not dare to disobey her eldest brother, so she had no choice but to lower her head dejectedly and sip on the milk.

After the meal, the brothers of the Xiang family performed the household chores while Director Zheng talked to Shi Sui and Xiang Yi about the cooperation.

“… The persona is the one I just talked about and the scene will probably be shot in a day. I wonder if you guys are interested in it, Shi Sui and Xiang Yi?”

Director Zheng was currently directing an immortal drama, which main plot was about the traditional chauvinistic male lead fighting monsters to seize the treasures and upgrade.

The male lead pf the drama had eventually obtained a magical ring on his golden finger but the ring did not contain a white bearded grandfather, but an immortal dressed in white.

The interaction with the male lead was not purely giving help but rather, there was some mutual tension.

The other character was the demoness that lived in the male lead’s mental design realm.

In order to help the male lead to transcend the tribulation, the immortal venerable entered the male lead’s mental demon realm, and as a result, there was an extremely provocative rivalry scene with the female demon.

Zheng director persuaded, “This is a challenge for both of you. Shi Sui can try the scenes you have to act out with the actress, while Xiang Yi can also familiarize herself with the shooting of films and television dramas. Compared to films,the requirements for drama series are lower…”

He actually did not hold much hope but after all, given Shi Sui’s current class, he totally didn’t have to play this special guest role.

Xiang Yi wasn’t careerminded at all.

He only felt from the bottom of his heart that the two were too in line with the persona they had so give it a try.

He didn’t expect that Xiang Yi would agree. “I can accept it.”

She had been an actress in other worlds, but after all, they was different from this world, and she wanted to quickly adapt to the current environment so that she could follow up with Shi Sui to make the movie.

Once she agreed, Shi Sui also had no problem, “If Sister Yi can, I can.”

Director Zheng was overjoyed. “Looks like I’ve come to the right place today!”

When he was about to make a decision, Xiang Feng, who was listening in, shouted, “I have to see the script first! Is there any intimate scenes?!”

The moment these words came out, several brothers of the Xiang family appeared in front of Director Zheng.

The four men with an average height of 183cm, plus a 180cm Xiang Feng, formed a very oppressive wall.

Surrounded in the middle, Director Zheng shivered. “…”

“They’re not particularly intimate…”

chapters.title: Chapter 553 - : Investment
chapters.body:
Chapter 553 - : Investment

Chapter 553: Investment

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

Half an hour later.

Director Zheng was holding the edited script in anguish, maintaining the last of his bottom line. “No, it can’t be changed anymore…”

1

He initially planned to make the scene of the fantastical scene seem artistic and full of an ambiguous romance. Now, it was completely bland.

The only element that was retained, was the demoness that was trying to seduce the Immortal Venerable. However, the original plot of the Immortal Venerable getting immersed, was changed into the Immortal Venerable pushing the demoness away and succeeding in transcending the tribulation.

Xiang Feng smacked his lips and said, “This is still okay.”

The brothers of the Xiang family were still frowning and expressing their dissatisfaction. seemingly extremely troubled.

However, when they saw the pitiful and helpless gaze in their sister’s eyes, their hearts turned soft.

‘Forget it, this is Xiang Yi’s career. We should support it.’

Hence, the four of them started studying the script with their heads pressed together. After ensuring that there were no intimate scenes or over-the-top lines, they were finally relieved.

1

Director Zheng heaved a long sigh of relief and said, “You guys go ahead and chat while I go take a walk around the courtyard.”

1

The netizens watching the livestream were laughing hysterically.

–[Hahahaha the humble Director Zheng is fleeing]

–The person who said he would never change his script, actually changed it today!]

1

–[Brothers and Uncle, you guys spoil Xiang Yi rotten. I’m full of envy! The country owes me too much!]

…

There were also netizens who felt that the act of changing the script was “playing with privilege”.

—— [Since she has already decided to act, why bother about these?]

—— [Indeed, money makes the world go round. Hah, the poor screenwriter will have to burn the midnight oil changing the script]

—— [Vase Fairy is really pretending to be nice after doing such a horrible thing. Actors ought to act out whatever scenes their role requires. She has no work ethic at all!!]

…

There were also people who felt that acting was just a profession and they just need to fulfill their obligations.

—— [What a joke. For example, when your boss makes you do something that you don’t want to, you can choose to succumb or jump ship. We’re already living in the modern era. Why do you have to bind actors with morals and ethics!?!]

…

The two of them were arguing incessantly.

They stopped only when Xiang Feng spoke up and made everyone shut up.

“How about I invest some money in Director Zheng’s film? Lest the team makes things hard for Xiang Yi…” He fiddled with his phone for a while before slapping his thigh and asking, “Damn it,I’m the biggest shareholder of this drama?”

1

“…”

With Xiang Feng’s current assets, his manager and trusted family members were usually the ones who handled his investments. He was quite a careless person who didn’t quite understand the details of investments.

Xiang Feng stayed silent for a moment before exclaiming, “Invest more money so that Xiang Yi can join the crew and add financial value to them!”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

“No need for that. I have less than ten lines in total.”

“How can that be!?! Our little baby is going to act in a drama for the first time. We can’t let her suffer!” Xiang Feng looked around and tried to seek affirmation. “Right?”

1

Xiang Yi thought her brothers would persuade her uncle but to her surprise…

Xiang Yu said, “That makes sense. I want to invest money too!”

Xiang Yi, “Isn’t it just money? I have plenty!”

1

Xiang Li said, “Xiang Yi, go ahead and film with a peace of mind. I have enough money to invest.”

Xiang Chen’s words were short and concise.

“I’ll invest.”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

1

‘What’s going on? Am I the only clear-headed person in this family?’

Director Zheng, who was holding his phone and taking photos of the plants in the courtyard, had no idea that he had just received five investments.

chapters.title: Chapter 554 - Nothing At All
chapters.body:
Chapter 554 - Nothing At All

The netizens teased in the comments:

—— [Director Zheng! You’re rich, you’re rich now!]

—— [This is probably a godsend opportunity that fell into your lap. I’m so full of envy]

—— [Xiang Yi is really the princess that everyone pampers! Her family spoils her so much!]

–[Who doesn’t want to have a family that can be a safe haven? Xiang Yi’s family is her backbone while my family… Ah…]

…

Countless people in front of the screen all revealed their envy of Xiang Yi.

The feeling of having the support of your family regardless of what you do is really…

Great.

Perhaps it is this kind of family that can raise such a gentle and calm girl.

…

In a private hospital.

Zhuo Yi was waiting for the test results.

He asked his assistant to take a picture of it and posted it on Weibo to win the sympathy of the netizens.

[@ZhuoYi: The true colors of people will eventually show.]

The man in the photo was pale and drenched in cold sweat. Although his features were still handsome, he looked rather haggard.

After all, Zhuo Yi was a “Double Gold Best Actor” who had debuted many years ago so he had garnered a large fan base.

The fans arrived at the comment section immediately and were full of indignation.

—— [Didn’t Best Actor Zhuo go to the manor? How did he end up like this?!]

—— [Did Shi Sui do something to Zhuo Yi? Zhuo Yi hit him back then because of the film. It’s too distasteful of him to be taking revenge at this time!]

—— [Oh my God, Shi Sui is too toxic. Didn’t Teacher Zhuo just hit him a few times? Why musthe take revenge? I’m sure Mr. Zhuo didn’t mean to do it back then]

…

The fans had a thick filter that blinded them so they felt that Zhuo Yi hadn’t done anything wrong and scolded Shi Sui instead.

The Shi Sui sisters arrived after receiving the news. Once they saw that the comments’ section was in such a manner, they were displeased.

A huge argument broke out and the comment section became a battlefield.

The Shi Sui sisters were extremely aggressive and it didn’t take long for Zhuo Yi’s fans to fall in the comment section.

Zhuo Yi’s fans began to change the subject, saying that Shi Sui and his fans were being too overbearing by forgetting his senior after gaining fame; and that in terms of capabilities, seniority and acting skills, Zhuo Yi was definitely better.

However, they underestimated the netizens’ ability to scour the Internet.

Someone happened to locate the hospital where Zhuo Yi was admitted to. They happened to see a photo of a medical record that was photographed in a Weibo post belonging to a medical staff. After zooming in on the record, they discovered that the record happened to belong to Zhuo Yi.

The diagnosis was clearly written on it, and although most of the text was obscured, there happened to be a sentence that was vaguely recognizable after zooming in.

[The patient’s bones, joints and skin are completely normal…]

The netizens were dumbfounded.

In other words, he was totally unhurt!

‘What are you acting for then!?’

Zhuo Yi’s fans were also confused because they thought that Zhuo Yi had been “bullied” by Shi Sui but to they didn’t expect Zhuo Yi to be perfectly healthy.

The Shi Sui sisters started mocking them using that diagnosis.

—— [Wow~ Best Actor Zhuo is really wonderful]

—— [What is he pretending for? He was totally acting like he had been beaten up. What a joke]

—— [In terms of seniority, Shi Sui has indeed been in the industry for a few years lesser than Zhuo Yi but in terms of competency, Zhuo Yi is only a Double Gold movie star while Shi Sui is a Triple Gold movie star. In terms of acting skills, Shi Sui has played a variety of roles. Apart from martial arts dramas and films, has Zhuo Yi played other roles? No]

…

At this moment, the medical staff brought the medical records to the VIP lounge.

“What? There’s nothing wrong with me? How is this possible?!”

Zhuo Yi was in disbelief. He had clearly been tortured by Xiang Yi who dislocated his hand and then restored it. She had done it several times repeatedly and yet, he was now told that he had taken the beating for nothing!

chapters.title: Chapter 555 - Eating Garbage
chapters.body:
Chapter 555 - Eating Garbage

Chapter 555: Eating Garbage

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“Yes, we didn’t manage to identify any dislocated bones as you’ve mentioned…”

Zhuo Yi yelled, “That’s because she moved my bones back to the right position!”

The doctor couldn’t help but blurt, “She must be an impressive doctor! Such superb skills!”

Zhuo Yi was dumbstruck.

The doctor coughed awkwardly and said, “Mr. Zhuo, in any case, there’s really nothing wrong with your body.”

Zhuo Yi broke down. ‘My body isn’t hurt but my heart is!’

As soon as he closed his eyes, all he would think about was the girl, who looked gentle and meek but was actually like a demon, snapping his hand into two…

Zhuo Yi couldn’t help but shudder while the clothes on his back were drenched in cold sweat.

He finally began to regret what he had done back then.

If he hadn’t treated Shi Sui that way back then, he have wouldn’t gotten himself in such a terrible situation today.

…

…

When it was almost evening, Xiang Yi’s brothers each had important things to do so they left one after another.

The only one left behind was Xiang Feng.

He couldn’t resist Xiang Yi’s coquettish pleading so he ordered a large variety of junk food for her.

1

The two of them also hid in the kitchen to eat secretly behind the backs of Shi Sui and Director Zheng.

“Come on, cheers!”

Holding onto the milk tea, Xiang Feng toasted to Xiang Yi happily.

1

Xiang Yi sucked a big mouthful of milk tea and managed to suck up some pearls, grass jelly, and pudding.

1

She paired it with a piece of fried chicken that had a crispy exterior and a tender interior dipped in sweet and spicy sauce. When she bit down, there were crunching sounds of the crispy batter breaking…

1

The young girl squinted in glee and dangled her legs in excitement.

‘Eating junk food is so enjoyable!’

“It’s delicious, Uncle!”

Xiang Feng said with a silly smile, “Hehehe, I like eating junk food too!”

1

The two of them reached a consensus and began gobbling the food up in large pieces.

1

This scene was recorded by the camera, and the audience of the livestream protested one after another.

1

–[This 3D surround sound… Ahhh I want to die!]

–[Her uncle seems a little unreliable, huh? But I like him! Hahahaha]

–[One second ago: Fried chicken with milk tea is calorie explosion! I’m not eating any!

One second later: What? There are takeout discount vouchers? I’ll order now!]

…

After eating to her heart’s content, Xiang Yi felt a little guilty and rubbed her belly before grabbing a clean box and storing a bit of each dish into it.

“Who is it for?”

“Shi Sui.” Xiang Yi said seriously, “It’s better to share.”

1

Xiang Feng said firmly, “He doesn’t eat junk food. Although he seems to be able to take hardship during filming, he’s really spoiled in private. He’s a picky eater and he abstains from fried foods, spicy and sour foods, and milk tea. He’s much healthier than many elderly people…”

The next second, a deep and alluring voice rang in their ears.

“It’s fine to eat some junk food once in a while.”

Xiang Feng was flabbergasted.

He instinctively felt a little diffident and was slightly relieved only when he saw that Shi Sui was alone.

He had developed a phobia from getting caught by Xiang Chen and the others on several occasions in the past.

1

Shi Sui glanced at the mess on the table before staring at the iced milk tea, which Xiang Yi had drunk a third of, for a few seconds.

“Do you want to try some? This fried chicken and onion rings are really good, and these pumpkin pancakes….,” Xiang Yi said, handing the small box to Shi Sui like it was a treasure. Shi Sui smiled slightly an chose not to let her kind intentions down as he tasted every single dish there was.

1

“Mm, not bad,” he remarked.

Xiang Feng’s eyes widened and he asked, “You…you you.. you actually made an exception to eat these? Didn’t you say you would never eat garbage?”

Shi Sui said calmly, “First of all, no one can eat garbage. Secondly, junk food is not the same as junk, and finally, what you eat doesn’t matter, what matters is…”

“Who you’re eating with.”

1

chapters.title: Chapter 556 - Rare, Silly Breed
chapters.body:
Chapter 556 - Rare, Silly Breed

The man’s voice was warm and gentle, with the decency of a gentleman.

However, his words were inexplicably really sweet.

The fans of the UntimelyCouple who were watching the livestream, appeared in unison.

—— [Daily dose of sugar! √]

——[Keyword! The most important thing is eating with Xiang Yi!]

–[Shi Sui is so good at this. He makes sense nad he’s so flirtatious]

—— [He’ll eat any food that she gives him. How sweet. I’m dying of diabetes and green with envy]

…

The netizens were chatting happily in the comment section but in reality, Xiang Feng gagged and pretended to barf. “Ew, I’m going to throw up. Surely you’re not forcing yourself to eat something you don’t like for my sake, right?”

Xiang Yi was confused.

Shi Sui was speechless too.

The netizens were dumbfounded.

“Brother, cut it out, I understand.” Xiang Feng patted Shi Sui’s shoulder and spoke in a serious manner, “Be human, don’t be a pervert.”

Shi Sui smiled quietly because he had already gotten used.

Xiang Yi couldn’t help but put a hand on her forehead, thinking to herself that it was no wonder that Xiang Feng had the lowest IQ of them all.

Xiang Feng said, “I get it, I totally get it! Ah, I can only blame it on my popularity. The entire world likes me because I’m handsome and charming…”

The netizens were dumbfounded.

‘What? Mr. Xiang do you have a wrong perception of yourself?’

‘What a rare and naive breed…’

But they felt that he was really cute!

On this day, something happened that made the public relations department of a certain influencer company under Star Entertainment laugh and cry…

The influencers signed to their company were not too bad but they didn’t have many fans in the industry.

However, they didn’t expect that their boss would somehow become famous on the Internet after joining the cast of “Two Under One Roof”. The number of fans he gained in a day was way higher than the fans that the PR department had painstakingly gathered over a long time…

The boss of these influencers became famous even before they did…

…

After having dinner, Xiang Yi reluctantly bid farewell to Xiang Feng.

Xiang Feng had indulged himself during dinner so his stomach was incredibly bloated at the moment. He lied down sluggishly and started reading the news on his phone.

The driver was driving slowly when all of a sudden…

Screech!

The tires rubbed against the ground with a violent screech.

Xiang Feng’s body leaned forward uncontrollably but he soon bounced back to his original position because of the restraint of the seatbelt.

“Mr. Xiang…” The driver trembled and said, “Someone has fainted.”

The weather was fair at first but it somehow started pouring heavily.

A gentle and slender woman had fallen in front of the car and her white dress was clinging tightly to her body, outlining the curves of her body. The driver looked down, not daring to look any further.

However Xiang Feng remained rather calm and he said, “Call the ambulance.”

“Okay!” After the driver called the ambulance, he noticed that Xiang Feng wasn’t moving so he asked, “Mr. Xiang, why don’t I go down and take a look?”

Although the woman was not hit by them but had fallen to the ground on herself, the driver felt that it was only right to get out of the car to take a look out of humanitarian spirit.

“No! What if she blackmails you!?”

The driver was dumbstruck.

‘Is that even a humane thing to say?’

On the ground, Qin Wanyan was freezing cold, so much that her teeth started chattering. She had used up her last weather-changing point cards and had been waiting for an opportunity for a long time before finally chancing upon Xiang Feng’s car.

She didn’t expect Xiang Feng to not get out of the car even after several minutes!

Instead, the ambulance came.

The window was finally rolled down and she heard the man speak.

“Can you still stand up?”

Qin Wanyan’s eyes were filled with hope, thinking that Xiang Feng was softhearted and wanted to get out of the car to accompany her, but to her surprise…

He said, “You have to pay for the stretcher when the ambulance comes. I suggest that you stand up if you can so that you can save some money.”

“You don’t have to thank me. After all, I am a socialist.”

Qin Wanyan was dumbstruck.

chapters.title: Chapter 557 - Impeccable Acting Chops (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 557 - Impeccable Acting Chops (1)

Hearing Xiang Feng’s insensitive words, Qin Wanyan was completely dumbfounded.

She questioned the system in her brain, “Are you sure that the subject I’m supposed to woo is him? Is there a need to woo such an oddball!?!”

The system answered feebly, “Hello Host, according to calculations, the subject of courtship must have the aura of a domineering CEO, massive wealth, and extremely good looks. He must also own an entertainment-related empire. Once you win his heart, you’ll have it easy in the entertainment industry…”

Hearing this, Qin Wanyan gritted her teeth and pinched her thighs with all her might to force herself to cry. She couldn’t help but shiver because of the cold.

“Sir, I’m so scared, can I trouble you to accompany me to the hospital?”

Under the heavy downpour, the woman in the white dress looked extremely charming and pitiful. An ordinary man would definitely feel sympathetic towards her even if they don’t get attracted to her.

However…

Xiang Feng said warily, “Are you expecting me to pay for the stretcher? It’s too expensive and it isn’t worth it at all. Don’t try to blackmail me!”

Qin Wanyan: ???

She was stunned speechless. At this moment, a doctor got off the car, held up an umbrella to shield her, and did a simple check for fractures or bleeding on her body. Next, a nurse took the temperature of her forehead with a thermometer gun.

“The patient’s fever has reached 39 degrees!”

Qin Wanyan forced herself to perk up and looked at Xiang Feng with tears in her eyes.

The man poked his small head out of the car window and uttered some words that made her feel suffocated.

“39 degrees? That’s incredible!”

Qin Wanyan was flabbergasted.

Instead of carrying a young woman who got drenched in the rain, to his car, he actually called her high-grade fever incredible. Is this something a human would do!?!
