Qin Wanyan’s eyes rolled over and she was overwhelmed with extreme infuriation as she passed out right on the spot!

…

…

Two days later.

The sun was shining brightly and it was a clear and beautiful day.

Xiang Yi and Shi Sui arrived at the film set of “The Way” that Director Zheng was directing.

Since Director Zheng was busy directing, the assistant director was in charge of receiving them.

The assistant director’s surname was Liu. He gawked at Xiang Yi for a while before turning to look at Shi Sui as if nothing had happened.

“Welcome, Shi Sui, welcome!”

Director Liu shook hands with Shi Sui, followed by Xiang Yi who merely nodded and said, “Hello.”

The first thing you need to do is to get a good idea of what you’re doing.

Many popular female artists who met him had to be nice and polite to him. Who gave Xiang Yi the right to be so rude!?!

‘What a fool, with my current status, it would be a piece of cake for me to make things hard for her on set.’

“Best Actor Shi, your dressing room is in front. Ms. Xiang, yours is here.”

Shi Sui rubbed Xiang Yi’s hair and said, “I’ll come to you later.”

Xiang Yi nodded obediently.

She entered the dressing room but the makeup artist wasn’t there yet. Director Liu walked around outside. Seeing that there was no one, he sauntered in.

After some casual small talk, he changed his tone of voice.

“Miss Xiang, this is your first time acting in a proper film and TV series, right? Don’t worry, we’ll take care of newcomers. At most, we’ll do a few more takes…” Although Director Liu sounded like he was being caring towards her, he was actually dissing Xiang Yi for her lack of experience in acting.

In the past year, “Xiang Yi” had indeed acted in an idol drama but it was a low-production one and her acting skills were terrible at the time. All she did was pout, glare, and pretend to cry, which was really awful.

Now, there were GIFs of her “unsavory past” circulating around the Internet.

Xiang Yi said, “Thank you, I’ll pay more attention.”

Director Liu snorted. “You? Really?”

chapters.title: Chapter 558 - : Impeccable Acting Skills (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 558 - : Impeccable Acting Skills (2)

Chapter 558: Impeccable Acting Skills (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Xiang Yi looked at him quietly.

Director Liu used the usual routine of suppressing actresses and said eloquently, “Some things cannot be achieved through just hard work. It is important to have self-awareness. Ahem, I’m not talking about you, please don’t jump to conclusions!”

However, the tone of his voice made it seem like he was telling her to jump to conclusions and assume that he was talking about her.

“You artistes have it the easiest during filming. Look, the cameramen, lighting technicians, set manager, and background actors are all suffering.” Director Liu pretended to be emotional and sighed. “All beings suffer. All of us just want to try to do our jobs well, but some people can have ten times the harvest with just a tenth of the effort, while some may give it their all, only to receive nothing in the end.

“So?” Xiang Yi asked.

Director Liu was stunned by how calm she was.

Most actresses would begin to get anxious once they hear that.

In today’s society, women are under extra pressure, and in the entertainment industry, female artistes are not only worried about their appearance all their lives but also in their careers.

They always feel that they are not good enough.

When they hear others denounce them, they will doubt life even more.

‘If you’re not good at sales, why don’t you try another aspect?’

That was how Director Liu got many actresses to willingly climb into his bed.

1

Seeing that Xiang Yi did not catch what he meant, Director Liu cleared his throat and said, “Miss Xiang, your current popularity is only brought about by the variety show. Without any works, you’ll just be a floating weed who won’t be able to maintain a foothold…”

“Why should floating weed have a foothold?” Xiang Yi asked in puzzlement. “Even salted fish can turn over. Floaters can just follow their hearts. Everyone has the right to choose their own life.”

Director Liu was dumbstruck.

“So you’re willing to be floating weed?!”

“Can’t I be a human?” Xiang Yi said calmly.

Director Liu: “…”

‘Why is this girl so stubborn?’

The make-up artist happened to arrive at this moment.

Seeing Xiang Yi in person, the makeup artist was stunned.

“Mr. Xiang, your skin condition is wonderful, you don’t need any foundation at all.” The makeup artist quickly sucked up to her. “I’ll simply brighten your features with some highlighter…”

Director Liu refused to go. Instead, he came close and said, “I’ll help you straighten your hair, Miss Xiang.”

The makeup artist had a sullen expression but he didn’t dare to voice his displeasure.

Director Zheng was a geek at filming, who could spend an entire day filming the same few scenes and rarely bothered about the daily affairs of the crew. Hence, Director Liu became the only one calling the shots.

Xiang Yi beat Director Liu to picking up the random little metal box that someone had left on the table.

She said calmly, “I have a speciality.”

Director Liu thought about it for a while before cracking a dirty joke with Xiang Yi. “I also have a strength…”

In the next second…

Click!

The small iron box was easily deformed by her singlehanded clenching!

1

She raised her eyebrows and said indifferently, “It’s nothing, I just applied a little more strength.”

“!”

Director Liu felt a sharp pain in a certain part of his body.

1

Given Xiang Yi’s strength, a casual pinch by her would probably cause his member to rupture…

Director Liu swallowed some saliva and frantically looked for an excuse. “Uh, I suddenly remembered that I have a scene to direct later. I’ll go to the set now.”

After he left, the make-up artist couldn’t help but give Xiang Yi a thumbs up.

“Miss Xiang, you’re awesome! You have no idea how many female staff members in the crew are irked by him.. Finally, someone can deal with him. Hahaha!”

chapters.title: Chapter 559 - Impeccable Acting Skills (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 559 - Impeccable Acting Skills (3)

Meanwhile…

A fan who was camping on the set of “The Way”, secretly took a picture of Shi Sui and Xiang Yi coming to film a scene together. After the photo was posted on the Internet, it sparked an uproar online.

On the one hand, more people started to pay attention to this drama series because of Shi Sui’s influence.

On the other hand, Xiang Yi’s business ability was mocked by the crowd too.

—— [Joke of the day: Xiang Yi acting.]

—— [Can she please not act? With that pretty face of hers, can’t she just go for magazine shoots and develop in the fashion industry or something!?!]

—— [To be fair, Shi Sui must be blinded by love and lust. Doesn’t he understand that overly aggressive promotion and forced fame will backfire?]

—— [I thought there was nothing more torturous than Vase Fairy singing. I didn’t expect there to be something even worser, and that is her acting chops. Seriously, every frame of the scenes she acts out are meme material]

…

The public opinion buzzed even more after someone posted a photo of Director Liu entering Xiang Yi’s dressing room.

–[Wow~ I seem to have suddenly understood something]

—— [I suddenly find Xiang Yi really disgusting. Could it be that her persona as “everyone’s favorite” made up and hyped up by others? Why would a rich and pretty girl do such a thing?]

–[So what if she’s rich and pretty? Many children of rich familie are psychopaths. Some seek thrill by stealing while some commit adultery for excitement ~]

…

The advent of the Internet allowed the dissemination of information to reach the fastest speed ever in human civilization. Countless good, bad, meaningful, meaningless, and fragmented information occupies the time of the masses.

Warmth and beautiful things are shared.

Hostility and tyranny collide.

Perhaps, one may be moved to tears by positivity one second, and punch their keyboards forcefully the next.

There may not be a standard mode for the evilness and niceness of human nature. Perhaps, human nature is ever-changing.

Even ordinary people are bound to face criticism, let alone Xiang Yi who was now incredibly famous.

Some people are crazy about her while some condemn her for everything she does.

The controversy seems to never end.

…

The makeup artist was still doing Xiang Yi’s eye makeup when Shi Sui packed up and came over.

The man was clad in a white shirt with wide sleeves, and his long eyebrows extended to his temples. After putting on a wig, he had an extraordinary aura that made him seem like an ethereal gentleman.

Xiang Yi stared at Shi Sui’s reflection in the mirror.

‘How… How is he so good-looking…’

Shi Sui greeted the makeup artist, looked askance at the facial expression of Xiang Yi who was wearing glasses, and asked with a gentle smile, “Do you like it?”

Xiang Yi nodded her little head vigorously, causing the makeup artist to be caught between tears and laughter. “Xiang Yi, don’t nod so vigorously, I almost smudged your eyeshadow…”

“Sorry.” Xiang Yi was a little embarrassed and hurriedly sat back down.

The process of getting makeup done for actresses was quite tedious and braiding their hair was even more time consuming. Shi Sui stayed with Xiang Yi for a while before going outside to get her some coffee when he saw that she was getting sleepy.

He ordered a vanilla latte for Xiang Yi, and when he returned, he heard Director Liu talking to someone over the phone at the end of the hallway. He was laughing happily too.

“Xiang Yi? That girl is very aloof and I wonder who she’s pretending for. I don’t believe that she comes from a wealthy family. Otherwise, why would her family allow her to join the entertainment industry? It’s no different from prostitutes…”

Going to the film set was just an excuse that he gave Xiang Yi. In fact, he had been loitering around and feeling uneasy about not being able to take advantage of Xiang Yi.

“But she’s really gorgeous. She has a thin waist and a perky ass. If I do her from behind, it’ll definitely… Hehehe…”

Whoosh——

His phone was suddenly pulled away.

“Who are you? Is there something wrong with you…” Halfway through cursing, Director Liu looked at Shi Sui, who was in front of him. His expression suddenly stiffened and he stammered. “Shi…Shi Sui…”

chapters.title: Chapter 560 - Impeccable Acting Skills (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 560 - Impeccable Acting Skills (4)

He never imagined that a phone call he made to complain to his friend, would be overheard by someone!

To make matters worse, it was Shi Sui who overheard!

He had interacted with Shi Sui before and he remembered him to be a natural talent at acting, as he almost never had to do multiple takes for a single scene. Even when the director made them do another take, it was mostly the problem of his co-stars.

Moreover, Shi Sui often treats others gently with politeness, and was almost never aggressive.

The young ‘Best Actor’, Shi Sui, looked down and hung up the phone nonchalantly.

Pangs of panic engulfed Director Liu but he pretended to be calm and said, “I was just joking with my friend over the phone just now. Well, as you know, we men just like chatting and joking around… Please don’t be offended!”

Shi Sui said sluggishly, “Well, I do mind it.”

Director Liu chuckled wryly and said, “Hahaha I know you two are close friends so I hereby apologize to you. It’s all my fault for being so cheeky with my words. My bad, my bad!”

“You’re apologizing to the wrong person.”

Director Liu was displeased when he heard that.

He apologized to Shi Sui because of the latter’s status in the industry.

‘Xiang Yi is just a girl. Not only did she not suck up to me, you want me to apologize to her?’

Director Liu subconsciously blurted, “Is that even necessary?”

The moment he said that…

Director Liu’s collar was violently grabbed by someone, after which he felt an irresistible force that flung him to the wall.

“Unnecessary, huh?”

The window was half open, and the summer breeze blew in but Director Liu felt a chill that penetrated his heart.

“Yes, it’s necessary!” Director Liu was so shocked that his legs went limp and his voice became shaky. “Shi Sui, take it easy, this is the third floor!”

The pair of eyes behind the gold-rimmed glasses was hostile and menacing. He was completely indifferent and emotionless.

The man finally removed his gentle facade, revealing his domineering aura that was usually well hidden.

“Go apologize to her.” The man’s voice was clear. “Immediately.”

…

…

Only half of her hair was braided and Director Liu suddenly dashed in, nodded, and bent forward to apologize to her in a humble manner that was a stark contrast to his attitude just now.

“Ms. Xiang, go ahead and get busy. I shall not disturb you anymore.” Director Liu hurriedly came and left.

Xiang Yi was confused.

It was just quite sudden.

The makeup artist was stunned too. “Why… why is there a sudden change in his attitude? Did the sun rise from the West today!?”

Xiang Yi shook her head to indicate that she wasn’t sure.

A while after Director Liu, Shi Sui returned.

“Is the café very far away?” Xiang Yi felt that he had been away for quite a long time.

“I accidentally spilled the cup I got so I went to get another one.”

At that, Xiang Yi immediately asked nervously, “Are you okay? Did you scald yourself?”

Shi Sui concealed his left hand behind his back and said, “It’s nothing.

Xiang Yi was so anxious that she exclaimed in a puerile voice, “Let me see!”

Only then did Shi Sui “reluctantly” show it to her.

His light blue veins could be seen vaguely under his pale and cold skin. There was some redness from the scalding, which was extraordinarily obvious even though the burn wasn’t serious.

The make-up artist thought Xiang Yi would say something like “How could you be so careless?”

However, she sighed and said, “You really are too delicate.”

The makeup artist: ????

“From now on, you’re not allowed to do these tasks. Let me do it!” Xiang Yi said seriously.

Shi Sui laughed and said, “Okay. Thank you, Xiang Yi.”

The make-up artist was immediately confused. ‘Is Shi Sui…such a freeloader?!’

…

The film set.

Shi Sui first shot a few literature scenes which mostly comprised of his character arguing with the male lead. He was good at memorizing lines so he managed to nail the scene in one take.

Immediately afterwards, it was time for him to act alongside Xiang Yi in the same scene…

chapters.title: Chapter 561 - Impeccable Acting Skills (5)
chapters.body:
Chapter 561 - Impeccable Acting Skills (5)

“Is Shi Sui is going to shoot a scene with a female star? Really?”

“I can’t imagine it. Back then, the scene of him making eye contact with Zhong Yi was flirtatious enough. If they were to do an intimate scene this time, it will be even more sensational…”

“It seems to be true, but I heard that the script has been changed and the actress has great financial power. She joined the team with five investment sums!”

“Wow, she’s so incredible.”

“Exactly…”

“Hehe, maybe there are more than five people…”

“…”

There were several staff members whispering and gossiping in the pantry, giggling happily from time to time.

Someone suddenly hollered, “Some people are just so foul-mouthed. How annoying and shameless!”

The few of them were speechless.

A man who was sitting up on a nearby lounge chair, took off the script and jacket covering his face. It turned out that he was Fu Jiayan, who played the main character in “The Way”!

The man had yet to remove his makeup and his hair was as dark as ink. His hair cascaded down his back like a waterfall and his suave eyebrows exuded an ancient charm which didn’t overwhelm his liveliness.

Resting his forehead in his long and slender fingers, Fu Jiayan yawned lazily and said, “Sorry, I was rehearsing my lines. Did I disturb you?”

The faces of the gossipmongers changed slightly. They had at least worked with the crew of “The Way” for a long time and read the script thoroughly. Hence, they knew that the male lead didn’t have such lines in his script.

Fu Jiayan was undoubtedly just scolding them.

However, despite knowing what was going on, they didn’t dare to offend him, the male lead who had a bright future as a star. Hence, they had no choice but to play along with a stiff smile.

“Mr. Fu, your script-memorizing skills are incredible!”

“Mr. Fu, why don’t you go back to the dressing room to rest? This chair is going to hurt your back if you lie on it for a long time!”

“Hahahaha Mr. Fu, what are you talking about? We’re afraid that we will disturb you from rehearsing your lines!”

They few of them made up some excuses and hurriedly slipped away.

Fu Jiayan humphed coldly and remarked scornfully, “Psht! How dare you badmouth Xiang Yi!?!”

After shooting a few scenes with Shi Sui and pulling all-nighters for filming the last few nights, he felt overwhelmed by the pressure and was too lazy to return to the dressing room to rest. Hence, he chose to just lie down here.

He didn’t expect to have overheard those conversations.

Fu Jiayan lowered his head and sent a message to Director Zheng.

Soon, the few staff members who badmouthed Xiang Yi were all “asked to leave” the set.

They looked at each other like they were struck by lightning.

They wondered, ‘Why…why?!’

…

…

The film set.

The venue was set in an ancient building where the interior furniture had basically been removed so it was very spacious and clean.

There was a red veil, which seemed like a faint layer of mist. It was very contrasting and when the fan blew at it, it fluttered gently like flowing water.

Director Zheng was supervising the final adjustment of the lighting. The warm tone of the dim light made the atmosphere even more ambiguous than ever.

His eyes lit up when he saw Shi Sui and Xiang Yi coming over.

The first thing that surprised him was the ancient costume that Xiang Yi was wearing.

He was initially worried that Xiang Yi’s looks may not be suitable for the ancient costumes but he was surprised to see how good she looked. The ancient costume didn’t seem to be conflicting with her clothes either.

The red dress resembled flame that outlined her slender body.

Her eyeliner was slightly elongated and her eyes were beautiful, demonic, but not tacky in any way. It encapsulated her ravishing beauty.

A description suddenly came to Director Zheng’s mind.

A clean demon.

Those words, which should never be put together, seemed to be fused perfectly when used to describe Xiang Yi.

He had a flash of inspiration and he immediately changed his filming plan and made new arrangements for it!

“Xiang Yi, I have a new idea for the scene! How about we let Shi Sui seduce you?!”

chapters.title: Chapter 562 - Impeccable Acting Skills (6)
chapters.body:
Chapter 562 - Impeccable Acting Skills (6)

Xiang Yi was dumbfounded but she nodded accommodatingly. “Okay, that works for me too.”

The staff on set were all dumbfounded.

‘What’s going on? Shouldn’t it be the demoness seducing the Immortal Venerable? How can it be the other way around?’

‘Isn’t this out of character!?!’

Having gotten a flash of inspiration, Director Zheng rattled on, “The plot just has to be logical and self-consistent. What matters is the tension between you two. The demoness has a sultry and enchanting appearance but a pure heart. Meanwhile, the Immortal Venerable has an ascetic appearance and a demonic character. One is mesmerizing without knowing it while the other is trying to curb his urges but ultimately cannot restrain himself…”

The scriptwriter was a young lady wearing black-framed glasses. Hearing the director’s words, she excitedly typed away on the keyboard rapidly.

Ouch!

‘This really gives me the feels! So much feels!’

‘Director Zheng is so good at it! A fragment of her imagination results in countless scenes that will cause a huge sensation!’

Usually, when she was asked to change the script, she would have a deadpan expression on her face and look like she was overwrought. However, today, she eagerly added a few thousand words’ worth of content to the plot out of her own accord!

When Director Zheng and Xiang Yi were almost done discussing, the screenwriter also took the initiative to show Director Zheng the edited plot.

After reading it, Director Zheng was overjoyed. “Yes, yes! This is the feeling and vibe that I’m looking for!

He then exclaimed in puzzlement, “You’re usually so unmotivated to work, why are you so zealous today!?”

The screenwriter was screaming from within. ‘Because I’m a fan of the UntimelyCouple!’

However, she kept a straight face and said, “Because I decided to start afresh and give all my passion for work.”

“…” Director Zheng looked at her in disbelief for a few seconds before focusing on Xiang Yi again.

He was a little worried about Xiang Yi’s acting skills.

If it was just lousy, he could still help her improve by explaining the scenes to her and guide her along.

However, in case it’s hopelessly terrible…

He would probably have to let Shi Sui be the focus of that scene while Xiang Yi just looks pretty.

Shi Sui and Xiang Yi had excellent memory skills as they could remember all their lines after just reading them once, which saved plenty of time.

Hence, Director Zheng raised his hand and waved it. “Let’s do a test run. If there are problems with equipment and lighting or whatever, we can make adjustments again.”

By saying this, he was being nice to Xiang Yi.

Even if the scene turns out badly, Director Zheng can also give her an out.

Meanwhile…

Those few staff members who had been fired and were filled with resentment, had yet to be removed from the work group chat because the admins were too busy to do so. Thus, when they heard someone talking about the impromptu change of the plot by Director Zheng, the few of them took screenshots and uploaded them to the Internet.

When the netizens saw the edited plot, they started to mock again.

—— [Can Vase Fairy pull off such a difficult scene?]

——[Shi Sui has to seduce Xiang Yi? Is she worthy?There must be something wrong with the director’s brain]

——[Doesn’t Shi Sui have an aversion to women? How can he act out that scene? Isn’t this a deliberate attempt to make things difficult for him? How much did Xiang Yi spend on bribing the director?]

…

The netizens were mocking incessantly while shooting began.

The red smoky veil was blown around, and the paper lanterns were warm and charming.

The Immortal Venerable who accidentally ended up in the mystic realm first looked around and saw the female demon napping on the bed. He then drew his saber.

The next instant.

The young demoness, who was ignorant and beautiful but did not know it, opened her eyes.

Her pupils were clean and clear, but there was a beautiful appeal to them.

The little demoness blinked innocently and seemed a little fearful when she saw the longsword in his hand.

Hence…

The cold and ascetic Immortal Venerable kept a straight face but withdrew the sword gently.

chapters.title: Chapter 563 - Impeccable Acting Skills (7)
chapters.body:
Chapter 563 - Impeccable Acting Skills (7)

The little demoness exhaled gently, looking extremely thankful and relieved.

…

At this point, Director Zheng, who was watching the surveillance camera footage, already wanted to clap for joy!

Shi Sui's acting skills were excellent as usual.

However, Xiang Yi's performance was really surprising!

The transition of her emotions and expressions from the confusion she felt at the beginning, to the silliness after the Immortal Venerable retracts his sword, was natural and smooth. There were no traces of it being an act at all!

Acting out a scene in an extremely natural manner was actually a tough feat for a newbie actor.

However, Xiang Yi did it!

Besides, since director Zheng only had very low expectations for Xiang Yi, he was even happier now that Xiang Yi had greatly exceeded his expectations!

…

In the frame, the indifferent Immortal Venerable who was dressed in a white robe with large, flowy sleeves, was making his way to the young demoness, one step at a time.

Finally, he stopped in front of the bed.

"Who are you?" The little demoness asked with her head tilted.

"Do you want to know?" The Immortal Venerable's voice was soft and deepen with a trace of inexplicable hoarseness. "Tell me your name before I let you know."

The young demoness warned warily, "Don't get too close to me, or I'll eat you up!"

The man seemed to laugh a little before asking, "How are you going to do that?"

The young demoness pushed him boldly.

Actually, it was impossible for her to take down an Immortal Venerable with her power.

With a strange gaze in his eyes, the man took two steps back and pulled away from her, slightly widening the distance between the two of them. He subconsciously clenched his fists, so hard that his bones could be seen clearly.

…

Director Zheng thought to himself, 'It's no wonder that he managed to win the Best Actor award thrice. This is such a meticulous scene.'

A cold, heartless and ascetic man is naturally bound to have some internal struggles when they develop romantic feelings for the first time.

However, at the same time, he didn't want to hurt the other party.

'Has Shi Sui's acting skills improved again lately? The way he's restraining his affection and devotion is done so perfectly.'

Director Zheng was secretly shocked, thinking to himself that Shi Sui was probably the most deserving actor among the younger generation of actors, to be nominated for international film awards.

…

The Immortal Venerable's actions made the young demoness mistakenly think that he was actually weak and wimpy.

Noticing the blood on the Immortal Venerable's body, she hesitated for a moment, jumped off the bed, and generously patted the bed. "You can sleep here for a while."

"Huh?"

"You're injured, you need to rest." The young demoness tugged his sleeve, gesturing for him to lie down.

The man seemed reserved and austere as he lied down quietly to get some rest with his eyes closed.

There was a rustling movement coming from beside him. The young demoness was curiously touching his sword.

The flying sword that made countless people in the world of immortal cultivation shudder, was actually wielded playfully by the demoness. She even secretly tied the tassel of the sword into a bow.

The Immortal Venerable frowned slightly without stopping her.

After fiddling with the sword, the young demoness developed an interest in the immortal. She first poked his sleeve with her finger before going on to poke his belt.

Her fair and fine wrist was suddenly clutched by a pair of large hands.

"Stop it." The man's voice was hoarse.

"Oh…" The young demoness wanted to retract her hand, only to find that she couldn't move an inch at all. She whispered, "Cut it out."

In response, the man slowly and gently grazed his coarse fingertips against the bone of her wrist a few times.

…

Director Zheng decided to do a close-up for that scene.

His large hand somehow looked extremely strong when wrapped around her wrist.

The staff on the scene were stunned. On the one hand, it was because of Xiang Yi's acting skills, and on the other hand, it was Shi Sui actually didn't show any adverse reactions when he held Xiang Yi's hand1

Well usually, he would throw up on the spot whenever he had any physical contact with other actresses!

Yet, why was he perfectly fine when holding Xiang Yi's hand?

He even seemed….to be enjoying it!

chapters.title: Chapter 564 - Impeccable Acting Skills (8)
chapters.body:
Chapter 564 - Impeccable Acting Skills (8)

…

Caught off guard by the touch of the hand, the young demoness's ears turned red.

Frightened and panicked, she bit the man's fingertip without blinking.

The man inhaled sharply as if he was holding back something.

After a few moments, he let go and covered his eyebrows to hide his emotions.

The little demoness, however, thought that she had hurt him and thus said carefully, "Uh, I'm a demon, I'm poisonous!"

The Immortal Venerable did not answer.

The little demoness said nervously, "Will I…poison you to death? I've been in the mystic realm for a long, long time, and you're the first person to come in. If I die like this, then wouldn't I become a human again…"

She was distressed and in self-reproach.

Thinking about it, the little demoness made a bold decision.

She climbed on the bed, her movements light and nimble like a cat. Bit by bit, she inched a little closer to the Immortal Venerable.

The Immortal Venerable noticed her little movement and said helplessly, "I won't die that easily…"

He choked and swallowed the rest of his words.

The reason he did that was because the little demoness was lying on his chest and licking her red lip. "I'll give you half of my inner elixir…"

The Immortal Venerable raised his hand to push her, but to no avail.

…

Everyone was immersed in this sweet and exciting scene, when they heard an abrupt sound.

"Cut!"

Everyone seemed to have woken up from a dream.

Despite not knowing what the issue was, many people looked at Xiang Yi gloatingly.

'Please, Shi Sui is the Best Actor titleholder, how could he make a mistake?'

'Of course, it's Xiang Yi's fault!'

To their surprise…

Director Zheng exclaimed loudly, "Shi Sui, what's wrong with you!?! Did you not eat enough food? Push her! Push harder!"

Everyone was dumbfounded.

'What? So the person at fault is Xiang Yi and not Shi Sui?'

Shi Sui coughed and said, "Sorry."

Since he started his career, he had never made such a low-level mistake, but he didn't expect to mess up when it comes to Xiang Yi.

Who can bear to push away such a gentle and cute little bunny?

However, the screenwriter was so excited that she pressed a piece of tissue tightly over his nose, for fear that blood would gush out of his nose.

'What a nice plot!'

'I have to write about this!'

She took out her cell phone, opened the notes app and began to sneakily add some details to the plot.

[Cold and Aloof Immortal Venerable X Gentle Demoness. No world views, no modesty, purely eating meat for the sake of eating meat. Click the cross if you don't like it…]

She typed rapidly and churned out more than a thousand words out in a minute.

…

On the other hand…

The stylist touched up the makeup for the two of them, and started to shoot the second scene.

Both of them were in the right state of so the filming of the scene went very smoothly.

…

The Immortal Venerable mercilessly pushed away the little demoness and said coldly, "Don't come near me."

The little demoness fell to the ground and looked at him in astonishment. "But, you are sleeping in my bed…"

The Immortal Venerable was speechless.

After a few seconds of silence, he said, "Come here."

The young demoness refuted, "No."

"I'm poisoned and about to fall." The Immortal Venerable said in a serious manner, "I need you to help me, can you?"

"Well…" the little demoness moved over slowly. slowly.

Just before she reached the bed, she was pulled onto the bed, and after a moment of spinning, she was below the Immortal Venerable.

"You want to save me?" The man asked hoarsely.

The young demoness nodded in confusion.

He finished speaking.

A pair of large, warm hands covered her eyes.

"Then, be good."

"…"

…

Director Zheng deliberately shot a silhouette of the two intertwined together, which was highly artistic and filled with ambiguous tension.

When he shouted 'cut' the venue was still dead silent.

No one expected that Xiang Yi had such impressive acting skills in addition to her beautiful face!!

chapters.title: Chapter 565 - Giving Oneself To Art
chapters.body:
Chapter 565 - Giving Oneself To Art

The shoot was over.

Shi Sui immediately got up and pulled away from the two. He was extremely gentlemanly.

The staff on set snapped back to their senses, as if they had just woken up from a dream, and proceeded to take care of the remaining matters.

Everyone stole a glance at the two of them. Shi Sui was still wearing the same costume, but his aura had changed completely from an aloof and cold Immortal Venerable to a mild-mannered and warm one.

He was obviously already out of character.

He was truly worthy of winning the 'Best Actor' award. He could get in and out of character extremely quickly.

They reckoned that Xiang Yi would probably be immersed in her role… but…

To their astonishment, Xiang Yi had also slipped out of her character!

The young girl was no longer exuding the aura of a silly and sweet girl or the sultry charm of a demoness. Despite the bright and vibrant makeup, it was still clear that she was Xiang Yi.

She was completely different from the girl in the drama!

She was on par with Shi Sui's speed in getting out of character…

Wow!

'Who was hating on her and saying that her acting skills are poor? Are your eyes used for spurting gas?!'

Director Zheng was a person of excellence and had an extremely critical pursuit of art. He watched the clip again and again before giving an "OK" sign to Shi Sui and Xiang Yi, who were resting.

"It's perfect, we just need to take a few more shots. I want to achieve a beautiful effect."

The two of them were very cooperative and didn't have any objections.

Director Zheng suddenly remembered something and rubbed his hands together. He said sheepishly, "Xiang Yi, now that the script has been changed to this, will your brothers and uncle be upset…"

In the original version, the most intimate scene between the Immortal Venerable and the demoness was just that of the demoness tugging Shi Sui's sleeve. There was barely any physical contact, let alone any seduction by the Immortal Venerable.

However, the screenwriter was getting really excited and immersed in writing, and so was Director Zheng. Hence, they decided to edit the script on impulse.

In hindsight, they regretted it.

Xiang Yi said seriously, "This is all for art. My brothers and uncle will understand."

The little girl looked calm but in reality, the tips of her snowy white ears were slightly red.

If it was another male actor, she would never act out such a scene, but since she was shooting the scene with Shi Sui…

She was rather fond of the idea of openly showing affection for each other.

She thought, 'Maybe it's time to give Shi Sui a proper status?'

After getting her permission, Director Zheng heaved a long sigh of relief while thinking to himself, 'A good-tempered actress like Xiang Yi is so comfortable to work with!'

The few additional scenes to be shot were mostly close-ups of them on the bed.

For example, there were scenes of them holding hands…

Another example was her red dress being intertwined with his white belt…

One of the most beautiful shots was that of the Immortal Venerable raising his hand to cover the eyes of the young demoness as his white robe was completely open, baring his body. His clean and distinct Adam's apple was rolling and slightly flushed. The scene was chaotic and ambiguous.

…

The make-up shoot was over, and the two of them were done with their scenes.

Although it was only a cameo, Director Zheng prepared a small end-of-shoot ceremony for the two.

Fu Jiayan came over to join in the fun. He had prepared gifts for the two of them.

The gift for Xiang Yi was a small self-heating hot pot while Shi Sui's was a black thermos flask.

"Xiang Yi, this hotpot is delicious! However, it might be a bit heaty." Fu Jiayan chuckled with the vibe of a comedian.

Xiang Yi was stunned, but she smiled vibrantly and said, "Thank you."

"Are you really so happy?" Fu Jiayan scratched his head and said, "Sister Yi, it's okay if you don't like it, you can say so. You don't need to pretend."

"No, I'm really happy. Except for my family, I rarely receive gifts from others." Xiang Yi was a little embarrassed.

Fu Jiayan was very surprised, "Huh? How is that possible?!"

chapters.title: Chapter 566 - We Made It Real!
chapters.body:
Chapter 566 - We Made It Real!

"I just… don't have many friends."

Ever since she was a child, she had been busy with her academics and was constantly skipping grades in school while learning medicine from her grandfather and researching cooking.

Whenever she went to a new environment, the people around her would change again before she could adapt.

Apart from Jiang Jiujiu, she had never had any close female friends.

Even if there were girls who approached her, most of them are were friends with her for the sake of getting close to her brothers or uncle.

Over time, Xiang Yi rarely took the initiative to socialize and had gotten used to being immersed in her own world.

Fu Jiayan was surprised. "You're such a gentle person, Xiang Yi. How come you don't have any friends…"

He suddenly paused as he realized something.

It's precisely because of her gentleness that others would treat her casually.

Fu Jiayan was indeed worthy of being an actor. He instantly imagined a dramatic scene for Xiang Yi, and patted her shoulder with melancholy. "Xiang Yi, I will often send you gifts in the future!"

Before he finished, he saw Shi Sui glaring daggers at him, which made him so frightened that he shuddered and quickly cowered.

The reason was that his gaze was too oppressive and scary.

…

Director Zheng flew into a rage when he learned that someone had leaked the matter of the script being edited.

Not only did he want to pursue the legal responsibility of those fired staff, but he also immediately had a video edited and uploaded to the internet.

[@TheWayTVSeries: Today's dose of spoilers have been delivered. Friends, please sign and accept ~ This is the first video of today's shooting of the mental demon mystic realm scene. This interaction is really sweet! PS: Guess who made the mistake of letting the director call 'cut'?

The video turned out to be the scene of the Immortal Venerable and the demoness.

Some netizens started to criticize Xiang Yi before even clicking on the video to play it.

–[Xiang Yi must have been a burden to Shi Sui and dragged him down with her!]

— [I'm so mentally exhausted. A pretty girl like her can do anything. Why must she take up acting?]

–[Isn't Xiang Yi only good at glaring and pouting? It's really hard on Shi Sui to have to act with her…]

However, when the netizens clicked on the video…

Due to the time constraint, the post-production team only simply added a filter to adjust the color. They did not even have time to match the music, not to mention a variety of fancy special effects that were commonly used for dramas about immortal cultivation.

However, that was the reason that others could see how impeccable Shi Sui and Xiang Yi were at memorizing and saying their lines.

From the immortal daddy stepped into the veil, and then to the little female demon was pulled into the arms of the immortal daddy, the plot sweet to bursting, especially the last set of close-ups, can be called the classic work of ancient aesthetics.

The netizens: Awesome!!!!

–[Wtf?? *cactus* *cactus* *cactus*]

–[This is Xiang Yi? Really? Is it not AI?!]

–[I'm amazed, Shi Sui's acting skills could actually be improved further? Xiang Yi's acting skills are really impressive too and her acting was so natural that I didn't really feel she was acting!

In addition to being amazed by Xiang Yi's acting skills, there was more discussion about the plot.

—— [Such a good plot and they're only playing the supporting role? Make them the main cast! Make them the main cast immediately!"

—— [The director and scriptwriter should quickly add more scenes for these two people! I want to watch a hundred episodes of the romance between the Immortal Venerable and the demoness!]

—— [Ahhh the look in the Immortal Venerable's eyes are so lustful and alluring. The little demoness is so sweet and tender, she doesn't even know how alluring she is. What a perfect couple!]

Countless people were amused when they heard Director Zheng saying, "Push her! Push her harder!" at the end of the video. His hollering tickled the funny bone of countless people.

Who would have thought that the one who made the mistake was Shi Sui?!

This day, the number of fans of the UntimelyCouple quickly grew and countless fans started chanting: [They're going to consummate next!! Sisters, we made it real!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 567 - Xiang Yi'S Boyfriend Power (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 567 - Xiang Yi'S Boyfriend Power (1)

The fans of the UntimelyCouple were rejoicing.

However, the directors and actors of the entertainment industry had completely witnessed Xiang Yi's amazing acting skills from the video that lasted a few short minutes!

In addition to being natural, she had a compelling aura that almost overflowed out of the screen.

Her beautiful eyes, her seductive soul, and her smile were all alluring.

Her ancestors had totally blessed her with impeccable acting skills that could help her earn a ton of money!

Many directors remembered Xiang Yi's name.

'This little newcomer has a promising future!'

What really pushed this video to the climax was a story with a similar plot, named "Immortal Venerable", which was written by a popular but low-key writer and was published on a foreign website.

The main characters were exactly the Immortal Venerable and the young demoness in "The Way" but the plot development suddenly advanced rapidly, so much that it would garner a massive amount of curses and foul language from netizens if it were to be broadcast locally.

However, the author was too good at writing, so much that the ambiguity and sweetness between the Immortal Venerable and the young demoness was expressed to the fullest. It was just like a pot of tomato brisket stew where not only the meat is fragrant, the soup is also sweet!

Although there were only a few thousand words to the story, it became famous immediately and some enthusiastic netizens even shared it locally, after which it was secretly circulated.

All of a sudden, the official Weibo of "The Way" was full of discussions:

—— [Full text please! Ahhhh!]

—— [A video with the story would be the best!]

–[What kind of god is the author of Immortal Venerable? He's so good at writing! I must watch the live-action of the scene where she's blindfolded!!!]

…

The drama series, "The Way", also managed to rise to fame because of it and even the male lead, Fu Jiayan, gained quite a large number of fans.

However, the fans of another celebrity started mocking them by saying that Shi Sui and Xiang Yi, who were just the supporting characters, had stolen the limelight of the male lead from Fu Jiayan. They also said that Fu Jiayan must feel terrible.

Fu Jiayan, who happened to see the comments, chose a specific one and retorted.

—— [Isn't it great to chill and enjoy victory when you're gaming and your teammate carries the team?]

Fu Jiayan fans all agreed one after another.

—— [Instead of supporting his teammates, is he supposed to report them instead?]

—— [Some people are just really sour, huh~ Well, we can't help that our silly prince is blessed enough to have gotten such wonderful teammates~]

—— [How great would it be if our dear Silly can get some popularity off of Shi Sui and Xiang Yi! You guys can't get any clout even if you want to!]

The other party's fans: "…"

'No, are you people and your idol all so shameless and lack dignity!?!'

'Not only are you unashamed about having the limelight stolen from you, but you're also so proud of it too, huh??'

'I'm utterly speechless. I've never seen such an artist!'

However, they thought about it carefully again and imagined what would happen if their favorite artiste were to get acquainted with mighty figures like Shi Sui and Xiang Yi…

They got even angrier!

…

On the other hand.

Si Chuanbai and Ah Nan drove over to receive them but they couldn't drive near the set so Xiang Yi and Shi Sui had to walk over to the cars.

The official fan clubs of Fu Jiayan and the leading actress happened to be there to support them, and when they saw the two of them walking out side by side, dozens of people squealed and swarmed towards them.

"Shi Sui is so handsome. Ahhhh!"

"Oh my God, Xiang Yi is really cute. Oh dear, I'm going to turn into her fan…"

"…"

Seeing that the two were about to be surrounded, ten or so bodyguards suddenly appeared from all sides to surround Xiang Yi and Shi Sui.

They were the bodyguards that the brothers of the Xiang family had prepared for their sister.

Someone among the crowd yelled in dissatisfaction, "Forget it if Best Actor Shi refuses to give us an autograph.. What is Xiang Yi putting on airs and being so uncooperative for!?! Let me tell you, celebrities can't be spoiled. Overindulgence is what leads to them trampling on the hearts of us fans!"

chapters.title: Chapter 568 - Xiang Yi'S Boyfriend Power (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 568 - Xiang Yi'S Boyfriend Power (2)

The scene suddenly fell silent.

The crowd looked at each other in dismay, and those who knew each other well exchanged glances to communicate.

Through the chaos of the crowd, that fan managed to see Xiang Yi, only to find that…

She wasn't even looking at them.

A feeling of embarrassment and anger surged within her.

'What did Xiang Yi mean by this?'

'Is she disregarding me!?'

"Xiang Yi, what are you pretending to be noble for? I know you heard it. Look at the other artists from the neighboring country. They're all so cooperative with their fans. Yet, you're behaving so aloofly and giving the cold shoulder to the people who like you?"

The bewildering speech made the atmosphere more awkward.

The bodyguards kept a straight face and cleared the way for Xiang Yi, as if they were clearing the streets for a wealthy heiress to shop.

She was reserved and aloof.

When Xiang Yi passed by the girl…

The girl tried to squeeze through the crowd and rushed to the front of Xiang Yi, but she tripped over someone and was about to fall when a pair of fair and slender hands suddenly clutched her wrist.

Whoosh——

The girl fell into a warm embrace and widened her eyes in disbelief.

Her wrist was being gripped tightly by the young girl in front of her. She took a closer look to see that although she wasn't wearing any makeup, her face was exquisite and flawless, and her hair was emitting a faint, citrusy scent…

She was a little shorter than Xiang Yi and due to inertia, her forehead was pressed against Xiang Yi's slender and thin shoulders…

The girl's face reddened at a speed that was visible to the naked eye.

…

On the other hand…

Time rewound back to two minutes ago.

Ah Nan panicked. He couldn't wait any longer in the car as he kept clamoring about wanting to go receive Xiang Yi.

Si Chuanbai couldn't convince him, so he accompanied him over.

From a distance, Ah Nan saw those fans visiting the class and was a little worried, "There are many people, nothing should go wrong, right…"

The next second, he heard the crowd screaming crazily.

Even after hearing the voice of the screaming fangirls, Ah Nan's body could not help but shake. "Shi Sui is so famous and his fans are so agitated…"

Immediately afterwards, the girl, who was creating trouble, began to speak up.

Ah Nan frowned and said, "I'll go over and take a look."

He was afraid that Xiang Yi could not handle this kind of thing well, lest she gets criticized by others.

The next second, Ah Nan heard the screams that were several times louder than just now. They were so overwhelming that they were almost like human loudspeakers.

"Ahhhhh, Xiang Yi is so suave!"

Ah Nan was confused.

'How long has it been? Must you guys be so fast with the mutiny?!'

…

Among the crowd.

When the girl stood still, Xiang Yi instantly let go of her hand.

"Are you okay?" She asked.

The girl was dumbfounded as she stared straight at Xiang Yi, finding her to be rather pretty and her voice to be rather sweet. For some reason, she smelled really good too…

She blushed and said, "I-I'm fine…"

Xiang Yi slightly nodded and said, "Mind your safety."

"You… Why don't you give us your autograph?" The girl couldn't say anything serious in the face of Xiang Yi's quiet and soft eyes. Her questioning even became coquettish.

Xiang Yi was silent for a few seconds before saying, "I thought you guys were joking." She tilted her head and asked in bewilderment, "Can someone really like me?"

When she first transmigrated back, Xiang Yi saw how the netizens scolded her.

The girl's eyes widened and she asked, "What makes you think that way? Do you have some serious misconceptions about your popularity? Aren't you the most handsome, cute, and charming female artiste in the world?"

The fans were dumbstruck.

'Young lady, there's something wrong with you!'

chapters.title: Chapter 569 - Xiang Yi'S Boyfriend Power (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 569 - Xiang Yi'S Boyfriend Power (3)

The surrounding people were shocked.

'Xiang Yi's temper is so good!'

'That girl was so harsh with her words and yet, she's still so gentle!'

Some people were bold enough to ask for autographs.

"Xiang Yi, can I have an autograph?"

"Xiang Yi, Xiang Yi, can I take a picture with you?"

"Xiang Yi, Xiang Yi, can you record yourself saying something so that I can use it as a wakeup alarm?"

"…"

Xiang Yi responded to all of them nicely and even asked her bodyguards to help carry the things.

The screams were getting louder and louder, interspersed with confessions like "I like you so much," "I love you so much!" and "Xiang Yi, from today onwards, you are my wife!"

Ah Nan asked, "… Why is no one calling out to Shi Sui?"

Si Chuanbai said composedly, "Maybe because he's washed up."

Ah Nan was confused.

'How can you hate on your own artiste like that!?!'

…

While the netizens were still bragging about Xiang Yi's acting skills, a few short videos silently went viral…

The first one was that of Xiang Yi, who was wearing a shirt and a pair of jeans, clutching the wrist of a girl who was about to fall down before pulling her into her arms. It looked somewhat romantic.

The second one was that of Xiang Yi carrying several big bags with ease. Not only did she do it effortlessly but she even gently said things like: "Good morning, Your Highness", "You must be full of vitality today too" and so on.

The third one was a group photo of Xiang Yi and the others while Shi Sui played the role of photographer and helped to take the photo. Xiang Yi noticed that the skirt of the girl next to her was half unzipped, and although she was wearing an undergarment beneath, Xiang Yi immediately blocked her to prevent any possibility of her getting a wardrobe malfunction…

…

The netizens were really confused.

'Is this… really Xiang Yi?'

While "Two Under One Roof" had propelled Xiang Yi to fame, it also resulted in a lot of limitations.

What people saw was just the Xiang Yi at home, and the people they dealt with were just the occasional guests who dropped by for a visit.

However, when they came to set this time, they saw a different side to Xiang Yi.

She was gentle, composed, polite, educated, well-mannered, treats everyone with patience and makes others feel very comfortable.

All of a sudden, all the comments below the video were full of praises for her.

–[Gentleness is really the attribute of a pendant!!!]

–[Oh my God, Xiang Yi would make a really good boyfriend! I repeatedly watched the scene of her grabbing that girl's wrist dozens of times and it still gives me the goosebumps!]

–[What do you call a beautiful sister! From now on, she'll be considered a pretty sister!]

——[I think we can call her Brother Yi too hahhaha]

…

…

People in the entertainment industry could tell something from this.

Xiang Yi's fame was unstoppable and many brands, directors, and video websites had all extended an olive branch to Xiang Yi.

…

In the nanny van.

Ah Nan happily told Xiang Yi about the netizens' praises for her

After listening to a few sentences, Xiang Yi wondered, "Are they really not hired by you?"

"Oh dear, what do you take me for!?!" Ah Nan pursed his lips and exclaimed, "I wouldn't lie to you about such things!"

"I see."

"Hey, why are you reacting so calmly? You're famous now! Isn't this what you've always dreamed of?"

Xiang Yi was calm. "My goal has changed after I got amnesia."

She and Ah Nan were close, but not close enough to tell him that she had transmigrated before.

Hence, her amnesia was a universal excuse that would stop all questions.

"What do you want now?"

"Men.." Xiang Yi face unchanged to say love words, "A dreamboat."

chapters.title: Chapter 570 - Eat And Sleep Well To Be Carefree
chapters.body:
Chapter 570 - Eat And Sleep Well To Be Carefree

"…"

Ah Nan and Si Chuanbai fell silent.

Shi Sui chuckled lightly and said, "Thank you, it's my pleasure."

The way he said 'thank you' was just…really dog-like.

Ah Nan looked like he couldn't bring himself to stare at them while Si Chuanbai professionally took out his tablet to inform Shi Sui about his schedule.

"On Wednesday, you have to attend SN's exhibition event, on Thursday you need to go to Jincheng… If you have no objections, that shall be it."

After coldly informing Shi Sui of the plans, Si Chuanbai looked at Xiang Yi and suddenly changed his tone of voice.

"Xiang Yi, after comprehensive consideration and deliberation between me and Ah Nan, we have temporarily decided to take on three endorsement deals for you."

"One is a local food company that specializes in vermicelli, one is a hand wash liquid company, and the other is a spokesperson contract for the whole product line of Hades' brand, WF. Do you think it's okay? If you have any ideas, feel free to voice them out and I will respect all your opinions."

Shi Sui was speechless too.

'What? Who's your longtime colleague and friend?'

Xiang Yi flipped through the information prepared by Si Chuanbai. The competency of the ace celebrity agent was not to be doubted at all. All three brands that he picked out were perfect in every aspect.

"I can do all of them."

"Then I'll go and approach the brands." Si Chuanbai said gently, "Xiang Yi, don't feel emotionally pressured and just try to get into the right state. Only when you eat and sleep well can you be carefree."

Xiang Yi thanked him warmly.

When it was Shi Sui's turn, Si Chuanbai didn't have much to explain to him. The two of them looked at each other for a few seconds, and he said four words in a strict and serious manner.

"Drink more hot water."

"…" Shi Sui was silent for a few seconds, "You too."

"Oh."

That was the end of their conversation.

Si Chuanbai followed them to the manor to get a free meal before going back to deal with work.

Ah Nan stayed behind, ready to accompany Xiang Yi for all the upcoming commercial shoots.

…

Starry Entertainment.

Qin Wanyan was in the parking lot, looking really haggard despite wearing exquisite makeup.

She had already squandered all the points she had and there was no way she could exchange any more points for a "beauty filter card". Besides, she now had no source of income and even if she desperately tried to maintain a fresh, radiant and energetic image, she would still be pretending after all. There was no way it could replace reality.

After waiting for a long time, she finally saw Xiang Feng who came downstairs.

The man had broad shoulders and long legs, looking very much like a domineering president with his suave gait.

'But…'

When he got closer, Qin Wanyan noticed that he was holding a burger in his hand, which he took a big bite out of after looking around and making sure that there was no one else nearby.

Half the burger was gone. 🙂

Qin Wanyan was speechless.

She desperately tried to convince herself that although this man was too straightforward, insensitive, and silly, he was wealthy and had plenty of resources.

She could force herself to not dislike him.

The system in her mind weakly said, "Host, you're strongly advised against resorting to such a proactive an aggressive method. When dealing with a man like Xiang Feng, you should adopt a slow and steady approach…"

"What do you know!? If I take my time, the cows would have come home before I even win his heart!" Qin Wanyan simply couldn't tolerate living a life without popularity, expensive cars and luxuries. She felt that without a luxurious lifestyle, she would be no different from a loser.

'I'm the Chosen One!'

'The Goddess of Fate will definitely look after me!'

At the thought of this, Qin Wanyan pulled down the strap on one side of her halter dress, went around from the back of the car to Xiang Feng and pretended to sprain her ankle as she fell towards him…

Her appearance caught Xiang Feng off guard, leaving him with enough time to only take a step back. Although he was unscathed, the burger in his hand fell to the ground as hard as Qin Wanyan did.

Qin Wanyan was in so much pain that she wanted to curse her heart out. She looked up at Xiang Feng with tears in her eyes…

However, all he did was hurl vulgarities.

"F**k! Can I still eat it after I f***ing pick up???"

….

chapters.title: Chapter 571 - Garbage Sorting
chapters.body:
Chapter 571 - Garbage Sorting

Qin Wanyan: ???

She looked at Xiang Feng in disbelief, simply suspecting that she heard wrong.

Qin Wanyan had secretly practiced her fall in the mirror at home several times prior to this, from the angle, posture to the degree of openness of her arms, were all very precise.

She also had to make sure she had the beauty of desire.

However, she would never have thought that she would run into an oddball like Xiang Feng after pulling off such a perfect fall!

"Mr. Xiang…" Qin Wanyan called him pitifully. She didn't believe that he wasn't interested in women at all. "I'm sorry for bumping into you, are you okay?"

She leaned forward a little, exposing a large patch of her snowy white skin beneath her collarbone.

Which normal man wouldn't harbor designs on her after seeing such a scene?

However…

Qin Wanyan misjudged how insensitive Xiang Feng was.

He pounded his chest and exclaimed, "My burger has already become like this, how can I be fine? I specially ordered an extra chicken fillet! Yet, it's gone just like that. This is infuriating!"

Qin Wanyan was speechless.

She was choked for a few seconds and then she said tentatively, "Then…I'll buy you another one,okay?"

Xiang Feng looked at her sympathetically and said, "Nah, you're wearing so little. It seems that you probably can't afford to buy any clothes. Your family's financial situation should be very difficult, right?"

"I can still afford to buy a burger." Qin Wanyan saw that Xiang Feng did not have any intention to help her so she had no choice but to climb up by herself. She then picked up the garbage on the ground and walked towards the garbage can next to her while saying, "Mr. Xiang, I am really sorry, I will definitely make up for your…"

Before she could finish her pretentious speech, Xiang Feng yelled at her in exasperation.

"Stop! How can you throw the garbage without sorting it!?!"

Qin Wanyan: ???

She said with a stiff smile, "It shouldn't matter, the janitor will take care of it…"

"How can that do!?! You're so uncultured!"

In order to leave a good impression on him, Qin Wanyan gritted her teeth and picked up the garbage before sorting them out.

Xiang Feng, who was next to her, was still giving her proper guidance.

"Hamburger is wet garbage, which also means that it's perishable garbage, such as waste food materials, leftovers, expired food, melon rinds, kernels, flowers and greenery, herbal medicine residue and other biomass household waste."

"Food packaging boxes are recyclables, which refer to waste paper, waste plastic, waste glass products, waste metal, waste fabric and other household waste that are suitable for being recycled."

Qin Wanyan was speechless.

She couldn't even smile and was barely maintaining her last expression management. "Thank you, Mr. Xiang, you are so good, and you have taught me so much. I have to thank you even more…"

"That's not necessary." Xiang Feng's eyes were full of disgust. "You didn't even know about that? Tsk."

Although he did not say anything serious, his 'tsk' contained too much disdain, which made Qin Wanyan exasperated.

'I'm not going to serve this man anymore!'

'I don't believe I can't complete the task without winning his heart!'

The system's voice sounded in her head when she was about to leave.

"Host, the task to win his heart is a time-limited task. If you fail, there will be a penalty…"

"What punishment?" Qin Wanyan impatiently asked, "Why didn't you say so earlier?"

"Well… I have reminded you about this, you just didn't listen carefully." The system's voice was still feeble and cautious but the words it said were extremely cruel. "If you fail the mission, you will be…eradicated!"

Qin Wanyan suddenly got a chill down her back. "W-what do you mean eradicated?!"

She suddenly remembered that the transmigrator in Ling Ye's body seemed to have also been erased….

chapters.title: Chapter 572 - Kitty Fan (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 572 - Kitty Fan (1)

The system said with an innocent and harmless tone of voice, "Eradication means that you will die, Host."

"What do you say?" Qin Wanyan was suddenly scared. "Is Ling Ye also… Is he also dead?!"

"Sorry, your permissions are insufficient for results to be checked."

"…"

Qin Wanyan asked with great annoyance, "Can I not carry out this task?"

"No, Host."

"Can I not be a transmigrator then?"

"No, Host."

The little system still sounded soft and cute, but Qin Wanyan felt a cold chill of terror. In hindsight, she realized that perhaps, it wasn't a good thing to be chosen as a transmigrator at all…

…

…

The time for the filming of the vermicelli commercial was quickly set, and the filming plan was also sent to Xiang Yi.

The content was very simple. It comprised of a warm and beautiful scene of a person and a cat chilling at home with a bowl of piping hot vermicelli. The little kitten would play with a furry little ball while the owner enjoyed the vermicelli.

…

The day of the shoot.

Shi Sui had lots of event on his agenda too so he went out early in the morning.

Xiang Yi set off at eight in the morning while the clingy Xiao Naofu inched closer.

Last night, Xiao Naofu and the Little Xiji had several fights, and to be precise, Xiao Naofu had unilaterally beat up Little Xiji. In the end, Xiao Naofu accidentally fell and hit its head against the table leg in the corner.

It was clearly its own fault, but the little kitten was so pretentious that it ignored Little Xiji and insisted on leaving with Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi had no choice but to helplessly carry it in a cat bag.

Ah Nan placed a simple cat toilet in the car, causing the space to suddenly become extremely cramped. Thus, he had no choice but to squeeze in the corner, but he was extremely willing to do that.

'Kittens are the cutest creatures in the world! Even if I'm poor and uneducated, I can't let the kitten suffer!'

When Xiao Naofu got into the car, it threw a tantrum and tried to get out of the cat bag. It then daintily lied in Xiang Yi's arms while she stroked her fingertips gently to caress the back of its neck.

Ah Nan took out his cell phone and took a picture of this scene, which he then posted to Weibo.

Xiang Yi basically wouldn't update her Weibo much and would occasionally only post something about her daily life. Hence, many of her Spicy Rabbits followed her.

As soon as the photo was posted, the number of likes exceeded a thousand.

–[Pretty sister plus little kitten, double blast!]

— [I stroke and rub ten of such kitties until they go bald each day!]

–[Xiao Naofu, you lecherous cat! How dare you put your paw on Xiang Yi's chest!]

–[@ShiSui, here's a cat that made you a cuckold]

…

The Spicy Rabbits were swooning over the cat when some discordant comments suddenly appeared below the Weibo post.

— [What does Xiang Yi mean by that? Is she trying to establish dominance?]

—— [Of all times, why does she have to show off her cat now? Who would believe that she's not doing it on purpose?]

–[Our Pudding is a celebrity cat! It's not something this kind of bastard garden cat can compare to, okay?]

…

Ah Nan was confused as he read through the comments. "What's wrong with these people? Have they got nothing better to do?"

Xiang Yi turned her head to look at her and asked with a frown, "What's the name of that cat in the shooting plan?"

Ah Nan froze, and then made a video call to Si Chuanbai.

When the call was connected, Si Chuanbai seemed to be in a meeting. Clad in a suit and sitting upright, he raised an eyebrow at him. "Yes?"

"Mr. Si, am I disturbing you…" Ah Nan felt diffident for a while. Lately, Si Chuanbai would reply almost immediately whenever he looked for him, so much that he seemed to be very free. That was why he bravely decided to give him a video call. "Are you busy now? I'll call you again later."

Si Chuanbai said, "No, you're not interrupting me.. Shoot."

chapters.title: Chapter 573 - Kitty Fan (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 573 - Kitty Fan (2)

Ah Nan briefly described what happened and Si Chuanbai, who was on the other end of the video call, looked cold and austere as if he was a discipline master who was supervising the elementary school students.

In fact…

In the meeting room, the crowd stared dumbfounded at Si Chuanbai, the man who was usually known as a ruthless work machine. However, at this moment, he was leaning back in his chair, twirling the black and gold pen between his fingers. He was obviously relaxed and sluggish.

The crowd looked at each other.

'Something is going on! There must be something happening!'

'Could it be that Mr. Si is on a video call with his girlfriend!?!'

"… Mr. Si, that's probably it." Ah Nan swallowed his saliva and hung his head low in frustration. "Go ahead and scold me."

Si Chuanbai asked, "What would I scold you for?"

"Yes, it was me who posted that picture, that's why I caused Pudding's fans to scold Xiang Yi…"

Pudding was an internet-famous cat influencer whose owner was named Ah Dai. The Weibo accounts and TikTok accounts managed by Ah Dai had all garnered several million followers each.

"If you want to condemn someone, you will find a hundred reasons to do so." Si Chuanbai pressed his eyebrows and said, "Don't bother, I'll handle it."

Ah Nan asked, "Huh? Just this?"

He thought it was a big deal, but Si Chuanbai actually reacted so nonchalantly.

Si Chuanbai raised his eyebrows and asked, "Are you questioning my competency?"

The man's tone was quite ambiguous.

Ah Nan, who had colorful hair, began to panic. He shook his head clumsily and stammered, "No… No, Mr. Si is very, very powerful. You're incredibly competent and capable in every aspect!"

A certain sentence of his pleased Si Chuanbai, a man who was as cold as a glacier that never melts. He smiled and said, "Okay, hand your phone to Xiang Yi for a moment."

"Okay, okay."

Ah Nan handed the phone to Xiang Yi.

The joy in the depths of Si Chuanbai's eyes faded and he returned to his cool and merciless work mode. "Some time ago, I happened to study some examples of successful online influencers. Ah Dai is one of those typical cases where her success is not accidental, but inevitable."

"Firstly, she has a team behind her to create a persona and image for her. Secondly, she's very persistent in hyping herself up and chasing clout. Thirdly, she repeatedly takes advantage of her fans. After a pause, he said, "I suspect that her cat, is no longer the same cat she used to have."

Xiang Yi squinted.

"But you don't have to take any of this to heart. Xiang Yi, I do have a lot of controversial material about her and her cat. If she wants to continue to provoke us, we won't be nice or merciful to her."

"I'll have to trouble you then, Mr. Si."

"You're welcome."

After hanging up the phone, Xiang Yi proceeded to search for a picture of Pudding.

It was a white ragdoll cat with fluffy fur, slightly folded ears, and different-colored pupils, one blue and one yellow. They totally resembled beautiful jewels.

Other influencer cats were chubby but Pudding was exceptionally fat, almost beyond the human perception of cats.

There were many cute cats, but their adorable qualities were mostly similar.

A unique cat like Pudding was really one of its kind so it managed to garner lots of fans.

Xiang Yi's frown grew deeper and deeper.

…

…

The location of the commercial shoot was set at a bed-and-breakfast on the outskirts of Nancheng.

The main colors in the room were almost only brown and pure white, which was especially clean and fresh.

When Xiang Yi arrived, Ah De had already been waiting for a long time and was holding a selfie stick while doing a livestream.

"…. Thank you for the rainbow rain from Aunt Pudding. Pudding finally gets to eat some canned food today!" Ah Dai was skillfully interacting with her fans, and when she saw Xiang Yi, she immediately said exaggeratedly, "Wow! Xiang Yi is here!"

chapters.title: Chapter 574 - Kitty Fan (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 574 - Kitty Fan (3)

Ah Dai ran towards Xiang Yi and exclaimed, "How are you, Xiang Yi? I'm Ah Dai!"

Xiang Yi nodded to greet her. When she smelled the faint scent of catnip on Ah Dai's body, she said politely but distantly, "Hello."

"This is my cat, it's called Pudding. It will be working with you today, please take good care of it, Xiang Yi~" Ah Dai pointed to the cat bag on the ground, which wasn't far from her.

There was a cartoon print on the cat bag, which was round and adorable.

However, the cat bag was a little too small for Pudding and there were air holes only on the front and the bottom.

Its face was pressed against the transparent frame on the front of the cat bag and it was panting heavily with great difficulty. It's large face was stiff and it resembled a pancake, looking stupid and silly.

Ah Dai's fans in the livestream were screaming. [Pudding is so cute!!]

Xiang Yi frowned slightly and politely reminded, "Why don't you let Pudding go out to get some fresh air? You can also let it get familiar with the set."

Ah Dai said in a livelier manner, "It's okay, it's okay, Pudding is very obedient!"

Xiang Yi was speechless.

She was… very confused.

'Can't Ah Dai see that Pudding is not breathing well anymore?'

"Meow meow meow!" In the nanny van, Xiao Naofu leaped off the seat and skipped around to play.

Seeing Xiang Yi's cat behaving so wildly, there was a trace of disdain in Ah Dai's eyes.

'How can such a tacky cat be worthy of being compared to mine?'

However, Ah Dai began to panic when she saw the comments in the livestream.

——[Wow! That little kitten is so cute!]

——[This is what macho men should be looking at!]

— [Oooooo it's so small. It seems to be smaller than my palm]

——[I feel that mischievous cats are pretty good too. Pudding is just too obedient that I find it a little uninteresting sometimes~]

…

'How did this happen!?!'

Ah Dai was a little flustered, for fear that Xiao Naofu would steal Pudding's limelight. Hence, she started interacting with her fans. "I'll let Pudding out then. Pudding can great its dearest Daddies, Mommies, Uncles, and Aunts later!"

As soon as they heard that Pudding was going to come out, the comments and rewards given to Ah Dai in the livestream increased again.

Ah Dai unzipped her cat bag, and the ragdoll cat leaped out eagerly, gasping hard for fresh air.

"Pudding, come let Mommy hug you." Ah Dai picked up Pudding with one hand, after which the ragdoll cat skillfully hugged her neck, However, it had a good camera sense and began meowing at the screen.

Ah Dai's was very slender, thus making Pudding look incredibly fat in comparison. It looked just like a piglet, which was a jarring visual contrast.

"Ah, it's time for Pudding to lose some weight." Ah Dai pretended to lament, "If you continue staying so fat, you will become a kitty that no one likes."

When the fans heard this, they started teasing one after another.

——[What kitty? It's clearly a little pig!]

——[Please don't. I think Pudding won't look good if it loses weight]

——[Why should it lose weight!?! It's not fat! It's just fluffy!]

…

Ah Dai was about to say something else when the director who was shooting today's commercial, came over and asked Xiang Yi to familiarize herself with Pudding.

"Pudding, be good." Ah De instructed. As if it were human, the ragdoll cat reluctantly tugged on her clothes. It rubbed its head against her like a coquettish and clingy cat.

When Ah De handed Pudding over to Xiang Yi for her to hold it, the originally docile ragdoll cat became brutal all of a sudden.

"Ow!" Pudding struggled and refused to be held by Xiang Yi.

Ah Dai took Pudding back again, "Ah, Pudding has a different personality from your cat. It's a little introverted, let me coax it first."

Her words had successfully provoked the fans.

chapters.title: Chapter 575 - Kitty Fan (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 575 - Kitty Fan (4)

The fans felt that Xiang Yi's manager was deliberated shedding attention on Xiang Yi. Otherwise, why would he have uploaded a photo of Xiang Yi petting her cat?

They felt that she was out to make her tacky cat replace Pudding!

—— [Hey, didn't Xiang Yi try to set a pet-whisperer persona for herself previously? Now that has fallen through, huh?]

–[Yeah, yeah, I still remember when the photos of her feeding the deer were released and everyone called her a forest fairy. That was hilarious]

—— [If a well-behaved cat like Pudding doesn't like Xiang Yi, shouldn't she reflect on herself? Animals are spiritual and know who are genuinely nice to them!]

…

The fans thought that they were speaking out in the name of righteousness, completely unaware that they had been used.

…

Pudding clung to Ah Dai for a long time, but the director eventually couldn't stand it any longer and thus, gave her a reminder. Ah Dai then started apologizing profusely before putting Pudding down onto the ground.

Pudding circled around her feet and stopped only when the scent of catnip faded after a while.

Xiang Yi squatted down and gently rubbed the back of Pudding's neck and jaw. She then fed it some dried small fish, which was Xiao Naofu's favorite snack.

She brought a small packet of it, which contained about five or six dried fishes.

Pudding first sniffed it before widening its round pupils. It then began eating happily.

Xiao Naofu scurried over when it smelled the snack, after which it took two from Xiang Yi and nestled next to Pudding to eat.

The contrast between the two cats was just too stark.

Pudding's tail was thicker than Xiao Naofu's head.

Ah Dai's livestream was still on and she wanted to take advantage of the valuable opportunity today to attract attention and drive up traffic.

To his surprise, a fan raised a question.

——[It feels like the size of this tacky cat is rather normal. When Pudding was its age, it seemed to be several times its size. Is it really appropriate for it to be so fat…]

Ah Dai hurriedly found a way to change the subject. She blinked innocently and asked, "Xiang Yi, what brand of dried small fish are you feeding it? The packaging is such a minimalist style! I've never seen it before!"

She was very tactful with her words, making everyone's imagination run wild.

'Minimalist… Doesn't hat just mean that the packaging is simple?'

—— [How can the cat be fed junk food? The tacky cat can be fed casually, but Pudding is a pure breed!]

——[She's already a celebrity, must she be so stingy? If she wants to buy some cat snacks, she should buy those manufactured by big brands!]

–[Even Ah Dai has never seen that brand before… Oh my God, what is this woman feeding Pudding!?]

…

Just as the fans were making the situation seem even more dramatic, the director came over to join in the fun and threw a small dried fish at Pudding.

He was also a cat lover and usually had a stern look on his face but whenever he saw cats, he would grin gleefully to the point that he would squint.

"Xiang Yi, this little dried fish of yours is from LP, right? Tsk, how luxurious!"

Ah Dai giggled in her heart and laughed awkwardly. "LP? Is it very expensive?"

The director exclaimed, "It's a luxury brand in the world of cat snacks! Previously, it was the exclusive brand used by the royal families of Russia and Switzerland but now, a limited number is available to the public. One small packet of dried fish coasts as much as dozens of kilograms of jerky manufactured by D brand!"

D brand was a relatively popular local cat food brand, which sold extremely expensive dried cat food, jerky, and canned cat food!

Ah Dai was confused.

And so were the fans.

'What the hell?!'

'This is such an ordinary dried fish but it turns out to be from a luxurious brand!?!'

Some people refused to believe it and thus went to check the price, only to slip into a trance immediately.

'What kind of family does Xiang Yi come from? They can actually…. afford such an expensive dried fish?!'

chapters.title: Chapter 576 - Kitty Fan (5)
chapters.body:
Chapter 576 - Kitty Fan (5)

Not only were the fans watching Ah Dai's livestream confused, Ah Dai was dumbfounded too!

They felt that Xiang Yi shouldn't squander her money like this even though she was rich!

A cat is only a beast after all, how can it eat better food than a human?!

"Hah, Xiang Yi is really generous…" Ah Dai ruffled her hair, giving off a fragrant scent. "But I think we should set a limit for everything. Too much of a good thing may be bad…"

Xiang Yi said indifferently, "I wasn't the one who bought it but my uncle. He dotes on Xiao Naofu very much. I usually make Xiao Naofu's food on my own."

Ah Dai was speechless.

Everyone knew that Xiang Feng was a domineering CEO so he would of course, buy whatever he wanted.

He didn't need anyone to make comments about his spending habits.

Ah Dai was furious and sour. In fact, she even imagined how wonderful life would be if she was Xiang Feng's niece.

The director, however, became interested. "Xiang Yi, what kind of food do you usually make yourself? Is it troublesome to do it yourself?"

Xiang Yi shared her recipes with him.

"Just some poached salmon, chicken breast, prawns and so on. I occasionally cook some other meat. Kittens are better off eating meat as a staple food."

"I do mix some steamed pumpkin, carrots, and sweet potatoes and feed them a little. These foods are rich in fibre."

"If possible, you can also feed your cat some cabbage and lettuce and so on, which will provide additional vitamins and minerals. However, these vegetables have to be cooked."

"That's so elaborate." The director lamented. Feeling that he could not leave Ah Dai out, he asked, "Ah Dai you must be very knowledgeable too after raising cats for such a long time, right?"

Ah Dai said pitifully, "Xiang Yi is really great, but I'm usually too busy to cook, so I usually feed Pudding cat food and canned cat food. I'm so envious of Xiang Yi for being able to take care of Xiao Naofu so well!"

The director was quite smart too and he could vaguely tell the hidden meaning behind Ah Dai's compliment. He laughed and said tactfully, "Great,great! Okay then, let's all get ready to start shooting!"

The set had been set up in advance. It was in a warm and pleasant living room with clear windows. There was also warm orange light to create the right amount of warmth for the atmosphere.

Xiang Yi changed into a clean outfit comprising of a purple knit shirt and a long white skirt. She looked extremely gentle.

Having been bribed with the dried fish, Pudding was now very friendly to Xiang Yi and it would even take the initiative to rub itself against Xiang Yi coquettishly.

'But…'
