When the staff brought out the cooked vermicelli, the rich aroma somehow stimulated Pudding, and it started scratching Xiang Yi!

*Tearing*

The sleeve of the knitted shirt that Xiang Yi had just changed into was torn by Pudding's claws, which even hooked onto the thread!

The director repeatedly reminded Ah Dai to switch off the livestream, but Ah Dai pretended not to hear, and cheekily continued the stream.

Seeing this scene, Ah Dai exclaimed, "Xiang Yi, don't scare Pudding!"

Xiang Yi was confused.

'Since when did I scare it?'

Pudding's fans, however, did not care about this and began cursing at Xiang Yi.

–[What's wrong with this woman? Why is she scaring Pudding?!]

–[Xiang Yi, do you think Pudding is your tacky cat? It's very delicate and it's not a cat you can treat with negligence!]

——[Pudding obviously hates Xiang Yi. Can't they just replace Xiang Yi with someone else? Otherwise, I'm not going to watch this ad! And I will never order this brand's vermicelli either!]

Ah Dai blinked and started behaving as pretentiously as she could.

"Sorry, sorry, sorry, it's Pudding's fault. Why don't we replace Pudding…"

The director pondered for a moment before exclaiming, "Sure!"

Ah Dai was stunned. "Huh?"

The director happily made up his mind. He declared, "Let's replace Pudding with Xiao Naofu!"

Ah Dai: ????????

….

chapters.title: Chapter 577 - Kitty Fan (6)
chapters.body:
Chapter 577 - Kitty Fan (6)

Ah Dai was dumbfounded.

'No, why is this different from what I thought?'

'Shouldn't the director be coaxing and supporting Pudding? Why does he want to replace Pudding with that tacky cat, Xiao Naofu!?!'

Pudding's fans were also dumbfounded. In the past, Ah Dai had also done livestreams of Pudding while promoting the products that were sent to her for the endorsement deals that Pudding got. All the brands that they had partnered with, all pampered Pudding. Hence, she was confused as to why Pudding was receiving such treatment today.

The fans were furious.

——[Replace Pudding? Why???]

——[Does that tacky cat deserve it!? This is clearly rigged! This is biasness in broad daylight!]

——[The director is so biased towards Xiang Yi just because she's popular now. That's why he decided to use her cat. He's so stupid, he doesn't know how strong our purchasing power is!]

…

A brand of cat food that Pudding once endorsed had achieved a miracle of a ten-second sell-out, thanks to Pudding's fans. Hence, the fans had been really proud of it and had been talking about it all the time.

…

Ah Dai finally came back to her senses and asked with her eyes wide open, "Director, how can you replace Pudding just like that…"

The director said bluntly, "With all due respect, the state that Pudding is now isn't suitable for it to star in a commercial. Instead of watching it being in so much pain, why don't you hurry up and take it to the vet? The most urgent task at hand is to improve Pudding's physical state."

"Pudding can do it!" Ah Dai panicked. "It really can!"

The director waved his hand and frantically went to communicate with Xiao Naofu.

He tried to give a few simple commands to Xiao Naofu, only to realize that Xiao Naofu was very human-like!

However it wasn't compliant but rebellious.

In particular, when he laid on the ground and teased Xiao Naofu, the little kitten would also show a look of disgust and contempt…

Not only was it cute, but it was also particularly comical.

Ah Dai stood helplessly in place.

Pudding was meowing on the ground in misery but Ah Dai was extremely frustrated and wanted to go up and kick it.

Xiang Yi took a deep glance at the selfie stick in her hand. Even though Pudding was in great agony, Ah Dai still didn't stop the livestream.

Thus, Xiang Yi bent forward and rubbed the back of Pudding's neck comfortingly.

The fans watching the livestream yelled: [Let go of Pudding! What are you trying to do to her!!!]

Pudding is so uncomfortable and she's justSome sensible fans also typed:

[What's wrong with Ah Dai… Pudding is in so much pain and she's still just standing there? On the contrary, Xiang Yi seems to be very concerned about Pudding…]

Ah Dai was feeling really vexed and when she saw that comment, she casually blocked the person who posted it.

That fan was confused when she realized that she got kicked out of the livestream.

'What??? What's wrong with making that comment?'

Xiang Yi sat on the ground and waited for Pudding to mellow down before rubbing its belly.

There was a sudden change.

Pudding retched twice and began projectile-vomiting.

That scene broke the hearts of countless fans!

–[Oh nooooo, what's wrong with our Pudding?]

——[I want to throw a kerosene can at Xiang Yi! What vicious thing did she do to Pudding?]

—— [Pudding's condition wasn't that bad just now! It's all Xiang Yi's fault! It's her touch that caused Pudding to react like this!!]

…

Ah Dai took advantage of the situation and accused Xiang Yi right away. "Xiang Yi, what did you do to Pudding… Pudding was fine, why did it suddenly throw up?"

She was really good at shifting the blame to others!

Xiang Yi glanced at her and said indifferently, "You should be asking yourself that question.]

"You clearly caused Pudding to vomit because you touched it. Did you use some massage technique to cause it to react that way? I know you're proficient in medical techniques but the anatomy and acupuncture points of humans are different from that of cats. You can't massage it blindly…."

chapters.title: Chapter 578 - Kitty Fan (7)
chapters.body:
Chapter 578 - Kitty Fan (7)

Ah Dai accused Xiang Yi immediately.

When the fans heard this, they naturally became even angrier, so much that they lost their sanity and instantly felt that it was Xiang Yi's fault!

Xiang Yi = the culprit who triggered Pudding's illness!

However, while that unreasonable logic worked for other people, it didn't work on Xiang Yi.

The young girl made Ah Dai break down with just one sentence.

"When was the last time Pudding had a medical checkup?"

"…" Ah Dai's pupils contained a fleeting trace of panic. Fortunately for her, her phone camera was facing Xiang Yi at this time so the livestream viewers could only see Xiang Yi's face, but not her expression. She lied and pretended to be calm. "Not long ago. What's the matter?"

"What was the diagnosis?" Xiang Yi asked calmly.

Some fans felt uncomfortable and peeved because they felt that Xiang Yi was being too aggressive and overbearing.

— [What does the Xiangha mean? Checking the account?]

——[Does her family live by the sea? She's so nosy!]

–[Pudding is doing fine! It doesn't need her mindless worrying!]

There were also fans who realized that something was wrong.

——[But to be fair, Pudding's health is really worrying…]

–[Why is Pudding still vomiting hairballs? This can't be because Xiang Yi touched it!]

–[If you don't know, just ask. Why is Ah Dai still arguing with Xiang Yi here? Take Pudding to the doctor!]

…

Ah Dai stammered and couldn't answer.

She hadn't never taken Pudding for a medical checkup, so she obviously didn't know what the diagnosis was?

Xiang Yi said, "It's throwing up a lot of hairballs. Did you feed it enough hairball removal formula?"

Ah Dai exclaimed, "O-Of course I did!"

"How often?"

"Frequently." Her tone of voice was obviously diffident.

"Or, do you feed it cat grass or something?"

Ah Dai was speechless again.

Fans were shocked to hear that.

'Seriously? As a pet blogger, in other words, someone who makes money off of her pets, she doesn't even do such basic care for her cat?'

The commercial director frowned when he heard that.

Xiang Yi continued, "Do you keep track of the amount of food that Pudding eats? How many grams of cat food plus canned snacks?"

Ah Dai obviously could not answer because she usually fed Pudding casually.

Besides, in order to maintain Pudding's special body shape, which was different from other cat influencers, she often fed Pudding a ton of food.

If Pudding refused to eat, she would also add catnip, or cat snacks mixed with enticing ingredients, so that Pudding would eat as much as possible.

Ah Dai was ashamed and furious. "Xiang Yi, is that the point? Don't you avoid the point! It's because of you that Pudding…"

"Are you an elementary school student?"

The more composed Xiang Yi was, the more Ah Dai seemed like a shrew.

"Will Pudding grow hairballs in its stomach just because I touched it a little? Will Pudding spit out so much undigested meat just because I touched it a little? Will it be unable to resist the frequent catnip stimulation just because I touched it a little?"

Ah Nan was dumbfounded. "Xiang Yi, what hairball, undigested meat and catnip stimulation are you talking about…"

"Simply put, it's because Pudding ate far more food than it's digestive system could handle on its own, and it did not get fed enough supplements for hairball removal. As for catnip stimulation, you have to ask Miss Ah Dai why she needs to carry catnip sachets with her."

Having her secret exposed, Ah Dai snapped "What are you talking about?! I didn't do those things at all!!"

Xiang Yi said indifferently, "My sense of smell is fine. If your conscience is clear, do you dare to take out the stuff in the pocket of your jacket?"

chapters.title: Chapter 579 - Kitty Fan (8)
chapters.body:
Chapter 579 - Kitty Fan (8)

"…"

It was dead silent.

Ah Dai was trembling lightly, completely unable to believe that the secret she had been keeping, was exposed!

Pudding was very clingy towards her but it wasn't clingy enough by her standards, thus failing to achieve the effect she wanted.

Hence, Ah Dai always wore catnip sachets on her body.

Catnip was as fatally addictive to cats as poppies are to people.

With the stimulation of catnip, Pudding would kiss and rub itself against her at a level that was beyond the normal affection of cats. It would also give the visual illusion that Pudding was extremely clingy to her.

She argued, "I…How could I possibly wear such stuff? I have no idea what you're talking about!"

However, the explanation sounded extremely weak.

The audience of the live stream were already in an uproar at this point!

—— [Catnip sachets?]

——[Xiang Yi must be slandering Ah Dai. How could Ah Dai possibly bring such a thing!?!]

—— [So what if she did? Catnip is found in many cat toys!]

——[No, no, no. Putting aside the dosage, catnip itself is as toxic as drugs! For example, the dosage of catnip in cat toys may be equivalent to a mouthful of coke but if her catnip sachet contains an equivalent amount of catnip as half a liter of white wine… That's really scary!]

——[Ah Dai, if you have a clear conscience, pull out the things in your jacket and show it to everyone! You'd be able to put Xiang Yi to shame! I believe that the innocent will be able to prove themselves without excessive arguing!]

…

Seeing the comments on the live stream, Ah Dai was stunned.

She suddenly regretted starting a livestream!

If she hadn't, she would have been able to cover it up.

However, the fans were all now clamoring to see what was in her pockets.

She would be letting the cat out of the bag if she took it out!

"Why should I cooperate with you when you're accusing me?" Ah Dai hugged Pudding to hide her guilty conscience. "Forget it, I can avoid you even if I can't afford to mess with you! I'll leave now! I don't need you to compensate for the breach of contract either! I don't want to interfere with your shooting!"

She sounded righteous and upright, as if Xiang Yi and the rest were forcing her to leave.

To her surprise, the director put her to shame.

"Miss Ah Dai, we've never signed an official cooperation contract, so why would there be a compensation for a breach of contract? Please be mindful of your words."

Having worked in the entertainment industry for years, they were all experienced and smart. The director wouldn't have bothered to stand up for anyone during usual times.

However, he was really fond of cats and he couldn't help but feel uncomfortable when he saw that.

Moreover, with his status, he didn't care about a small fry like Ah Dai. It was normal for him to throw a tantrum every now and then.

As soon as he said that, there was yet another uproar.

Ah Dai had been bragging about Pudding's endorsements for a long time and recently, Pudding's fees had increased greatly!

It turned out that Pudding's commercial shoot this time was not a collaboration with a certain brand. What was it considered then? Free labor?

Little did they know that Ah Dai had deliberately offered to let Pudding star in the ad for free, in order to use this commercial to increase Pudding's rates, so as to make more money.

Ah Dai seemed a little embarrassed and she tried to give herself an out by pretending to be pitiful. "If you insist on saying so, there's nothing I can do…"

The director did not buy it at all. He sneered and said, "Bring out the contract then. I've never liked it when others beat around the bush with me."

"…"

There had never signed a contract before so how can there be a contract?

While Ah Dai was completely speechless, Pudding was stimulated by the catnip that she was carrying on her body and thus reached its paws out maniacally to scratch the pocket of Ah Dai's jacket, causing it to tear loudly!

A sachet sudden fell out….

chapters.title: Chapter 580 - Kitty Fan (9)
chapters.body:
Chapter 580 - Kitty Fan (9)

Boom…

As if there was a thunderbolt that exploded with a bang in her head, Ah Dai tried to pick it up, but the director beat her to it and picked up the catnip sachet.

Ah Dai screamed at the top of her lungs, "Give it back to me! That's my stuff!"

The director put it on the tip of his nose and sniffed it, and his expression changed dramatically.

The smell of catnip was too strong.

It was no wonder Pudding had such an intense reaction!

"You ought to use such stuff sparingly," Xiang Yi said with composure. "It will affect the health of cats."

Ah Dai turned a deaf ear to her words and snatched the catnip sachet from the director's hand. During the process, she accidentally tripped over Pudding and cursed under her breath while completely ignoring Pudding, which was still wailing softly with uneasiness.

Realizing what was going on, she hurriedly scampered over to tap her phone screen and switch off the livestream.

However, it was too late.

Although the camera was shaking, the audience had all seen what happened just now.

'How dare Ah Dai treat Pudding like this?'

The angry audience flooded Ah Dai's livestream with comments.

——[Friendly reminder, respond as soon as possible 🙂 ]

——[What's up with the catnip sachet and the feeding? What's up with the medical checkup!?!]

—— [Pudding is sick and yet you still kicked it. I really suspect if you really treat Pudding as your family!]

…

Seeing that the matter had been exposed, Ah Dai was so disoriented that her first reaction was to run away!

Not only did she flee, she didn't even take Pudding with her!

She subconsciously felt that her cat was worthless once it was sick, so she simply chose to abandon it!

Her behavior left all the staff present speechless.

"How can she abandon her pet just like that? What kind of a person is she…"

"I used to send Pudding lots of e-gifts in the past because I thought that once Ah Dai had the money, she'd be able to take care of Pudding well but I didn't expect… Well…"

Everyone was discussing incessantly.

The director also felt uncomfortable but work is more important so he instructed someone to send Pudding to the nearest veterinary clinic before continuing with the shoot.

The plot script for the commercial was simple. Xiang Yi would pet her cat at home for a while before picking up a pack of vermicelli to cook it in the open kitchen.

The kitten played with a plush ball next to her, creating a warm atmosphere that shows that although she lived alone, she had to have a good meal.

The shooting went even better than the director expected!

The food Xiang Yi cooked like a beautiful work of art. Even the half-cooked vermicelli seemed like part of a lavish banquet in her hands.

The act of her cooking the vermicelli, draining the water, adding ingredients… every frame was incredibly beautiful.

What's even more surprising was Xiao Naofu's behavior!

The little kitten was soft, chubby, and full of vitality. The best part is that it had excellent camera sense!

The director was incredibly excited as he turned into a cat fan behind the screen, wishing to rub Xiao Naofu until it turned bald!!

…

On the Internet.

Many of the resourceful netizens found out the origin of the catnip.

The catnip sachets were not handmade by Ah Dai but rather, they were ready made products.

The netizens searched for the product on a pet medical supplies website, which clearly showed that the catnip content of the sachet was extremely high. It was mainly used for the treatment of anorexia and other conditions in cats, and the recommended usage was to allow the cats to sniff it for a while at a time.

Since it was relatively unpopular, the sales volume of this product was not high and few people were aware of it.

However, Ah Dai was not using it for treatment, but for daily wear! She even exposed Pudding to it for several hours a day!!

The angry fans instantly started cursing!

Live streams are a double-edged sword. While they can bring about benefits, they can also ruthlessly backfire!

Some people even raised a new doubt.

According to Ah Dai's method of raising, is the current Pudding really still the same Pudding as before?

chapters.title: Chapter 581 - Kitty Fan (10)
chapters.body:
Chapter 581 - Kitty Fan (10)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

At first, only a small group of people were questioning it but one fan came up with concrete evidence!

She was initially a die-hard fan of Pudding, and since Ah Dai kicked her out of the livestream today, she was so furious that she turned into a hater.

She looked through the old photos of Pudding on her phone and wanted to delete them all, but…

She found something fishy instead.

There were subtle differences in the color of Pudding’s fur now, compared to the past.

Even its fans failed to notice it, let alone ordinary people.

If not for her amazing observation skills and the careful comparison that she made, she probably wouldn’t have noticed it!

After thinking about Pudding’s body size and the questions Xiang Yi asked Ah Dai during the livestream today, she uploaded something onto Weibo.

[@PuddingsGreatAunt: Without further ado, let me put up a set of comparison photos. Let’s all spot the difference together. If you know, you know.]

She posted a photo of the “former Pudding” and the current Pudding.

@PuddingsGreatAunt also had many fans, most of whom were related to Pudding. When they saw the pictures, they were first surprised and doubtful, after which they were furious!

They discovered that the cats in the photos looked very similar, they were two different cats!

…

By the time Ah Dai logged on to Weibo again, she was greeted, not with budding greetings from her fans, but with overwhelming scoldings!

—— [Where did the old Pudding go?]

–[People like you don’t deserve to be influencers!]

—— [You’re even more disgusting than trash, I’m going to throw up!]

…

Ah Dai’s vision turned black and she switched off her phone in a bid not to read the comments.

Even so, those hurtful words kept flashing in her mind…

Garbage garbage garbage…

Go to hell… Go to hell… Go to hell…

Ah Dai grabbed her hair and screamed at the top of her lungs.

…

…

What really banished Ah Dai into the abyss was the staff of the snail powder commercial shoot, who secretly revealed that Ah Dai had abandoned Pudding on set because it was sick, and had no intention of coming back to bring it away.

The cat-loving fans were so enraged that they began to curse their hearts out at Ah Dai!

So far, Ah Dai’s reputation was completely ruined!

…

…

At the set of the commercial shoot.

The snowy white rice noodles were soft, smooth and springy while the soup was delicious and unique. The soup was made with river snail, sand ginger, star anise and other seasonings. It was then cooked with sour bamboo shoots, peanuts, fungus, and a few pieces of fried beancurd. Finally, it was garnished with a handful of small green vegetable with rice vinegar and chili oil drizzled over it before it was served…

The scene made countless netizens salivate in front of their screens.

The little white cat jumped on the table, sat down, and looked at the gentle and clean young girl in front of it with its head tilted.

Xiang Yi picked up some vermicelli with her chopsticks and unlike some mukbang streamers who ate in extremely unsightly and uncouth fashion, her table manners were much more refined. However, she didn’t have the sophisticated etiquette of socialites and noble ladies, but it was somehow very influential.

Watching her eat is a form of pleasure.

Their stomachs started to rumble!

That was the case for all the staff on the set!

Xiang Yi was very dedicated to her work as she finished the entire bowl of vermicelli. Her cherry lips were stained red by the chilli and there were tears above her well-defined pupils. She raised her head to face the camera with a faint smile on her face, which was absolutely beautiful.

Xiao Naofu disliked the food at first because of its strong odor but it tolerated the discomfort and tried its best to cooperate with her for the sake of helping her make money!

However, as it stared at the vermicelli, it began to feel a strong urge to taste it. Thus, it dove headfirst into the small amount of soup base left in Xiang Yi’s bowl…

The bowl was too large for Xiao Naofu so it plunged into the bowl with a “poof”, staining its fur with the soup. It meowed with a dumbfounded expression.

The slip-up caused the director to holler with masculinity, “So cute!!!!! Ahhhhhh!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 582 - A Cat With An Internet Addiction
chapters.body:
Chapter 582 - A Cat With An Internet Addiction

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The staff on set desperately tried to contain their laughter but it was so difficult to do so that they started pinching their thighs.

Xiang Yi couldn’t help but burst into laughter. She hurriedly fished Xiao Naofu out of the bowl and wiped it down with a towel.

“Just make do for now, I’ll give you a bath when we get home.” After all, Xiao Naofu was very particular about cleanliness.

Xiao Naofu secretly licked its fleshy paw, which was stained with some of the snail vermicelli soup base.

After experiencing the unique and amazing taste, the kitten’s icy blue pupils instantly dilated to the roundest it could be “Meow!”

—— [How can there be food in this world that tastes better than the prawns cooked by the silly woman!?!]

Xiao Naofu’s reaction was entirely captured by the camera.

The director not only exclaimed about how cute Xiao Naofu was, he was even exhilarated!

Shooting pets is a very difficult thing because all kinds of unexpected events can happen during the process.

For example, some issues may arise when the pet does not cooperate or the pet’s acting skills are not appropriate.

Xiao Naofu’s reaction was purely an accident.

It was an accidental surprise!

The shooting Xiang Yi’s part of the commercial was completed and the director asked his subordinates to take a few more make-up shots of Xiao Naofu. After supervising the editing of the raw material, he sent an edited draft to the brand representative.

In just a few minutes.

The brand sponsor sent him a message on WeChat: [I’m going to increase the endorsement fees! I want to pay more!!!]

…

“What did he say? They want to increase the endorsement fees?” Xiang Yi asked, looking at Ah Nan blankly after removing her makeup.

Ah Nan smiled, “Yes! I’ve heard of brand sponsors deducting endorsement fees but those who offer more money are really rare! They even doubled the fees!”

“Why?”

“The additional money is for Xiao Naofu! The brand sponsor is extremely satisfied with its performance!”

“… ”

Xiang Yi first froze in shock before bursting into laughter. She pinched Xiao Naofu’s face and said, “Wow, Xiao Naofu is so awesome. It can even make money through its own labor.”

Xiao Naofu’s eyes lit up when it heard that it was getting paid too!

While Ah Nan left to drive the car over, it rubbed its head against Xiang Yi coquettishly while making gestures with its paw to ask for the electronic tablet.

Xiang Yi said helplessly, “You’ve been spending too much time on the electronic tablet lately. You’re simply addicted to the Internet!”

Xiao Naofu meowed.

“Okay, I’ll let you play with it when we go home.”

Xiao Naofu was overjoyed. It wanted to shop online! It wanted to order a massive cart of snail vermicelli!

From now on, it decided that it would eat that delicious food every day! It would have two packs for every meal!

If he couldn’t finish it all, he would at most… let Little Xiji have a few mouthfuls of it.

Xiao Naofu, who had struck it rich in a day, decided not to sleep at all. It squatted majestically in the back of the car, like a schoolboy who accidentally struck the lottery and was on his way home.

…

In the manor.

Xiao Naofu was the first to jump out of the car. He then scurried over to find the tablet, after which he clawed at the screen skilfully to unlock the tablet. When it started searching for vermicelli online in a bid to place an order, it suddenly realized something…

It was extremely quiet at home.

It looked around and waited for a long time, but still did not see that familiar figure.

‘Where is that tacky dog?!’

‘Did that demon Shi Sui take it away and stew it to make dog meat hot pot?!’

The young ‘Best Actor’ was reading a book in front of the floor-to-ceiling window with his long legs slightly bent. He was focused and charming.

Xiao Naofu leaped over and bit the leg of its trousers.

“Stop it.” The man’s voice was low and alluring.

“Meow meow meow!!!”

—— [You dog, give Little Xiji back to me!!]

Seemingly having noticed the unusual behavior of Xiao Naofu, Shi Sui looked down at its soiled fur.

He frowned and picked up Xiao Naofu with his defined and bony fingers. He then gently rubbed the back of its neck twice and remarked, “How did you make such a mess of yourself? You’re so ugly and stinky, no one would want to stew you.”

Xiao Naofu: …. Screw you, let’s die together, you dog of a man!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 583 - Xiao Naofu Rises To Fame (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 583 - Xiao Naofu Rises To Fame (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The white and tender little kitten was so angry that it wanted to bite someone but Shi Sui pinched the back of its neck easily!

It was hanging in midair and could only flail its paws about helplessly.

“Meow meow meow…”

The more it thought about it, the more aggrieved Xiao Naofu felt. Its eyes were watery and tears started streaming down its face.

It cried, leaving Shi Sui slightly stunned for a few seconds. However, he soon let go and gently stroked the kitten’s head.

“Why are you crying? Little kitty.”

Xiao Naofu pretended to vomit but it still couldn’t stop crying.

Shi Sui sighed, finding it quite a bit of a headache.

Apart from Xiang Yi, he had never been good at coaxing other crying creatures.

After thinking about it, the man threatened with a sullen expression on his face, “If you cry again, I’ll kiss you.”

Those words worked better than any other form of comfort. Xiao Naofu tried hard to hold back its tears, only to look more aggrieved.

It looked in the direction of the cat villa, which Little Xiji would usually sleep in. However, it was now fluffy and empty.

It was as if Little Xiji had never existed.

Shi Sui followed its line of sight and understood what it meant.

“Xiang Feng has quite a bit of free time on his hands lately so he brought Little Xiji home to raise it. Don’t worry, although he’s not very reliable, he’s still very doting on pets like cats and dogs.”

Speaking of which, he was the one who picked up Xiao Naofu and adopted it.

‘So that tacky dog wasn’t caught and eaten up.’

Xiao Naofu heaved a sigh of relief.

It felt humiliated and wiped his tears with its furry paws, after which it jumped off the couch and went back to playing with its tablet.

However, the games that it usually liked to play, the eating livestreams that it usually liked to watch, and the shopping platform that it usually liked to browse, suddenly became meaningless at this moment.

Xiao Naofu played for a while before laying on the ground and wagging its tail in boredom.

‘If only that tacky dog is here. It’d lick my fur, act as a cushion, and even give its favorite canned beef to me.’

Some time later.

“Xiao Naofu, it’s time to take a shower.”

Xiang Yi’s gentle voice sounded and Xiao Naofu was still listless and lacking energy.

“Meow.”

“Huh?” Xiang Yi pushed the tablet to it. Since Xiao Naofu learned to type, the communication between the two of them had become much easier.

Xiao Naofu pressed its paw against the screen and asked, “When will Little Xiji come back?”

“I…I’m not sure. How about I send you to stay at Uncle Xiang Feng’s house for a few days?”

Xiao Naofu shook its head sternly and typed: “If I leave, who will protect you, you silly woman?”

Seeing this, Xiang Yi’s heart warmed up. She hugged Xiao Naofu and kissed it several times.

“Xiao Naofu, why are you so cute?”

“Meowww!”

——[Don’t use ‘cute’ to describe me. You have to use ‘ferocious’, okay?]

Xiang Yi was amused by its serious appearance and lowered her head to text Xiang Feng.

…

In the evening.

The livestream started.

Squatting on the steps, Xiao Naofu despondently looked at the sunset.

If one were to look out of the window in the living room, they would only be able to see a round head and a pair of droopy ears. Xiao Naofu looked completely listless.

Li Jianyu specifically found a camera angle to film it, and the fans of the livestream were all gushing over its cuteness.

—— [From today onwards, I’m a fan of cats!]

—— [Such a cute little kitty, I’ll finish one in a bite!]

—— [Cute and brainless. Happy but senseless]

…

Until…

“Woof! Woof, woof, woof!!!”

Upon hearing that familiar barking sound, Xiao Naofu’s ears shot up and became taut.

At the main entrance, Little Xiji was running towards it as if it was spreading his wings.

In the next second, Xiao Naofu jumped down the steps and ran towards Little Xiji.
